## 2.9.1 PM Counter Framework

### 2.9.1.0-2 PM Counter Framework PM Counter Search in NIDD (ID: 11192143)

**2.9.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11192148`)

PM Counter Framework
The following instructions explain a simple method to search for PM counters in NIDD which is recommended to unexperienced NIDD users.

* Open NIDD in <https://nidd-prod1.ext.net.nokia.com/NIDD/.>
* Select PM -> Counters Search.
* Set Domain = SingleOAM.
* Set Product = MRBTS PM/FM.
* Set the PI ID or the NetAct Name to the value of the wanted counter (E.g.: PI ID = M55303C13001 or NetAct Name = PUCCH\_FORMAT1\_DTX).
* Set the Category of the wanted counter:

Category = Customer, if the counter has only the character 'C' in its PI ID (E.g.: PI ID = M55303C13001).

Category = R&D, if the counter has the characters 'CRD' in its PI ID (E.g.: PI ID = M55308CRD52001).

Note: If the Category is set to the wrong value, then the counter will not be found.

* Click the 'Search' button.
* NIDD displays a table of all available versions of the counter.
* Select the version which corresponds to the release or package of the wanted counter.

See <https://confluence.ext.net.nokia.com/display/EE/Counter+Search> for the PM counter search function.

Search results can be exported to an Excel sheet.

---

### 2.9.1.0-3 PM Counter Framework General (ID: 11192153)

**2.9.1.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11192157`)

PM Counter Framework
For PM object management see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6250\_replaced([11230118](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kysJ-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For more information on 5G MOCs see 5G\_UP\_2718\_replaced([11391877](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ufbP0_vkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Supported PM counter types are given in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6251\_replaced([11230125](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kysJ-vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For PM counter collection mechanism see 5G\_UP\_2730\_replaced([11392078](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ufb27fvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For more information on PM counters see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6246\_replaced([11230091](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kysJ9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Measurement types are listed in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6253\_replaced([11230164](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kysxAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

PM counters for 5G L2-PS are given in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For throughput calculations L2-RT shall report time in ms. The time can be accumulated by the L2 application Process on Linux NRT core.

Sample time for Min and Max counters must be aligned with bank switch time [5G\_UP\_2733\_replaced([11392097](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ufcd8vvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_2735\_replaced([11392113](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ufcd9PvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))], i.e. multiple of the bank switch time. In L2-RT sample time can also be shorter than the bank switch time (multiple of ms). For more information and propagation of Min/Max counters see 5G\_UP\_2744\_replaced([11392177](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ufcd_PvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

### 2.9.1.0-4 PM Counter Framework PM Counter management in 5G-L2-PS (ID: 11192164)

**2.9.1.0-4.0-8**  (ID: `12585828`)

PM Counter Framework
See 5G\_L2\_1515\_replaced([11192153](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for general information.

5G-L2-PS shall report PM counters with the following aggregation levels, for URI construction see 5G\_L2\_IF\_1490\_replaced([10994810](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2XHW5_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **Granularity** | **Aggregation Level** | **Network Profile** | **First Feature** |
| NRCELL | NRBTS,NRCELL | PLMN-MRBTS-NRBTS-NRCELL | 5GC000425-Y |
| NRCELL per PLMN | NRBTS,NRCELL,MNC | PLMN-MRBTS-NRBTS-NRCELL, MCC-MNC | CB006665-A |
| NRCELL per PMQAP | NRBTS,NRCELL,NRPMQAP | PLMN-MRBTS-NRBTS-NRCELL, NRPMQAP | CB008200-F |
| NRCELL per SSBPM | NRBTS,NRCELL,SSBPM | PLMN-MRBTS-NRBTS-NRCELL, SSBPM | CB013684-D |
| [CNI-136855-A]NRCELL per NRRESOURCEGROUP[End CNI-136855-A] | NRBTS,NRCELL, NRRESOURCEGROUP | PLMN-MRBTS-NRBTS-NRCELL, NRRESOURCEGROUP | CB008746-A |
| NRCELLGRP | NRBTS,NRCELLGRP | PLMN-MRBTS-NRBTS-NRCELLGRP | CB012734-J |

5G-L2-PS shall report PM counters per NRCELL.

* 5G-L2-PS shall create a NRCELL object for PM counters at reception of a PsCell\_CellSetupReq.

**- 5G-L2-PS shall remove the NRCELL related PM object instance at reception of a PsCell\_CellDeleteReq.**

**- 5G-L2-PS shall also remove the NRCELL related PM object instances (if any) at reception of a PsCell\_CellGroupDeleteReq.**

5G-L2-PS shall report NRCELL level per PLMN PM counters.

**- 5G-L2-PS shall create a new NRCELL per PLMN object instance for collection of related PM counters per each new plmnId associated with a cell at reception of a PsCell\_CellSetupReq.**

* There can be up to six PLMNs per cell.
* PLMN(s) to NRCELL assignment change in the runtime is not currently supported without cell deletion and addition in CP.

5G-L2-PS shall report NRCELL level per PMQAP PM counters.

**- 5G-L2-PS shall create a new NRCELL per PMQAP object instance for collection of related PM counters per each new pmqapId associated with a cell at reception of a PsCell\_CellSetupReq.**

* There can be up to profiles per cell defined in pmqapProfileList see: 5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* PMQAP profile(s) to NRCELL assignment change in the runtime is not currently supported without cell deletion and addition in L2-PS.

5G-L2-PS shall report NRCELL level per SSB PM counters.

**- 5G-L2-PS shall create a new NRCELL per SSB object instance for collection of related PM counters per each new ssbId associated with a cell at reception of a PsCell\_CellSetupReq.**

* There can be up to 64 SSB beams per cell.
* SSB(s) to NRCELL assignment change in the runtime is not currently supported without cell deletion and addition in CP.

[CNI-136855-A]  
5G-L2-PS shall report NRRESOURCEGROUP level PM counters per NR cell utilization per NR resource group.

* 5G-L2-PS shall create the NRRESOURCEGROUP object instance for PM counters:  
      - if the NRRESOURCEGROUP object does not exist for impacted cell and  
      - after reception of PsCell\_CellSetupReq, or PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq, which contains configuration of resource group for impacted cell.
* 5G-L2-PS shall delete the NRRESOURCEGROUP object instance (if any) at reception of PsCell\_ CellReconfigurationReq which does not contain configuration of resource group or at reception of PsCell\_CellDeleteReq.  
  **[End CNI-136855-A]**

5G-L2-PS shall report NRCELLGRP level PM counters per NRCELLGRP for FR2.

* 5G-L2-PS shall create the NRCELLGRP object instance for PM counters at reception of the first PsCell\_CellSetupReq within cell group.

**- 5G-L2-PS shall delete the NRCELLGRP object instance for PM counters at reception of the PsCell\_CellGroupDeleteReq.**

---

### 2.9.1.0-5 PM Counter Framework Nullable and non-nullable PM counters (ID: 11192212)

**2.9.1.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11192218`)

PM Counter Framework
5G-L2-PS shall support nullable and non-nullable PM counters.

When the measured value in the given reporting period is 0:

* If a PM counter is declared as non-nullable, 5G-L2-PS shall update PM Agent with 0 by the end of the reporting period.
* If a PM counter is declared as nullable, 5G-L2-PS shall refrain from updating PM Agent by the end of the reporting period.

Each PM counter is non-nullable, unless specified otherwise.

---

### 2.9.3.1 Pre-Scheduler

#### 2.9.3.1.0-1 Pre-Scheduler Accumulated number of slots with DL data buffered (ID: 11192249)

**2.9.3.1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11192258`)

Pre-Scheduler
[CNI-127108]

Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: ACC\_CELL\_DL\_DRB\_DATA

PI ID: M55308C26001

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

[END CNI-127108]

[BEFORE CNI-127108]

For 'NR Cell Utilization' class, according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), PM Counter M55308C26001 (ACC\_CELL\_DL\_DRB\_DATA) shall be incremented by 1 each slot for which there is DL data buffered in any DRB of any UE which is not in DRX sleep state. Buffered DL SRB data is not counted.

[END CNI-127108]

The following implementation is proposed:

With actual (bit) array for all attached UEs indicating data present in DL buffer defined at 5G\_L2\_346\_replaced([11197493](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29MWGfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) referred as 'DL buffer array' and DRX (sleep) status (bit) array for all attached UEs defined at 5G\_L2\_2980\_replaced([11197568](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29NkMfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) referred as 'DRX array':

· ACC\_CELL\_DL\_DRB\_DATA is incremented by 1 each slot when there is any UE for which entry in DL buffer array is set to TRUE and corresponding entry in DRX array is set to FALSE.

Note: Since for already existing 'NR Cell Utilization' class DL DRB buffer counters sampling period can be configured to a value greater than one slot, counter ACC\_CELL\_DL\_DRB\_DATA can operate only on actual (bit) array (instead of sampling period (bit) array). Therefore, ACC\_CELL\_DL\_DRB\_DATA is to be updated in Pre-Scheduler – before current DL DRB buffers could be cleared during the scheduling process.

[CNI-127108]

Increment value: No additional details as compared to NIDD.

[END CNI-127108]

#### 2.9.3.1.0-2 Pre-Scheduler Accumulated number of UEs put under DTX optimized scheduling (ID: 11192263)

**2.9.3.1.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11192275`)

Pre-Scheduler
[CNI-127108]

Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: ACC\_UE\_MICRO\_DTX\_OPTIMIZED

PI ID: M55308C33000

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time: No additional details as compared to NIDD.

[END CNI-127108]

[BEFORE CNI-127108]

For 'NR Cell Utilization' class, according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), PM counter M55308C33000 ( ACC\_UE\_MICRO\_DTX\_OPTIMIZED), this counter is updated each time a UE is assigned to dtxOptimizedDrbTraffic request class.

[END CNI-127108]

[CNI-127108]

Increment value:

[END CNI-127108]

The following implementation is proposed:

ACC\_UE\_MICRO\_DTX\_OPTIMIZED is incremented by 1 when one UE is assigned to the dtxOptimizedDrbTraffic request class as specified in 5G\_L2\_5933\_replaced([11148047](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24O9k_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note: This counter should be specified in 5G\_L2\_346\_replaced([11197493](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29MWGfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and is only adjacent to 5G\_L2\_5907\_replaced([11192279](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28i12_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for the reader convenience.

#### 2.9.3.1.0-3 Pre-Scheduler Accumulated number of UEs which reached the end of the DTX retention before the arrival of new data (ID: 11192279)

**2.9.3.1.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11192298`)

Pre-Scheduler
[CNI-127108]

Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: ACC\_UE\_MICRO\_DTX\_NO\_DATA\_BUNDLING

PI ID: M55308C33001

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time: No additional details as compared to NIDD.

[END CNI-127108]

[BEFORE CNI-127108]

For 'NR Cell Utilization' class, according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), PM counter M55308C33001 (ACC\_UE\_MICRO\_DTX\_NO\_DATA\_BUNDLING), this counter indicates the accumulated number of UEs in the request class dtxOptimizedDrbTraffic which reached the end of the retention delay (dtxMaxRetentionDelay) before the arrival of new data

[END CNI-127108]

[CNI-127108]

Increment value:

[END CNI-127108]

The following implementation is proposed:

At expiration of the timer dtxMaxRetentionDelay, ACC\_UE\_MICRO\_DTX\_NO\_DATA\_BUNDLING is incremented by 1 if no BSR with indication " bit 1 of dataAdded = 1 " in LoCtrl\_DlBufferStatusInd has been received during dtxMaxRetentionDelay.

### 2.9.3.2 TD Scheduler

#### 2.9.3.2.0-1 TD Scheduler Basic DL Slot Type (ID: 11192308)

**2.9.3.2.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `11192332`)

TD Scheduler
[BEFORE CNI-127108]

Different DL slot types shall be counted after slot type selection step (5G\_UP\_ALG\_21946\_replaced([11173650](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuVOZ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for PM Counter class 'NR Cell Utilization' assessment as requested in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)):

Dependent on the type of DL slot the following PM Counters shall be incremented by +1 :

* M55308C00003: SSB\_SLOTS = SSB\_SLOTS +1, in case of SS Burst Slot in DL
* M55308C00001: DL\_DATA\_SLOTS = DL\_DATA\_SLOTS +1, in case of DL Data Slot

On an FDD carrier shared with LTE, 5G-L2-PS shall increment M55308C00001 (DL\_DATA\_SLOTS) only in DL slots which are available for 5G according to the current DL sharing pattern rrmFddCurrentDlShareBitmap, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2304\_replaced([11171916](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuIaFvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). DL slots reserved for LTE shall be skipped.

If isAnyPrbPoolingActive (ref to 5G\_L2\_IF\_14\_replaced([10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) set to 'true' and slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed set to 'false', no allocation could be allowed in particular slots due to allocation of signals on other cells, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2382\_replaced([11115299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7609\_replaced([11115123](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX5PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for FDD, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2375\_replaced([11115218](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpr-_PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11299\_replaced([11116720](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp6ocfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for TDD.

For FDD, If slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed is 'true',no allocation could be allowed in particular slots due to allocation of signals on other cells, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2382\_replaced([11115299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19557\_replaced([11115143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The way M55308C00001 counts has been modified.

M55332C02001 is impacted to exclude noPDSCH slot, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2382\_replaced([11115299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[CNI-127108]

From CNI-127108 please rely on 5G\_L2\_20818\_replaced([11192347](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28jc5_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) SS Burst slots and 5G\_L2\_20816\_replaced([11192338](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28jc5fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) Sum of DL Data slots

[END CNI-127108]

#### 2.9.3.2.0-2 TD Scheduler Sum of DL Data slots (ID: 11192338)

**2.9.3.2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11192341`)

TD Scheduler
Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: DL\_DATA\_SLOTS

PI ID: M55308C00003

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

On an FDD carrier shared with LTE, 5G-L2-PS shall increment M55308C00001 (DL\_DATA\_SLOTS) only in DL slots which are available for 5G according to the current DL sharing pattern rrmFddCurrentDlShareBitmap, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2304\_replaced([11171916](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuIaFvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). DL slots reserved for LTE shall be skipped.

If isAnyPrbPoolingActive (ref to 5G\_L2\_IF\_14\_replaced([10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) set to 'true' and slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed set to 'false', then

No allocation could be allowed in particular slots due to allocation of signals on other cells

- For FDD, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2382\_replaced([11115299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7609\_replaced([11115123](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX5PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

- For TDD see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2375\_replaced([11115218](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpr-_PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11299\_replaced([11116720](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp6ocfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

The way M55308C00001 counts has been modified.

M55332C02001 is impacted to exclude noPDSCH slot, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2382\_replaced([11115299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

End If

If slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed is 'true' then

No allocation could be allowed in particular slots due to allocation of signals on other cells, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2382\_replaced([11115299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19557\_replaced([11115143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The way M55308C00001 counts has been modified.

M55332C02001 is impacted to exclude noPDSCH slot, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2382\_replaced([11115299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

End If

Increment value: 1

#### 2.9.3.2.0-4 TD Scheduler Rejected scheduling attempts on PDSCH (ID: 11192356)

**2.9.3.2.0-4.0-3**  (ID: `11192372`)

TD Scheduler
[BEFORE CNI-127108]

For 'NR Cell Utilization's class, below R&D PM Counters are defined:

1. PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PUCCH (M55308CRD54001)

For each DL slot, in TD/FD scheduling, if a UE been rejected for scheduling due to PUCCH not available (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4297\_replaced([11177362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuu3A_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then the counter PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PUCCH shall be update:

PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PUCCH = PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PUCCH + 1

1. PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PDCCH (M55308CRD54002)

For each DL slot, in TD/FD scheduling, if a UE been rejected for scheduling due to PDCCH not available (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4297\_replaced([11177362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuu3A_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then the counter PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PDCCH shall be update:

PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PDCCH = PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PDCCH + 1

1. PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PRB (M55308CRD54003)

For each DL slot, in TD/FD scheduling, if a UE been rejected for scheduling due to needed PRB resource not available (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4297\_replaced([11177362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuu3A_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then the counter PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PRB shall be update:

PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PRB = PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PRB + 1

1. PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_EIRP\_CONS (M55308CRD54004)

For each DL slot, in TD/FD scheduling, if a UE been rejected for scheduling due to EIRP constriant check fail (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4297\_replaced([11177362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuu3A_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then the counter PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_EIRP\_CONS shall be update:

PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_EIRP\_CONS = PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_EIRP\_CONS + 1

1. PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_UE\_OVERHEAT (M55308CRD54005)

For each DL slot, in TD/FD scheduling, if a UE been rejected for scheduling due to overheating (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4297\_replaced([11177362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuu3A_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then the counter PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_UE\_OVERHEAT shall be update:

PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_UE\_OVERHEAT = PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_UE\_OVERHEAT + 1

1. PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_OTHER (M55308CRD54006)

For each DL slot, in TD/FD scheduling, if a UE been rejected for scheduling and the reject reason is not belong to any of above counters (PUCCH, PDCCH, PRB, EIRP, OVERHEAT), then this UE shall be included into  counter PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_OTHER:

PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_OTHER = PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_OTHER + 1

Note, the recommended method to update this counter is, to update this counter at the end of DL slot as follows:

PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_OTHER = PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_OTHER

* ( PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT
* numOfScheduledUeDl
* PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PUCCH
* PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PDCCH
* PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PRB
* PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_EIRP\_CONS
* PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_UE\_OVERHEAT )

where,

* numOfScheduledUeDl, is the number of UE that successful scheduled in this slot.
* PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT (M55308CRD54007)

For each DL slot, the counter  PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT is updated as:

PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT =  PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT +  numOfUeTdDl

where,

* numOfUeTd, is the number of UE in DL CS1 list that enter TD, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4209\_replaced([11174627](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kudxRfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* PDSCH\_BLOCK\_F1 (M55308C00047)

For each DL slot, in TD/FD scheduling, if a UE been rejected for scheduling due to PUCCH F1 not available (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4297\_replaced([11177362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuu3A_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter:

PDSCH\_BLOCK\_F1 += 1

1. PDSCH\_BLOCK\_F3 (M55308C00048)

For each DL slot, in TD/FD scheduling, if a UE been rejected for scheduling due to PUCCH F3 not available (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4297\_replaced([11177362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuu3A_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter:

PDSCH\_BLOCK\_F3 += 1

Note: for sherpa trace, ue blocking cause are recorded during PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PUCCH and PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PDCCH updating.

CP2 requirement(s):

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2

[CNI-127108]

From CNI-127108 please rely on

5G\_L2\_20827\_replaced([11192377](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28jc7_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) Rejected allocation attempts on PDSCH due to PUCCH not available

5G\_L2\_20829\_replaced([11192387](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28jc8fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) Rejected allocation attempts on PDSCH due to PDCCH not available

5G\_L2\_20831\_replaced([11192398](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28kD8fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) Rejected allocation attempts on PDSCH due to PRB not available

5G\_L2\_20833\_replaced([11192406](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28kD8_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) Rejected allocation attempts on PDSCH due to EIRP constraint

5G\_L2\_20835\_replaced([11192417](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28kD9fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) Rejected allocation attempts on PDSCH due to UE overheating

5G\_L2\_20837\_replaced([11192426](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28kD9_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) Rejected allocation attempts on PDSCH due to other reasons

5G\_L2\_20841\_replaced([11192437](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28kD-fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) Total number of allocation attempts on PDSCH

5G\_L2\_20843\_replaced([11192444](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28kD-_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) Number of PDSCH allocations blocked due to lack of F1 HARQ A/N resources

5G\_L2\_20845\_replaced([11192454](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28kD_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) Number of PDSCH allocations blocked due to lack of F3 HARQ A/N resources

[END CNI-127108]

#### 2.9.3.2.0-10 TD Scheduler Rejected allocation attempts on PDSCH due to other reasons (ID: 11192426)

**2.9.3.2.0-10.0-2**  (ID: `12637973`)

TD Scheduler
**Measurement: NR Cell Utilization**

[Before CB012724-C]

**NetAct name: PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_OTHER**

**PI ID: M55308CRD54006**

[CB012724-C]

**NetAct name: PDSCH\_ALLOC\_ATT\_REJ\_OTHER**

**PI ID: M55308C00157**

[End CB012724-C]

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

**Update time: For each DL slot, in TD/FD scheduling, if a UE been rejected for scheduling:**

[Before CB012724-C]

* Not schedulable
* Not schedulable simple paired UE (MU-MIMO)
* FD schedule block
* FD schedule block in MIMO

[CB012724-C]

* Select subcell fail
* All other causes

and the reject reason is not belong to any of above counters (PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PUCCH, PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PDCCH, PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PRB, PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_EIRP\_CONS, PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_UE\_OVERHEAT), then this UE shall be included into counter PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_OTHER

Note, the recommended method to update this counter is, to update this counter at the end of DL slot as follows:

PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_OTHER = PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_OTHER

* ( PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT
* numOfScheduledUeDl
* PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PUCCH
* PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PDCCH
* PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PRB
* PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_EIRP\_CONS
* PDSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_UE\_OVERHEAT

[CB012724-C] - PDSCH\_ALLOC\_ATT\_REJ\_SCHED\_BLKD [End CB012724-C])

where,

* numOfScheduledUeDl, is the number of UE that successful scheduled in this slot.

**Increment value: 1**

Increment value:

#### 2.9.3.2.0-15 TD Scheduler Successful PDSCH allocations (ID: 11192464)

**2.9.3.2.0-15.0-2**  (ID: `11192474`)

TD Scheduler
[BEFORE CNI-127108]

1. PDSCH\_ALLOC\_F1 (M55308C00049)

For each DL slot, in TD/FD scheduling, when for a UE, Transport Block is successfully scheduled on PDSCH and related HARQ A/N would have to use F1 PUCCH resources (related HARQ A/N would require 1 or 2 bit payload), then 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter:

PDSCH\_ALLOC\_F1 += 1

1. PDSCH\_ALLOC\_F3 (M55308C00050)

For each DL slot, in TD/FD scheduling, when for a UE, Transport Block is successfully scheduled on PDSCH and related HARQ A/N would have to use F3 PUCCH resources (related HARQ A/N would require more than 2 bit payload), then 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter:

PDSCH\_ALLOC\_F3 += 1

[CNI-127108]

From CNI-127108 please rely on

5G\_L2\_20854\_replaced([11192479](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28krA_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) Number of successful PDSCH allocations that require HARQ feedback on F1 PUCCH

5G\_L2\_20856\_replaced([11192489](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28krBvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) Number of successful PDSCH allocations that require HARQ feedback on F3 PUCCH

[END CNI-127108]

#### 2.9.3.2.0-18 TD Scheduler Successful PUCCH allocations (ID: 11192499)

**2.9.3.2.0-18.0-2**  (ID: `11192509`)

TD Scheduler
[BEFORE CNI-127108]

1. AVG\_RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_F1\_NUM (M55308C00051)

For each UL slot, when for a UE, PUCCH Format 1 Resource is requested, then 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter:

AVG\_RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_F1\_NUM += 1

1. AVG\_RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_F3\_NUM (M55308C00052)

For each UL slot, when for a UE, PUCCH Format 3 Resource is requested, then 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter:

AVG\_RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_F3\_NUM += 1

1. AVG\_RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_F1\_DENOM (M55308C00053)

For each UL slot, when for at least one UE, PUCCH Format 1 is requested, then 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter:

AVG\_RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_F1\_DENOM += 1

1. AVG\_RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_F3\_DENOM (M55308C00054)

For each UL slot, when for at least one UE, PUCCH Format 3 is requested, then 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter:

AVG\_RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_F3\_DENOM += 1

1. RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_F1\_MAX (M55308C00055)

For each UL slot, when for a UE, PUCCH Format 1 Resource is requested, then 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter:

RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_F1\_MAX = max(RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_F1\_MAX, AVG\_RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_F1\_NUM)

1. RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_F3\_MAX (M55308C00056)

For each UL slot, when for a UE, PUCCH Format 3 Resource is requested, then 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter:

RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_F3\_MAX = max(RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_F3\_MAX, AVG\_RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_F3\_NUM)

1. AVG\_RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_HAN\_F1\_NUM (M55308C00087)

For each UL slot, when for a UE, PUCCH Format 1 Resource used for HARQ A/N is requested, then 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter:

AVG\_RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_HAN\_F1\_NUM += 1

1. AVG\_RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_HAN\_F3\_NUM (M55308C00088)

For each UL slot, when for a UE, PUCCH Format 3 Resource used for HARQ A/N is requested, then 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter:

AVG\_RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_HAN\_F3\_NUM += 1

1. RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_HAN\_F1\_MAX (M55308C00089)

For each UL slot, when for a UE, PUCCH Format 1 Resource used for HARQ A/N is requested, then 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter:

RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_HAN\_F1\_MAX = max(RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_HAN\_F1\_MAX, AVG\_RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_HAN\_F1\_NUM)

1. RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_HAN\_F3\_MAX (M55308C00090)

For each UL slot, when for a UE, PUCCH Format 3 Resource used for HARQ A/N is requested, then 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter:

RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_HAN\_F3\_MAX = max(RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_HAN\_F3\_MAX, AVG\_RSRC\_USED\_PUCCH\_HAN\_F3\_NUM)

#### 2.9.3.2.0-29 TD Scheduler Number of initial HARQ sent for SRB1 for HO which are acknowledged (ID: 12552195)

**2.9.3.2.0-29.0-1**  (ID: `12552725`)

TD Scheduler
Measurement: NR SRB statistics for UP

NetAct name: HARQ\_ACK\_INIT\_SRB1DL\_HOSRC

PI ID: M55393C00001

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_nXESkPvPEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a sequence diagram illustrating the process of initial HARQ (Hybrid Automatic Repeat Request) acknowledgments for SRB1 (Signaling Radio Bearer 1) during a handover (HO) in a 5G network. The diagram depicts interactions between a User Equipment (UE) and various network entities, including 5G-L1-UL (Layer 1 - Uplink), 5G-L1-DL (Layer 1 - Downlink), 5G-L2-PS (Layer 2 - Packet Switched), 5G-L2-LO (Layer 2 - Logical), and 5G-CP-RT (Control Plane - Real Time).
The diagram begins with a request from 5G-L2-PS to 5G-L2-LO for user suspension, specifying the cause as "HO\_intra\_du:1" and "HO\_others: 3, HO\_with\_ExtScell:4". Following this, 5G-L2-PS suspends DL bearers for the UE. Subsequently, a `LoCtrl_PduMuxReq` message is sent to 5G-L2-LO with the parameter `logicalChannelIdentity=LCID1:SRB1`.
The UE receives a PDSCH (Physical Downlink Shared Channel) transmission, indicated by "(TB)" which likely stands for Transport Block. In response, the UE sends a PUCCH (Physical Uplink Control Channel) message containing "(DLA/N)", which signifies Downlink Assignment/Negative Acknowledgment.
The diagram then details the "Initial transmission for HARQ index" with two alternative scenarios:
1. `UIData_PucchReceiveRespHarqDL1sw` or `UIData_PucchReceiverespHarqDLoner` with `(ackNack = 'ACK=1')`.
2. `UIData_PuschReceiveRespHarqD` or `UIData_PuschReceiveRespHarqDLoner` with `(ackNack1BitUci = '1=ACK or ackNackUciMoreThan1Bit=1)`.
Finally, the diagram shows an increment of the initial SRB1 counter, labeled as `HARQ_ACK_INIT_SRB1DL_HOSRC`.
The title of the diagram is " ". The bottom right corner contains a URL: "http://msc-generator.sourceforge.net v6.3.7".[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/12724\_A\_HARQ\_ACK\_INIT\_SRB1DL\_HOSRC.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

Update time:   
5G-L2-PS shall update counter when below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSuspendSchedulingReq ([10977033](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_yDjh4Pu4Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) from 5G-CP-RT:
* ueSuspendCause=’HO\_intra\_du:1’ or ‘HO\_others:3’ or ‘HO\_with\_ExtScell:4’;
* 5G-L2-PS sends LoCtrl\_PduMuxReq ([10984591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_qlPgwPu5Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to 5G-L2-LO:
* logicalChannelIdentity=’LCID1:SRB1’;
* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE ackNack=1 (Ack) over PUCCH from UE indicated in:
* Loner: UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDLoner.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL ([11514265](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_SuawkPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) OR
* Other: UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDL1sw.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL ([11514255](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Snr2cPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* or 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE ackNack1BitUci=1 (Ack) OR ackNackUciMoreThan1Bit=1 (Ack) over PUSCH from UE indicated in:
* Loner: UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDLoner from 5G-L1-UL ([11513937](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_PYhLwPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) OR
* Other: UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDL1sw from 5G-L1-UL ([11513924](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_PPSXQPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Increment value: The counter is updated by one for the initial SRB 1 DCI sent to the UE and acknowledged during the HO execution phase in the source cell.

The counter is valid for both SA and NSA

Link to the file: [12724\_A\_HARQ\_ACK\_INIT\_SRB1DL\_HOSRC.signalling](https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:u:/r/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Drawings%20and%20diagrams%20for%205G/User%20Plane/5G%20L2%20Entity%20Level/2%205G-L2-PS%20Component%20Requirements/2.8%20PM%20Counters/CB012724_A/12724_A_HARQ_ACK_INIT_SRB1DL_HOSRC.signalling?csf=1&web=1&e=ftruBG)

**2.9.3.2.0-30.0-1**  (ID: `12552731`)

TD Scheduler
Measurement: NR SRB statistics for UP  
NetAct name: HARQ\_NACK\_INIT\_SRB1DL\_HOSRC  
PI ID: M55393C00002  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_nXESkPvPEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a sequence diagram illustrating the process of initial HARQ transmissions for SRB1 during a handover (HO) that are not acknowledged. The diagram depicts interactions between a User Equipment (UE) and various network entities: 5G-L1-UL (Layer 1 Uplink), 5G-L1-DL (Layer 1 Downlink), 5G-L2-PS (Layer 2 Packet Switched), 5G-L2-LO (Layer 2 Lower), and 5G-CP-RT (Control Plane Real-Time).
The diagram begins with a request from 5G-L2-PS to 5G-L2-LO for user suspend scheduling, specifying the cause as "HO\_intra\_du:1" and "HO\_others: 3, HO\_with\_ExtScell:4". Following this, 5G-L2-PS suspends DL bearers for the UE. Subsequently, a "LoCtrl\_PduMuxReq" message is sent to 5G-L2-LO with the parameter "logicalChannelIdentity=LCID1:SRB1".
The UE then receives a PDSCH (TB) from 5G-L1-DL. In response, the UE sends a PUCCH (DLA/N) to 5G-L1-UL. The diagram then details the alternative actions taken for initial HARQ transmission for a given HARQ index. These actions involve the UE sending either "UIData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDL1sw" or "UIData\_PucchReceiverespHarqDLoner" with an "ackNack='NACK=0'" status, or "UIData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqD" or "UIData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDLoner" with an "ackNack1BitUci = '0=NACK' or ackNackUciMoreThan1Bit=0" status.
Finally, the diagram indicates that the initial SRB1 counter is incremented, labeled as "HARQ\_NACK\_INIT\_SRB1DL\_HOSRC". The bottom right corner contains a URL: "http://msc-generator.sourceforge.net v6.3.7".[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/12724\_A\_HARQ\_NACK\_INIT\_SRB1DL\_HOSRC.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

Update time:   
5G-L2-PS shall update counter when below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSuspendSchedulingReq ([10977033](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_yDjh4Pu4Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) from 5G-CP-RT:
* ueSuspendCause=’HO\_intra\_du:1’ or ‘HO\_others:3’ or ‘HO\_with\_ExtScell:4’;
* 5G-L2-PS sends LoCtrl\_PduMuxReq ([10984591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_qlPgwPu5Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to 5G-L2-LO:
* logicalChannelIdentity=’LCID1:SRB1’;
* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE ackNack=0 (Nack) over PUCCH from UE indicated in:
* Loner: UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDLoner.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL ([11514265](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_SuawkPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) OR
* Other: UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDL1sw.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL ([11514255](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Snr2cPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* or 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE ackNack1BitUci=0 (Nack) OR ackNackUciMoreThan1Bit=0 (Nack) over PUSCH from UE indicated in:
* Loner: UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDLoner from 5G-L1-UL ([11513937](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_PYhLwPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) OR
* Other: UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDL1sw from 5G-L1-UL ([11513924](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_PPSXQPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Increment value: The counter is updated by one for the initial SRB 1 DCI sent to the UE and not acknowledged during the HO execution phase in the source cell.

The counter is valid for both SA and NSA.

#### 2.9.3.2.0-31 TD Scheduler Number of initial HARQ sent for SRB1 for HO which are DTXed (ID: 12552450)

**2.9.3.2.0-31.0-1**  (ID: `12552733`)

TD Scheduler
Measurement: NR SRB statistics for UP  
NetAct name: HARQ\_DTX\_INIT\_SRB1DL\_HOSRC  
PI ID: M55393C00003  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_nXESkPvPEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a sequence diagram illustrating the process of initial HARQ transmission for SRB1 during a handover (HO) which results in DTXed (Discontinuous Transmission) states.
The diagram depicts interactions between several entities: UE (User Equipment), 5G-L1-UL (5G Layer 1 Uplink), 5G-L1-DL (5G Layer 1 Downlink), 5G-L2-PS (5G Layer 2 Packet Switched), 5G-L2-LO (5G Layer 2 Lower Layer), and 5G-CP-RT (5G Control Plane Real-Time).
The sequence of events is as follows:
1. **`PsUser_UserSuspendSchedulingReq`**: Sent from 5G-L2-LO to 5G-L2-PS. This request includes parameters indicating the cause of suspension, such as `HO_intra_du:1`, `HO_others: 3`, and `HO_with_ExtScell:4`.
2. **`5G_L2-PS suspends DL bearers for the UE`**: A message indicating that the 5G-L2-PS entity suspends the downlink bearers for the UE.
3. **`LoCtrl_PduMuxReq`**: Sent from 5G-L2-LO to 5G-L2-PS. This request specifies the `logicalChannelIdentity=LCID1:SRB1`.
4. **`PDSCH (TB)`**: A message representing the Physical Downlink Shared Channel (Transport Block) is sent from 5G-L1-DL to UE.
5. **`PUCCH (DLA/N)`**: A message representing the Physical Uplink Control Channel (Downlink Assignment/Notification) is sent from UE to 5G-L1-UL.
6. **`Alt: Initial transmission for HARQ index`**: This section details the alternative conditions for initial HARQ transmission.
\* **`UIData_PucchReceiveRespHarqDL1sw or UIData_PucchReceiverespHarqDLoner`**: This condition is met if `dtcMeas L1sw/dtx="DTX=1"`.
\* **`UIData_PuschReceiveRespHarqD or UIData_PuschReceiveRespHarqDLoner`**: This condition is met if `ackOnPuschReportAndDtxMeas L1sw/dbxAck1Bit > '0'` or `ackOnPuschReportAndDtxMeas Loner/dtxAck 1Bit > '0'`.
7. **`Increment the initial SRB1 counter HARQ_DTX_INIT_SRB1DL_HOSRC`**: This is a final action indicating the incrementing of the initial SRB1 counter, associated with the source identifier `HARQ_DTX_INIT_SRB1DL_HOSRC`.
The diagram also includes a title: "" and a source reference at the bottom: "http://msc-generator.sourceforge.net v6.3.7".[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/12724\_A\_HARQ\_DTX\_INIT\_SRB1DL\_HOSRC.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

Update time:   
5G-L2-PS shall update counter when below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSuspendSchedulingReq ([10977033](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_yDjh4Pu4Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) from 5G-CP-RT:
* ueSuspendCause=’HO\_intra\_du:1’ or ‘HO\_others:3’ or ‘HO\_with\_ExtScell:4’;
* 5G-L2-PS sends LoCtrl\_PduMuxReq ([10984591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_qlPgwPu5Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to 5G-L2-LO:
* logicalChannelIdentity=’LCID1:SRB1’;
* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE DTX=1 (dtxMeasL1sw/dtx or dtxMeasLoner/dtx) over PUCCH from UE indicated in:
* Loner: UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDLoner.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL ([11514265](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_SuawkPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) OR
* Other: UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDL1sw.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL ([11514255](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Snr2cPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* or 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE ackOnPuschReportAndDtxMeasLoner/dtxAck1Bit > '0' or ackOnPuschReportAndDtxMeasL1sw/dtxAck1Bit > '0' over PUSCH from UE indicated in:
* Loner: UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDLoner from 5G-L1-UL ([11513937](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_PYhLwPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) OR
* Other: UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDL1sw from 5G-L1-UL ([11513924](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_PPSXQPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Increment value: The counter is updated by one for the initial SRB 1 DCI sent to the UE and is DTXed during the HO execution phase in the source cell.  
The counter is valid for both SA and NSA.

#### 2.9.3.2.0-32 TD Scheduler Number of last HARQ retransmission sent for SRB1 for HO which are acknowledged (ID: 12552453)

**2.9.3.2.0-32.0-1**  (ID: `12552742`)

TD Scheduler
Measurement: NR SRB statistics for UP  
NetAct name: HARQ\_ACK\_ANY\_RTX\_SRB1DL\_HOSRC  
PI ID: M55393C00004  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_nXESkPvPEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a sequence diagram illustrating the process of handling HARQ retransmissions for SRB1 during a handover (HO) in a 5G network. The diagram depicts interactions between different network entities: UE (User Equipment), 5G-L1-UL (5G Layer 1 - Uplink), 5G-L1-DL (5G Layer 1 - Downlink), 5G-L2-PS (5G Layer 2 - Packet Switched), 5G-L2-LO (5G Layer 2 - Logical Operation), and 5G-CP-RT (5G Control Plane - Real Time).
The diagram begins with a `PsUser_UserSuspendSchedulingReq` message from 5G-L2-LO to 5G-L2-PS, indicating a user suspend scheduling request with specific causes related to HO. Subsequently, 5G-L2-PS suspends DL bearers for the UE.
A `LoCtrl_PduMuxReq` message is sent from 5G-L2-LO to 5G-L1-DL, specifying the `logicalChannelIdentity` as LCID1:SRB1.
The diagram then shows interactions related to PUCCH (Physical Uplink Control Channel) and PDSCH (Physical Downlink Shared Channel) between UE and 5G-L1-UL/DL.
Specifically, it details two scenarios for HARQ retransmissions:
**Scenario 1: Final retransmission when maxDIHarqTx is reached**
\* UE sends PUCCH (DLAN) to 5G-L1-UL.
\* An alternative path shows `UIData_PucchReceiveRespHarqDL1sw` or `UIData_PucchReceiveRespHarqDLoner` with `ackNack='NACK=0'`.
\* Another alternative path shows `UIData_PuschReceiveRespHarqD` or `UIData_PuschReceiveRespHarqDLoner` with `ackNack1BitUci = '0=NACK'` or `ackNackUciMoreThan1Bit=0`.
\* PDSCH (TB) is transmitted.
\* The final retransmission for HARQ index when maxDIHarqTx is reached is indicated.
\* UE sends PUCCH (DLAN) to 5G-L1-UL.
\* An alternative path shows `UIData_PucchReceiveReqL1sw` or `UIData_PucchReceiveRespHarqDLoner`.
**Scenario 2: Final retransmission when maxDIHarqTx is reached (with ACK)**
\* UE sends PUCCH (DLAN) to 5G-L1-UL.
\* An alternative path shows `UIData_PucchReceiveRespHarqDL1sw` or `UIData_PucchReceiveRespHarqDLoner` with `ackNack= 'ACK=1'`.
\* Another alternative path shows `UIData_PuschReceiveRespHarqD` or `UIData_PuschReceiveRespHarqDLoner` with `ackNack1BitUci = '1=ACK'` or `ackNackUciMoreThan1Bit=1`.
Finally, the diagram indicates an increment for an SRB1 counter labeled `HARQ_ACK_ANY_RTX_SRB1DL_HOSRC`.
The title of the diagram is " ". The bottom right corner shows a URL: `http://msc-generator.sourceforge.net v6.3.7`.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/12724\_A\_HARQ\_ANY\_LST\_RTX\_SRB1DL\_HOSRC.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

Update time:   
5G-L2-PS shall update counter when below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSuspendSchedulingReq ([10977033](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_yDjh4Pu4Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) from 5G-CP-RT:
* ueSuspendCause=’HO\_intra\_du:1’ or ‘HO\_others:3’ or ‘HO\_with\_ExtScell:4’;
* 5G-L2-PS sends LoCtrl\_PduMuxReq ([10984591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_qlPgwPu5Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to 5G-L2-LO:
* logicalChannelIdentity=’LCID1:SRB1’;
* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE ackNack=0 (Nack) over PUCCH indicated in:
* Loner: UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDLoner.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL ([11514265](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_SuawkPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) OR
* Other: UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDL1sw.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL ([11514255](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Snr2cPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE ackNack1BitUci=0 (Nack) OR ackNackUciMoreThan1Bit=0 (Nack) over PUSCH indicated in:
* Loner: UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDLoner from 5G-L1-UL ([11513937](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_PYhLwPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) OR
* Other: UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDL1sw from 5G-L1-UL ([11513924](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_PPSXQPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* 5G-L2-PS sends UlData\_PucchReceiveReqL1sw ([11513990](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_P6U4UPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or UlData\_PucchReceiveReqLoner ([11514001](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_QCDQ8PvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for the final retransmission of HARQ Index
* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE ackNack=1 (Ack) over PUCCH indicated in:
* Loner: UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDLoner.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL ([11514265](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_SuawkPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) OR
* Other: UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDL1sw.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL ([11514255](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Snr2cPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* or 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE ackNack1BitUci=1 (Ack) OR ackNackUciMoreThan1Bit=1 (Ack) over PUSCH indicated in:
* Loner: UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDLoner from 5G-L1-UL ([11513937](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_PYhLwPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) OR
* Other: UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDL1sw from 5G-L1-UL ([11513924](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_PPSXQPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Increment value: The counter is updated by one for any SRB 1 DCI retransmission sent to the UE and is acknowledged during HO execution phase in source cell.

The counter is valid for both SA and NSA.

#### 2.9.3.2.0-33 TD Scheduler Number of last HARQ retransmission sent for SRB1 for HO which are not acknowledged (ID: 12552508)

**2.9.3.2.0-33.0-1**  (ID: `12552751`)

TD Scheduler
Measurement: NR SRB statistics for UP  
NetAct name: HARQ\_NACK\_LST\_RTX\_SRB1DL\_HOSRC  
PI ID: M55393C00005  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_nXESkPvPEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a sequence diagram illustrating the process of handling HARQ retransmissions for SRB1 during a handover (HO) when acknowledgments are not received.
The diagram depicts interactions between several entities: UE, 5G-L1-UL, 5G-L1\_DL, 5G-L2-PS, 5G-L2-LO, and 5G-CP-RT.
The sequence of events is as follows:
1. **PsUser\_UserSuspendSchedulingReq**: Sent from 5G-L2-LO to 5G-L2-PS, indicating a user suspend scheduling request with specific reasons like 'HO\_intra\_du:1', 'HO\_others:3', or 'HO\_with\_ExtScell:4'.
2. **5G\_L2-PS suspends DL bearers for the UE**: 5G-L2-PS performs this action.
3. **LoCtrl\_PduMuxReq**: Sent from 5G-L2-PS to 5G-L1-UL, with a logical channel identity of LCID1:SRB1.
4. **PUCCH (DLAN)**: A message sent from UE to 5G-L1-UL.
5. **Alt (Alternative)**: This block contains two possible scenarios for the UE's response:
\* **UIData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDL1sw or UIData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDLoner**: This message is sent with `ackNack = 'NACK=0'`.
\* **UIData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqD or UIData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDLoner**: This message is sent with `ackNack 1BitUci = '0=NACK' or ackNackUciMoreThan1Bit=0))`.
6. **PD SCH (TB)**: A message sent from 5G-L1-UL to UE.
7. **The final retransmission for HARQ index when maxDIHarqTx is reached**: This is a descriptive label for the subsequent message.
8. **UIData\_PucchReceiveReqL1sw or UIData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDLoner**: This message is sent from 5G-L1-UL to UE.
9. **PUCCH (DLAN)**: Another message sent from UE to 5G-L1-UL.
10. **Alt (Alternative)**: Similar to the previous alternative block, this one also contains two possible scenarios:
\* **UIData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDL1sw or UIData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDLoner**: Sent with `ackNack = 'NACK=0'`.
\* **UIData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqD or UIData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDLoner**: Sent with `ackNack 1BitUci = '0=NACK' or ackNackUciMoreThan1Bit=0)`.
11. **Increment the last SRB1 counter**: This action is performed, and the counter is labeled as **HARQ\_NACK\_LST\_RTX\_SRB1DL\_HOSRC**.

* logicalChannelIdentity=’LCID1:SRB1’;

#### 2.9.3.2.0-34 TD Scheduler Number of last HARQ retransmission sent for SRB1 for HO which are DTXed (ID: 12552514)

**2.9.3.2.0-34.0-1**  (ID: `12552759`)

TD Scheduler
Measurement: NR SRB statistics for UP  
NetAct name: HARQ\_DTX\_LST\_RTX\_SRB1DL\_HOSRC  
PI ID: M55393C00006  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_nXESkPvPEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a sequence diagram illustrating the process of HARQ retransmissions for SRB1 during a handover (HO) that results in DTXed (Discontinuous Transmission) states. The diagram shows interactions between a User Equipment (UE) and various network components, including 5G-L1-UL, 5G-L1-DL, 5G-L2-PS, 5G-L2-LO, and 5G-CP-RT.
The diagram depicts the following key events and messages:
1. **User Suspend Scheduling Request**: The `5G-L2-PS` component sends a `PsUser_UserSuspendSchedulingReq` to the UE. This request includes a `ueSuspendCause` which can be "HO\_intra\_du:1", "HO\_others:3", or "HO\_with\_ExtScell:4".
2. **DL Bearer Suspension**: Following the suspend request, `5G-L2-PS` suspends DL bearers for the UE.
3. **PDU Multiplexing Request**: `5G-L2-LO` sends a `LoCtrl_PduMuxReq` to `5G-L2-PS`, specifying the `logicalChannelIdentity` as `LCID1:SRB1`.
4. **PUCCH Transmission (DLAN)**: The UE sends data on the PUCCH (Physical Uplink Control Channel) with DLAN (Downlink Allocation Notification).
5. **Alternative Paths for HARQ Feedback**:
\* **Path 1 (ACK/NACK)**: If the `ackNack` is 'NACK=0', the UE sends `UIData_PucchReceiveRespHarqDL1sw` or `UIData_PucchReceiverespHarqDLoner`.
\* **Path 2 (ACK/NACK with UCI)**: If `ackNack1BitUci` is '0=NACK' or `ackNackUciMoreThan1Bit=0`, the UE sends `UIData_PuschReceiveRespHarqD` or `UIData_PuschReceiveRespHarqDLoner`.
6. **PDSCH Transmission (TB)**: The diagram shows a PDSCH (Physical Downlink Shared Channel) transmission of a Transport Block (TB).
7. **Final Retransmission**: A message indicates "The final retransmission for HARQ index when maxDIHarqTx is reached". This is followed by the UE sending `UIData_PucchReceiveReqL1sw` or `UIData_PucchReceiveRespHarqDLoner` on PUCCH (DLA/N).
8. **Alternative Paths for Final Retransmission**:
\* **Path 1 (DTX Measurement)**: If `dtxMeasL1sw/dtx` is "DTX=1", the UE sends `UIData_PucchReceiveRespHarqDL1sw` or `UIData_PucchReceiveRespHarqDLoner`.
\* **Path 2 (DTX Report)**: If `ackOnPuschReportAndDtxMeasL1sw/dtxAck1Bit` is '> '0'' or `ackOnPuschReportAndDtxMeasLoner/dtxAck1Bit` is '> '0'', the UE sends `UIData_PuschReceiveRespHarqD` or `UIData_PuschReceiveRespHarqDLoner`.
9. **SRB1 Counter Increment**: Finally, the diagram shows an action to "Increment the last SRB1 counter" with the identifier `HARQ_DTX_LST_RTX_SRB1DL_HOSRC`.
The title of the diagram is "" and the identifier is "". The bottom right corner indicates the source as "http://msc-generator.sourceforge.net v6.3.7".[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/12724\_A\_HARQ\_DTX\_LST\_RTX\_SRB1DL\_HOSRC.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSuspendSchedulingReq ([10977033](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_yDjh4Pu4Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) from 5G-CP-RT:
* ueSuspendCause=’HO\_intra\_du:1’ or ‘HO\_others:3’ or ‘HO\_with\_ExtScell:4’;
* 5G-L2-PS sends LoCtrl\_PduMuxReq ([10984591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_qlPgwPu5Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to 5G-L2-LO:
* logicalChannelIdentity=’LCID1:SRB1’;
* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE ackNack=0 (Nack) over PUCCH indicated in:
* Loner: UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDLoner.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL ([11514265](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_SuawkPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) OR
* Other: UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDL1sw.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL ([11514255](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Snr2cPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE ackNack1BitUci=0 (Nack) OR ackNackUciMoreThan1Bit=0 (Nack) over PUSCH indicated in:
* Loner: UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDLoner from 5G-L1-UL ([11513937](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_PYhLwPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) OR
* Other: UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDL1sw from 5G-L1-UL ([11513924](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_PPSXQPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* 5G-L2-PS sends UlData\_PucchReceiveReqL1sw ([11513990](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_P6U4UPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or UlData\_PucchReceiveReqLoner ([11514001](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_QCDQ8PvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for the final retransmission of HARQ Index
* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE DTX=1 (dtxMeasL1sw/dtx or dtxMeasLoner/dtx) over PUCCH indicated in:
* Loner: UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDLoner.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL ([11514265](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_SuawkPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) OR
* Other: UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDL1sw.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL ([11514255](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Snr2cPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* or 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE ackOnPuschReportAndDtxMeasLoner/dtxAck1Bit > '0' or ackOnPuschReportAndDtxMeasL1sw/dtxAck1Bit > '0' over PUSCH indicated in:
* Loner: UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDLoner from 5G-L1-UL ([11513937](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_PYhLwPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) OR
* Other: UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDL1sw from 5G-L1-UL ([11513924](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_PPSXQPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Increment value: The counter is updated by one for the last SRB 1 DCI retransmission sent to the UE and is DTXed during HO execution phase in source cell.

The counter is valid for both SA and NSA

Link to the file: [12724\_A\_HARQ\_DTX\_LST\_RTX\_SRB1DL\_HOSRC.signalling](https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:u:/r/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Drawings%20and%20diagrams%20for%205G/User%20Plane/5G%20L2%20Entity%20Level/2%205G-L2-PS%20Component%20Requirements/2.8%20PM%20Counters/CB012724_A/12724_A_HARQ_DTX_LST_RTX_SRB1DL_HOSRC.signalling?csf=1&web=1&e=WNdvXU)

2. **PsUser\_UserSetupReq or PsUser\_UserModifyReq (ueCapability.supportOfRedCap = 'True')**: Sent from 5G-L2-PS to 5G-CP-RT.
3. **DCI1\_1 Scheduling**: A process or event occurring within the 5G-L2-PS.

* 5G-L2-PS schedules DCI1\_1 format and sends DlData\_PdcchSendReqL1sw([11512566](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_A2r6APvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or DlData\_PdcchSendReqLoner([11512575](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_A9P1A_vwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* dciSize for DCI1\_1 format

Increment value:   
The counters are updated by one for each slot with the number of CCEs available for downlink DCI Format 1\_1 in Cell BWP-0…9 for REDCAP UE.

#### 2.9.3.2.0-37 TD Scheduler Number of downlink grants that are acknowledged in Cell BWP-0...BWP-9 (ID: 12682629)

**2.9.3.2.0-37.0-1**  (ID: `12682686`)

TD Scheduler
**Measurement: NR PDCCH usage**

**NetAct name: DL\_GRANT\_ACK\_CBWP0 ... DL\_GRANT\_ACK\_CBWP9**

**PI ID: M55335C00043 ... M55335C00052**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).**

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a sequence diagram illustrating a process related to downlink grants in a 5G network. The diagram depicts interactions between three entities: UE (User Equipment), 5G-L1-UL (5G Layer 1 Uplink), 5G-L2-PS (5G Layer 2 Packet Switched), and 5G-CP-RT (5G Control Plane Real-Time).
The diagram has a title: "" and a subtitle: "".
The sequence of events is as follows:
1. **UE to 5G-L1-UL:** A message labeled "PUCCH (DLAN)" is sent from UE to 5G-L1-UL.
2. **5G-L1-UL to itself (Alt):** An "Alt" (alternative) block is shown within the 5G-L1-UL lifeline. This block contains two possible messages:
\* "UIData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDL1sw or UIData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDLoner" with a condition "(CRC='OK=0' or CRC="NOK=1")".
\* "UIData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqD or UIData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDLoner" with a condition "(ackCrcCheck='0=Pass' or ackCrcCheck='1=Fail')".
3. **5G-L2-PS to 5G-CP-RT:** A message "PsCell\_CellSetupReq" is sent from 5G-L2-PS to 5G-CP-RT, with a parameter "(cellBwp.cellBwpld)".
4. **Below the 5G-L1-UL lifeline:** A text box indicates an action: "Increment the counter for number of downlink grants that are acknowledged in Cell BWP-0 ... 9 DL\_GRANT\_ACK\_CBWPO ... DL\_GRANT\_ACK\_CBWP9 with any Aggregation Level in the Cell BWP-0 ... 9".
At the bottom right corner, there is a URL: "http://msc-generator.sourceforge.net v6.3.7".[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/12724\_H\_DL\_GRANT\_ACK\_CBWP0.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

**Update time:**

5G-L2-PS shall update counters when below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetup([12700571](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_FVqBg11dEfCPFofqMEsORA)) from 5G-CP-RT with proper BWP:
* cellBwp([12462264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_oIo_YAr3EfCT35inaBGo7g)).cellBwpId
* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE [Before PR846043]ackNack=1 (Ack)[PR846043]CRC=OK or CRC=NOK[End PR846043]over PUCCH from UE indicated in:
* Loner: UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDLoner.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL ([11514265](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_SuawkPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) OR
* Other: UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDL1sw.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL ([11514255](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Snr2cPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* or 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE [Before PR846043]ackNack1BitUci=1 (Ack) OR ackNackUciMoreThan1Bit=1 (Ack)[PR846043]ackCrcCheck=Pass or ackCrcCheck=Fail[End PR846043]over PUCCH from UE indicated in:
* Loner: UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDLoner from 5G-L1-UL ([11513937](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_PYhLwPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) OR
* Other: UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDL1sw from 5G-L1-UL ([11513924](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_PPSXQPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Increment value:

The counters are updated by one when the downlink scheduler sends a DCI in a UE-Specific, Type1, or Type3 PDCCH for the Cell BWP-0 to the UE and the UE sends HARQ ack in response to the grant.

Link to the file: [12724\_H\_DL\_GRANT\_ACK\_CBWPx.signalling](https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:u:/r/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Drawings%20and%20diagrams%20for%205G/User%20Plane/5G%20L2%20Entity%20Level/2%205G-L2-PS%20Component%20Requirements/2.8%20PM%20Counters/CB012724_H/12724_H_DL_GRANT_ACK_CBWPx.signalling?csf=1&web=1&e=7Mg9HA)

#### 2.9.3.2.0-38 TD Scheduler Number of uplink grants that are acknowledged in Cell BWP-0...BWP-9 (ID: 12682630)

**2.9.3.2.0-38.0-1**  (ID: `12682688`)

TD Scheduler
**Measurement: NR PDCCH usage**

**NetAct name: UL\_GRANT\_ACK\_CBWP0 ... UL\_GRANT\_ACK\_CBWP9**

**PI ID: M55335C00033 ... M55335C00042**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).**

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a sequence diagram illustrating a 5G communication scenario. It depicts interactions between a User Equipment (UE), 5G-L1-UL (Layer 1 Uplink), 5G-L2-PS (Layer 2 Packet Switched), and 5G-CP-RT (Control Plane Real-Time).
The diagram shows the following sequence of events:
1. **PUSCH (TB)**: The UE sends a Physical Uplink Shared Channel (PUSCH) transmission block (TB) to the 5G-L1-UL.
2. **UIData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqUL1sw or UIData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqULoner**: The 5G-L1-UL sends a response to the UE, indicating the status of the PUSCH reception. This response can be either `UIData_PuschReceiveRespHarqUL1sw` or `UIData_PuschReceiveRespHarqULoner`. The status is further detailed by `(CRC='OK=0' or CRC="NOK=1")`, suggesting a Cyclic Redundancy Check (CRC) result indicating success (OK=0) or failure (NOK=1).
3. **PsCell\_CellSetupReq (cellBwp.cellBwpld)**: The 5G-L2-PS sends a `PsCell_CellSetupReq` message to the 5G-CP-RT, which includes `cellBwp.cellBwpld` as a parameter. This likely signifies a cell setup request with a specific bandwidth part identifier.
4. **Increment the counter for number of uplink grants that are acknowledged in Cell BWP-0 ... 9 UL\_GRANT\_ACK\_CBWPO ... UL\_GRANT\_ACK\_CBWP9 with all Aggregation Level in the Cell BWP-0 ... 9**: This is a descriptive text box indicating an action or a state. It suggests that a counter is incremented for the number of uplink grants acknowledged within a specific cell bandwidth part (BWP) range (0 to 9). The counter is identified by `UL_GRANT_ACK_CBWPO ... UL_GRANT_ACK_CBWP9`, and this increment happens across all aggregation levels within that BWP.
The title of the diagram is " ".
At the bottom right corner, there is a URL: `http://msc-generator.sourceforge.net v6.3.7`.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/12724\_H\_UL\_GRANT\_ACK\_CBWPx.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

**Update time:**

5G-L2-PS shall update counters when below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetup([12700571](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_FVqBg11dEfCPFofqMEsORA)) from 5G-CP-RT with proper BWP:
* cellBwp([12462264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_oIo_YAr3EfCT35inaBGo7g)).cellBwpId
* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE CRC = OK or NOK over PUSCH from UE indicated in:
* Loner: UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqULoner ([11513907](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_PByt0PvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) from 5G-L1-UL OR
* Other: UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqUL1sw ([11513897](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_O7Oy0PvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) from 5G-L1-UL.

Increment value:

The counters are updated by one when the number of acknowledged uplink grants (UE-Specific or Type1/3-PDCCH) with all Aggregation Level in the Cell BWP-0.

Link to the file: [12724\_H\_UL\_GRANT\_ACK\_CBWPx.signalling](https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:u:/r/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Drawings%20and%20diagrams%20for%205G/User%20Plane/5G%20L2%20Entity%20Level/2%205G-L2-PS%20Component%20Requirements/2.8%20PM%20Counters/CB012724_H/12724_H_UL_GRANT_ACK_CBWPx.signalling?csf=1&web=1&e=6c4Ofm)

### 2.9.3.3 SD Scheduler

#### 2.9.3.3.0-1 SD Scheduler PM counters (ID: 11192617)

**2.9.3.3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11192623`)

SD Scheduler
Total Number of co-scheduled UEs on PDSCH

---

**2.9.3.3.0-1.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `11192650`)

SD Scheduler
[CNI-127108]

Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: TOTAL\_COSCHED\_UE\_PDSCH

PI ID: M55308C02004

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

It shall be calculated as below:

1) In each DL slot, if PDSCH is not scheduled, no update on TOTAL\_COSCHED\_UE\_PDSCH;

2) In each DL slot, if any PDSCH is scheduled:

a. If there are paired UEs, TOTAL\_COSCHED\_UE\_PDSCH is added by number of paired users in PairSet;

b. If there is no paired UE, TOTAL\_COSCHED\_UE\_PDSCH is not incremented

Note: this counter shall be incremented only when parameter actDlMuMimo = True. Otherwise the value of the counter shall equal to zero

Increment value :

number of paired users in PairSet

[End CNI-127108]

[Before CNI-127108]

For 'NR Cell Utilization' and 'NR Cell Utilization per PLMN' class PM Counters according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), DL MU-MIMO related counters are defined as below:

1. About TOTAL\_COSCHED\_UE\_PDSCH (M55308C02004)

It shall be calculated as below:

1) In each DL slot, if PDSCH is not scheduled, no update on TOTAL\_COSCHED\_UE\_PDSCH;

2) In each DL slot, if any PDSCH is scheduled:

a. If there are paired UEs, TOTAL\_COSCHED\_UE\_PDSCH is added by number of paired users in PairSet;

b. If there is no paired UE, TOTAL\_COSCHED\_UE\_PDSCH is not incremented

Note: this counter shall be incremented only when parameter actDlMuMimo = True. Otherwise the value of the counter shall equal to zero

2.   About PRB\_USED\_PDSCH (M55308C10001)  and PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_PLMN (M55338C00001)

It shall be generic counter which will be updated whatever MU-MIMO is enabled or not.

In each DL slot including SSB slot without TRS and TRS slot for each scheduled UE, the counter is updated as below:

PRB\_USED\_PDSCH += numOfPdschPrbs

PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_PLMN += numOfPdschPrbs for the related PLMN

where

* numOfPdschPrbs: the number of PRB allocated for PDSCH.

3.   About PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH (M55308C10003)

It shall be generic counter which will be updated whatever MU-MIMO is enabled or not. In each DL slot  including SSB slot  without TRS and TRS slot, PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH is updated as below:

PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH += numOfUserGroups \* BWP

where

‑ BWP is the total number of PRBs available for PDSCH in full DL bandwidth.

o If actPRBBlanking or actAsymBwGuardband is enabled, the value of BWP shall exclude PRBs in RBGs which not available for PDSCH, that is, the RBG contain at least 1 blanked PRB.

o For SSB slot without TRS, If numPdschPrbInSsbSlots in PsCell\_CellSetupReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_61\_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [CB009510-A] OR PsCell\_CellRconfigurationReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB009510-A] is greater than zero, the value of BWP shall exclude PRBs in RBGs which not available for PDSCH, that is the RBG contain at least 1 blanked PRB or 1 SSB PRB. Note that, this also applies to TDD FR1 case.

o    When numPdschPrbInSsbSlots is greater than 0, this value of BWP shall exclude PRBs which are occupied by SS block or PRB blanking or CSI-RS for beam management in the SSB slot. For a SSB slot with TRS, this value of BWP shall not greater than min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots). For a TRS slot, this value of BWP shall not greater than numPdschPrbInTrsSlots.  Note that, this also applies to TDD FR1 case.

* numOfUserGroups is the number of user groups can be created in current DL slot.

a) For the case that DL MU-MIMO is disabled: numOfUserGroups is 1;

b) For the case that DL MU-MIMO is enabled: numOfUserGroups is 1 if no user can be paired, otherwise numOfUserGroups is decided in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4396\_replaced([11142208](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr3JO_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End CNI-127108]

---

**2.9.3.3.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11192656`)

SD Scheduler
Number of PRBs used for PDSCH

**2.9.3.3.0-1.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11206393`)

SD Scheduler
**Measurement: NR Cell Utilization / NR Cell Utilization per PLMN**

**NetAct name: PRB\_USED\_PDSCH /PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_PLMN**

**PI ID: M55308C10001 /M55338C00001**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

**Update time:**

It shall be generic counter which will be updated whatever MU-MIMO is enabled or not.

In each DL slot including SSB slot **without TRS and TRS slot for each scheduled UE, the counter is updated as below:**

PRB\_USED\_PDSCH += numOfPdschPrbs

PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_PLMN += numOfPdschPrbs for the related PLMN

where

* numOfPdschPrbs: the number of PRB allocated for PDSCH.

**Increment value :**

number of numOfPdschPrbs

[CB008250-AB]Counter PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_PLMN value is 100 times higher than the actual value (for example, 1.23 is stored as 123), so the reported value should be multiplied by 100. This counter is only updated when PLMN aware scheduling (NRBTS.actPlmnAwareScheduler=true) is enabled and provides the number of used PRBs only for PLMN aware traffic.[End CB008250-AB]

---

**2.9.3.3.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11192666`)

SD Scheduler
Number of PRBs available for PDSCH

---

**2.9.3.3.0-1.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `12885786`)

SD Scheduler
**Measurement: NR Cell Utilization**

**NetAct name: PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH**

**PI ID: M55308C10003**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

**Update time:**

It shall be generic counter which will be updated whatever MU-MIMO is enabled or not. In each DL slot  including SSB slot  without TRS and TRS slot, PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH is updated as below:

PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH += numOfUserGroups \* BWP

where

‑ BWP is the total number of PRBs available for PDSCH in full DL bandwidth.

o If actPRBBlanking **or actAsymBwGuardband** is enabled, the value of BWP shall exclude PRBs in RBGs which not available for PDSCH, that is, the RBG contain at least 1 blanked PRB.\*\*\*\*

o For SSB slot without TRS, If numPdschPrbInSsbSlots in PsCell\_CellSetupReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_61\_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) OR PsCell\_CellRconfigurationReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is greater than zero, the value of BWP shall exclude PRBs in RBGs which not available for PDSCH, that is the RBG contain at least 1 blanked PRB or 1 SSB PRB. Note that, this also applies to TDD FR1 case.

o   **When numPdschPrbInSsbSlots is greater than 0, this value of BWP shall exclude PRBs which are occupied by SS block or PRB blanking** or CSI-RS for beam management **in the SSB slot. For a SSB slot with TRS, this value of BWP shall not greater than min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots). For a TRS slot, this value of BWP shall not greater than numPdschPrbInTrsSlots.** Note that, this also applies to TDD FR1 case.***\****\*

* numOfUserGroups is the number of user groups can be created in current DL slot.

a) For the case that DL MU-MIMO is disabled: numOfUserGroups is 1;

b) For the case that DL MU-MIMO is enabled: numOfUserGroups is 1 if no user can be paired, otherwise numOfUserGroups is decided in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4396\_replaced([11142208](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr3JO_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

**Increment value :**

numOfUserGroups \* BWP

**[CB012623-B]**

Note : This counter also includes the number of PRBs that are muted to mitigate SSB interference., refer to [12680269: Impact on Counter and KPI definition](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_arZNjFALEfCeeMlEb49MrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)

**[End CB012623-B]**

---

**2.9.3.3.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `12516812`)

SD Scheduler
Number of available PDSCH PRB for Special slot

---

**2.9.3.3.0-1.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `12516813`)

SD Scheduler
Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: PDSCH\_PRB\_AVAL\_SPCL\_SLT

PI ID: M55308C00165

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)

Update time:

When 5G-CP-RT sends PsCell\_CellSetupReq to 5G-L2-PS and

* CellTechnology is TDD ([10967599](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UT6g_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)),

then 5G-L2-PS shall start updating the number of available PRBs in a special slot for PDSCH transmissions. The updated number of available PRBs in special slots for PDSCH transmissions shall be reported in the PDSCH\_PRB\_AVAL\_SPCL\_SLT counter.

The number of available PRBs in special slots for PDSCH transmissions shall be based on the legacy counter ‘Number of PRBs available for PDSCH’ (PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH = M55308C10003), considering only special slots. Special slot is slot where there are DL and UL symbols referred also as BI slot.

Increment value:

The counter shall be incremented by the number of available PDSCH PRBs in special slots.

---

**2.9.3.3.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `12557878`)

SD Scheduler
Number of scheduledPDSCH PRB for Special slot

---

**2.9.3.3.0-1.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `12557879`)

SD Scheduler
Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: PDSCH\_PRB\_SCHD\_SPCL\_SLT

PI ID: M55308C00166

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)

Update time:

When 5G-CP-RT sends PsCell\_CellSetupReq to 5G-L2-PS and

* CellTechnology is TDD ([10967599](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UT6g_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)),

then 5G-L2-PS shall start updating the number of scheduled PRBs in a special slot for PDSCH transmissions. The updated number of scheduled PRBs in special slots for PDSCH transmissions shall be reported in the PDSCH\_PRB\_SCHD\_SPCL\_SLT counter.

The number of scheduled PRBs in special slots for PDSCH transmissions shall be based on the legacy counter  ‘Number of PRBs used for PDSCH’ (PRB\_USED\_PDSCH = M55308C10001), considering only special slots. Special slot is slot where there are DL and UL symbols referred also as BI slot.

Increment value:

The counter is incremented by the number of scheduled PDSCH PRBs in special slots.

---

**2.9.3.3.0-1.0-6**  (ID: `12978036`)

SD Scheduler
Number of PRBs muted for SSB interference mitigation

---

**2.9.3.3.0-1.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `12978037`)

SD Scheduler
Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: NUM\_PRB\_PDSCH\_MUTE\_SSB\_INT\_MIT

PI ID: M55165C00044

Note: This counter shows the total PDSCH PRBs left unused due to SSB interference mitigation. PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [12680269: Impact on Counter and KPI definition](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_arZNjFALEfCeeMlEb49MrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)

Update time:  This counter is updated with the number of PRBs muted for SSB interference mitigation each time such muting is done

Increment value:

The counter is incremented with the number of PRBs muted for SSB interference during the measurement

### 2.9.3.4 FD Scheduler

#### 2.9.3.4.1 Configurable Artifical Load Generation

##### 2.9.3.4.1.0-1 Configurable Artifical Load Generation DL slots with the total load below the target load (ID: 11192686)

**2.9.3.4.1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11192690`)

Configurable Artifical Load Generation
Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: DL\_SLOTS\_BELOW\_TGT\_LOAD

PI ID: M55308C00043

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

When:

1. 5G-L2-PS schedules configurable DL artificial load generation, as specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17426\_replaced([11183931](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvOmQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
2. AND the current slot is the downlink slot
3. AND at least ONE of the following conditions is true:
4. PRBsForArtificialLoadGeneration + PRBConsumedByscheduledRealUEs < ConfiguredLoadInPRB,
5. DL artificial load over PDCCH is below the configured target (see 5G\_L2\_11054\_replaced([11150015](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24ZVtPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Increment value: 1.

CP2 Reference: For artificial load measurements in DL slots, see: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17659\_replaced([11183961](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvOmR_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**2.9.3.4.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11192700`)

Configurable Artifical Load Generation
Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: DL\_SLOTS\_ARTIFICIAL\_LOAD

PI ID: M55308C00044

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

When:

1. 5G-L2-PS schedules configurable DL artificial load generation, as specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17426\_replaced([11183931](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvOmQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
2. AND the current slot is the downlink slot
3. AND at least ONE of the following conditions is true:

CP2 Reference: For artificial load measurements in DL slots, see: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17659\_replaced([11183961](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvOmR_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
