#### 2.9.3.4.2 DL Data Slot &amp; DL PDSCH PRB

##### 2.9.3.4.2.0-1 DL Data Slot &amp; DL PDSCH PRB DL Data Slot Usage (ID: 11192719)

**2.9.3.4.2.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `11192740`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
[Before CNI-127108]

For 'NR Cell Utilization's class PM Counters according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) related to DL Data Slot Usage PM Counter shall be maintained by incrementing them +1  in the following cases:

* M55308C00005: DATA\_SLOT\_PDSCH = DATA\_SLOT\_PDSCH +1, in the case that at least one UE was scheduled over the PDSCH in the actual DL data slot in the given cell

Note: DL Data slot counters are also pegged due to signalling caused by RACH procedures triggered by detection of ghost pre-ambles on one hand

and also by UEs that did not finish contention resolution on the other hand. In DL especially sent RACH msg2 contribute to this PM counter.

If slowPrbPoolingAllowed set to 'true'  and slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed set to 'false', no allocation could be allowed in particular slots due to allocation of signals on other cells see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2382\_replaced([11115299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7609\_replaced([11115123](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX5PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For FDD, If slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed is 'true',no allocation could be allowed in particular slots due to allocation of signals on other cells, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2382\_replaced([11115299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19557\_replaced([11115143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Potentially the way this counter counts should be changed.

CP2 requirement(s):

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2-PS

[CNI-127108]

Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: Sum of DL Data slots

PI ID: M55308C00005

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

For 'NR Cell Utilization's class PM Counters according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) related to DL Data Slot Usage PM Counter shall be maintained  in the following cases:

* M55308C00005: DATA\_SLOT\_PDSCH = DATA\_SLOT\_PDSCH +1, in the case that at least one UE was scheduled over the PDSCH in the actual DL data slot in the given cell

Note: DL Data slot counters are also pegged due to signalling caused by RACH procedures triggered by detection of ghost pre-ambles on one hand

and also by UEs that did not finish contention resolution on the other hand. In DL especially sent RACH msg2 contribute to this PM counter.

If slowPrbPoolingAllowed set to 'true'  and slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed set to 'false', no allocation could be allowed in particular slots due to allocation of signals on other cells see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2382\_replaced([11115299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7609\_replaced([11115123](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX5PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For FDD, If slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed is 'true',no allocation could be allowed in particular slots due to allocation of signals on other cells, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2382\_replaced([11115299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19557\_replaced([11115143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Potentially the way this counter counts should be changed.

CP2 requirement(s):

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2-PS

Increment value :

M55308C00005: DATA\_SLOT\_PDSCH = DATA\_SLOT\_PDSCH +1

[End CNI-127108]

##### 2.9.3.4.2.0-2 DL Data Slot &amp; DL PDSCH PRB DL Data Slot Usage Time (ID: 11192745)

**2.9.3.4.2.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11192755`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
[Before CNI-127108]

For 'NR Cell Utilization's class PM Counters according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) related to DL Data Slot Usage Time PM Counter shall be maintained by incrementing them by DL data slot duration (see 5G\_L2\_541\_replaced([11156744](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25BnwvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or 3GPP 38.211 depending on numerology)  in the following cases:

M55308C00008: DATA\_SLOT\_PDSCH\_TIME = DATA\_SLOT\_PDSCH\_TIME + 'slotDurationUs', in the case that at least one UE was scheduled over the PDSCH in the actual DL data slot in the given cell

Note: It shall be sufficient to base the implemenation on 5G\_L2\_325\_replaced([11192719](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28mgM_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) by processing it with the value of 'slotDurationUs', that means multiplying the counted DL PDSCH slots with the slot duration time in us.

CP2 requirement(s):

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2

[CNI-127108]

Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: DATA\_SLOT\_PDSCH\_TIME

PI ID: M55308C00008

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

For 'NR Cell Utilization's class PM Counters according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) related to DL Data Slot Usage Time PM Counter shall be maintained by incrementing them by DL data slot duration (see 5G\_L2\_541\_replaced([11156744](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25BnwvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or 3GPP 38.211 depending on numerology)  in the case that at least one UE was scheduled over the PDSCH in the actual DL data slot in the given cell.

Increment value :

M55308C00008: DATA\_SLOT\_PDSCH\_TIME = DATA\_SLOT\_PDSCH\_TIME + 'slotDurationUs'

Note: It shall be sufficient to base the implementation on 5G\_L2\_325\_replaced([11192719](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28mgM_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) by processing it with the value of 'slotDurationUs', that means multiplying the counted DL PDSCH slots with the slot duration time in us.

CP2 requirement(s):

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2

[End CNI-127108]

##### 2.9.3.4.2.0-3 DL Data Slot &amp; DL PDSCH PRB PRB and throughput PMQAP profile DL (ID: 12579681)

**2.9.3.4.2.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `12579683`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
Number of scheduled PDSCH slot for profile

---

**2.9.3.4.2.0-3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12579686`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
Measurement: PRB and throughput PMQAP profile

## NetAct name: SCHD\_PDSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP

PI ID: M55363C00005

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

Update time:

When 5G-CP-RT sends PsCell\_CellSetupReq or PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq to 5G-L2-PS with:

* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) AND
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) AND
* actMacResourceUtilizationCounter = 00000010 – Scheduled Slot per PMQAP profile ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))

then 5G-L2-PS shall provide the number of slots that have PDSCH scheduled for a PMQAP profile in a measurement period for FR1. The counter shall consider slots: SSB, TRS and special slots.

Increment value:

5G-L2-PS increments the counter by 1 for all the bearers configured in a profile that are scheduled in one slot.

Example:  
Slot1: If multiple bearers are scheduled in a slot on one PMQAP Profile, update the SCHD\_PDSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP counter by 1.

Slot2; If the scheduled bearers in a slot belong to multiple PMQAP profile, update the SCHD\_PDSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP counter for each PMQAP profile by 1.

Slot 3: If the scheduled bearers in a slot belong to multiple PMQAP profile and additionally one bearer belongs to multiple PMQAP Profiles, update the SCHD\_PDSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP counter for each PMQAP profile (Profile1 and Profile2) by 1.

[image-0][image\_desc]The image displays a diagram illustrating three different "slots" labeled Slot 1 (SSB), Slot 2 (TRS), and Slot 3 (Special). Each slot contains a vertical arrangement of oval shapes, each labeled with "DRB" followed by a number (e.g., DRB1, DRB2). The colors of these ovals vary across the slots, with Slot 1 containing only pink ovals, Slot 2 containing pink, light blue, and purple ovals, and Slot 3 containing pink, light blue, and purple ovals.
To the right of each slot, there is descriptive text.
**Slot 1 (SSB):**
- "Slot 1 (SSB)"
- "DATA\_SLOT\_PDSCH\_PMQAP = 1"
- "Profile1={Drb1,Drb2,Drb3}"
- "SCHD\_PDSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP = 1"
- Visually, it shows three pink ovals labeled DRB1, DRB2, and DRB3 stacked vertically.
**Slot 2 (TRS):**
- "Slot 2 (TRS)"
- "DATA\_SLOT\_PDSCH\_PMQAP = 1"
- "Profile1={Drb1,Drb2}"
- "SCHD\_PDSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP = 1"
- "profile2={Drb3,Drb5}"
- "SCHD\_PDSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP = 1"
- "Profile3={Drb4,Drb6}"
- "SCHD\_PDSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP = 1"
- Visually, it shows six ovals stacked vertically: DRB1 (pink), DRB2 (pink), DRB3 (light blue), DRB4 (light blue), DRB5 (light blue), and DRB6 (purple).
**Slot 3 (Special):**
- "Slot 3 (Special)"
- "DATA\_SLOT\_PDSCH\_PMQAP = 1"
- "Profile1={Drb1,Drb2}"
- "SCHD\_PDSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP = 1"
- "profile2={Drb1,Drb4}"
- "SCHD\_PDSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP = 1"
- "Profile3={Drb5}"
- "SCHD\_PDSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP = 1"
- Visually, it shows four ovals stacked vertically: DRB1 (partially pink, partially purple), DRB2 (pink), DRB3 (light blue), and DRB4 (purple).
The diagram appears to be illustrating different configurations or profiles of data radio bearers (DRBs) within specific time slots, possibly in a telecommunications context.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-05151122.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

**2.9.3.4.2.0-3.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12580117`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
Measurement: PRB and throughput PMQAP profile

## NetAct name: DATA\_SLOT\_PDSCH\_PMQAP

PI ID: M55363C00006

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

Update time:

When 5G-CP-RT sends PsCell\_CellSetupReq or PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq to 5G-L2-PS with:

* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) AND
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) AND
* actMacResourceUtilizationCounter = 00000010 – Scheduled Slot per PMQAP profile ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))

then 5G-L2-PS shall provide the number of slots that are scheduled in PDSCH for FR1. The counter shall consider: SSB, TRS and special slots.

The counter is updated by 1 for each slot that is scheduled for PDSCH.

Increment value:

5G-L2-PS increments the counter by 1 every slot irrespective of the DRBs configured in the profile. Thus, all Profiles configured shall increment this counter by the same value.

Note: The counter is used as a denominator for the counter SCHD\_PDSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP to calculate the average PDSCH slot usage per Profile

Example:

Slot1: If multiple bearers are scheduled in a slot on one PMQAP Profile, update the DATA\_SLOT\_PDSCH\_PMQAP counter by 1.

Slot2: If the scheduled bearers in a slot belong to multiple PMQAP profile, update the DATA\_SLOT\_PDSCH\_PMQAP counter for all PMQAP profile by 1.

Slot 3: If the scheduled bearers in a slot belong to multiple PMQAP profile and additionally one bearer belongs to multiple PMQAP Profiles, update the DATA\_SLOT\_PDSCH\_PMQAP counter for all PMQAP profiles by 1.

Each slot contains a vertical arrangement of oval shapes, each labeled with "DRB" followed by a number (e.g., DRB1, DRB2). The oval shapes are colored pink, light blue, and purple.
To the right of each slot, there is text describing configurations associated with that slot.
**Slot 1 (SSB):**
\* Contains three oval shapes labeled DRB1, DRB2, and DRB3, all colored pink.
\* Associated text:
\* "Slot 1 (SSB)"

\* "Profile1={Drb1,Drb2,Drb3}"
\* "SCHD\_PDSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP = 1"
**Slot 2 (TRS):**
\* Contains six oval shapes labeled DRB1, DRB2, DRB3, DRB4, DRB5, and DRB6.
\* DRB1 and DRB2 are pink.
\* DRB3 and DRB5 are light blue.
\* DRB4 and DRB6 are purple.
\* Associated text:
\* "Slot 2 (TRS)"

\* "SCHD\_PDSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP = 1"
\* "profile2={Drb3,Drb5}"
\* "SCHD\_PDSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP = 1"
\* "Profile3={Drb4,Drb6}"
\* "SCHD\_PDSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP = 1"
**Slot 3 (Special):**

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
Measurement: PRB and throughput PMQAP profile

## NetAct name: UE\_SCHD\_PDSCH\_PMQAP

PI ID: M55363C00007

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

Update time:

When 5G-CP-RT sends PsCell\_CellSetupReq or PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq to 5G-L2-PS with:

* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) AND
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) AND
* actMacResourceUtilizationCounter = 00000001 – Scheduled UEs per slot per PMQAP profile ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))

then 5G-L2-PS shall provide the number of UEs scheduled in a PDSCH slot for a profile in a measurement period for FR1.

The counter shall consider: SSB, TRS and special slots.

Increment value:

5G-L2-PS increments the counter by 1 every UE in all slots in the profile.

Example:

Slot1: If multiple bearers are scheduled in a slot for one UE on one PMQAP Profile, update the UE\_SCHD\_PDSCH\_PMQAP counter by 1.

Slot2: If the scheduled bearers in a slot for multiple UEs belong to multiple PMQAP profile, update the UE\_SCHD\_PDSCH\_PMQAP counter by the number of UEs with scheduled DRBs matching the PMQAP profile.

Slot 3: If the scheduled bearers in a slot for multiple UEs belong to multiple PMQAP profiles and additionally one bearer belongs to multiple PMQAP Profiles, update the UE\_SCHD\_PDSCH\_PMQAP counter for all PMQAP profiles by 1.

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Slots | Slot1 | Slot2 | Slot3 | Slot4 |
| UEs | UE1, UE2 | UE1, UE2, UE3 | UE1 | UE1, UE2 |
| UE\_SCHD\_PDSCH\_PMQAP | 2 | 5 (2 + 3) | 6 (2 + 3 + 1) | 8 (2 + 3 + 1 + 2) |
| MAX\_UE\_SCHD\_PDSCH\_PMQAP | 2 | 3 | 3 | 3 |

To the right of each slot, there is text describing parameters and configurations associated with that slot.

## NetAct name: MAX\_UE\_SCHD\_PDSCH\_PMQAP

PI ID: M55363C00008

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

Update time:

When 5G-CP-RT sends PsCell\_CellSetupReq or PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq to 5G-L2-PS with:

* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) AND
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) AND
* actMacResourceUtilizationCounter = 00000001 – Scheduled UEs per slot per PMQAP profile ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))

then 5G-L2-PS shall collect data of the number of scheduled UEs in PDSCH slot for profile to get the maximum number of UEs scheduled in a PDSCH slot for a profile in a measurement period for FR1.

The counter shall consider: SSB, TRS and special slots.

Increment value:

The maximum UEs is the maximum of the UE\_SCHD\_PDSCH\_PMQAP ([12580113](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_7BIBNDFrEfCRMdP0Nuo3Hg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) in a sampling period.

When 5G-L2-PS has determined UE\_SCHD\_PDSCH\_PMQAP, then 5G-L2-PS shall report it to OAM.

When OAM receives UE\_SCHD\_PDSCH\_PMQAP, then OAM shall calculate the max value within the measurement period and update the MAX\_UE\_SCHD\_PDSCH\_PMQAP counter for PMQAP profile.

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Slots | Slot1 | Slot2 | Slot3 | Slot4 |
| UEs | UE1, UE2 | UE1, UE2, UE3 | UE1 | UE1, UE2 |
| UE\_SCHD\_PDSCH\_PMQAP | 2 | 5 (2 + 3) | 6 (2 + 3 + 1) | 8 (2 + 3 + 1 + 2) |
| MAX\_UE\_SCHD\_PDSCH\_PMQAP | 2 | 3 | 3 | 3 |

##### 2.9.3.4.2.0-4 DL Data Slot &amp; DL PDSCH PRB DL Data Slot Usage with both DCI 1_0 and 1_1 (ID: 11192760)

**2.9.3.4.2.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `11192770`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
[Before CNI-127108]

For 'NR Cell Utilization's class PM Counters, DCI format 1\_0 and 1\_1 scheduling together in same DL Slot related DL slot usage PM Counter shall be maintained by incrementing them +1 in the following cases:

M55308C00036: DL\_DATA\_SLOT\_SIB\_PAG = DL\_DATA\_SLOT\_SIB\_PAG +1

in the case that at least one UE was scheduled in the dedicated BWP in the same DL data slot with SIB/Paging/msg2/msg4 shceduled in the given cell.

[CNI-127108]

Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: DL\_DATA\_SLOT\_SIB\_PAG

PI ID:M55308C00036

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

For 'NR Cell Utilization's class PM Counters, DCI format 1\_0 and 1\_1 scheduling together in same DL Slot related DL slot usage PM Counter shall be maintained by incrementing them

in the case that at least one UE was scheduled in the dedicated BWP in the same DL data slot with SIB/Paging/msg2/msg4 shceduled in the given cell.

Increment value :

M55308C00036: DL\_DATA\_SLOT\_SIB\_PAG = DL\_DATA\_SLOT\_SIB\_PAG +1

[End CNI-127108]

---

##### 2.9.3.4.2.0-5 DL Data Slot &amp; DL PDSCH PRB DL Data Slot Usage Time with both DCI 1_0 and 1_1 (ID: 11192775)

**2.9.3.4.2.0-5.0-2**  (ID: `11192786`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
[Before CNI-127108]

For 'NR Cell Utilization's class PM Counters, DCI format 1\_0 and 1\_1 scheduling together in same DL Slotrelated DL slot usage time PM Counter shall be maintained by incrementing them by DL data slot duration (depending on numerology) in the following cases:

M55308C00037: DL\_DATA\_SLOT\_SIB\_PAG\_TIME = DL\_DATA\_SLOT\_SIB\_PAG\_TIME + 'slotDurationUs'

in the case that at least one UE was scheduled in the dedicated BWP in the same DL data slot with SIB/Paging/msg2/msg4 shceduled in the given cell

Note: It shall be sufficient to base the implemenation on 5G\_L2\_325\_replaced([11192719](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28mgM_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) by processing it with the value of 'slotDurationUs', that means multiplying the counted DL PDSCH slots with the slot duration time in us.

[CNI-127108]

Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: DL\_DATA\_SLOT\_SIB\_PAG\_TIME

PI ID: M55308C00037

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

For 'NR Cell Utilization's class PM Counters, DCI format 1\_0 and 1\_1 scheduling together in same DL Slotrelated DL slot usage time PM Counter shall be maintained by incrementing them

in the case that at least one UE was scheduled in the dedicated BWP in the same DL data slot with SIB/Paging/msg2/msg4 shceduled in the given cell

Increment value :

DL\_DATA\_SLOT\_SIB\_PAG\_TIME = DL\_DATA\_SLOT\_SIB\_PAG\_TIME + 'slotDurationUs'

Note: It shall be sufficient to base the implemenation on 5G\_L2\_325\_replaced([11192719](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28mgM_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) by processing it with the value of 'slotDurationUs', that means multiplying the counted DL PDSCH slots with the slot duration time in us.

[End CNI-127108]

---

##### 2.9.3.4.2.0-6 DL Data Slot &amp; DL PDSCH PRB DL PDCCH OFDM Symbol Usage (ID: 11192791)

**2.9.3.4.2.0-6.0-3**  (ID: `11192807`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
[Before CNI-127108]

With all DlData\_PdcchSendreq messages sent for a given slot and SFN for a given cell (handled by one or more subcells), the 5G-L2-PS, determines the PDCCH symbols used in this slot by counting the number of symbols where the DCI are mapped.

Whatever the CORESET (size, duration), the RNTI and the DCI format ([0,1]\_0 or [0,1]\_1), a symbol used by a DCI is counted only once for this slot.

a DCI is using the number of symbols defined by the "numOfSymbols" starting at the location defined by the "startSymbolNumber".

When the number of PDCCH symbols used in the slot is known, the PM Counters of class 'NR Cell Utilitzation' related to used PDCCH OFDM symbols shall be incremented for the related cell with the number of PDCCH symbols used within the slot for this cell.

M55308C03002, aka PDCCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS, indicates the accumulated number (sum) of OFDM symbols used for PDCCH in the related cell for each slot during the monitoring period.

[CNI-127108]

Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: PDCCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS

PI ID: M55308C03002

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

M55308C03002, aka PDCCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS, indicates the accumulated number (sum) of OFDM symbols used for PDCCH in the related cell for each slot during the monitoring period.

Update time:

With all DlData\_PdcchSendreq messages sent for a given slot and SFN for a given cell (handled by one or more subcells), the 5G-L2-PS, determines the PDCCH symbols used in this slot by counting the number of symbols where the DCI are mapped.

Whatever the CORESET (size, duration), the RNTI and the DCI format ([0,1]\_0 or [0,1]\_1), a symbol used by a DCI is counted only once for this slot.

a DCI is using the number of symbols defined by the "numOfSymbols" starting at the location defined by the "startSymbolNumber".

When the number of PDCCH symbols used in the slot is known, the counter shall be incremented for the related cell .

CP2 requirement(s):

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2

Increment value :

The counter  shall be incremented  with the number of PDCCH symbols used within the slot for this cell.

[End CNI-127108]

---

##### 2.9.3.4.2.0-7 DL Data Slot &amp; DL PDSCH PRB DL PDSCH OFDM Symbol Usage (ID: 11192813)

**2.9.3.4.2.0-7.0-2**  (ID: `11192821`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
[Before CNI-127108]

When sending a "DlData\_PdschSendReq message by L2-PS to DL-L1 PM Counters of class 'NR Cell Utilitzation' related to used PDSCH OFDM symbols shall be incremented for the related subcell.

M55308C03001, aka PDSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS, indicates the accumulated number (sum) of OFDM symbols used for PDSCH in the related cell.

One DlData\_PdschSendReq message per TBS shall be sent to the related subcell. For each TBS related message the parameters 'startSymbolNumber' and 'numOfSymbols' are is relevant.

1.) Upon sending DlData\_PdschSendreq the related cell shall be indentified by the subcellId

2.) Assess parameters 'startSymbolNumber' and 'numOfPdschSymbols'

3.) PDSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS = PDSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS + numOfPdschSymbols

CP2 requirement(s):

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2

[CNI-127108]

Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: PDSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS

PI ID: M55308C03001

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

M55308C03001, aka PDSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS, indicates the accumulated number (sum) of OFDM symbols used for PDSCH in the related cell.

Update time:

When sending a "DlData\_PdschSendReq message by L2-PS to DL-L1 PM Counters of class 'NR Cell Utilitzation' related to used PDSCH OFDM symbols shall be incremented for the related subcell.

One DlData\_PdschSendReq message per TBS shall be sent to the related subcell. For each TBS related message the parameter 'numOfSymbols is relevant.

1.) Upon sending DlData\_PdschSendreq the related cell shall be indentified by the subcellId

2.) Assess numOfPdschSymbols'

3.) PDSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS = PDSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS + numOfPdschSymbols

CP2 requirement(s):

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2

Increment value :

PDSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS = PDSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS + numOfPdschSymbols

[End CNI-127108]

---

##### 2.9.3.4.2.0-8 DL Data Slot &amp; DL PDSCH PRB DL PDSCH OFDM Symbol Usage (ID: 11192827)

**2.9.3.4.2.0-8.0-4**  (ID: `11192847`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
[Before CNI-127108]

When sending a "DlData\_PdschSendReq message by L2-PS to DL-L1 PM Counters of class 'NR Cell Utilitzation' related to used PDSCH OFDM symbols time shall be incremented for the related subcell.

M55308C03005, aka PDSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS\_TIME, indicates the accumulated (sum of) of OFDM symbols time used for PDSCH in the related cell.

The implementation of the PM Counter shall be based on the PM Counter in 5G\_L2\_331\_replaced([11192813](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28nHQvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), that counts the DL PDSCH OFDM Symbols.

To process the time duration of the symbols the following step 4.) shall be done after 5G\_L2\_331\_replaced([11192813](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28nHQvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)):

4.)  PDSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS\_TIME = PDSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS\_TIME + numOfPdschSymbols\*(slotDurationUs/OFDM\_SYMBOLS\_PER\_SLOT)

CP2 requirement(s):

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2

If slowPrbPoolingAllowed set to 'true'  and slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed is 'false', no allocation could be allowed in particular PdschSymbols  due to allocation  on other cells see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2382\_replaced([11115299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7609\_replaced([11115123](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX5PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed is 'true',no allocation could be allowed in particular PdschSymbols  due to allocation  on other cells see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2382\_replaced([11115299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19557\_replaced([11115143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Potentially the way this counter counts should be changed.

[CNI-127108]

Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: PDSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS\_TIME

PI ID: M55308C03005

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

M55308C03005, aka PDSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS\_TIME, indicates the accumulated (sum of) of OFDM symbols time used for PDSCH in the related cell.

Update time:

When sending a "DlData\_PdschSendReq message by L2-PS to DL-L1 the counter  shall be incremented for the related subcell.

The implementation of the PM Counter shall be based on the PM Counter in 5G\_L2\_331\_replaced([11192813](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28nHQvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), that counts the DL PDSCH OFDM Symbols.

To process the time duration of the symbols the following step 4.) shall be done after 5G\_L2\_331\_replaced([11192813](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28nHQvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)):

4.)

CP2 requirement(s):

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2

Increment value :

PDSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS\_TIME = PDSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS\_TIME + numOfPdschSymbols\*(slotDurationUs/OFDM\_SYMBOLS\_PER\_SLOT)

If slowPrbPoolingAllowed set to 'true'  and slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed is 'false', no allocation could be allowed in particular PdschSymbols  due to allocation  on other cells see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2382\_replaced([11115299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7609\_replaced([11115123](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX5PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed is 'true',no allocation could be allowed in particular PdschSymbols  due to allocation  on other cells see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2382\_replaced([11115299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19557\_replaced([11115143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Potentially the way this counter counts should be changed.

[End CNI-127108]

##### 2.9.3.4.2.0-9 DL Data Slot &amp; DL PDSCH PRB DL PDSCH PRB Used with multiple dedicated BWPs (ID: 11192852)

**2.9.3.4.2.0-9.0-4**  (ID: `11192872`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
[Before CNI-127108]

If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and if there is PS BWP configured (with BWP PROFILE as power saving also  denoted as PSBWP )

For "DlData\_PdschSendReq" message, the related cell shall be identified by the subcellId and for each grant in the message, there shall be a check to confirm if grant is for a UE in PS BWP based on ue's c-rnti.

If the check qualifies then following counters shall be incremented.

M55308C29005, aka PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_BWP\_PS, indicates the number of used PRB for PDSCH for power saving BWP in the related cell.

M55308C29001, aka PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_BWP1, This counter provides the number of physical resource blocks (PRBs) used for a PDSCH for BWP1.

M55308C29003, aka PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_BWP2, This counter provides the number of physical resource blocks (PRBs) used for a PDSCH for BWP2.

M55308C00085, aka PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_BWP3, This counter provides the number of physical resource blocks (PRBs) used for a PDSCH for BWP3.

Note 1: This counter isn't updated when a control message (SRB data, RA Resp (msg2), or RA msg4) is scheduled over PDSCH, as it belongs to the initial bandwidth part (BWP) and not to BWP1, BWP2 or BWP3.

Note 2: When some resources from the whole bandwidth are used at a given time by the BWPx, the other BWPs can't use the same resources at the same time, which may result in lower usage of PRBs for other BWPs.

Note 3: This counter is incremented when there are multiple dedicated bandwidth parts configured within a 5G cell.

Note 4: The dedicated BWPs are numbered in ascending order of the bandwidth size"

CP2 requirement(s):

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2

[CNI-127108]

Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_BWP\_PS, PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_BWP1,PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_BWP2,PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_BWP3

PI ID: M55308C29005, M55308C29001, M55308C29003, M55308C00085

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

When a DL grant of iniTx or reTx is sent on PDCCH for power-saving BWP, the scheduled PRB amount is incremented into the counter.

Update time:

If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and if there is PS BWP configured (with BWP PROFILE as power saving also  denoted as PSBWP )

For "DlData\_PdschSendReq" message, the related cell shall be identified by the subcellId and for each grant in the message, there shall be a check to confirm if grant is for a UE in PS BWP based on ue's c-rnti.

If the check qualifies then following counters shall be incremented.

M55308C29005, aka PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_BWP\_PS, indicates the number of used PRB for PDSCH for power saving BWP in the related cell.

M55308C29001, aka PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_BWP1, This counter provides the number of physical resource blocks (PRBs) used for a PDSCH for BWP1.

M55308C29003, aka PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_BWP2, This counter provides the number of physical resource blocks (PRBs) used for a PDSCH for BWP2.

M55308C00085, aka PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_BWP3, This counter provides the number of physical resource blocks (PRBs) used for a PDSCH for BWP3.

Note 1: This counter isn't updated when a control message (SRB data, RA Resp (msg2), or RA msg4) is scheduled over PDSCH, as it belongs to the initial bandwidth part (BWP) and not to BWP1, BWP2 or BWP3.

Note 2: When some resources from the whole bandwidth are used at a given time by the BWPx, the other BWPs can't use the same resources at the same time, which may result in lower usage of PRBs for other BWPs.

Note 3: This counter is incremented when there are multiple dedicated bandwidth parts configured within a 5G cell.

Note 4: The dedicated BWPs are numbered in ascending order of the bandwidth size"

CP2 requirement(s):

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2

Increment value :

number of physical resource blocks (PRBs) used for a PDSCH in the bandwidth

[End CNI-127108]

##### 2.9.3.4.2.0-10 DL Data Slot &amp; DL PDSCH PRB DL PDSCH Number of scheduled UEs (ID: 11192878)

**2.9.3.4.2.0-10.0-1**  (ID: `11192882`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
Accumulated number of UEs scheduled in DL per slot per  BWP

---

**2.9.3.4.2.0-10.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11192897`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
[Before CNI-127108]

If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and if there is PS BWP configured (with BWP PROFILE as power saving also  denoted as PSBWP )

For "DlData\_PdschSendReq" message, the related cell shall be identified by the subcellId and for each grant in the message, there shall be a check to confirm if grant is for a UE in PS BWP based on ue's c-rnti.

If the check qualifies then following counters shall be incremented by no of UEs scheduled in PUSCH

M55308C28009, aka ACC\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP\_PS, indicates Accumulated number of UEs scheduled in DL per slot per Power Saving BWP.

M55308C28010, aka MAX\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP\_PS, indicates Maximum number of UEs scheduled in DL per slot per Power Saving BWP.

M55308C28001, aka ACC\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP1, This counter indicates the accumulated number of P(S)Cell or SCell UEs which are scheduled in DL per slot and per BWP1.

M55308C28002, aka MAX\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP1, This counter indicates the maximum number of P(S)Cell or SCell UEs which are scheduled in DL per slot and per BWP1.

M55308C28005, aka ACC\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP2, This counter indicates the accumulated number of P(S)Cell or SCell UEs which are scheduled in DL per slot and per BWP2.

M55308C28006, aka MAX\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP2, This counter indicates the maximum number of P(S)Cell or SCell UEs which are scheduled in DL per slot and per BWP2.

M55308C00081, aka ACC\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP3, This counter indicates the accumulated number of P(S)-Cell or S-Cell UEs which are scheduled in DL per slot and per BWP3.

M55308C00082, aka MAX\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP3, This counter indicates the maximum number of P(S)-Cell or S-Cell UEs which are scheduled in DL per slot and per BWP3.

Note 1: This counter is incremented when there are multiple dedicated bandwidth parts configured within 5G cell.

Note 2: The dedicated BWPs are numbered in ascending order of the bandwidth size.

CP2 requirement(s):

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2

[CNI-127108]

Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: ACC\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP\_PS, ACC\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP1, ACC\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP2, ACC\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP3

PI ID: M55308C28009, M55308C28001, M55308C28005, M55308C00081

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and if there is PS BWP configured (with BWP PROFILE as power saving also  denoted as PSBWP )

For "DlData\_PdschSendReq" message, the related cell shall be identified by the subcellId and for each grant in the message, there shall be a check to confirm if grant is for a UE in PS BWP based on ue's c-rnti.

If the check qualifies then following counters shall be incremented by no of UEs scheduled in PUSCH

M55308C28009, aka ACC\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP\_PS, indicates Accumulated number of UEs scheduled in DL per slot per Power Saving BWP.

M55308C28001, aka ACC\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP1, This counter indicates the accumulated number of P(S)Cell or SCell UEs which are scheduled in DL per slot and per BWP1.

M55308C28005, aka ACC\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP2, This counter indicates the accumulated number of P(S)Cell or SCell UEs which are scheduled in DL per slot and per BWP2.

M55308C00081, aka ACC\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP3, This counter indicates the accumulated number of P(S)-Cell or S-Cell UEs which are scheduled in DL per slot and per BWP3.

Note 1: This counter is incremented when there are multiple dedicated bandwidth parts configured within 5G cell.

Note 2: The dedicated BWPs are numbered in ascending order of the bandwidth size.

Increment value :

number of UEs scheduled in DL per slot in the bandwidth

CP2 requirement(s):

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2

[End CNI-127108]

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
Maximum number of UEs scheduled in DL per slot per  BWP

---

**2.9.3.4.2.0-10.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11192908`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: MAX\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP\_PS, MAX\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP1, MAX\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP2, MAX\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP3

PI ID: M55308C28010, M55308C28002, M55308C28006, M55308C00082

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and if there is PS BWP configured (with BWP PROFILE as power saving also  denoted as PSBWP )

For "DlData\_PdschSendReq" message, the related cell shall be identified by the subcellId and for each grant in the message, there shall be a check to confirm if grant is for a UE in PS BWP based on ue's c-rnti.

If the check qualifies then following counters shall be incremented by no of UEs scheduled in PUSCH, if "UEs scheduled in DL per slot per BWP\_x " during the previous sampling time is larger than the previous maximum value.

M55308C28010, aka MAX\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP\_PS, indicates Maximum number of UEs scheduled in DL per slot per Power Saving BWP.

M55308C28002, aka MAX\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP1, This counter indicates the maximum number of P(S)Cell or SCell UEs which are scheduled in DL per slot and per BWP1.

M55308C28006, aka MAX\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP2, This counter indicates the maximum number of P(S)Cell or SCell UEs which are scheduled in DL per slot and per BWP2.

M55308C00082, aka MAX\_UE\_DL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP3, This counter indicates the maximum number of P(S)-Cell or S-Cell UEs which are scheduled in DL per slot and per BWP3.

Note 1: This counter is incremented when there are multiple dedicated bandwidth parts configured within 5G cell.

Note 2: The dedicated BWPs are numbered in ascending order of the bandwidth size.

CP2 requirement(s):

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2

Increment value :

No of UEs scheduled in PUSCH

CP2 requirement(s):

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2

##### 2.9.3.4.2.0-11 DL Data Slot &amp; DL PDSCH PRB DL PRB and throughput PMQAP profile Counters (ID: 11192912)

**2.9.3.4.2.0-11.0-1**  (ID: `11192917`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
Number of DL PRBs used for data traffic for PMQAP

---

**2.9.3.4.2.0-11.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11192923`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
Number of DL PRBs used for data traffic for PMQAP internal counters

---

**2.9.3.4.2.0-11.0-1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11192931`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
5G-L2-PS shall maintain internal counters for the PM counter report:

numUsedPrbsForPdschPerPmqapProfileCurrentSlot[pmqapProfileIndex]

for each configured PMQAP profile in pmQapIndexList in Cell Setup (5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or Cell Reconfiguration (5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

pmqapProfileIndex range [Before CB008933-A] [0.. 19] [CB008933-A] [0.. 39] [End CB008933-A].

Those internal counters should be maintained with float precision.

---

**2.9.3.4.2.0-11.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11192936`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
Updating Number of DL PRBs used for data traffic for PMQAP internal counters

---

**2.9.3.4.2.0-11.0-1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11192941`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
During slot processing numUsedPrbsForPdschPerPmqapProfileCurrentSlot[pmqapProfileIndex] (see. 5G\_L2\_8436\_replaced([11192923](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28nuV_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) internal counters are updated with total number of PRBs used for PDSCH, related with given PMQAP profile in current slot.

In order to calculate number of PRBs used for PDSCH for PMQAP profile 5G-L2-PS should keep track about following information per UE per TB for newTx and reTx:

* tbSizeInBytes - transport block size for single TB, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4621\_replaced([11192057](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kviITvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),
* numPrbs - total number of PRBs for single TB, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4487\_replaced([11179166](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku4A_PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),
* scheduledBytes - total number of scheduled bytes for single DRB, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4550\_replaced([11185672](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvUs7fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For calculating number of PRBs used for single DRB, 5G L2 PS should follow below formula:

numPrbsForSingleDrb = (scheduledBytes/tbSizeInBytes) \* numPrbs;

Then numPrbsForSingleDrb should be used to update each corresponding profile using pmQapIndexList from Bearer Setup (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_397\_replaced([10974876](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U-o4vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

numPrbsForSingleDrb should be maintained with float precision.

---

**2.9.3.4.2.0-11.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11192946`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
Number of DL PRBs used for data traffic for PMQAP PM Counters

---

**2.9.3.4.2.0-11.0-1.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11192956`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
[Before CNI-127108]

In each slot 5G-L2-PS will update DL\_PRB\_USED\_DATA\_PMQAP (M55363C00001), for each configured PMQAP profile as follows:

update of DL\_PRB\_USED\_DATA\_PMQAP should be done using integer values.

IF (numUsedPrbsForPdschPerPmqapProfileCurrentSlot[pmqapProfileIndex] > 0) AND (numUsedPrbsForPdschPerPmqapProfileCurrentSlot[pmqapProfileIndex] < 1)

numUsedPrbsForPdschPerPmqapProfileInteger = 1

ELSE

numUsedPrbsForPdschPerPmqapProfileInteger = ROUND(numUsedPrbsForPdschPerPmqapProfileCurrentSlot[pmqapProfileIndex]) (see. 5G\_L2\_8436\_replaced([11192923](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28nuV_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

END

DL\_PRB\_USED\_DATA\_PMQAP for configured pmqapProfileIndex += numUsedPrbsForPdschPerPmqapProfileInteger;

Then numUsedPrbsForPdschPerPmqapProfileCurrentSlot[pmqapProfileIndex] are reset to 0.

[CNI-127108]

Measurement: PRB and throughput PMQAP profile

NetAct name: DL\_PRB\_USED\_DATA\_PMQAP

PI ID: M55363C00001

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

In each slot 5G-L2-PS will update DL\_PRB\_USED\_DATA\_PMQAP (M55363C00001), for each configured PMQAP profile as follows:

update of DL\_PRB\_USED\_DATA\_PMQAP should be done using integer values.

IF (numUsedPrbsForPdschPerPmqapProfileCurrentSlot[pmqapProfileIndex] > 0) AND (numUsedPrbsForPdschPerPmqapProfileCurrentSlot[pmqapProfileIndex] < 1)

numUsedPrbsForPdschPerPmqapProfileInteger = 1

ELSE

numUsedPrbsForPdschPerPmqapProfileInteger = ROUND(numUsedPrbsForPdschPerPmqapProfileCurrentSlot[pmqapProfileIndex]) (see. 5G\_L2\_8436\_replaced([11192923](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28nuV_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

END

DL\_PRB\_USED\_DATA\_PMQAP for configured pmqapProfileIndex += numUsedPrbsForPdschPerPmqapProfileInteger;

Then numUsedPrbsForPdschPerPmqapProfileCurrentSlot[pmqapProfileIndex] are reset to 0.

Increment value :

number of physical resource blocks (PRBs),  integer value

[End CNI-127108]

Maximum DL PRB Utilization for PMQAP

**2.9.3.4.2.0-11.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11192968`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
Maximum DL PRB Utilization for PMQAP PM Counters

---

**2.9.3.4.2.0-11.0-2.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11192980`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
[Before CNI-127108]

In each slot 5G-L2-PS will update DL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX\_PMQAP (M55363C00003) for each configured PMQAP pmqapProfileIndex as follows:

dlPrbUtilSlotMaxPmqapCurrentSlot[pmqapProfileIndex] = ROUND((numUsedPrbsForPdschPerPmqapProfileInteger[pmqapProfileIndex] \* 100) / numOfPdschPrbs)

for:

* numUsedPrbsForPdschPerPmqapProfileInteger[pmqapProfileIndex], see 5G\_L2\_8434\_replaced([11192946](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28nuXPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),
* numOfPdschPrbs, see 5G\_L2\_260\_replaced([11192617](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28lSH_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

DL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX\_PMQAP = MAX(DL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX\_PMQAP; dlPrbUtilSlotMaxPmqapCurrentSlot[pmqapProfileIndex])

[CNI-127108]

Measurement: PRB and throughput PMQAP profile

NetAct name: DL\_PRB\_USED\_DATA\_PMQAP

PI ID: M55363C00001

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

In each slot 5G-L2-PS will update DL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX\_PMQAP (M55363C00003) for each configured PMQAP pmqapProfileIndex as follows:

dlPrbUtilSlotMaxPmqapCurrentSlot[pmqapProfileIndex] = ROUND((numUsedPrbsForPdschPerPmqapProfileInteger[pmqapProfileIndex] \* 100) / numOfPdschPrbs)

for:

* numUsedPrbsForPdschPerPmqapProfileInteger[pmqapProfileIndex], see 5G\_L2\_8434\_replaced([11192946](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28nuXPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),
* numOfPdschPrbs, see 5G\_L2\_260\_replaced([11192617](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28lSH_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

DL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX\_PMQAP = MAX(DL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX\_PMQAP; dlPrbUtilSlotMaxPmqapCurrentSlot[pmqapProfileIndex])

Increment value :

Scheduled PRB amount

[End CNI-127108]

**2.9.3.4.2.0-11.0-3**  (ID: `11192986`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
Diagnostic information for DL PRB and throughput PMQAP profile Counters

---

**2.9.3.4.2.0-11.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11192997`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
Printing diagnostic information for PRB and throughput PMQAP profile Counters is controlled with R&D parameter rdDlPrbAndThroughputPmqapProfileDiagnosticBitmap (see 5G\_L2\_8463\_replaced([11182469](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27cClPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [CB008933-A] and rdDlPrbAndThroughputPmqapProfileDiagnosticBitmap2 (see 5G\_L2\_18428\_replaced([11182484](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27cCl_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB008933-A]. These bitmaps defines for which PMQAP profile diagnostic prints shall be enabled during measurements aggregation for PRB and throughput PMQAP profile Counters.

To determine if the diagnostic information shall be printed, 5G-L2-PS checks bit value under bitIndex of rdDlPrbAndThroughputPmqapProfileDiagnosticBitmap, corresponding to pmqapProfileIndex from pmQapIndexList in Cell Setup (5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or Cell Reconfiguration (5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

If the bit value is set to 1, 5G-L2-PS prints the diagnostic information.

---

##### 2.9.3.4.2.0-12 DL Data Slot &amp; DL PDSCH PRB PRB_AVAIL_PDSCH_BB_POOL (ID: 11193002)

**2.9.3.4.2.0-12.0-5**  (ID: `12885823`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
**Measurement: NR Cell Utilization**

**NetAct name: PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL**

**PI ID: M55308C10005**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

This  counter will be updated only if **isAnyDlPrbPoolingActive [5G\_L2\_IF\_14\_replaced([10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))] is enabled. This counter shows the PRB available from frequency point of view. Capacity limitations from PRB pooling are considered.**

**Update time:**

In each available slot with PDSCH**including SSB slot without TRS and TRS slot, PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL is updated as below :**

If slowPrbPoolingAllowed

PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL += min (CRM\_allocation, numAllocCellPrb) - reservedPrb

else if slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed :

if  actSpecificBwpSize is False, PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL += min (dlBandwidth,numAllocCellPrb)  - reservedPrb

else

actSpecificBwpSize is True, PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL += min (cellBwp.bandwidth of dedicated BWP in PsCell\_CellSetupReq message,numAllocCellPrb)  - reservedPrb

end if

end if

Where

 numAllocCellPrb is the DL cell PRB amount allocated by baseband resource manager (BBRM)

 CRM\_allocation is considered only if DSS mode > 2 and is the available PDSCH RBGs as informed to L2-PS via the EN DSS DL CELL RESOURCE AREA ALLOCATION REQUEST (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4744\_replaced([11172253](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuK2VPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

 reservedPrb =

o for SSB slot, if numPdschPrbInSsbSlots in PsCell\_CellSetupReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_61\_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) OR PsCell\_CellRconfigurationReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **is greater than zero, the value of reservedPrb shall include PRBs in RBGs which are not available for PDSCH, that is the RBG contain at least 1 blanked PRB or 1 SSB PRB.**

o for TRS slot, if numPdschPrbInTrsSlots in PsCell\_CellSetupReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_61\_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) OR PsCell\_CellRconfigurationReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is greater than zero, the value of reservedPrb shall include PRBs in RBGs which are not available for PDSCH, that is the RBG contain at least 1 blanked PRB or 1 TRS PRB.

o for other slots than SSB or TRS, reservedPrb is set to 0.

o if actPRBBlanking is enabled, L2PS could consider additional PRBs not available for PDSCH. Indeed, BBRM do not allocate blanked PRB, however, L2PS considers PRBs in RBGs which are not available for PDSCH, that is, the RBG contain at least 1 blanked PRB.

 dlBandwidth is the maximum number of downlink Resources Blocks as given in PsCell\_CellSetupReq message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_61\_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

**Note: if DSS enabled (DSS mode >= 2), only DL slots that are assigned to NR (5G\_UP\_ALG\_10192\_replaced([11171912](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuIaFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) are considered when updating PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL counter**

**Note: The changes under flag  slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed are applicable for Large Baseband Pooling (CB007112) also.**

**[CB012623-B]**

**Note 1： This counter also includes the number of PRBs that are muted to mitigate SSB interference. refer to [12680269: Impact on Counter and KPI definition](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_arZNjFALEfCeeMlEb49MrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)**

**[End CB012623-B]**

**Increment value : number of available PDSCH PRBs**

---

##### 2.9.3.4.2.0-13 DL Data Slot &amp; DL PDSCH PRB Number of layer PRBs available for PDSCH with L1 baseband pooling activated (ID: 11193028)

**2.9.3.4.2.0-13.0-1**  (ID: `11193033`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
[Before CNI-127108]

LAYER\_PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL (M55308C36005) counter will be updated only if slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed [5G\_L2\_IF\_14\_replaced([10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))] is enabled.

This counter shows the layer PRBs available from frequency point of view. Capacity limitations from layer PRB pooling are considered.

In each available DL  slot including SSB slot and TRS slot, LAYER\_PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL is updated as below :

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed

- if the slot is not a SSB or TRS slot:

LAYER\_PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL += rrmMaxNumLayerPrbPerSlot

- if the slot is a SSB slot:

LAYER\_PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL += min(rrmMaxNumLayerPrbPerSlot, numPdschPrbInSsbSlots \* MaxNumDlLayer)

- if the slot is a TRS slot:

LAYER\_PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL += min(rrmMaxNumLayerPrbPerSlot, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots \* MaxNumDlLayer)

- if the slot is a SSB and TRS slot:

LAYER\_PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL += min(rrmMaxNumLayerPrbPerSlot, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots \* MaxNumDlLayer, numPdschPrbInSsbSlots \* MaxNumDlLayer)

end if

Where

 rrmMaxNumLayerPrbPerSlot = numAllocCellLayerPrbDl is the maximum number of usable layer PRBs (defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

 numAllocCellLayerPrbDl is the DL cell layer PRBs amount allocated by baseband resource manager (BBRM) thanks to PsInternal\_ResourceResp refer to 5G\_L2\_8852\_replaced([11243971](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3BzwXPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

  MaxNumDlLayer: maximum number of DL layers possible in the cell according to the cell definition.

 for SSB slot, numPdschPrbInSsbSlots in PsCell\_CellSetupReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_61\_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or PsCell\_CellRconfigurationReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is greater than zero.

 for TRS slot, if numPdschPrbInTrsSlots in PsCell\_CellSetupReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_61\_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or PsCell\_CellRconfigurationReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is greater than zero.

[CNI-127108]

Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: LAYER\_PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL

PI ID: M55308C36005

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

LAYER\_PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL (M55308C36005) counter will be updated only if slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed [5G\_L2\_IF\_14\_replaced([10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))] is enabled.

This counter shows the layer PRBs available from frequency point of view. Capacity limitations from layer PRB pooling are considered.

Update time:

In each available[before PR794149]DL [End PR794149]  slot [PR794149]with PDSCH [End PR794149]  including SSB slot and TRS slot, LAYER\_PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL is updated as below :

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed

- if the slot is not a SSB or TRS slot:

LAYER\_PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL += rrmMaxNumLayerPrbPerSlot

- if the slot is a SSB slot:

LAYER\_PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL += min(rrmMaxNumLayerPrbPerSlot, numPdschPrbInSsbSlots \* MaxNumDlLayer)

- if the slot is a TRS slot:

LAYER\_PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL += min(rrmMaxNumLayerPrbPerSlot, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots \* MaxNumDlLayer)

- if the slot is a SSB and TRS slot:

LAYER\_PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL += min(rrmMaxNumLayerPrbPerSlot, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots \* MaxNumDlLayer, numPdschPrbInSsbSlots \* MaxNumDlLayer)

end if

Where

 rrmMaxNumLayerPrbPerSlot = numAllocCellLayerPrbDl is the maximum number of usable layer PRBs (defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

 numAllocCellLayerPrbDl is the DL cell layer PRBs amount allocated by baseband resource manager (BBRM) thanks to PsInternal\_ResourceResp refer to 5G\_L2\_8852\_replaced([11243971](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3BzwXPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

  MaxNumDlLayer: maximum number of DL layers possible in the cell according to the cell definition.

 for SSB slot, numPdschPrbInSsbSlots in PsCell\_CellSetupReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_61\_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or PsCell\_CellRconfigurationReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is greater than zero.

 for TRS slot, if numPdschPrbInTrsSlots in PsCell\_CellSetupReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_61\_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or PsCell\_CellRconfigurationReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is greater than zero.

Increment value : number of available layer PRBs

[End CNI-127108]

---

##### 2.9.3.4.2.0-14 DL Data Slot &amp; DL PDSCH PRB Number of layer PRBs used for PDSCH with L1 baseband pooling activated (ID: 11193039)

**2.9.3.4.2.0-14.0-1**  (ID: `11193044`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
[Before CNI-127108]

LAYER\_PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL (M55308C36006) counter will be updated only if slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed [5G\_L2\_IF\_14\_replaced([10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))] is enabled.

This counter shows the consumed layer PRBs.

In each available DL slot and for each PDSCH UE allocation, LAYER\_PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL is updated as below :

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed

LAYER\_PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL += rrmNumLayerPrbUsedPerAllocation

end if

Where

 rrmNumLayerPrbUsedPerAllocation is the number of layer PRBs consumed for each allocation per UE (Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[CNI-127108]

Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: LAYER\_PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL

PI ID: M55308C36006

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

LAYER\_PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL (M55308C36006) counter will be updated only if  slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed [5G\_L2\_IF\_14\_replaced([10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))] is enabled.

This counter shows the consumed layer PRBs.

Update time:

In each available DL slot and for each PDSCH UE allocation, LAYER\_PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL is updated as below :

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed

LAYER\_PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_BB\_POOL += rrmNumLayerPrbUsedPerAllocation

end if

Where

 rrmNumLayerPrbUsedPerAllocation is the number of layer PRBs consumed for each allocation per UE (Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Increment value : number of used layer PRBs

[End CNI-127108]

##### 2.9.3.4.2.0-15 DL Data Slot &amp; DL PDSCH PRB The number of downlink UEs which were blocked from scheduling due to throughput limit. (ID: 11193049)

**2.9.3.4.2.0-15.0-1**  (ID: `11193054`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: BLOCKED\_PDSCH\_UE\_COUNT

PI ID: M55308CRD54020

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

BLOCKED\_PDSCH\_UE\_COUNT (M55308CRD54020) counter will be updated only when Throughput Pooling is enabled i.e. tddInstTputPoolingAllowed == true. This counter aggregates the number of UEs which are blocked due to throughput limit i.e. the throughput needed for the UE (based on its PRB allocation) is not possible to be allocated to the UE.

In each available DL slot and for each UE which is blocked from scheduling, BLOCKED\_PDSCH\_UE\_COUNT is updated as below

if(tddInstTputPoolingAllowed == true)

BLOCKED\_PDSCH\_UE\_COUNT++

* Refer 5G\_L2\_21245\_replaced([11150227](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24ajzvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for scenarios in which counter update is required.
* For ReTx UE (adaptive/non-adaptive) if available throughput is less than the required throughput this counter is updated.
* For MSG2 and MSG4 UE this counter is updated if available throughput is less than the required throughput.
* For NewTx UEs this counter is updated if even after the PRB reduction the throughput required is more than the remaining throughput for the cell.

Increment value : The number of blocked PDSCH UEs.

---

##### 2.9.3.4.2.0-16 DL Data Slot &amp; DL PDSCH PRB The number of reduced downlink subcell PRBs due to throughput limit. (ID: 11193059)

**2.9.3.4.2.0-16.0-1**  (ID: `11193064`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: REDUCED\_PDSCH\_SUBCELL\_PRB\_COUNT

PI ID: M55308CRD54022

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

REDUCED\_PDSCH\_SUBCELL\_PRB\_COUNT (M55308CRD54022) counter will be updated only when Throughput Pooling is enabled i.e. tddInstTputPoolingAllowed == true.

This counter aggregates the number of subcell PRBs reduced/shaved from the UE to meet the throughput limit i.e. the UE required/needed throughput is not possible to be allocated for the UE and some subcell PRBs are reduced to meet the throughput limits.

In each available DL slot and for a UE for which the PRBs are reduced due to throughput requirement, REDUCED\_PDSCH\_SUBCELL\_PRB\_COUNT is updated as below:

if(tddInstTputPoolingAllowed == true)

REDUCED\_PDSCH\_SUBCELL\_PRB\_COUNT += rrmNumOfPrbShaved

For more detail refer 5G\_L2\_21245\_replaced([11150227](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24ajzvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Increment value : The number of reduced subcell PRBs.

---

##### 2.9.3.4.2.0-17 DL Data Slot &amp; DL PDSCH PRB Downlink Initial and Re-transmission data volume with multiple dedicated BWPs (ID: 12827151)

**2.9.3.4.2.0-17.0-1**  (ID: `12827100`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
Initial and Re-transmission data volume in DL dedicated BWP1

---

**2.9.3.4.2.0-17.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12827101`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
**Measurement: NR Dynamic BWP**

**NetAct name: PDSCH\_INIRE\_VOL\_BWP1**

**PI ID: M55351C00003**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).**

**Update time:**

PDSCH\_INIRE\_VOL\_BWP1, indicates the number of bytes scheduled in initial or re-transmission is sent in "DlData\_PdschSendReq" ([11512737](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRrpO_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRrpO_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")) for BWP 1 in the related cell. The criteria for BWP1 identification is specified in the NIDD.

**Increment value: No additional details as compared to NIDD.**

---

**2.9.3.4.2.0-17.0-2**  (ID: `12827152`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
Initial and Re-transmission data volume in DL dedicated BWP2

---

**2.9.3.4.2.0-17.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12827153`)

DL Data Slot & DL PDSCH PRB
**Measurement: NR Dynamic BWP**

**NetAct name: PDSCH\_INIRE\_VOL\_BWP2**

**PI ID: M55351C00004**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).**

**Update time:**

PDSCH\_INIRE\_VOL\_BWP2, indicates the number of bytes scheduled in initial or re-transmission is sent in "DlData\_PdschSendReq" ([11512737](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRrpO_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRrpO_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")) for BWP2 in the related cell. The criteria. The criteria for BWP2 identification is specified in the NIDD.

**Increment value: No additional details as compared to NIDD.**

#### 2.9.3.4.3 Measurements before FD-Polite widening loop

##### 2.9.3.4.3.0-1 Measurements before FD-Polite widening loop Number of PRBs planned to be allocated for PDSCH before the Power Optimization step is applied (ID: 12795885)

**2.9.3.4.3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12795886`)

Measurements before FD-Polite widening loop
Measurement: NR Resource Utilization per CELL  
NetAct name: PRB\_ALLOC\_PDSCH\_BFR\_PO\_STEP  
PI ID: M55165C00040  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

Update time: 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter after non-POLITE FD allocations are finalized in DL, before FD-POLITE PRB widening loop (see [12533165](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_jm0A4Bw4EfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) would alter UE allocation, regardless of value of actFdpolite (see [10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) and regardless of whether FD-POLITE PRB widening is activated in the slot (see [12533182](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_oNYRdxw6EfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

Increment value: 5G-L2-PS shall increment the counter with the selected number of PRBs before FD-POLITE PRB widening loop for each UE with DL transmission scheduled, regardless of whether Power Optimization loop would alter the UE allocation.

Note: When actLteNrDssLteCatM is enabled and actRat1Alloc = true only PRBs overlapping with Cat-M NBs aren't counted. This counter is also updated for SRB data, MSG2, MSG4, but not for SIB and it does not include PRBs reserved for boosting the power of VoNR or SRB1/SRB2 retransmissions.

---

##### 2.9.3.4.3.0-2 Measurements before FD-Polite widening loop Average MCS allocation before the Power Optimization step is applied to 64QAM table for initial transmission (ID: 12795887)

**2.9.3.4.3.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12795888`)

Measurements before FD-Polite widening loop
Measurement: NR DL HARQ  
NetAct name: AVG\_MCS\_INITX\_BFR\_PO\_64QAM  
PI ID: M55300C00060  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

Update time: 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter after non-POLITE FD allocations are finalized in DL, before FD-POLITE PRB widening loop (see [12533165](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_jm0A4Bw4EfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) would alter UE allocation, regardless of value of actFdpolite (see [10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) and regardless of whether FD-POLITE PRB widening is activated in the slot (see [12533182](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_oNYRdxw6EfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

Increment value: 5G-L2-PS shall increment the counter with selected MCS value before FD-POLITE PRB widening loop of each UE with Initial Transmission that uses 64QAM table, regardless of whether Power Optimization loop would alter the UE allocation.

---

##### 2.9.3.4.3.0-3 Measurements before FD-Polite widening loop Average MCS allocation before the Power Optimization step is applied to 256QAM table for initial transmission (ID: 12795889)

**2.9.3.4.3.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `12795890`)

Measurements before FD-Polite widening loop
Measurement: NR DL HARQ  
NetAct name: AVG\_MCS\_INITX\_BFR\_PO\_256QAM  
PI ID: M55300C00061  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

Update time: 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter after non-POLITE FD allocations are finalized in DL (including SBB and TRS slots), before FD-POLITE PRB widening loop (see [12533165](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_jm0A4Bw4EfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) would alter UE allocation, regardless of value of actFdpolite (see [10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) and regardless of whether FD-POLITE PRB widening is activated in the slot (see [12533182](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_oNYRdxw6EfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

Increment value: 5G-L2-PS shall increment the counter with selected MCS value before FD-POLITE PRB widening loop of each UE with Initial Transmission that uses 256QAM table, regardless of whether Power Optimization loop would alter the UE allocation.

---

#### 2.9.3.4.4 Critical DRBs in DL

##### 2.9.3.4.4.0-1 Critical DRBs in DL Number of DRBs with critical traffic in DL (ID: 13495065)

**2.9.3.4.4.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13495087`)

Critical DRBs in DL
Measurement: NR Resource Utilization per cell  
NetAct name: NUM\_DRB\_CRI\_TRAF\_SCH\_DL\_SLOT  
PI ID: M55165C00071  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

Update time: 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter after FD allocations are finalized in DL. It shall count the number of critical DRBs from which the DL traffic have been successfully scheduled.

Increment value: 5G-L2-PS shall increment the counter once for every critical DRBs from which the DL traffic was successfully scheduled in the slot.

Note :

1. Critical SRBs are not considered for this counter update

---

### 2.9.3.5 NR DL Latency PM Counters

#### 2.9.3.5.0-1 NR DL Latency PM Counters DL initial scheduling delay DRX active (ID: 11193074)

**2.9.3.5.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11193084`)

NR DL Latency PM Counters
Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: DL\_INIT\_SCHD\_DLY\_DRX\_ACT

PI ID: M55308C00057

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[Before CB010361-A]

Update time:

Upon LoCtrl\_DlBufferStatusInd message receive, for every DRB (see rbDlBufferInfo in 5G\_L2\_IF\_874\_replaced([10984647](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WBxx_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), if all below conditions are met:

•     actLatencyPmCount parameter is set to true, (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

•     DRB buffer is empty in L2PS (calculated on bufferedBytes from previous messages)

•     bufferedBytes field in LoCtrl\_DlBufferStatusInd msg is greater than 0 (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_874\_replaced([10984647](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WBxx_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

•     UE is monitoring PDCCH due to DRX in current slot (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2263\_replaced([11114367](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpkDK_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4204\_replaced([11174481](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kucjIfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or DRX is not configured for UE

Set start timestamp for a given UE DRB to value of frameNumber and slot from LoCtrl\_DlBufferStatusInd message

When DL Transport Block is scheduled successfully for UE and start timestamp is set, set stop timestamp to current frame and slot number.

Increment value:

For every DRB data scheduled in Transport Block, if start and stop timestamp are set, increment counter with (stop – start) value calculated in microseconds.

NOTE: Remember to handle sfn/slot modulo operations correctly.

[CB010361-A]

Update time: As specified in 5G\_L2\_18893\_replaced([11150214](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24ajzPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), only if UE is monitoring PDCCH due to DRX in current slot (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2263\_replaced([11114367](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpkDK_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4204\_replaced([11174481](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kucjIfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or DRX is not configured for UE.

Increment value: As specified in 5G\_L2\_18893\_replaced([11150214](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24ajzPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), only if actLatencyPmCount parameter is set to true (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[End CB010361-A]
