#### 2.9.3.5.0-5 NR DL Latency PM Counters DL initial scheduling delay DRX inactive (ID: 11193116)

**2.9.3.5.0-5.0-2**  (ID: `11193127`)

NR DL Latency PM Counters
Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: DL\_INIT\_SCHD\_DLY\_DRX\_INACT

PI ID: M55308C00060

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[Before CB010361-A]

Update time:

Upon LoCtrl\_DlBufferStatusInd message receive, for every DRB (see rbDlBufferInfo in 5G\_L2\_IF\_874\_replaced([10984647](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WBxx_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), if all below conditions are met:

•     actLatencyPmCount parameter is set to true (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

•     DRB buffer is empty in L2PS (calculated on bufferedBytes from previous messages)

•     bufferedBytes field in LoCtrl\_DlBufferStatusInd msg is greater than 0 (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_874\_replaced([10984647](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WBxx_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

•     UE is not monitoring PDCCH due to DRX in current slot (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2263\_replaced([11114367](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpkDK_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4204\_replaced([11174481](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kucjIfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Set start timestamp for a given UE DRB to value of frameNumber and slot from LoCtrl\_DlBufferStatusInd message

When DL Transport Block is scheduled successfully for UE and start timestamp is set, set stop timestamp to current frame and slot number.

Increment value:

For every DRB data scheduled in Transport Block, if start and stop timestamp are set, increment counter with (stop – start) value calculated in microseconds.

[CB010361-A]

Update time: As specified in 5G\_L2\_18893\_replaced([11150214](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24ajzPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), only if UE is not monitoring PDCCH due to DRX in current slot (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2263\_replaced([11114367](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpkDK_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4204\_replaced([11174481](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kucjIfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Increment value: As specified in 5G\_L2\_18893\_replaced([11150214](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24ajzPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), only if actLatencyPmCount parameter is set to true (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[End CB010361-A]

### 2.9.3.7 NR DL SAS PM Counters

#### 2.9.3.7.0-1 NR DL SAS PM Counters Number of DL PRBs used for slice-aware scheduling per resource group (ID: 11193189)

**2.9.3.7.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11193200`)

NR DL SAS PM Counters
Measurement: NR cell utilization per NR resource group

NetAct name: DL\_PRB\_USED\_DATA\_NRG

PI ID: M55910C00001

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

[Before PR802313] In post scheduling phase when all data about PRB assignment to UEs is available. [PR802313] At the end of virtual slot (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30750\_replaced([11188771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kved6PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).  [End PR802313]

Increment value:

Shall be incremented by the number of used PRBs on PDSCH per resource group configured via dlResourceGroupConfig in CellSetupReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and/or CellReconfigurationReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))). This is sum of rrmInstDrbPrbAlloc\_j,c(t) (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7577\_replaced([11190661](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6K_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for all DRBs j belonging to this resource group [PR802313] from slots t belonging to one virtual slot [End PR802313].

Note that counter's value is 100 times higher than the actual value (for example, 1.23 is stored as 123), so the reported value should be multiplied by 100. To mitigate undesirable rounding error effects (such as, 12.345 reported for one RG as 1235 and 27.655 reported from other RG as 2766 add up to 4000 when rounded after summation and to 4001 when rounded before summation) compensation mechanism shall be introduced to correct values of reported PRBs so that both values, rounded before and after summation, will be equal at any time.

---

#### 2.9.3.7.0-2 NR DL SAS PM Counters Maximum DL PRB utilization for slice-aware scheduling per resource group (ID: 11193204)

**2.9.3.7.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11193214`)

NR DL SAS PM Counters
Measurement: NR cell utilization per NR resource group

NetAct name: DL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX\_NRG

PI ID: M55910C00002

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Update time:

[Before PR802313] In post scheduling phase when all data about PRB assignment to UEs is available. [PR802313] At the end of virtual slot (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30750\_replaced([11188771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kved6PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).  [End PR802313]

Increment value:

Shall be updated by the average resource group i resource share in slot t, according to following rules.

If

(t - cellConfigChangeSlot > 100) and

(rrmRGAvgShare\_i(t)  > DL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX\_NRG (i))

Then

DL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX\_NRG(i) = rrmRGAvgShare\_i(t)

where:

cellConfigChangeSlot = the last slot when CellSetupReq or CellReconfigurationReq received.

rrmRGAvgShare\_i(t) = the average resource group share (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7392\_replaced([11190186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6I_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) of resource group configured via dlResourceGroupConfig in CellSetupReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and/or CellReconfigurationReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

#### 2.9.3.7.0-3 NR DL SAS PM Counters Maximum DL PRB utilization for slice-aware scheduling per PLMN (ID: 11247102)

**2.9.3.7.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `12336951`)

NR DL SAS PM Counters
**Measurement: NR Cell Utilization per PLMN**

**NetAct name: DL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX\_PLMN**

**PI ID: M55338C00005**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

**Update time: Each DL slot**

**Increment value :**

Counter is updated if the instantaneous average PRB utilization ratio over the last 100 slots for the corresponding PLMN is higher than the previously recorded maximum value.

#### 2.9.3.7.0-4 NR DL SAS PM Counters Number of DL PRBs available for slice-aware scheduling in the cell (ID: 11193219)

**2.9.3.7.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `11193229`)

NR DL SAS PM Counters
Measurement: NR cell utilization per NR resource group

NetAct name: DL\_PRB\_AVAIL\_SAS

PI ID: M55308C10013

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Update time:

[Before PR802313] In post scheduling phase when all data about PRB assignment to UEs is available. [PR802313] At the end of virtual slot (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30750\_replaced([11188771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kved6PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).  [End PR802313]

Increment value:

Increment by the number [Before PR802313] rrmAvailablePrbsForSas(t) [PR802313] rrmNSlotsAvailablePrbsForSas(t) [End PR802313]: the number of PRBs available for scheduling DRBs in [PR802313] virtual [End PR802313] slot t (see [Before PR802313] 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7577\_replaced([11190661](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6K_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [PR802313] 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30522\_replaced([11193737](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvvjofvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30750\_replaced([11188771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kved6PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_L2\_22434\_replaced([11206253](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-J_a_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [End PR802313]).

Note that counter's value is 100 times higher than the actual value (for example, 1.23 is stored as 123), so the reported value should be multiplied by 100.

---

#### 2.9.3.7.0-5 NR DL SAS PM Counters Denominator for the calculation of the DL PRB Utilization per resource group (ID: 11193235)

**2.9.3.7.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11193238`)

NR DL SAS PM Counters
Measurement: NR cell utilization per NR resource group for FR1 and FR2  
NetAct name: DL\_PRB\_UTIL\_RATIO\_DNOM  
PI ID: M55910C00028  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Update time:  
[Before PR802313] In post scheduling phase when all data about PRB assignment to UEs is available. [PR802313] At the end of virtual slot (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30750\_replaced([11188771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kved6PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).  [End PR802313]

Increment value:  
Incremented by the number of average DL PRB Utilization per resource group. It corresponds to the number of available PRBs on PDSCH for slice-aware traffic in the cell.

This counter is incremented as DL\_PRB\_AVAIL\_SAS (see 5G\_L2\_21163\_replaced([11193219](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28qKlPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), but it is reported on NGR level - unlike DL\_PRB\_AVAIL\_SAS, which is incremented at the cell level. This counter is implemented as workaround solution for NetAct limitations. From 5G-L2-PS perspective, DL\_PRB\_AVAIL\_SAS would be sufficient.

Note that counter's value is 100 times higher than the actual value (for example, 1.23 is stored as 123), so the reported value should be multiplied by 100.

---

#### 2.9.3.7.0-6 NR DL SAS PM Counters Denominator for the calculation of the DL PRB Utilization per PLMN (ID: 12533593)

**2.9.3.7.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `12539499`)

NR DL SAS PM Counters
**Measurement: NR Cell Utilization per PLMN**

**NetAct name: DL\_PRB\_UTIL\_RATIO\_DNOM\_PLMN**

**PI ID: M55338C00003**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

**Update time:**

Updated when a data slot is available for PDSCH.

**Increment value :**

Counter corresponds to the number of available PRBs on PDSCH for PLMN-aware traffic in the cell. The reported value is 100 times higher than the actual value (for example, 1.23 is stored as 123).

---

#### 2.9.3.7.0-7 NR DL SAS PM Counters Number of additional DL PRBs used due to MU-MIMO pairing for slice-aware scheduling per resource group (ID: 11193244)

**2.9.3.7.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `11193248`)

NR DL SAS PM Counters
Measurement: NR cell utilization per NR resource group

NetAct name: DL\_ADD\_PRB\_USED\_MUMIMO\_NRG

PI ID: M55910C00025

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

At the end of virtual slot (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30750\_replaced([11188771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kved6PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Increment value:

Shall be incremented by the number of excessive PRBs assigned on PDSCH due to MU-MIMO pairing which would not be assigned otherwise if the UEs were scheduled as SU-MIMO. Counted per resource group configured via dlResourceGroupConfig in CellSetupReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and/or CellReconfigurationReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))). In practice this is difference between of rrmActRGPrbAlloc\_k(t) (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23738\_replaced([11191972](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kviISvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and sum of rrmInstDrbPrbAlloc\_j,c(t) (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7577\_replaced([11190661](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6K_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for all DRBs j belonging to this resource group from slots t belonging to one virtual slot.

Note that counter's value is 100 times higher than the actual value (for example, 1.23 is stored as 123), so the reported value should be multiplied by 100.

---

### 2.9.3.8 RE level DL Radio Resource Utilization based Spectral Efficiency KPI

#### 2.9.3.8.0-1 RE level DL Radio Resource Utilization based Spectral Efficiency KPI Number of REs used for PDSCH excluding paging and SIB (ID: 13391845)

**2.9.3.8.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `13391854`)

RE level DL Radio Resource Utilization based Spectral Efficiency KPI
**Measurement: [Before CB015822-A] Spare counters per NRCELL level per DU [CB015822-A] NR Resource Utilization per CELL [End CB015822-A]**

**NetAct name: [Before CB015822-A] CELL\_DU\_SUM\_M55902C20 [CB015822-A] NUM\_RE\_USED\_PDSCH [End CB015822-A]**

**PI ID: [Before CB015822-A] M55902C00020 [CB015822-A] M55165C00062 [End CB015822-A]**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_5KBG5p5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA).**

**Update time:**

This counter shall be updated after FD scheduling of each UE when it’s PDSCH resource allocation is finally determined.

**Increment value:**

For each UE, L2-PS shall increment N\_PDSCH\_RE(i) into [Before CB015822-A] CELL\_DU\_SUM\_M55902C20 [CB015822-A] NUM\_RE\_USED\_PDSCH [End CB015822-A] after FD scheduling,

[Before CB015822-A] CELL\_DU\_SUM\_M55902C20 [CB015822-A] NUM\_RE\_USED\_PDSCH [End CB015822-A] += N\_PDSCH\_RE (i)

where N\_PDSCH\_RE(i) is the number of PDSCH REs [Before CB015822-A] including DMRS RE[End CB015822-A] allocated for UE i.

In case of MU-MIMO, same PDSCH PRB/RE resource could be shared by multiple UEs for DL data or reference signal (RS) transmission. NUM\_RE\_USED\_PDSCH can only be incremented once for all co-scheduled UEs.

[CB015822-B]In case of super cell, per RE, NUM\_RE\_USED\_PDSCH can only be incremented once for all subcells.[End CB015822-B]

For other cases, such as control message (SRB data, RA Resp (msg2), RA msg4),[CB015822-B] artificial load,[End CB015822-B] etc, please refer to NIDD specification.

‘Calculation of effective code rate’ ([11124515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqrdc_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) procedure could be referenced for N\_PDSCH\_RE determination.

---

#### 2.9.3.8.0-2 RE level DL Radio Resource Utilization based Spectral Efficiency KPI Number of REs used for PDSCH DM-RS or PTRS (ID: 13391846)

**2.9.3.8.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `13395050`)

RE level DL Radio Resource Utilization based Spectral Efficiency KPI
**Measurement: NR Resource Utilization per CELL**

**NetAct name: NUM\_RE\_USED\_PDSCH\_RS**

**PI ID: M55165C00063**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_5KBG5p5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA).**

**Update time:**

This counter shall be updated after FD scheduling of any PDSCH(SIB1, OSI, paging or UE DL data,etc)when it’s PDSCH resource allocation is finally determined.

**Increment value:**

L2-PS shall increment N\_PDSCH\_RS\_RE into NUM\_RE\_USED\_PDSCH\_RS after FD scheduling,

PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_RS += N\_PDSCH\_RS\_RE(k)

where N\_PDSCH\_RS\_RE(k) is the number of REs reserved for PDSCH DMRS (N\_DMRS) and PTRS (N\_PTRS) sending on the allocated PDSCH PRB(s) for SIB1, OSI, paging or UE data transmission:

N\_PDSCH\_RS\_RE(k) = N\_DMRS(k) + N\_PTRS(k), k indicates the dedicated FD scheduling of SIB1, OSI, Paging or UE.

‘Calculation of effective code rate’ ([11124515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqrdc_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) procedure could be referenced for N\_DMRS and N\_PTRS determination, with

* N\_DMRS refers to [image-0][image\_desc]The image contains the text "N PRB DMRS". The text is in a dark blue color and is slightly blurry. The letters are arranged in two lines, with "N" on the left and "PRB" on the right on the top line, and "DMRS" on the bottom line.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-02121720.png[/image\_path][/image-0]
* N\_PTRS refers to [image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a blurry, stylized representation of the text "N\_RE^PTRS". The "N" is large and to the left, with a subscript "RE" below it. To the right of the "N" and slightly above the subscript is the superscript "PTRS". The text is rendered in a font that appears to be serifed, with a slight gradient effect giving it a metallic or glossy appearance. The background is white.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-02121720.png[/image\_path][/image-1].

Please refer to [11124515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqrdc_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for detail.

[CB015822-B] In case of MU-MIMO, same PRB/RE resource could be shared by multiple UEs for DL data or reference signal (RS) transmission. The counter can only be incremented once for all co-scheduled UEs.

For other cases, such as control message artificial load, supercell case, etc, please refer to NIDD specification.

[End CB015822-B]

Notes: DMRS symbol RE not used for DMRS signal sending or PDSCH data sending (Blank RE) is also counted.

---

#### 2.9.3.8.0-3 RE level DL Radio Resource Utilization based Spectral Efficiency KPI Number of REs used for paging (ID: 13391847)

**2.9.3.8.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `13416509`)

RE level DL Radio Resource Utilization based Spectral Efficiency KPI
**Measurement: [Before CB015822-A] Spare counters per NRCELL level per DU [CB015822-A] NR Resource Utilization per CELL [End CB015822-A]**

**NetAct name: [Before CB015822-A] CELL\_DU\_SUM\_M55902C21 [CB015822-A] NUM\_RE\_USED\_PAGING [End CB015822-A]**

**PI ID: [Before CB015822-A] M55902C00021 [CB015822-A] M55165C00064 [End CB015822-A]**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_5KBG5p5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA).**

**Update time:**

This counter shall be updated after FD scheduling of Paging.

**Increment value:**

L2-PS shall increment N\_PDSCH\_RE into [Before CB015822-A] CELL\_DU\_SUM\_M55902C21 [CB015822-A] NUM\_RE\_USED\_PAGING [End CB015822-A] after FD scheduling of Paging,

[Before CB015822-A] CELL\_DU\_SUM\_M55902C21 [CB015822-A] NUM\_RE\_USED\_PAGING [End CB015822-A] += N\_PDSCH\_RE

where N\_PDSCH\_RE is the number of PDSCH REs [Before CB015822-A] including DMRS RE [End CB015822-A] allocated for Paging. [CB015822-A] Note: the REs reserved for PDSCH DMRS shall be excluded from N\_PDSCH\_RE.[End CB015822-A]

[CB015822-B] For special counter incrementing considerations, such as supercell, please refer to NIDD specification.[End CB015822-B]

---

#### 2.9.3.8.0-4 RE level DL Radio Resource Utilization based Spectral Efficiency KPI Number of REs used for SIB1 and OSI (ID: 13391848)

**2.9.3.8.0-4.0-3**  (ID: `13416510`)

RE level DL Radio Resource Utilization based Spectral Efficiency KPI
**Measurement: [Before CB015822-A] Spare counters per NRCELL level per DU [CB015822-A] NR Resource Utilization per CELL [End CB015822-A]**

**NetAct name: [Before CB015822-A] CELL\_DU\_SUM\_M55902C22 [CB015822-A] NUM\_RE\_USED\_SIB1\_OSI [End CB015822-A]**

**PI ID: [Before CB015822-A] M55902C00022 [CB015822-A]  M55165C00065 [End CB015822-A]**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_5KBG5p5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA).**

**Update time:**

This counter shall be updated after FD scheduling of SIB1 or OSI.

**Increment value:**

L2-PS shall increment N\_PDSCH\_RE into [Before CB015822-A] CELL\_DU\_SUM\_M55902C22 [CB015822-A] NUM\_RE\_USED\_SIB1\_OSI [End CB015822-A] after FD scheduling of SIB1 or OSI,

[Before CB015822-A] CELL\_DU\_SUM\_M55902C22 [CB015822-A] NUM\_RE\_USED\_SIB1\_OSI [End CB015822-A] += N\_PDSCH\_RE

where N\_PDSCH\_RE is the number of PDSCH REs [Before CB015822-A] including DMRS RE [End CB015822-A] allocated for SIB1 or OSI. [CB015822-A] Note: the REs reserved for PDSCH DMRS shall be excluded from N\_PDSCH\_RE. [End CB015822-A]

[CB015822-B]  For special counter incrementing considerations, such as supercell, please refer to NIDD specification. [End CB015822-B]

---

#### 2.9.3.8.0-5 RE level DL Radio Resource Utilization based Spectral Efficiency KPI Number of REs used for SSB (ID: 13391849)

**2.9.3.8.0-5.0-3**  (ID: `13416511`)

RE level DL Radio Resource Utilization based Spectral Efficiency KPI
**Measurement: [Before CB015822-A] Spare counters per NRCELL level per DU [CB015822-A] NR Resource Utilization per CELL [End CB015822-A]**

**NetAct name: [Before CB015822-A] CELL\_DU\_SUM\_M55902C24 [CB015822-A] NUM\_RE\_USED\_SSB [End CB015822-A]**

**PI ID: [Before CB015822-A] M55902C00024 [CB015822-A] M55165C00066 [End CB015822-A]**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_5KBG5p5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA).**

**Update time:**

This counter shall be updated after SSB scheduling in SSB slot.

**Increment value:**

L2-PS shall increment N\_SSB\_RE(i) into [Before CB015822-A] CELL\_DU\_SUM\_M55902C24 [CB015822-A] NUM\_RE\_USED\_SSB [End CB015822-A] for the SSB transmission for beam i,

[Before CB015822-A] CELL\_DU\_SUM\_M55902C24 [CB015822-A] NUM\_RE\_USED\_SSB [End CB015822-A] += N\_SSB\_RE(i)

where N\_SSB\_RE(i) is the number of REs used for SSB transmission for beam i, including REs used for PSS, SSS, PBCH, and DMRS for PBCH.

[CB015822-B] Note: counter shall not be incremented for inactive SSB or muted SSB.

For special counter incrementing considerations, such as supercell and Reduced SSB size (CB010987), please refer to NIDD specification. [End CB015822-B]

---

#### 2.9.3.8.0-6 RE level DL Radio Resource Utilization based Spectral Efficiency KPI Number of REs used for PDCCH (ID: 13391850)

**2.9.3.8.0-6.0-3**  (ID: `13416512`)

RE level DL Radio Resource Utilization based Spectral Efficiency KPI
**Measurement: [Before CB015822-A] Spare counters per NRCELL level per DU [CB015822-A] NR Resource Utilization per CELL [End CB015822-A]**

**NetAct name: [Before CB015822-A] CELL\_DU\_SUM\_M55902C25 [CB015822-A] NUM\_RE\_USED\_PDCCH [End CB015822-A]**

**PI ID: [Before CB015822-A] M55902C00025 [CB015822-A] M55165C00067 [End CB015822-A]**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_5KBG5p5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA).**

**Update time:**

* For DL scheduling, this counter shall be updated after it’s PDCCH resource allocation for DL grant is finally determined.
* For UL scheduling, this counter shall be updated after it’s PDCCH resource allocation for UL grant is finally determined.

**Increment value:**

L2-PS shall increment N\_PDCCH\_RE into [Before CB015822-A] CELL\_DU\_SUM\_M55902C25 [CB015822-A] NUM\_RE\_USED\_PDCCH [End CB015822-A] after FD scheduling,

[Before CB015822-A] CELL\_DU\_SUM\_M55902C25 [CB015822-A] NUM\_RE\_USED\_PDCCH [End CB015822-A] += N\_PDCCH\_RE(k)

where N\_PDCCH\_RE(k) is the number of PDCCH REs allocated (including the REs used for PDCCH DMRS) for the DL/UL grant of SIB1, OSI, paging or UE, k indicates the dedicated FD scheduling of SIB1, OSI, Paging or UE.

Note that the RE used for PDCCH DMRS is included in this counter.

For the special counter incrementing considerations, such as artificial load generation[CB015822-B] ,supercell [End CB015822-B], etc, please refer to NIDD specification.

---

#### 2.9.3.8.0-7 RE level DL Radio Resource Utilization based Spectral Efficiency KPI Number of REs used for CSI-RS excluding CSI-IM (ID: 13391851)

**2.9.3.8.0-7.0-3**  (ID: `13416513`)

RE level DL Radio Resource Utilization based Spectral Efficiency KPI
**Measurement: [Before CB015822-A] Spare counters per NRCELL level per DU [CB015822-A] NR Resource Utilization per CELL [End CB015822-A]**

**NetAct name: [Before CB015822-A] CELL\_DU\_SUM\_M55902C23 [CB015822-A] NUM\_RE\_USED\_CSI\_RS [End CB015822-A]**

**PI ID: [Before CB015822-A] M55902C00023 [CB015822-A] M55165C00068 [End CB015822-A]**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_5KBG5p5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA).**

**Update time:**

This counter shall be updated after scheduling for CSI-RS for Tracking Reference Signal (TRS), CSI-RS for channel acquisition (ACQ) and CSI-RS for beam management

**Increment value:**

L2-PS shall increment N\_CSI\_RS\_RE(i) into [Before CB015822-A] CELL\_DU\_SUM\_M55902C23 [CB015822-A] NUM\_RE\_USED\_CSI\_RS [End CB015822-A] per per CSI-RS resource symbol, i.e. L1 CSI-RS resource of [11513052](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRuFdvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9),

[Before CB015822-A] CELL\_DU\_SUM\_M55902C23 [CB015822-A] NUM\_RE\_USED\_CSI\_RS [End CB015822-A] += N\_CSI\_RS\_RE(i)

where N\_CSI\_RS\_RE(i) is the number of REs used for CSI-RS resource symbol i.

TS 38.211 Table 7.4.1.5.3-1 could be used for N\_CSI\_RS\_RE calculation:

N\_CSI\_RS\_RE = numOfPrb \* D \* K

where,

numOfPrb is the number of PRBs allocated for CSI-RS resource (symbol)

D equals to the CSI-RS frequency density (indicated by Density column) if it takes a value of 1 or 0.5, or equals to 1 if it takes a value of 3.

K = (number of k of [image-0][image\_desc]The image is entirely black.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-02251608.png[/image\_path][/image-0] column) \* (number of k' of [image-1][image\_desc]The image is entirely black.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-02251609.png[/image\_path][/image-1]column)

[CB015822-B] For the special counter incrementing considerations, such as DSS,supercell, etc, please refer to NIDD specification. [End CB015822-B]

---

#### 2.9.3.8.0-8 RE level DL Radio Resource Utilization based Spectral Efficiency KPI Number of REs used for CSI-IM RS (ID: 13391852)

**2.9.3.8.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `13395211`)

RE level DL Radio Resource Utilization based Spectral Efficiency KPI
**Measurement: NR Resource Utilization per CELL**

**NetAct name: NUM\_RE\_USED\_CSI\_IM\_RS**

**PI ID: M55165C00069**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_5KBG5p5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA).**

**Update time:**

This counter shall be updated after scheduling for CSI-RS for CSI-IM

**Increment value:**

L2-PS shall increment N\_CSI\_IM\_RS\_RE(i) into NUM\_RE\_USED\_CSI\_IM\_RS per CSI-RS resource symbol (i.e. L1 CSI-RS resource of [11513052](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRuFdvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) configured for CSI-IM sending (see [11172281](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26UoS_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F243)),

NUM\_RE\_USED\_CSI\_IM\_RS += N\_CSI\_IM\_RS\_RE(i)

where N\_CSI\_IM\_RS\_RE(i) is the number of REs used for CSI-RS resource symbol i configured for CSI-IM sending.

Note: per NIDD, ZP REs for TRS rate matching ([10969296](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Ub2Vvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), zpCsiRsAssociation='trs') shall be excluded from counting.

TS 38.211 Table 7.4.1.5.3-1 could be used for N\_CSI\_IM\_RS\_RE calculation in the same manner as N\_CSI\_RS\_RE calculation ([13391851](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BGRUwQV2EfGozuGzRUXHpg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F243))

---

#### 2.9.3.8.0-9 RE level DL Radio Resource Utilization based Spectral Efficiency KPI Number of DL symbols (ID: 13391853)

**2.9.3.8.0-9.0-3**  (ID: `13416514`)

RE level DL Radio Resource Utilization based Spectral Efficiency KPI
**Measurement: [Before CB015822-A] Spare counters per NRCELL level per DU [CB015822-A] NR Resource Utilization per CELL [End CB015822-A]**

**NetAct name: [Before CB015822-A] CELL\_DU\_SUM\_M55902C26 [CB015822-A] NUM\_DL\_SYMBOLS [End CB015822-A]**

**PI ID: [Before CB015822-A] M55902C00026 [CB015822-A] M55165C00070 [End CB015822-A]**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_5KBG5p5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA).**

**Update time:**

This counter shall be updated for each slot.

**Increment value:**

For each slot, [Before CB015822-A] CELL\_DU\_SUM\_M55902C26 [CB015822-A] NUM\_DL\_SYMBOLS [End CB015822-A] shall be incremented by  number of DL symbols of this slot.

In DSS case, the symbol only used by LTE is not counted.

[Before CB015822-A]

For DL symbol which is not used by any DL channel, is excluded.

[CB015822-A]

For DL slot, update 14 DL symbols for all DL slots (Those are available in air interface) ;

For TD BI slot, only DL symbols counted(Actual configured symbols in special slot).[End CB015822-A]

Refer to NIDD definition.

---

### 2.9.3.9 Post Scheduling

#### 2.9.3.9.0-1 Post Scheduling PRBs available for slice-ware PDSCH traffic (ID: 11193259)

**2.9.3.9.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11193269`)

Post Scheduling
[Before CB008709-E]

For 'NR Cell Utilization' class, according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), PM Counter M55308C10007(PRB\_AVAIL\_PDSCH\_SLICES) shall be incremented each slot by the number rrmAvailablePrbsForSas(t): the number of PRBs available for scheduling DRBs in slot t (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7577\_replaced([11190661](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6K_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Note that counter's value is 100 times higher than the actual value (for example, 5.0 is stored as 500), so the reported value should be multiplied by 100.

CP2 requirement(s):

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2
* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7577\_replaced([11190661](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6K_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) Mapping DRB allocations from bytes to PRBs & calculating the instantaneous resource share of the DRBs

[End CB008709-E]

#### 2.9.3.9.0-2 Post Scheduling PRBs used for PDSCH per slice (ID: 11193275)

**2.9.3.9.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11193283`)

Post Scheduling
[Before CB008828-C]

For 'NR L1 Resource Slice' class, according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), PM Counter M55359C00000(PRB\_USED\_PDSCH\_SLICE) shall be incremented each slot by the number of used PRBs on PDSCH per slice. This is sum of rrmInstDrbPrbAlloc\_j(t) (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7577\_replaced([11190661](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6K_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for all DRBs j belonging to this slice.

Note that counter's value is 100 times higher than the actual value (for example, 5.0 is stored as 500), so the reported value should be multiplied by 100.

CP2 requirement(s):

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2
* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7577\_replaced([11190661](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6K_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) Mapping DRB allocations from bytes to PRBs & calculating the instantaneous resource share of the DRBs

[End CB008828-C]

#### 2.9.3.9.0-3 Post Scheduling Maximum utilization ratio of PRBs used for PDSCH per slice (ID: 11193289)

**2.9.3.9.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11193300`)

Post Scheduling
[Before CB008828-C]

For 'NR L1 Resource Slice' class, according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), PM Counter M55359C00001(PRB\_PDSCH\_UTIL\_RATIO\_SLICE\_MAX) shall be updated by the average slice i resource share in every slot t, according to following rules.

If

(t - cellConfigChangeSlot > 100) and

(rrmSliceAvgShare\_i(t) > PRB\_PDSCH\_UTIL\_RATIO\_SLICE\_MAX(i))

Then

PRB\_PDSCH\_UTIL\_RATIO\_SLICE\_MAX(i) = rrmSliceAvgShare\_i(t)

where:

cellConfigChangeSlot = the last slot when Cell Setup or Cell Reconfiguration received.

rrmSliceAvgShare\_i(t) = the average slice i resource share (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7392\_replaced([11190186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6I_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

CP2 requirement(s):

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2
* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7392\_replaced([11190186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6I_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) Slice Resource Share Bookkeeping

[End CB008828-C]

#### 2.9.3.9.0-9 Post Scheduling Maximum DL PRB Utilization per slot (ID: 11193396)

**2.9.3.9.0-9.0-2**  (ID: `11193405`)

Post Scheduling
[CNI-127108]

Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: DL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX

PI ID: M55308C36001

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time: Each slot.

[END CNI-127108]

[BEFORE CNI-127108]

For 'NR Cell Utilization' class, according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), PM COUNTER M55308C36001 (DL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX) shall be updated each slot t by the value of the maximum DL PRB Utilization, according to following rules:

[END CNI-127108]

[CNI-127108]

Increment value:

[END CNI-127108]

dlPrbUtilization(t) = ROUND((numOfUsedPdschPrbs(t)/numOfAvailablePdschPrbs(t)) \* 100%);

DL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX = MAX(dlPrbUtilization(t), DL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX);

where:

* dlPrbUtilization(t) = the percentage of utilized PRBs on PDSCH per slot t
* numOfUsedPdschPrbs(t) = the number of PRBs allocated for PDSCH in slot t (ref. 5G\_L2\_260\_replaced([11192617](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28lSH_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* numOfAvailablePdschPrbs(t) = the number of PRBs available for PDSCH in slot t (ref. 5G\_L2\_260\_replaced([11192617](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28lSH_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

[BEFORE CNI-127108]

CP2 requirements:

[CNI-127108]

CP2 Reference:

[END CNI-127108]

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2-PS

#### 2.9.3.9.0-10 Post Scheduling Expected Cell Size Configuration (ID: 11193411)

**2.9.3.9.0-10.0-2**  (ID: `11193419`)

Post Scheduling
[CNI-127108]

Measurement: NR Timing Advance

NetAct name: EXP\_CELL\_SIZE\_CFG

PI ID: M55307C03001

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time: Each slot when Cell Setup (PsCell\_CellSetupReq ref. 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or Cell Reconfiguration (PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq ref. 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) received.

[END CNI-127108]

[BEFORE CNI-127108]

For 'NR Timing Advance' class, according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), PM COUNTER M55307C03001 (EXP\_CELL\_SIZE\_CFG) shall be updated each slot when Cell Setup (PsCell\_CellSetupReq ref. 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or Cell Reconfiguration (PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq ref. 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) received,

based on values of NRBTS.NRPMRNL.NRPMCCP.cfgTAcounters (taCountersConfig.cfgTAcounters ref. 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and NRBTS.NRCELL.expectedCellSize (taCountersConfig.expectedCellSize ref. 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), according to following rules:

[END CNI-127108]

[CNI-127108]

Increment value:

[END CNI-127108]

If

(NRBTS.NRPMRNL.NRPMCCP.cfgTAcounters = 0)

Then

EXP\_CELL\_SIZE\_CFG = 99

Else if

(NRBTS.NRPMRNL.NRPMCCP.cfgTAcounters = 1)

Then

EXP\_CELL\_SIZE\_CFG = NRBTS.NRCELL.expectedCellSize

[BEFORE CNI-127108]

CP2 requirements:

[CNI-127108]

CP2 Reference:

[END CNI-127108]

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2-PS

#### 2.9.3.9.0-11 Post Scheduling UE Count According to DL Pathloss Based Radio Link Quality Metrics (ID: 12809969)

**2.9.3.9.0-11.0-1**  (ID: `12809970`)

Post Scheduling
Number of Accumulated UEs in Cell-Near Region

---

**2.9.3.9.0-11.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12809972`)

Post Scheduling
Measurement: NR DL Signal Quality Level 2

NetAct name: ACC\_UE\_CELL\_NEAR

PI ID: M55400C00002

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ").

Update time and Increment value:

For the update of this counter L2-PS shall maintain a local variable totalNumUeInCellNearRegion which is cell specific. This variable reflects at any time the value/sample which has to be accumulated as per NIDD definition of this counter, that is: totalNumUeInCellNearRegion reflects at any time the number of UEs in the cell whose DL pathloss lies in Cell-Near Region.

totalNumUeInCellNearRegion is updated as described below:

At reception of PsCell\_CellSetupReq ([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")):

totalNumUeInCellNearRegion = 0;

At reception of PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq ([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")):

If the actUeCountPerRadioLinkQualityCount is set to disabled:  
then, totalNumUeInCellNearRegion = 0;

Note: totalNumUeInCellNearRegion shall not be reset during online reconfiguration of the DL pathloss thresholds 'cellEdgeUePathlossThrPmCount' and 'cellNearUePathlossThrPmCount' defined in [12790507](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_0dGjMJPGEfCoxNjZXyLbRA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_0dGjMJPGEfCoxNjZXyLbRA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9").

The counter update described below shall be performed by L2-PS only if actUeCountPerRadioLinkQualityCount is set to True.

At reception of PHR report for an UE:

The L2-PS scheduler can receive a PHR report from a UE through various interface messages, as described below:

P-Cell: via LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd ([10984729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")) OR PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUlInfoUpdateInd ([10980421](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VipkPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VipkPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9"))

[Before CB012268-B-UPD002]

S-Cell: via PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlPhrForwardInd ([10980279](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vhbc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vhbc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")) OR LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd ([10984729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9"))

[End CB012268-B-UPD002]

NSA Cell: via LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd ([10984729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")) OR PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUlInfoUpdateInd ([10980421](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VipkPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VipkPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9"))

totalNumUeInCellNearRegion is incremented by 1 if following conditions are true:

[CB012268-B-UPD002]

* If the cell is not configured as an S-Cell for a UE, that UE will be considered when incrementing the counter.

[End CB012268-B-UPD002]

* For the first PHR report received by the UE:

If the DL pathloss calculated from this PHR falls within the Cell-Near region as defined in NIDD.

* For the subsequent PHR report received by the UE:

If the DL pathloss calculated by the latest PHR falls within Cell-Near region as defined in NIDD and previously computed DL pathloss is outside the Cell-Near region.

totalNumUeInCellNearRegion is decremented by 1 if following conditions is true:

[CB012268-B-UPD002]

* If the cell is not configured as an S-Cell for a UE, that UE will be considered when incrementing the counter..

[End CB012268-B-UPD002]

* Subsequent PHR report received by the UE:

If the DL pathloss calculated from this PHR is outside the Cell-Near region as defined in NIDD while previous DL pathloss was within Cell-Near region.

At reception of PsUser\_UserDeleteReq ([10976800](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VIZ7Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VIZ7Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")):

[CB012268-B-UPD002]If the cell is not configured as an S-Cell for a UE, then[End CB012268-B-UPD002] totalNumUeInCellNearRegion is decremented by 1 if the corresponding UE was within Cell-Near region based on DL pathloss.

totalNumUeInCellNearRegion updated as above is accumulated at each slot.

[CB012268-B-UPD002]

Notes:

1. ueAddCause is received in PsUser\_UserSetupReq ([10974645](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U9ayPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U9ayPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")).

[End CB012268-B-UPD002]

---

**2.9.3.9.0-11.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12809980`)

Post Scheduling
Measurement: NR DL Signal Quality Level 2

NetAct name: ACC\_UE\_CELL\_MIDDLE

PI ID: M55400C00003

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ").

Update time and Increment value:

For the update of this counter L2-PS shall maintain a local variable totalNumUeInCellMiddleRegion which is cell specific. This variable reflects at any time the value/sample which has to be accumulated as per NIDD definition of this counter, that is: totalNumUeInCellMiddleRegion reflects at any time the number of UEs in the cell whose DL pathloss lies in Cell-Middle Region.

totalNumUeInCellMiddleRegion is updated as described below:

At reception of PsCell\_CellSetupReq ([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")):

totalNumUeInCellMiddleRegion = 0;

At reception of PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq ([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")):

If the actUeCountPerRadioLinkQualityCount is set to disabled:  
then, totalNumUeInCellMiddleRegion = 0;

Note: totalNumUeInCellMiddleRegion shall not be reset during online reconfiguration of the DL pathloss thresholds 'cellEdgeUePathlossThrPmCount' and 'cellNearUePathlossThrPmCount' defined in [12790507](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_0dGjMJPGEfCoxNjZXyLbRA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_0dGjMJPGEfCoxNjZXyLbRA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9").

The counter update described below shall be performed by L2-PS only if actUeCountPerRadioLinkQualityCount is set to True.

At reception of PHR report for an UE:

The L2-PS scheduler can receive a PHR report from a UE through various interface messages, as described below:

P-Cell: via LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd ([10984729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")) OR PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUlInfoUpdateInd ([10980421](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VipkPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VipkPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9"))

[Before CB012268-B-UPD002]

S-Cell: via PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlPhrForwardInd ([10980279](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vhbc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vhbc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")) OR LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd ([10984729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9"))

[End CB012268-B-UPD002]

NSA Cell: via LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd ([10984729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")) OR PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUlInfoUpdateInd ([10980421](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VipkPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VipkPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9"))

totalNumUeInCellMiddleRegion is incremented by 1 if following conditions are true:

[CB012268-B-UPD002]

* If the cell is not configured as an S-Cell for a UE, that UE will be considered when incrementing the counter.

[End CB012268-B-UPD002]

* For the first PHR report received by the UE:

If the DL pathloss calculated from this PHR falls within the Cell-Middle region as defined in NIDD.

* For the subsequent PHR report received by the UE:

At reception of PsUser\_UserDeleteReq ([10976800](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VIZ7Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VIZ7Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")):

totalNumUeInCellMiddleRegion updated as above is accumulated at each slot.

[CB012268-B-UPD002]

Notes:

1. ueAddCause is received in PsUser\_UserSetupReq ([10974645](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U9ayPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U9ayPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")).

totalNumUeInCellEdgeRegion is updated as described below:

#### 2.9.3.9.0-12 Post Scheduling Critical PRBs in DL (ID: 13495098)

**2.9.3.9.0-12.0-1**  (ID: `13495092`)

Post Scheduling
Number of PRBs used for critical traffic on PDSCH

---

**2.9.3.9.0-12.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13495089`)

Post Scheduling
Measurement: NR Resource Utilization per cell  
NetAct name: NUM\_PRB\_USED\_CRI\_TRAF\_PDSCH  
PI ID: M55165C00073  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

Update time: 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter during post scheduling after all the PRB allocations are finalized in DL.

Increment value: 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter with the value of total number of PRBs allocated for all critical DRBs in PDSCH.

---

## 2.9.4 UL Scheduler

### 2.9.4.0-1 UL Scheduler FA: TBD Document Owner: TBD (ID: 11193430)

### 2.9.4.1 Pre-Scheduler

#### 2.9.4.1.0-1 Pre-Scheduler UEs with Data in UL Buffer (ID: 11193442)

**2.9.4.1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11193444`)

Pre-Scheduler
Number of Active UEs with data in UL buffer

---

**2.9.4.1.0-1.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `12505763`)

Pre-Scheduler
Measurement : NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name : ACC\_UE\_UL\_DRB\_DATA

PI ID : **M55308C02002**

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Upon reception of a "LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd' message by L2-PS from L2-LO as a triggering event, the PM Counters of class 'NR Cell Utilitzation' related to the 'Number of Active UEs with data in UL buffer' shall be processed in the frame of UL buffer Housekeeping function.

 At the end of the sampling period when the rdPmCounter523FSamplingPeriod timer (5G\_L2\_1183\_replaced([11183363](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27iwTPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) expires, the arrays and the following PM counter is processed:

* the current sample value will be set to the number of UEs having bit set in the sampling period (bit) array.

Then the sampling period (bit) array will be set to the actual (bit) array for all attached UEs in order to start the new sampling period monitoring with the latest value.

* **M55308C02002, aka ACC\_UE\_UL\_DRB\_DATA, indicates the accumulated number (sum over samples) of active UEs having data in UL buffer** [CB013961-A-UPD002](note 1)**[End CB013961-A-UPD002] in the related P- or S-subcell. The current sample value is added to the old PM counter value of ACC\_UE\_UL\_DRB\_DATA:**\*\*\*\*

ACC\_UE\_UL\_DRB\_DATA = ACC\_UE\_UL\_DRB\_DATA + current sample value

In the frame of the arrival of PsUser\_UserDeleteReq message for a specific UE, this UE shall be removed from all L2-PS internal lists, that are keeping track on the UEs, which having data in the UL buffer that are used to process the PM Counters.

In the frame of the arrival of a PsUser\_BearerDeleteReq message for a specific UE, this UE shall be evaluated, whether its remaining bearers have still data in the UL buffer. If not, the UE shall be removed from all L2-PS internal lists, that are keeping track on the UEs,  which are having data in the UL buffer that are used to process the PM counters.

Note:

 At the end of the reporting period the sample counters shall be given to the PM counter framework. From  ACC\_UE\_UL\_DRB\_DATA/SAMPLE\_CNT\_NR\_CELL\_UTIL\_UL an average UE number per sampling period can directly be calculated by higher layers.

By decreasing the length of the sampling period ideally to the length of 1 slot, the Average number of UEs that have data in UL buffer per slot can be determined.

 All cells that are configured for the UE shall get the same counter values assigned.

**[CB013961-A-UPD002]**

Note 1: Buffered UL data in LCG with buffered UL data equal to SR payload are not counted whenever UE is in SR\_PENDING\_WAITING\_FOR\_GRANT state ([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) **[End CB013961-A-UPD002] [PR830426] or in SR\_PENDING\_FOR\_UE\_RESPONSE state[End PR830426].**

CP2 reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

**2.9.4.1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11193463`)

Pre-Scheduler
Maximum number of UEs with UL DRB data buffered

---

**2.9.4.1.0-1.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `12505773`)

Pre-Scheduler
Measurement : NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name : MAX\_UE\_UL\_DRB\_DATA

PI ID : **M55308C02003**

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Upon reception of a "LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd' message by L2-PS from L2-LO as a triggering event, the PM Counters of class 'NR Cell Utilitzation' related to the 'Number of Active UEs with data in UL buffer' shall be processed in the frame of UL buffer Housekeeping function .

 At the end of the sampling period when the rdPmCounter523FSamplingPeriod timer (5G\_L2\_1183\_replaced([11183363](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27iwTPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) expires, the arrays and the following PM counter is processed:

* the current sample value will be set to the number of UEs having bit set in the sampling period (bit) array.

Then the sampling period (bit) array will be set to the actual (bit) array for all attached UEs in order to start the new sampling period monitoring with the latest value.

* M55308C02003, aka MAX\_UE\_UL\_DRB\_DATA, indicates the actual maximum number (maximum over samples) of active UEs having data in UL buffer **[CB013961-A-UPD002] (note 1)**[End CB013961-A-UPD002] in the related subcell inside the running sampling period. The current max\_UE\_UL value is checked against the old value of MAX\_UE\_UL\_DRB\_DATA. If the max\_UE\_UL value is larger than the previous value, the max\_UE\_UL value shall become the new PM counter sample value, otherwise the previous maximum value shall become the PM counter sample value.\*\*\*\*

If (max\_UE\_UL > MAX\_UE\_UL\_DRB\_DATA ) {

MAX\_UE\_UL\_DRB\_DATA = max\_UE\_UL;

}

Else {}

In the frame of the arrival of PsUser\_UserDeleteReq message for a specific UE, this UE shall be removed from all L2-PS internal lists, that are keeping track on the UEs, which having data in the UL buffer that are used to process the PM Counters.

In the frame of the arrival of a PsUser\_BearerDeleteReq message for a specific UE, this UE shall be evaluated, whether its remaining bearers have still data in the UL buffer. If not, the UE shall be removed from all L2-PS internal lists, that are keeping track on the UEs,  which are having data in the UL buffer that are used to process the PM counters.

Note:

 At the end of the reporting period the sample counters shall be given to the PM counter framework. From  ACC\_UE\_UL\_DRB\_DATA/SAMPLE\_CNT\_NR\_CELL\_UTIL\_UL an average UE number per sampling period can directly be calculated by higher layers.

By decreasing the length of the sampling period ideally to the length of 1 slot, the Average number of UEs that have data in UL buffer per slot can be determined.

 All cells that are configured for the UE shall get the same counter values assigned.

**[CB013961-A-UPD002]**

Note 1: Buffered UL data in LCG with buffered UL data equal to SR payload are not counted whenever UE is in SR\_PENDING\_WAITING\_FOR\_GRANT state ([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

**[End CB013961-A-UPD002]**

CP2 reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

**2.9.4.1.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11193471`)

Pre-Scheduler
Sample count for NR Cell Utilization UL counters

---

**2.9.4.1.0-1.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11193477`)

Pre-Scheduler
Measurement : NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name : SAMPLE\_CNT\_NR\_CELL\_UTIL\_UL

PI ID : M55308C01001

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Upon reception of a "LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd' message by L2-PS from L2-LO as a triggering event, the PM Counters of class 'NR Cell Utilitzation' related to the 'Number of Active UEs with data in UL buffer' shall be processed in the frame of UL buffer Housekeeping function.

 At the end of the sampling period when the rdPmCounter523FSamplingPeriod timer (5G\_L2\_1183\_replaced([11183363](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27iwTPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) expires, the arrays and the following PM counter is processed:

* the current sample value will be set to the number of UEs having bit set in the sampling period (bit) array.

Then the sampling period (bit) array will be set to the actual (bit) array for all attached UEs in order to start the new sampling period monitoring with the latest value.

o M55308C01001, aka SAMPLE\_CNT\_NR\_CELL\_UTIL\_UL describes the number of samples taken to the ACC – counter.

So the actual value of SAMPLE\_CNT\_NR\_CELL\_UTIL\_UL shall be incremented after each sample period:

SAMPLE\_CNT\_NR\_CELL\_UTIL\_UL = SAMPLE\_CNT\_NR\_CELL\_UTIL\_UL + 1

In the frame of the arrival of PsUser\_UserDeleteReq message for a specific UE, this UE shall be removed from all L2-PS internal lists, that are keeping track on the UEs, which having data in the UL buffer that are used to process the PM Counters.

In the frame of the arrival of a PsUser\_BearerDeleteReq message for a specific UE, this UE shall be evaluated, whether its remaining bearers have still data in the UL buffer. If not, the UE shall be removed from all L2-PS internal lists, that are keeping track on the UEs,  which are having data in the UL buffer that are used to process the PM counters.

Note:

 At the end of the reporting period the sample counters shall be given to the PM counter framework. From  ACC\_UE\_UL\_DRB\_DATA/SAMPLE\_CNT\_NR\_CELL\_UTIL\_UL an average UE number per sampling period can directly be calculated by higher layers.

By decreasing the length of the sampling period ideally to the length of 1 slot, the Average number of UEs that have data in UL buffer per slot can be determined.

 All cells that are configured for the UE shall get the same counter values assigned.

CP2 reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

#### 2.9.4.1.0-2 Pre-Scheduler UEs with 5QI1 Data in UL Buffer (ID: 11193482)

**2.9.4.1.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11193495`)

Pre-Scheduler
[CNI-127108] Measurement : NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name :ACC\_UE\_UL\_DRB\_DATA\_5QI1

PI ID :M55308C32001

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End CNI-127108]

Counter M55308C32001 is based on M55308C02002(ACC\_UE\_UL\_DRB\_DATA).

That only contains the UEs whose 5QI1 buffer isn't empty (including UE UL BSR,  L2-PS sending the pre-schedule for voice data, SR and Packet Aggregation).

Note: logicalChannelId and LCG index can be used to determine whether the UE's 5QI1 buffer is empty with its qosId.

#### 2.9.4.1.0-3 Pre-Scheduler PM counters for Number of UEs with UL data buffered per PMQAP profile (ID: 11193500)

**2.9.4.1.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11193510`)

Pre-Scheduler
[CNI-127108] Measurement : UE statistics per NRPMQAP

NetAct name :ACC\_UE\_UL\_DRB\_DATA\_PQMQAP

PI ID :M55356C00001

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End CNI-127108]

[Before CNI-127108]Counters [CNI-127108] Counter [End CNI-127108] ACC\_UE\_UL\_DRB\_DATA\_PQMQAP(M55356C00001)

[Before CNI-127108]/MAX\_UE\_UL\_DRB\_DATA\_PMQAP(M55356C00003)[End CNI-127108] are based on M55308C02002(ACC\_UE\_UL\_DRB\_DATA)[Before CNI-127108]/M55308C02003(MAX\_UE\_UL\_DRB\_DATA), [End CNI-127108] .That the UEs are grouped by each PMQAP profile.

Note: 1.  logicalChannelId and LCG index can be used to determine whether the UE's buffer is empty with its qosId.

2. If the UE with UL DRB data belongs to more than one PMQAP profiles, then each value related to the UE should be accumulate.

3. If PMQAP profiles online changed, then keep the old the UE's PMQAP profile index unchanged until the UE or the bear released, but applied for the new UE or bear attached.

Pre-Scheduler

#### 2.9.4.1.0-7 Pre-Scheduler Accumulated slots with UL data buffered (ID: 11193550)

**2.9.4.1.0-7.0-3**  (ID: `12492150`)

Pre-Scheduler
Measurement : NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name :ACC\_CELL\_UL\_DRB\_DATA

PI ID :**M55308C26002**

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For 'NR Cell Utilization' class, according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), Counter M55308C26002  shall be incremented by 1 each slot for which there is UL data buffered in any LCG with a DRB configured of any UE. Buffered UL data in LCG with only SRB(s) configured is not counted. **[CB013961-A-UPD002]**Buffered UL data in LCG with buffered UL data equal to SR payload are not counted whenever UE is in SR\_PENDING\_WAITING\_FOR\_GRANT state ([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). **[End CB013961-A-UPD002]**\*\*\*\*

The following implementation is proposed:

ACC\_CELL\_UL\_DRB\_DATA is incremented by 1 each slot when there is at least one bit set to TRUE in actual (bit) array for all attached UEs indicating data present in UL buffer.

Note: Since for already existing 'NR Cell Utilization' class UL DRB buffer counters sampling period can be configured to a value greater than one slot, counter ACC\_CELL\_UL\_DRB\_DATA can operate only on actual (bit) array (instead of sampling period (bit) array). Therefore, ACC\_CELL\_UL\_DRB\_DATA is to be updated in Pre-Scheduler – before current UL DRB buffers could be cleared during the scheduling process.

---

#### 2.9.4.1.0-8 Pre-Scheduler UL PRB and throughput PMQAP profile Counters (ID: 11193565)

**2.9.4.1.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `11193570`)

Pre-Scheduler
Number of UL PRBs used for data traffic for PMQAP

---

**2.9.4.1.0-8.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11193573`)

Pre-Scheduler
Number of UL PRBs used for data traffic for PMQAP internal counters

---

**2.9.4.1.0-8.0-1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11193583`)

Pre-Scheduler
5G-L2-PS shall maintain internal counters for the PM counter report:

* numUsedPrbsForPuschPerPmqapProfileCurrentSlotLastTx[pmqapProfileIndex]
* numUsedPrbsForPuschPerPmqapProfileCurrentSlotAllTx[pmqapProfileIndex]

for each configured PMQAP profile in pmQapIndexList in Cell Setup (5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or Cell Reconfiguration (5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

pmqapProfileIndex range [Before CB008933-A] [0.. 19] [CB008933-A] [1...64] [End CB008933-A].

Those internal counters should be maintained with float precision.

---

**2.9.4.1.0-8.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11193589`)

Pre-Scheduler
Updating Number of UL PRBs used for data traffic for PMQAP internal counters

---

**2.9.4.1.0-8.0-1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11193593`)

Pre-Scheduler
During slot processing

* numUsedPrbsForPuschPerPmqapProfileCurrentSlotLastTx[pmqapProfileIndex] (see 5G\_L2\_8602\_replaced([11193573](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28sm2_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* numUsedPrbsForPuschPerPmqapProfileCurrentSlotAllTx[pmqapProfileIndex] (see 5G\_L2\_8602\_replaced([11193573](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28sm2_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

internal counters are updated with total number of PRBs used for PUSCH, related with given PMQAP profile in current slot.

In order to calculate number of PRBs used for PUSCH for PMQAP profile 5G-L2-PS should keep track about following information per UE per TB for newTx and reTx:

* tbSizeInBytes - transport block size for single TB, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_5084\_replaced([11203344](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwejfPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),
* numPrbs - total number of PRBs for single TB, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4970\_replaced([11199433](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNduvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),
* receivedDataAmount - total number of scheduled bytes for single DRB, see 5G\_L2\_IF\_3473\_replaced([10984729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* txNumber - number of retransmissions performed for given TB

For calculating number of PRBs used for single DRB, 5G L2 PS should follow below formula:

numPrbsForSingleDrbLastTx = (numPrbs / tbSizeInBytes) \* receivedDataAmount;

numPrbsForSingleDrbAllTx = sum[k=1..txNumber] { numPrbs[k] / tbSizeInBytes[k] } \* receivedDataAmount

numPrbsForSingleDrbLastTx should be used to update internal counter numUsedPrbsForPuschPerPmqapProfileCurrentSlotLastTx[pmqapProfileIndex] corresponding to index in pmQapIndexList from Bearer Setup (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_397\_replaced([10974876](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U-o4vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

numPrbsForSingleDrbAllTx should be used to update internal counter numUsedPrbsForPuschPerPmqapProfileCurrentSlotAllTx[pmqapProfileIndex] corresponding to index in pmQapIndexList from Bearer Setup (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_397\_replaced([10974876](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U-o4vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

numPrbsForSingleDrbLastTx and numPrbsForSingleDrbAllTx should be maintained with float precision.

[02895594]

Note:

When receivedDataAmount is higher that tbSizeInBytes, such case is excluded from calculation. This is workaround for some problems with decoding information from recevied TB, that was causing UL PRB Utilization for NRPMQAP exceed 100%.

[End 02895594]

---

**2.9.4.1.0-8.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11193598`)

Pre-Scheduler
Number of UL PRBs used for data traffic for PMQAP PM Counters

---

**2.9.4.1.0-8.0-1.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11193608`)

Pre-Scheduler
[CNI-127108] Measurement : PRB and throughput PMQAP profile

NetAct name :UL\_PRB\_USED\_DATA\_PMQAP

PI ID :M55363C00002

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End CNI-127108]

In each slot 5G-L2-PS will update UL\_PRB\_USED\_DATA\_PMQAP (M55363C00002), for each configured PMQAP profile as follows:

update of UL\_PRB\_USED\_DATA\_PMQAP should be done using integer values.

IF (numUsedPrbsForPuschPerPmqapProfileCurrentSlotAllTx[pmqapProfileIndex] > 0) AND (numUsedPrbsForPuschPerPmqapProfileCurrentSlotAllTx[pmqapProfileIndex] < 1)

numUsedPrbsForPuschPerPmqapProfileAllTxInteger = 1

ELSE

numUsedPrbsForPuschPerPmqapProfileAllTxInteger = ROUND(numUsedPrbsForPuschPerPmqapProfileCurrentSlotAllTx[pmqapProfileIndex]) (see. 5G\_L2\_8602\_replaced([11193573](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28sm2_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

END

UL\_PRB\_USED\_DATA\_PMQAP for configured pmqapProfileIndex += numUsedPrbsForPuschPerPmqapProfileAllTxInteger ;

---

**2.9.4.1.0-8.0-2**  (ID: `11193612`)

Pre-Scheduler
Maximum UL PRB Utilization for PMQAP

---

**2.9.4.1.0-8.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11193618`)

Pre-Scheduler
Updating Number of UL PRBs used for data traffic for PMQAP internal counters

---

**2.9.4.1.0-8.0-2.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11193627`)

Pre-Scheduler
[CNI-127108] Measurement : PRB and throughput PMQAP profile

NetAct name :UL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX\_PMQAP

PI ID :M55363C00004

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End CNI-127108]

In each slot 5G-L2-PS will update UL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX\_PMQAP (M55363C00004) for each configured PMQAP pmqapProfileIndex as follows:

ulPrbUtilSlotMaxPmqapCurrentSlot[pmqapProfileIndex] = (numUsedPrbsForPuschPerPmqapProfileCurrentSlotLastTx[pmqapProfileIndex] \* 100) / PRB\_AVAIL\_PUSCH

IF (ulPrbUtilSlotMaxPmqapCurrentSlot[pmqapProfileIndex] > 0) AND (ulPrbUtilSlotMaxPmqapCurrentSlot[pmqapProfileIndex] < 1)

ulPrbUtilSlotMaxPmqapCurrentSlot[pmqapProfileIndex] = 1

ELSE

ulPrbUtilSlotMaxPmqapCurrentSlot[pmqapProfileIndex] = ROUND(ulPrbUtilSlotMaxPmqapCurrentSlot[pmqapProfileIndex])

END

for:

* numUsedPrbsForPuschPerPmqapProfileCurrentSlotLastTx[pmqapProfileIndex], see 5G\_L2\_8602\_replaced([11193573](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28sm2_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* PRB\_AVAIL\_PUSCH , see 5G\_L2\_433\_replaced([11193740](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28t0__vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

UL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX\_PMQAP = MAX(UL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX\_PMQAP; ulPrbUtilSlotMaxPmqapCurrentSlot[pmqapProfileIndex])

---

**2.9.4.1.0-8.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11193633`)

Pre-Scheduler
Diagnostic information for UL PRB and throughput PMQAP profile Counters

---

**2.9.4.1.0-8.0-2.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11193645`)

Pre-Scheduler
Printing diagnostic information for PRB and throughput PMQAP profile Counters is controlled with R&D parameter rdUlPrbAndThroughputPmqapProfileDiagnosticBitmap (see 5G\_L2\_8613\_replaced([11183164](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27hiIvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))  [CB008933-A] and rdUlPrbAndThroughputPmqapProfileDiagnosticBitmap2 (see 5G\_L2\_18425\_replaced([11183178](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27hiJfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB008933-A]. These bitmaps defines for which PMQAP profile diagnostic prints shall be enabled during measurements aggregation for PRB and throughput PMQAP profile Counters.

To determine if the diagnostic information shall be printed, 5G-L2-PS checks bit value under bitIndex of rdUlPrbAndThroughputPmqapProfileDiagnosticBitmap, corresponding to pmqapProfileIndex from pmQapIndexList in Cell Setup (5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or Cell Reconfiguration (5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

If the bit value is set to 1, 5G-L2-PS prints the diagnostic information.

#### 2.9.4.1.0-9 Pre-Scheduler Proactive Grant Scheduling (ID: 12819197)

**2.9.4.1.0-9.0-1**  (ID: `12821788`)

Pre-Scheduler
**Proactive UL Grant Sequence**

---

**2.9.4.1.0-9.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12821815`)

Pre-Scheduler
Time of non-zero buffered data during prolong timer activity

---

**2.9.4.1.0-9.0-1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12821823`)

Pre-Scheduler
5G-L2-PS shall maintain the state variable prolongTimerTimeOfNonZeroBsr per Ue context as follows:

When 5G-L2-PS receives the [10984687: UL MAC PDU Reception Indication](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WBxzvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ) and all the following conditions are true for the given UE:

* lowPrioPugActivated is set to true (see [10974651: PsUser\_UserSetupReq Message Content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U9ayfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ) or [10976074: PsUser\_UserModifyReq message content:](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VEvgvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)),
* ueUlBufferInfo is received for transmission that was scheduled with a proactive UL grant,
* The BSR is up to date according to [11151181: Check if this BSR is older than last received up-to-date BSR for the UE](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24gqZPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)
* The prolong timer is running (see [11195341: Low Priority Proactive Grants: Timing](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv7J4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),
* The prolongTimerTimeOfNonZeroBsr variable has not been set during the current prolong timer duration,
* After processing of ueBsrList and bearerList any of the UE’s rrmBufferedDataUlLcg\_bytes (see [11203665: Multiplicities of the housekeeping function](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwgYo_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is greater than zero,

then 5G-L2-PS shall record the reception time of the LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd in the UE context as prolongTimerTimeOfNonZeroBsr.

When the prolong timer expires or is stopped, 5G-L2-PS shall clear the prolongTimerTimeOfNonZeroBsr variable.

[Before CNI-136896-E] Note: Missing counter specification added based on code as improvement action post 05083507 [End CNI-136896-E]

---

Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: ULPROGRANT\_NONSKIP\_SEQ\_START

PI ID: M55308C30001

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

Update time:

When 5G-L2-PS receives LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd (see [10984687: UL MAC PDU Reception Indication](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WBxzvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and for a given UE context 5G-L2-PS starts the prolong timer (rrmProGrantsPeriod) as described in [11195341: Low Priority Proactive Grants: Timing](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv7J4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) and ulProGrantType is set to nonSkippable (see [10974651:](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_inbyIPu4Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ) [10974651: PsUser\_UserSetupReq Message Content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U9ayfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ) or [10976074: PsUser\_UserModifyReq message content:](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VEvgvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)),

Increment value:

5G-L2-PS shall increase the counter by one.

[Before CNI-136896-E] Note: Missing counter specification added based on code as improvement action post 05083507 [End CNI-136896-E]

Increment value:
