---

**2.9.4.1.0-9.0-1.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `12821872`)

Pre-Scheduler
Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: MAX\_ULPROGRANT\_NONSKIP\_SEQ\_DUR

PI ID: M55308C31001

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update the counter upon one of the following events:

1. Expiration of prolong timer (rrmProGrantsPeriod)  (see [11195341: Low Priority Proactive Grants: Timing](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv7J4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
2. Restart of prolong timer (reception of [10984687: UL MAC PDU Reception Indication](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WBxzvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))
3. Prolong timer stop due to TCP Boost Proactive Grant Scheduling (see [11195526: TCP Boost Interaction With Other Types Of Proactive Grants](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv8_A_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

The update shall be performed only if both of the following conditions are met during the activity of the prolong timer:

* the prolongTimerTimeOfNonZeroBsr has been set as described in [12821815: Time of non-zero buffered data during prolong timer activity](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6ewp1amiEfCrANRYxAlR5A).
* the ulProGrantType is set to nonSkippable (see [10974651: PsUser\_UserSetupReq Message Content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U9ayfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ) or [10976074: PsUser\_UserModifyReq message content:](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VEvgvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Increment value:

5G-L2-PS shall calculate a duration as the difference in time between the prolong timer start time and prolongTimerTimeOfNonZeroBsr time, expressed in milliseconds. The counter shall be updated with calculated duration if it is greater than the value currently stored in the PM counter active memory bank.

[Before CNI-136896-E] Note: Missing counter specification added based on code as improvement action post 05083507 [End CNI-136896-E]

---

2. Restart of prolong timer (reception of [10984687: UL MAC PDU Reception Indication](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WBxzvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))
3. Prolong timer stop due to TCP Boost Proactive Grant Scheduling (see [11195526: TCP Boost Interaction With Other Types Of Proactive Grants](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv8_A_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

* the prolongTimerTimeOfNonZeroBsr has been set as described in [12821815: Time of non-zero buffered data during prolong timer activity](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6ewp1amiEfCrANRYxAlR5A).
* the ulProGrantType is set to skippableDynamic or skippableDynamicEnhanced (see [10974651: PsUser\_UserSetupReq Message Content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U9ayfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ) or [10976074: PsUser\_UserModifyReq message content:](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VEvgvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Increment value:

5G-L2-PS shall calculate a duration as the difference in time between the prolong timer start time and prolongTimerTimeOfNonZeroBsr time, expressed in milliseconds. The counter shall be updated with calculated duration if it is greater than the value currently stored in the PM counter active memory bank.

**2.9.4.1.0-9.0-1.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `12821875`)

Pre-Scheduler
Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: AVG\_ULPROGRANT\_NONSKIP\_SEQ\_DUR

PI ID: M55308C31002

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update the counter upon one of the following events:

1. Expiration of prolong timer (rrmProGrantsPeriod)  (see [11195341: Low Priority Proactive Grants: Timing](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv7J4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
2. Restart of prolong timer (reception of [10984687: UL MAC PDU Reception Indication](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WBxzvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))
3. Prolong timer stop due to TCP Boost Proactive Grant Scheduling (see [11195526: TCP Boost Interaction With Other Types Of Proactive Grants](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv8_A_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

The update shall be performed only if both of the following conditions are met during the activity of the prolong timer:

* the prolongTimerTimeOfNonZeroBsr has been set as described in [12821815: Time of non-zero buffered data during prolong timer activity](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6ewp1amiEfCrANRYxAlR5A)
* the ulProGrantType is set to nonSkippable (see [10974651: PsUser\_UserSetupReq Message Content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U9ayfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ) or [10976074: PsUser\_UserModifyReq message content:](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VEvgvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Increment value:

5G-L2-PS shall increment the counter’s cumulative sum by the time difference in microseconds between prolong timer start time and prolongTimerTimeOfNonZeroBsr time and shall increase the number of samples by 1000.

[Before CNI-136896-E] Note: Missing counter specification added based on code as improvement action post 05083507 [End CNI-136896-E]

### 2.9.4.2 TD Scheduler

#### 2.9.4.2.0-1 TD Scheduler Basic UL Slot Type (ID: 11193653)

**2.9.4.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11193659`)

TD Scheduler
UL Data slots

---

**2.9.4.2.0-1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11193669`)

TD Scheduler
[CNI-127108] Measurement : NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name : UL\_DATA\_SLOTS

PI ID : M55308C00002

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

No additional details as compared to NIDD

Increment value:

No additional details as compared to NIDD

[End CNI-127108]

[before CNI-127108]

Different UL slot types shall be counted after slot type selection step (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4759\_replaced([11194212](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvzODfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for PM Counter class  'NR Cell Utilization' assessment as requested in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)):

Dependent on the type of slot the following PM Counters shall be incremented by +1.

* M55308C00004: PRACH\_SLOTS = PRACH\_SLOTS +1, in case of Random Access Channel Slot
* M55308C00002: UL\_DATA\_SLOTS = UL\_DATA\_SLOTS +1, in case of UL Data Slot

CP2 reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[End CNI-127108]

**2.9.4.2.0-2.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `12637989`)

TD Scheduler
Measurement : NR Cell Utilization

[Before CB012724-C]

NetAct name : PUSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_OTHER

PI ID : **M55308CRD54010**

[CB012724-C]

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

NetAct name: PUSCH\_ALLOC\_ATT\_REJ\_OTHER

PI ID: M55308C00164

[End CB012724-C]

Update time:

For each UL slot, in TD/FD scheduling, the counter shall be updated if a UE has been rejected for scheduling on PUSCH:

[Before CB012724-C]

* Not schedulable
* FD schedule block in MIMO
* FD schedule block
* FD schedule block in MIMO
* Pusch skipped due to ATB shrink
* Pusch skipped due to large UCI
* Pusch skipped with 64 QAM low set table
* Pusch skipped due to L1 Limit
* Pusch ReTx number PRB too small for PCSI
* Min PRB not met

[CB012724-C]

* Select Subcell Fail

[Before CNI-137616-B]

* Pusch should not schedule a CSI

[End CNI-137616-B]

* All other causes

[End CB012724-C]

and the reject reason is not belong to any of above counters (PDCCH, PRB) (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4297\_replaced([11177362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuu3A_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Increment value :

The recommended method to update this counter is, to update this counter at the end of UL slot as follows:

PUSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_OTHER = PUSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_OTHER

* ( PUSCH\_SCH\_ATT ([11193726](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28t0_PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) - numOfScheduledUeUl
* PUSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PDCCH ([11193689](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28t08vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* PUSCH\_SCH\_ATT\_REJ\_PRB ([11193706](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28t0-PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))

[CB012724-C]

- PUSCH\_ALLOC\_ATT\_REJ\_SKIPALLOC ([12644510](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_pi5TJUKrEfCH-cG2YrVgkA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))

- PUSCH\_ALLOC\_ATT\_REJ\_SCHED\_BLKD ([12644515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_AqEDA0KsEfCH-cG2YrVgkA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))

- PUSCH\_ALLOC\_ATT\_REJ\_SMAL\_PRB ([12644517](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_SU0NgUKsEfCH-cG2YrVgkA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))

[End CB012724-C])

where,

* numOfScheduledUeUl, is the number of UE that successful scheduled in this slot.

#### 2.9.4.2.0-3 TD Scheduler Total number of allocation attempts on PUSCH (ID: 11193726)

**2.9.4.2.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `12638007`)

TD Scheduler
Measurement : NR Cell Utilization

[Before CB012724-C]

NetAct name : PUSCH\_SCH\_ATT

PI ID : **M55308CRD54011**

[CB012724-C]

Existing RD counter is converted to customer counter. Functionality is not changed. There is only change in NetAct name and PI ID fields:

NetAct name: PUSCH\_ALLOC\_ATT

PI ID: M55308C00158

Update time:

No additional details as compared to NIDD

Increment value:

For each UL slot, the counter PUSCH\_SCH\_ATT is updated as:

PUSCH\_SCH\_ATT =  PUSCH\_SCH\_ATT +  numOfUeTdUl

where,

* numOfUeTdUl, is the number of UE in UL CS1 list that enter TD ([11174627](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kudxRfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

FD Scheduler
Measurement: PRB and throughput PMQAP profile

## NetAct name: SCHD\_PUSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP

PI ID: M55363C00009

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

Update time:

When 5G-L2-PS shall update counter of  the number of slots that have PUSCH scheduled for a PMQAP profile in a measurement period for FR1 when below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq or PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq from 5G-CP-RT with:
* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) AND
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) AND
* actMacResourceUtilizationCounter = 00000010 – Scheduled Slot per PMQAP profile ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) AND
* logicalChannelIdentity = [3,32] -  DRBs ([10974859](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U-B3_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* 5G-L2-PS receive LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd ([10984729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) from 5G-L2-Lo to use for mapping with PMQAP Profile:
* bearerList,
* logicalChannelIdentity,
* receivedDataAmount

Rationale:

This counter considers the UL slot used for HARQ acknowledgment (initial and retransmissions) only if the IE crc=OK indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqULoner/ UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqUL1sw has been received. However, at this level there is no information about bearerId or LCID on which data is received because CRC is per TB. In such way 5G-L2-PS must wait to receive LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd with bearer list and logicalChannelIdentity to match it to the PMQAP Profile.

* 5G-L2-PS shall consider PRACH slots and Special slots.

Increment value:

5G-L2-PS increments the counter by 1 for all the bearers configured in a profile that are scheduled in one slot.

Example:  
Slot1: If multiple bearers are scheduled in a slot on one PMQAP Profile, update the SCHD\_PUSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP counter by 1.

Slot2; If the scheduled bearers in a slot belong to multiple PMQAP profile, update the SCHD\_PUSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP counter for each PMQAP profile by 1.

Slot 3: If the scheduled bearers in a slot belong to multiple PMQAP profile and additionally one bearer belongs to multiple PMQAP Profiles, update the SCHD\_PUSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP counter for each PMQAP profile (Profile1 and Profile2) by 1.

[image-0][image\_desc]The image displays a diagram illustrating the scheduling of data radio bearers (DRBs) across three time slots. Each slot is presented as a vertical column containing several oval shapes, each labeled with a DRB identifier (DRB1, DRB2, etc.). Accompanying each slot is a text description detailing the type of slot (SSB, TRS, PRACH, Special) and the DRB profiles assigned to it, along with a parameter "DATA\_SLOT\_PUSCH\_PMQAP = 1" and "SCHD\_PUSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP = 1".
**Slot 1 (PRACH):**
This slot contains three DRBs: DRB1, DRB2, and DRB3, all colored pink.
The associated text describes it as "Slot 1 (SSB)" with "DATA\_SLOT\_PUSCH\_PMQAP = 1".
It also defines "Profile1" as containing {Drb1, Drb2, Drb3} and "SCHD\_PUSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP = 1".
**Slot 2 (Special):**
This slot contains six DRBs: DRB1 (pink), DRB2 (pink), DRB3 (light blue), DRB4 (light blue), DRB5 (light blue), and DRB6 (purple).
The associated text describes it as "Slot 2 (TRS)" with "DATA\_SLOT\_PUSCH\_PMQAP = 1".
It defines three profiles:
\* "Profile1" as {Drb1, Drb2} with "SCHD\_PUSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP = 1".
\* "profile2" as {Drb3, Drb5} with "SCHD\_PUSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP = 1".
\* "Profile3" as {Drb4, Drb6} with "SCHD\_PUSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP = 1".
**Slot 3 (PRACH):**
This slot contains four DRBs: DRB1 (partially pink and purple), DRB2 (pink), DRB3 (light blue), and DRB4 (purple).
The associated text describes it as "Slot 3 (Special)" with "DATA\_SLOT\_PUSCH\_PMQAP = 1".
It defines three profiles:
\* "Profile1" as {DRB 1,2} with "SCHD\_PUSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP = 1".
\* "Profile2" as {DRB 1,4} with "SCHD\_PUSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP = 1".
\* "Profile3" as {DRB 3} with "SCHD\_PUSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP = 1".[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-05151126.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

FD Scheduler
Measurement: PRB and throughput PMQAP profile

## NetAct name: DATA\_SLOT\_PUSCH\_PMQAP

PI ID: M55363C00010

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

Update time:

Increment value:

Update time:

When 5G-CP-RT sends PsCell\_CellSetupReq or PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq to 5G-L2-PS with:

* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) AND
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) AND
* actMacResourceUtilizationCounter = 00000010 – Scheduled Slot per PMQAP profile ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))

then 5G-L2-PS shall provide the number of slots that are scheduled in PUSCH for FR1. The counter shall consider PRACH slots and Special slots. The counter is updated by 1 for each slot that is scheduled for PUSCH.

Increment value:

5G-L2-PS increments the counter by 1 every slot irrespective of the DRBs configured in the profile. Thus, all Profiles configured shall increment this counter by the same value.

Note: The counter is used as a denominator for the counter SCHD\_PUSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP to calculate the average PUSCH slot usage per Profile

Example:

Slot1: If multiple bearers are scheduled in a slot on one PMQAP Profile, update the DATA\_SLOT\_PUSCH\_PMQAP counter by 1.

Slot2; If the scheduled bearers in a slot belong to multiple PMQAP profile, update the DATA\_SLOT\_PUSCH\_PMQAP counter for all PMQAP profile by 1.

Slot 3: If the scheduled bearers in a slot belong to multiple PMQAP profile and additionally one bearer belongs to multiple PMQAP Profiles, update the DATA\_SLOT\_PUSCH\_PMQAP counter for all PMQAP profiles by 1.

[image-0][image\_desc]The image displays a diagram illustrating three "slots" labeled Slot 1, Slot 2, and Slot 3. Each slot contains a vertical arrangement of oval shapes, each labeled with "DRB" followed by a number (e.g., DRB1, DRB2). The oval shapes are colored pink, light blue, and purple.
Slot 1, labeled "(PRACH)", contains three pink oval shapes labeled DRB1, DRB2, and DRB3. To the right of Slot 1, there is text indicating "Slot 1 (SSB)" and "DATA\_SLOT\_PUSCH\_PMQAP = 1". Below this, it states "Profile1=(Drb1,Drb2,Drb3)" and "SCHD\_PUSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP = 1".

- "Profile3=(Drb4,Drb6)" with "SCHD\_PUSCH\_SLOT\_PMQAP = 1"
Slot 3, labeled "(PRACH)", contains four oval shapes. The top oval, DRB1, is split into two colors: pink and purple. The second oval is pink (DRB2), the third is light blue (DRB3), and the fourth is purple (DRB4). To the right of Slot 3, there is text indicating "Slot 3 (Special)" and "DATA\_SLOT\_PUSCH\_PMQAP = 1". Below this, there are three profiles listed:

**2.9.4.3.0-2.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `12580102`)

FD Scheduler
Measurement: PRB and throughput PMQAP profile

## NetAct name: UE\_SCHD\_PUSCH\_PMQAP

PI ID: M55363C00011

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

Update time:

When 5G-CP-RT sends PsCell\_CellSetupReq or PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq to 5G-L2-PS with:

* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) AND
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) AND
* actMacResourceUtilizationCounter = 00000001 – Scheduled UEs per slot per PMQAP profile ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))

then 5G-L2-PS shall provide the number of UEs scheduled in a PUSCH slot for a profile in a measurement period for FR1.

The counter shall consider PRACH slots and Special slots.

Increment value:

5G-L2-PS increments the counter by 1 for all the bearers configured in a profile that are scheduled in one slot for one UE.

Example:

Slot1: If multiple bearers are scheduled in a slot for one UE on one PMQAP Profile, update the UE\_SCHD\_PUSCH\_PMQAP counter by 1.

Slot2: If the scheduled bearers in a slot for multiple UEs belong to multiple PMQAP profile, update the UE\_SCHD\_PUSCH\_PMQAP counter by the number of UEs with scheduled DRBs matching the PMQAP profile.

Slot 3: If the scheduled bearers in a slot for multiple UEs belong to multiple PMQAP profiles and additionally one bearer belongs to multiple PMQAP Profiles, update the UE\_SCHD\_PUSCH\_PMQAP counter for all PMQAP profiles by 1.

[image-0][image\_desc]The image displays three distinct slots, labeled "Slot 1", "Slot 2", and "Slot 3". Each slot contains a vertical arrangement of oval shapes, representing "DRB" (Data Radio Bearer) instances, and associated text describing configurations.

- Profile1={DRB 1,2,3}

- UE1={DRB 1,3,4}
- UE2={DRB 2,5,6}
- Profile1={DRB 1,2,3}
- UE\_SCHD\_PUSCH\_PMQAP = 2
- Profile2={DRB 4}
- UE\_SCHD\_PUSCH\_PMQAP = 1
- Profile3={DRB 5,6}
- UE\_SCHD\_PUSCH\_PMQAP = 1
**Slot 3:**
- Labeled as "(PRACH)".
- Contains four DRBs: DRB2, DRB4 (pink), DRB1 (partially pink and purple), and DRB3 (light blue).

- MAX\_UE\_SCHD\_PUSCH\_PMQAP = 3
- UE1=(DRB 1,3}
- UE2={DRB 2}

- UE\_SCHD\_PUSCH\_PMQAP = 3

**2.9.4.3.0-2.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `12580098`)

FD Scheduler
Measurement: PRB and throughput PMQAP profile

## NetAct name: MAX\_UE\_SCHD\_PUSCH\_PMQAP

PI ID: M55363C00012

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

Update time:

When 5G-CP-RT sends PsCell\_CellSetupReq or PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq to 5G-L2-PS with:

* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) AND
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) AND
* actMacResourceUtilizationCounter = 00000001 – Scheduled UEs per slot per PMQAP profile ([12519675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_u1nkQBkaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))

then 5G-L2-PS shall collect data of number of scheduled UEs in PUSCH slot for profile to get the maximum number of UEs scheduled in a PUSCH slot for a profile in a measurement period for FR1. The counter shall consider PRACH slots and Special slots.

Increment value:

The maximum UEs is the maximum of the UE\_SCHD\_PUSCH\_PMQAP ([12580101](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_tSj_czFrEfCRMdP0Nuo3Hg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) in a sampling period.

When 5G-L2-PS has determined UE\_SCHD\_PUSCH\_PMQAP, then 5G-L2-PS shall report it to OAM.

When OAM receives UE\_SCHD\_PUSCH\_PMQAP, then OAM shall calculate the max value within the measurement period and update the MAX\_UE\_SCHD\_PUSCH\_PMQAP counter for PMQAP profile.

To the right of each slot, there is associated text describing parameters and configurations.

\* UE\_SCHD\_PUSCH\_PMQAP = 2
\* Profile2={DRB 4}
\* UE\_SCHD\_PUSCH\_PMQAP = 1
\* Profile3={DRB 5,6}
\* UE\_SCHD\_PUSCH\_PMQAP = 1
\* DRB Ovals (from top to bottom): DRB1 (pink), DRB2 (pink), DRB3 (pink), DRB5 (light blue), DRB6 (light blue), DRB4 (purple).
**Slot 3:**
\* Label: Slot 3 (PRACH)

#### 2.9.4.3.0-3 FD Scheduler Number of PRBs available for PUSCH with L1 baseband pooling activated (ID: 11193758)

**2.9.4.3.0-3.0-7**  (ID: `12728052`)

FD Scheduler
Measurement : NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name : PRB\_AVAIL\_PUSCH\_BB\_POOL

PI ID :**M55308C10006**

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

Additionally to NIDD description, updated only if the given cell is NOT a Supplemental DL Cell FR1 (see 5G\_L2\_14855\_replaced([11141639](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23puzPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Increment value:

Implementation details:

In each available UL slot:

In FDD cells:

PRB\_AVAIL\_PUSCH\_BB\_POOL += min{CRM\_allocation, max{0, numAllocCellPrb - numOfPucchPRBs}} - numOfPrachPRBs

In TDD (FR1) cells:

PRB\_AVAIL\_PUSCH\_BB\_POOL += (availableUlPrb – number of PRBs used by common PUCCH  - number of PRBs used by PRACH)

where

* numAllocCellPrb is the UL cell PRB amount allocated by baseband resource manager (BBRM)
* CRM\_allocation is considered only if DSS mode >= 2 and is the available PUSCH PRBs as received in EN DSS UL SUBCARRIER RESOURCE ALLOCATION REQUEST (5G\_UP\_ALG\_5180\_replaced([11172453](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuMrgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

 numOfPucchPRBs is number of reserved PRBs for Long PUCCH

If DSS mode >= 2, numOfPucchPRBs corresponds to sum of the two areas for NR long PUCCH as received in EN DSS UL SUBCARRIER RESOURCE ALLOCATION REQUEST

Otherwise, numOfPucchPRBs = ulBandwidth – longPucchNumPuschPrb [CB012299-A] - longPucchNumPuschPrb2 [End CB012299-A] - totalBlankedPRBs

 ulBandwidth is the PRB corresponding to the UL Bandwidth of the cell

 longPucchNumPuschPrb corresponds to IE longPucchNumPuschPrb of the dedicated UL BWP (5G\_L2\_IF\_95\_replaced([10968336](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UXk5_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

 [CB012299-A] longPucchNumPuschPrb2 corresponds to IE longPucchNumPuschPrb2 of the dedicated UL large BWP (5G\_L2\_IF\_95\_replaced([10968336](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UXk5_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB012299-A]

 totalBlankedPRBs is sum of blanked UL PRBs in high and low edge (5G\_L2\_IF\_138\_replaced([10969576](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Udrg_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

 numOfPrachPRBs is number of PRBs for PRACH, if any, including guard PRBs (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4950\_replaced([11199072](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwLogvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

* availableUlPrb is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4876\_replaced([11196884](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwGI9vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**whereby the one of the largest dedicated BWP shall be used**
* Please note, that rrmNumPuschPrbDedicatedBwp in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4876\_replaced([11196884](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwGI9vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) can be different from slot to slot if NRCELL.actDynUlResAlloc = true.

---

#### 2.9.4.3.0-4 FD Scheduler Number of layer PRBs available for PUSCH with L1 baseband pooling activated (ID: 11193794)

**2.9.4.3.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `12767256`)

FD Scheduler
Measurement : NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name : LAYER\_PRB\_AVAIL\_PUSCH\_BB\_POOL

PI ID : M55308C36007

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

In each available UL slot i, LAYER\_PRB\_AVAIL\_PUSCH\_BB\_POOL is updated.

Increment value:

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed

LAYER\_PRB\_AVAIL\_PUSCH\_BB\_POOL += min(numAllocCellLayerPrbUl, availableUlPrb(i) for the largest BWP \* NbUlLayerInSubCell)

end if

Where

- numAllocCellLayerPrbUl is the UL cell layer PRBs amount allocated by baseband resource manager (BBRM) thanks to PsInternal\_ResourceResp refer to 5G\_L2\_8852\_replaced([11243971](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3BzwXPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

- availableUlPrb(i) coming from  5G\_UP\_ALG\_4876\_replaced([11196884](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwGI9vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[CB012299-A] longPucchNumPuschPrb2 impacts the value of availableUlPrb for the largest BWP [End CB012299-A]

---

#### 2.9.4.3.0-5 FD Scheduler Number of layer PRBs used for PUSCH with L1 baseband pooling activated (ID: 11193806)

**2.9.4.3.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11193811`)

FD Scheduler
[CNI-127108]

Measurement : NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name : PI ID : LAYER\_PRB\_USED\_PUSCH\_BB\_POOL

PI ID : M55308C36008

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

No additional details as compared to NIDD.

Increment value:

Implementation details:

In each available UL slot and for each PUSCH UE allocation, LAYER\_PRB\_USED\_PUSCH\_BB\_POOL is updated as below :

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed

LAYER\_PRB\_USED\_PUSCH\_BB\_POOL += rrmNumLayerPrbUsedPerAllocation

end if

Where

 rrmNumLayerPrbUsedPerAllocation is the number of layer PRBs consumed for each allocation per UE (Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[End CNI-127108]

[Before CNI-127108]

LAYER\_PRB\_USED\_PUSCH\_BB\_POOL (M55308C36008) counter will be updated only if slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed [5G\_L2\_IF\_14\_replaced([10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))] is enabled.

This counter shows the consumed layer PRBs.

In each available UL slot and for each PUSCH UE allocation, LAYER\_PRB\_USED\_PUSCH\_BB\_POOL is updated as below :

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed

LAYER\_PRB\_USED\_PUSCH\_BB\_POOL += rrmNumLayerPrbUsedPerAllocation

end if

Where

 rrmNumLayerPrbUsedPerAllocation is the number of layer PRBs consumed for each allocation per UE (Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[End CNI-127108]

#### 2.9.4.3.0-6 FD Scheduler Total number of available UL PRBs (ID: 11193815)

**2.9.4.3.0-6.0-3**  (ID: `12801131`)

FD Scheduler
Measurement : NR EN DSS per NR cell

NetAct name : EN\_DSS\_NBR\_AVLBL\_UL\_PRBS

PI ID : **M55332C02002**

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

per slot

Increment value:

Implementation details:

EN\_DSS\_NBR\_AVLBL\_UL\_PRBS += prbnbr

the number of available UL PRBs is prbnbr as:

[CB007372-AA]

If actAsymmetricDss=false

[End CB007372-AA]

prbnbr=(nbr of UL PRBs in cell bandwith) - (nbr of blanked UL PRBs)

[CB007372-AA]

Else

prbnbr=(nbr of UL PRBs in LTE shared area) [CB007372-D] - (nbr of blanked UL PRBs in LTE shared area) [End CB007372-D]

Endif

[End CB007372-AA]

The counter is not dependant of the 5GC001227 feature (PRB pooling for FDD).

#### 2.9.4.3.0-7 FD Scheduler Number of UL PRBs assigned to NR (ID: 12801802)

**2.9.4.3.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `12801805`)

FD Scheduler
Measurement : NR EN DSS per NR cell

NetAct name : EN\_DSS\_UL\_PRBS\_NR

PI ID : **M55332C01001**

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

per slot

Increment value:

Implementation details:

EN\_DSS\_UL\_PRBS\_NR += numOfPrbs

where:

- numOfPrbs: the number of UL PRB allocated by CRM to NR.

#### 2.9.4.3.0-8 FD Scheduler Number of UL PRBs assigned to NR with maximum share (ID: 12805430)

**2.9.4.3.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `12805431`)

FD Scheduler
Measurement : NR EN DSS per NR cell

NetAct name : EN\_DSS\_UL\_PRBS\_NR\_MAX\_SHARE

PI ID : **M55332C01002**

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The counter is incremented for each UL slot by the number of PRBs for which the maximum share was assigned to NR.

Note: If actAsymmetricDss=true, counter applies only to LTE shared area (dedicated NR area is excluded).

Update time:

per slot

Increment value:

Implementation details:

EN\_DSS\_UL\_PRBS\_NR\_MAX\_SHARE += numOfPrbs

where:

- numOfPrbs: the number of UL PRB allocated by CRM to NR if it is equal to maximum share.

**2.9.4.3.0-9.0-1**  (ID: `12806234`)

FD Scheduler
Measurement : NR EN DSS per NR cell

NetAct name : EN\_DSS\_UL\_PRBS\_NR\_MIN\_SHARE

PI ID : **M55332C01003**

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The counter is incremented for each UL slot by the number of PRBs for which the minimum share was assigned to NR.

Note: If actAsymmetricDss=true, counter applies only to LTE shared area (dedicated NR area is excluded).

Update time:

per slot

Increment value:

Implementation details:

EN\_DSS\_UL\_PRBS\_NR\_MIN\_SHARE+= numOfPrbs

where:

- numOfPrbs: the number of UL PRB allocated by CRM to NR if it is equal to minimum share.

#### 2.9.4.3.0-10 FD Scheduler Number of PRBs used for PUSCH (ID: 11206322)

**2.9.4.3.0-10.0-2**  (ID: `11206399`)

FD Scheduler
**Measurement: NR Cell Utilization / NR Cell Utilization per PLMN**

**NetAct name: PRB\_USED\_PUSCH /PRB\_USED\_PUSCH\_PLMN**

**PI ID: M55308C10002 /M55338C00002**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

**Update time:**

It shall be generic counter which will be updated whatever MU-MIMO is enabled or not.

In each DL slot including SSB slot **without TRS and TRS slot for each scheduled UE, the counter is updated as below:**

PRB\_USED\_PUSCH += numOfPuschPrbs

PRB\_USED\_PUSCH\_PLMN += numOfPuschPrbs for the related PLMN

where

* numOfPuschPrbs: the number of PRB allocated for PUSCH.

**Increment value :**

number of numOfPuschPrbs

[CB008250-AA]Counter PRB\_USED\_PUSCH\_PLMN value is 100 times higher than the actual value (for example, 1.23 is stored as 123), so the reported value should be multiplied by 100.This counter is only updated when PLMN aware scheduling (NRBTS.actPlmnAwareScheduler=true) is enabled and provides the number of used PRBs only for PLMN aware traffic. [End CB008250-AA]

#### 2.9.4.3.0-11 FD Scheduler Number of PRBs used for PUSCH for BWP1 (ID: 11193830)

#### 2.9.4.3.0-14 FD Scheduler PRBs used for PUSCH for Power Saving BWP (ID: 11193885)

**2.9.4.3.0-14.0-2**  (ID: `11193895`)

FD Scheduler
[CNI-127108]

Measurement : NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name : PRB\_USED\_PUSCH\_BWP\_PS

PI ID : M55308C29006

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

No additional details as compared to NIDD.

Increment value:

Implementation details:

For "UlData\_PuschReceiveReq" message, the related cell shall be identified by the subcellId, for each grant in the message, L2PS shall check if  grant is for PS BWP UE based on ue's c-rnti, if check evaluates to true then counter PRB\_USED\_PUSCH\_BWP\_PS shall be incremented by number of used PUSCH PRBs in the slot

[End CNI-127108]

[Before CNI-127108]

For definition of current PM counter prior to release 25R1, please refer to applicable release requirement under 5G\_L2\_3096\_replaced([11193830](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28ucE_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[End CNI-127108]

#### 2.9.4.3.0-15 FD Scheduler Accumulated number of UEs scheduled in UL per slot per Power Saving BWP (ID: 11193898)

**2.9.4.3.0-15.0-4**  (ID: `11193920`)

FD Scheduler
[CNI-127108]

Measurement : NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name : ACC\_UE\_UL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP\_PS

PI ID : M55308C28011

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

No additional details as compared to NIDD.

Increment value:

Implementation details:

- Whenever a UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message is sent, the parameter rrmNumScheduledUesUlSlot shall be incremented by the number of UEs handled by the message (e.g. 1 msg per UE for non-bundled interface messages).

- There shall be evaluation to check if  UlData\_PuschReceiveReq is sent to UEs in PS BWP, if evalutaion sets to true then above counter is incermented.

- After the UL scheduling is completed, L2-PS shall update the PM counter above using this parameter. rrmNumScheduledUesUlSlot is then reset to 0.

[End CNI-127108]

[Before CNI-127108]

Whenever a UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message is sent, the parameter rrmNumScheduledUesUlSlot shall be incremented by the number of UEs handled by the message (e.g. 1 msg per UE for non-bundled interface messages). After the UL scheduling is completed, L2-PS shall update the PM counters above using this parameter. rrmNumScheduledUesUlSlot is then reset to 0.

If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and if there is PS BWP configured (with BWP PROFILE as power saving also  denoted as PSBWP )

There shall be evaluation to check if  UlData\_PuschReceiveReq is sent to UEs in PS BWP, if evelautaion sets to true then following counters are incermented.

M55308C28011 aka ACC\_UE\_UL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP\_PS, indicates the accumulated number of P(S)-Cell or S-Cell UEs which are scheduled in UL per slot and per Power saving  BWP.

M55308C28012, aka MAX\_UE\_UL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP\_PS, indicates the max number of P(S)-Cell or S-Cell UEs which are scheduled in UL per slot and per power saving BWP.

M55308C28003, aka ACC\_UE\_UL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP1, This counter indicates the accumulated number of P(S)Cell or SCell UEs which are scheduled in UL per slot and per BWP1.

M55308C28004, aka MAX\_UE\_UL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP1, This counter indicates the maximum number of P(S)Cell or SCell UEs which are scheduled in UL per slot and per BWP1.

M55308C28007, aka ACC\_UE\_UL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP2, This counter indicates the accumulated number of P(S)Cell or SCell UEs which are scheduled in UL per slot and per BWP2.

M55308C28008, aka MAX\_UE\_UL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP2, This counter indicates the maximum number of P(S)Cell or SCell UEs which are scheduled in UL per slot and per BWP2.

M55308C00083, aka ACC\_UE\_UL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP3, This counter indicates the accumulated number of P(S)-Cell or S-Cell UEs which are scheduled in UL per slot and per BWP3.

M55308C00084, aka MAX\_UE\_UL\_SCH\_SLOT\_BWP3, This counter indicates the maximum number of P(S)-Cell or S-Cell UEs which are scheduled in UL per slot and per BWP3.

Note 1: This counter is incremented when there are multiple dedicated bandwidth parts configured within 5G cell.

Note 2: The dedicated BWPs are numbered in ascending order of the bandwidth size."

CP2 requirement(s):

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2

[End CNI-127108]

#### 2.9.4.3.0-25 FD Scheduler Data slot with PUSCH - Time (ID: 11194032)

**2.9.4.3.0-25.0-2**  (ID: `11194041`)

FD Scheduler
[CNI-127108]

Measurement : NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name : DATA\_SLOT\_PUSCH\_TIME

PI ID : M55308C00009

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

No additional details as compared to NIDD.

Increment value:

No additional details as compared to NIDD.

[End CNI-127108]

[Before CNI-127108]

For 'NR Cell Utilization' class PM Counters according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) related to DATA\_SLOT\_PUSCH\_TIME PM Counter shall be maintained by incrementing it by the slot duration slotDurationUs (Reference 5G\_L2\_541\_replaced([11156744](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25BnwvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and depending on numerlogy 3GPP 38.211) in the following cases:

M55308C00009: DATA\_SLOT\_PUSCH\_TIME=DATA\_SLOT\_PUSCH\_TIME + slotDurationUs, when at least one UE was scheduled over the PUSCH in the actual UL data slot in the given cell.

CP2 reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[End CNI-127108]

---

#### 2.9.4.3.0-26 FD Scheduler PUSCH OFDM symbols (ID: 11194047)

**2.9.4.3.0-26.0-2**  (ID: `11194058`)

FD Scheduler
[CNI-127108]

Measurement : NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name : PUSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS

PI ID : M55308C03003

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

No additional details as compared to NIDD.

Increment value:

Implementation details:

The UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message (5G\_L1\_5G21A\_190) shall contain a list of UE specific grants (5G\_L1\_5G21A\_184) per subcell that shall be used by 5G-L2-PS to trigger 5G-L1-UL to decode the NR UL slot. These UL grants shall be evaluated one-by-one:

1.) First the number of subcells in the message shall be determined

2.)  For each subcell the related cell shall be identified via subcellID mapping and shall be stored.

3.) Then the number of grants inside the subcell shall be identifed via parameter 'numOfGrants'

4.)  Loop through the UL receptions grants by evaluation the parameters.

5.)  With parameter numOfPuschSymbols the number of OFDM UL PUSCH symbols for PUSCH for this UE UL reception shall be assessed

6.)  For the related cell's PM counter shall be incremented:

PUSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS = PUSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS + 'numOfPuschSymbols'

subcellID, numOfGrants, numOfPuschSymbols: See UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.

Note: Above process description is general considering multiple subcells per message and multiple grants per subcell. Starting with 1 subcell per cell and 1 grant per subcell these numbers will be increased step-by-step by later features.

CP2 reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[End CNI-127108]

[Before CNI-127108]

M55308C03003, aka PUSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS of class 'NR Cell utilization', indicates the accumulated number (sum) of OFDM symbols used for PUSCH in the related CELL.

The UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message (5G\_L1\_5G21A\_190) shall contain a list of UE specific grants (5G\_L1\_5G21A\_184) per subcell that shall be used by 5G-L2-PS to trigger 5G-L1-UL to decode the NR UL slot. These UL grants shall be evaluated one-by-one:

1.) First the number of subcells in the message shall be determined

2.)  For each subcell the related cell shall be identified via subcellID mapping and shall be stored.

3.) Then the number of grants inside the subcell shall be identifed via parameter 'numOfGrants'

4.)  Loop through the UL receptions grants by evaluation the parameters.

5.)  With parameter numOfPuschSymbols the number of OFDM UL PUSCH symbols for PUSCH for this UE UL reception shall be assessed

6.)  For the related cell's PM counter shall be incremented:

PUSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS = PUSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS + 'numOfPuschSymbols'

subcellID, numOfGrants, numOfPuschSymbols: See UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.

Note: Above process description is general considering multiple subcells per message and multiple grants per subcell. Starting with 1 subcell per cell and 1 grant per subcell these numbers will be increased step-by-step by later features.

CP2 reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[End CNI-127108]

---

#### 2.9.4.3.0-27 FD Scheduler PUSCH OFDM symbols - Time (ID: 11194064)

**2.9.4.3.0-27.0-2**  (ID: `11194074`)

FD Scheduler
[CNI-127108]

Measurement : NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name : PUSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS\_TIME

PI ID: M55308C03006

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

No additional details as compared to NIDD.

Increment value:

Implementation details:

The implementation of the PM Counter shall be based on the PM Counter in 5G\_L2\_439\_replaced([11194047](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28wROPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), that counts the UL PUSCH OFDM Symbols.

To process the time duration of the symbols the following step 7.) shall be done after 5G\_L2\_439\_replaced([11194047](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28wROPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)):

7.)  PUSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS\_TIME = PUSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS\_TIME + numOfPuschSymbols\*(slotDurationUs/OFDM\_SYMBOLS\_PER\_SLOT)

slotDurationUs: See 5G\_L2\_541\_replaced([11156744](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25BnwvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

numOfPuschSymbols: See UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.

CP2 reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[End CNI-127108]

[Before CNI-127108]

M55308C03006, aka PUSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS\_TIME from class 'NR Cell Utilization', indicates the accumulated  (sum of)  OFDM symbols' time used for PUSCH in the related CELL.

The implementation of the PM Counter shall be based on the PM Counter in 5G\_L2\_439\_replaced([11194047](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28wROPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), that counts the UL PUSCH OFDM Symbols.

To process the time duration of the symbols the following step 7.) shall be done after 5G\_L2\_439\_replaced([11194047](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28wROPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)):

7.)  PUSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS\_TIME = PUSCH\_OFDM\_SYMBOLS\_TIME + numOfPuschSymbols\*(slotDurationUs/OFDM\_SYMBOLS\_PER\_SLOT)

slotDurationUs: See 5G\_L2\_541\_replaced([11156744](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25BnwvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

numOfPuschSymbols: See UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.

CP2 reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[End CNI-127108]

---

#### 2.9.4.3.0-28 FD Scheduler Received UE related RSSI for PUSCH Level 01 ... Received UE related RSSI for PUSCH Level 44 (ID: 11194079)

**2.9.4.3.0-28.0-3**  (ID: `12526767`)

FD Scheduler
Measurement : NR UL Signal Quality Level

NetAct name : UE\_RSSI\_PUSCH\_LEVEL\_01 ... UE\_RSSI\_PUSCH\_LEVEL\_44

PI ID : **M55303C07001 ... M55303C07044**

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

[Before CB009543-A]

No additional details as compared to NIDD.

[CB009543-A]

These counters are also updated for FDD supercell. No change in the method of update.

[End CB009543-A]

Increment value:

Implementation details:

- It is the UE related Received Signal Strenth Indicator  (RSSI) distribution for PUSCH containing also interference and noise. Measurement is calculated over all PRBs allocated for a UE and normalized to a single PRB. It is measured in the gNB and provided by UL-L1 in the parameter field 'rssi' (see 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_199). The value is received in the unit dBm in steps of 0.1 dBm.

- Value -140dBm shall be considered as invalid and counter shall NOT be updated.

---

#### 2.9.4.3.0-29 FD Scheduler Received UE related Signal Power for PUSCH Level 01 ... Received UE related Signal Power for PUSCH Level 44 (ID: 11194094)

**2.9.4.3.0-29.0-3**  (ID: `12526769`)

FD Scheduler
Measurement : NR UL Signal Quality Level

NetAct name : UE\_SIGNAL\_PWR\_PUSCH\_01 ... UE\_SIGNAL\_PWR\_PUSCH\_44

PI ID : **M55303C10001 ... M55303C10044**

Note : PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

[Before CB009543-A]

No additional details as compared to NIDD.

[CB009543-A]

These counters are also updated for FDD supercell. No change in the method of update.

[End CB009543-A]

Increment value:

Implementation details:

- It is the UE related Received Signal Power distribution for PUSCH containing also interference and noise. Measurement is calculated over all PRBs allocated for a UE and normalized to a single PRB. It is measured in the gNB and provided by UL-L1 in the parameter field 'rxPower' (see 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_199). The value is received in the unit dBm in steps of 0.1 dBm.

- Value -140dBm shall be considered as invalid and counter shall NOT be updated.

---

#### 2.9.4.3.0-30 FD Scheduler The number of uplink UEs which were blocked from scheduling due to throughput limit. (ID: 11194108)

**2.9.4.3.0-30.0-1**  (ID: `11194114`)

FD Scheduler
Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: BLOCKED\_PUSCH\_UE\_COUNT

PI ID: M55308CRD54021

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

BLOCKED\_PUSCH\_UE\_COUNT (M55308CRD54021) counter will be updated only when Throughput Pooling is enabled i.e. tddInstTputPoolingAllowed == true.

This counter aggregates the number of UEs which are blocked due to throughput limit i.e. the throughput needed for the UE (based on its PRB allocation) is not possible to be allocated to the UE.

In each available UL slot and for each UE which is blocked from scheduling, BLOCKED\_PUSCH\_UE\_COUNT is updated as below:

if(tddInstTputPoolingAllowed == true)

BLOCKED\_PUSCH\_UE\_COUNT++

* Refer 5G\_L2\_21257\_replaced([11152610](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24p0VfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for scenarios in which counter update is required.
* For ReTx UE (adaptive/non-adaptive) if available throughput is less than the required throughput this counter is updated.
* For MSG3 and MSG5 UE this counter is updated if available throughput is less than the required throughput.
* For NewTx UEs this counter is updated if available throughput is less than the minimum required throughput and if even after PRB reduction the throughput required is not less than the available throughput.

Increment value : The number of blocked PUSCH UEs.

---

#### 2.9.4.3.0-31 FD Scheduler The number of reduced uplink subcell PRBs due to throughput limit. (ID: 11194120)

**2.9.4.3.0-31.0-1**  (ID: `11194123`)

FD Scheduler
Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: REDUCED\_PUSCH\_SUBCELL\_PRB\_COUNT

PI ID: M55308CRD54023

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

REDUCED\_PUSCH\_SUBCELL\_PRB\_COUNT (M55308CRD54023) counter will be updated only when Throughput Pooling is enabled i.e. tddInstTputPoolingAllowed == true.

This counter aggregates the number of subcell PRBs reduced/shaved from the UE to meet the throughput limit i.e. the UE required/needed throughput is not possible to be allocated for the UE and some subcell PRBs are reduced to meet the throughput.

In each available UL slot and for a UE for which the PRBs are reduced due to throughput requirement, REDUCED\_PUSCH\_SUBCELL\_PRB\_COUNT is updated as below:

if(tddInstTputPoolingAllowed == true)

REDUCED\_PUSCH\_SUBCELL\_PRB\_COUNT += rrmNumOfPrbShaved

For more detail refer 5G\_L2\_21257\_replaced([11152610](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24p0VfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Increment value : The number of reduced subcell PRBs.

---

#### 2.9.4.3.0-32 FD Scheduler Number of DRB priority proactive UL grants sent to UE (ID: 11194128)

**2.9.4.3.0-32.0-1**  (ID: `11194134`)

FD Scheduler
Measurement: NR UL HARQ

NetAct name: DRB\_PRIO\_PROACT\_UL\_GRANTS

PI ID: M55302C15112

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time: When DCI 0\_1 is granted to UE whose UL Buffer Housekeeping Variables are (additionally) filled with DRB prioritized PUG payload (5G\_UP\_ALG\_32052\_replaced([11204049](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwi05PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Increment value: Increment by 1 for each DCI 0\_1 grant mentioned in ‘Update time’.

---

#### 2.9.4.3.0-33 FD Scheduler Number of PUSCH transmissions for DRB priority proactive UL grants filled with UE data (ID: 11194139)

**2.9.4.3.0-33.0-1**  (ID: `11194144`)

FD Scheduler
PI ID: M55302C15113

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

When LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd is received for UE with all below conditions are satisfied:

* at least one Radio Bearer with data received
* previous DCI 0\_1 grant is for DRB priority PUG, i.e., previous DCI 0\_1 was granted when UE’s UL Buffer Housekeeping Variables are (additionally) filled with DRB prioritized PUG payload (5G\_UP\_ALG\_32052\_replaced([11204049](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwi05PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* UE’s rrmDrbPriorityInterval timer (5G\_UP\_ALG\_30973\_replaced([11195595](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv9mEfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is still running

Increment value: Increment by 1 for each UE mentioned in ‘Update time’.

This value may also be online modified via PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq ([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")).
* In each UL schedulable slot.

**Increment value : No additional details as compared to NIDD.**

---

##### 2.9.4.3.0-38 DL Scheduled Bytes for PDSCH Initial transmission Number of UEs elegible for SRS or Refined BF but scheduled with SSB based BF (ID: 12817097)

**2.9.4.3.0-38.0-1**  (ID: `12817107`)

DL Scheduled Bytes for PDSCH Initial transmission
**Measurement: NR Beamforming 2**

**NetAct name: NUM\_UE\_E\_UL\_SRS\_BF\_SCHD\_SSB\_BF**

**PI ID: M55330C00050**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).**

**Update time:**

* NUM\_UE\_E\_UL\_SRS\_BF\_SCHD\_SSB\_BF counter is updated only when **actIncreaseMaxULScheduleUE** and **allowFallbackFromSRSToSSBBeam** are set to TRUE, which are received in PsCell\_CellSetupReq ([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")). This value may also be online modified via PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq ([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")).
* In each UL schedulable slot if due to the feature requirements, instead of scheduling one UE with a SRS or refined beam when possible, we do it with a SSB beam instead.

**Increment value : No additional details as compared to NIDD.**

##### 2.9.4.3.0-39 DL Scheduled Bytes for PDSCH Initial transmission Number of DRBs with critical traffic in UL (ID: 13495070)

**2.9.4.3.0-39.0-1**  (ID: `13495071`)

DL Scheduled Bytes for PDSCH Initial transmission
Measurement: NR Resource Utilization per cell  
NetAct name: NUM\_DRB\_CRI\_TRAF\_SCH\_UL\_SLOT  
PI ID: M55165C00072  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

Update time: 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter after FD allocations are finalized in UL. It shall count the number of critical DRBs from which the UL traffic have been successfully scheduled.

Increment value: 5G-L2-PS shall increment the counter once for every critical DRBs from which the UL traffic was successfully scheduled in the slot.

Note:

1. Critical SRBs are not considered for this counter update

---

### 2.9.4.4 NR UL Latency PM Counters

#### 2.9.4.4.0-1 NR UL Latency PM Counters UL Grant delay after SR receptions (ID: 11194154)

**2.9.4.4.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11194164`)

NR UL Latency PM Counters
Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: UL\_SR\_GRANT\_DLY

PI ID: M55308C00080

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[Before CB010361-A]

Update time:

Scheduling Request (SR) on PUCCH format 0

Upon reception of UlData\_PucchReceiveRespPs message, for every grant of pucch format 0 ('pucchFormat' == 0 in 5G\_L1\_IF\_221\_replaced([11514182](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR2BQvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), upon successful reception of positive SR (see srBit in 5G\_L1\_IF\_221\_replaced([11514182](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR2BQvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), if initialSrTimestamp is invalid, set initialSrTimestamp to value of sfn and slot from UlData\_PucchReceiveRespPs.

Scheduling Request (SR) on PUCCH format 1

Upon reception of UlData\_PucchReceiveRespPs message, for every grant of pucch format 1 ('pucchFormat' == 1 in 5G\_L1\_IF\_221\_replaced([11514182](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR2BQvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), upon successful reception of positive SR (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4615\_replaced([11187513](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvbamfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), for every SR detected for UE, if initialSrTimestamp is invalid, set initialSrTimestamp to value of sfn and slot from UlData\_PucchReceiveRespPs.

Scheduling Request (SR) on PUCCH format 2

Upon reception of UlData\_PucchReceiveRespPs message, for every grant of pucch format 2 ('pucchFormat' == 2 in 5G\_L1\_IF\_221\_replaced([11514182](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR2BQvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), that carry a successful received positive SR, if initialSrTimestamp is invalid, set initialSrTimestamp to value of sfn and slot from UlData\_PucchReceiveRespPs.

(See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3617\_replaced([11160013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktNNC_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3626\_replaced([11160044](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktN0EfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22280\_replaced([11187527](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvbanPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Scheduling Request (SR) on PUCCH format 3

Upon reception of UlData\_PucchReceiveRespPs message, for every grant of pucch format 3 ('pucchFormat' == 3 in 5G\_L1\_IF\_221\_replaced([11514182](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR2BQvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), that carry a successful received positive SR, if initialSrTimestamp is invalid, set initialSrTimestamp to value of sfn and slot from UlData\_PucchReceiveRespPs.

(See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3617\_replaced([11160013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktNNC_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3626\_replaced([11160044](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktN0EfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3603\_replaced([11159969](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktNNA_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Note: When SR bit is multiplexed with the CSI, decoded bit is prepended to the bits of the CSI report (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3617\_replaced([11160013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktNNC_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3603\_replaced([11159969](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktNNA_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and sent via UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs.

If actLatencyPmCount parameter is set to true, (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

When UL Grant is scheduled successfully for UE, if initialSrTimestamp is set, set stop timestamp to current frame and slot number.

Increment value:

Increment counter with (stop – initialSrTimestamp) value calculated in microseconds.

NOTE: Remember to handle sfn/slot modulo operations correctly.

[CB010361-A]

Update time: As specified in 5G\_L2\_18900\_replaced([11152577](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24pNU_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Increment value: As specified in 5G\_L2\_18900\_replaced([11152577](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24pNU_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), only if actLatencyPmCount parameter is set to true (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[End CB010361-A]

---

#### 2.9.4.4.0-2 NR UL Latency PM Counters Number of intial UL Grants after SR (ID: 11194169)

**2.9.4.4.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11194175`)

NR UL Latency PM Counters
Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: INIT\_UL\_GRANT\_SR

PI ID: M55308C00071

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

Update when UL\_SR\_GRANT\_DLY counter is incremented (see 5G\_L2\_13760\_replaced([11194154](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28w4UPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Increment value:

Increment by 1.

---

#### 2.9.4.4.0-3 NR UL Latency PM Counters UL MAC contention delay for LCG0 ... UL MAC contention delay for LCG7 (ID: 11194181)

**2.9.4.4.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `12590555`)

NR UL Latency PM Counters
Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: UL\_MAC\_CONT\_DLY\_LCG0 … UL\_MAC\_CONT\_DLY\_LCG7

PI ID: M55308C00063 … M55308C00070

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

There are three messages that might set “start” but the single “end” is defined for each.

Upon LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd receive, for every BSR in ueBsrList of ueUlBufferInfo (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_3473\_replaced([10984729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), if all below conditions are met:

• actLatencyPmCount parameter is set to true, (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

• LCG x buffer for which BSR is received is empty (rrmBufferedDataUlLcg\_bytes[x]==0, see 5G\_L2\_365\_replaced([11151205](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24gqaPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_5118\_replaced([11203660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwgYovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))  [PR828702]or (bufferedDataEmptyBeforeFirstCorrection = TRUE) see note1 [End PR828702]

• After Buffer Housekeeping parameters of the UE described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_5130\_replaced([11203801](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwg_wPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), rrmBufferedDataUlLcg\_bytes[x] is greather than 0

Set start timestamp for the corresponding LCG to current time.

Upon PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUlInfoUpdateInd receive, for every BSR in ueBsrList (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2165\_replaced([10980421](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VipkPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), if all below conditions are met:

• actLatencyPmCount parameter is set to true, (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

• LCG x buffer for which BSR is received is empty (rrmBufferedDataUlLcg\_bytes[x]==0, see 5G\_L2\_365\_replaced([11151205](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24gqaPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_5118\_replaced([11203660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwgYovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

• After Buffer Housekeeping parameters of the UE described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_5130\_replaced([11203801](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwg_wPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), rrmBufferedDataUlLcg\_bytes[x] is greather than 0

Set start timestamp for the corresponding LCG to current time.

Upon PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd receive, for every element in ueBufferSplitInfo (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2147\_replaced([10980201](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vg0Zfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), if all below conditions are met:

• actLatencyPmCount parameter is set to true, (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

• LCG x buffer for which buffer split is received is empty (rrmBufferedDataUlLcg\_bytes[x]==0, see 5G\_L2\_365\_replaced([11151205](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24gqaPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_5118\_replaced([11203660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwgYovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

• After Buffer Housekeeping parameters of the UE described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_5130\_replaced([11203801](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwg_wPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), rrmBufferedDataUlLcg\_bytes[x] is greather than 0

Set start timestamp for the corresponding LCG to current time.

When UL Grant is scheduled successfully for UE, if start timestamp is set for any LCG x, set stop timestamp to current time.

Increment value:

For every LCG x for which start and stop timestamps are set, increment corresponding UL\_MAC\_CONT\_DLY\_LCGX counter with (stop – start) value calculated in microseconds.

[PR828702]

Note1: We set bufferedDataEmptyBeforeFirstCorrection to TRUE if  LCG x buffer size == SRPayLoad and Ue is SR\_PENDING\_FOR\_UL\_GRANT) after receiving SR from UE (see 11203903), that means we have rrmBufferedDataUlLcg\_bytes[x]==0 at the first time Ue is in SR\_PENDING\_FOR\_UL\_GRANT.  bufferedDataEmptyBeforeFirstCorrection is set to FALSE after receiving the BSR from L2 LO in LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd see (11203903)

[End PR828702]
