#### 2.9.4.4.0-4 NR UL Latency PM Counters Number of UL bursts at MAC layer for LCG0 ... Number of UL bursts at MAC layer for LCG7 (ID: 11194191)

**2.9.4.4.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11194196`)

NR UL Latency PM Counters
Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: TOT\_UL\_BURST\_MAC\_LCG0 … TOT\_UL\_BURST\_MAC\_LCG7

PI ID: M55308C00072 … M55308C00079

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

Update when corresponding UL\_MAC\_CONT\_DLY\_LCG0 ... UL\_MAC\_CONT\_DLY\_LCG7 counter is incremented (see 5G\_L2\_13765\_replaced([11194181](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28xfUvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Increment value:

Increment by 1.

---

### 2.9.4.5 NR UL SAS PM Counters

#### 2.9.4.5.0-1 NR UL SAS PM Counters Number of UL PRBs used for slice-aware scheduling per resource group (ID: 11194206)

**2.9.4.5.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11194211`)

NR UL SAS PM Counters
Measurement: NR cell utilization per NR resource group

NetAct name: UL\_PRB\_USED\_DATA\_NRG

PI ID: M55910C00003

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

After the data reception from all UEs is complete in each UL slot.

Increment value:

Shall be incremented by the number of used PRBs on PUSCH per resource group configured via ulResourceGroupConfig in CellSetupReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and/or CellReconfigurationReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))). This is sum of rrmInstDrbPrbAlloc\_j,c(t) (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23256\_replaced([11207913](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwt0AvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for all DRBs j belonging to this resource group and all traffic classes c of SAS interest.

Note that counter's value is 100 times higher than the actual value (for example, 1.23 is stored as 123), so the reported value should be multiplied by 100.

---

#### 2.9.4.5.0-2 NR UL SAS PM Counters Maximum UL PRB utilization for slice-aware scheduling per resource group (ID: 11194216)

**2.9.4.5.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11194221`)

NR UL SAS PM Counters
Measurement: NR cell utilization per NR resource group

NetAct name: UL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX\_NRG

PI ID: M55910C00004

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Update time:

After the data reception from all UEs is complete in each UL slot.

Increment value:

Shall be updated by the average resource group i resource share in slot t, according to following rules.

If

(t - cellConfigChangeSlot > 100) and

(rrmRGAvgShare\_i(t)  > UL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX\_NRG (i))

Then

UL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX\_NRG(i) = rrmRGAvgShare\_i(t)

where:

cellConfigChangeSlot = the last slot when CellSetupReq or CellReconfigurationReq received.

rrmRGAvgShare\_i(t) = the average resource group share (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23262\_replaced([11207757](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwtM-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) of resource group configured via ulResourceGroupConfig in CellSetupReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and/or CellReconfigurationReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

#### 2.9.4.5.0-3 NR UL SAS PM Counters Maximum UL PRB utilization for slice-aware scheduling per PLMN (ID: 12447731)

**2.9.4.5.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11140408`)

NR UL SAS PM Counters
**Measurement: NR Cell Utilization per PLMN**

**NetAct name: UL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX\_PLMN**

**PI ID: M55338C00006**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

**Update time: Each UL slot**

**Increment value :**

Counter is updated if the instantaneous average PRB utilization ratio over the last 100 slots for the corresponding PLMN is higher than the previously recorded maximum value.

---

#### 2.9.4.5.0-4 NR UL SAS PM Counters Number of UL PRBs available for slice-aware scheduling in the cell (ID: 11194227)

**2.9.4.5.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11194231`)

NR UL SAS PM Counters
Measurement: NR cell utilization per NR resource group

NetAct name: UL\_PRB\_AVAIL\_SAS

PI ID: M55308C10012

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Update time:

After the data reception from all UEs is complete in each UL slot.

Increment value:

Increment by the number rrmAvailablePrbsForSas(t): the number of PRBs available for scheduling DRBs in slot t (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23256\_replaced([11207913](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwt0AvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Note that counter's value is 100 times higher than the actual value (for example, 1.23 is stored as 123), so the reported value should be multiplied by 100.

---

#### 2.9.4.5.0-5 NR UL SAS PM Counters Denominator for the calculation of the UL PRB Utilization per resource group (ID: 11194235)

**2.9.4.5.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11194240`)

NR UL SAS PM Counters
Measurement: NR cell utilization per NR resource group for FR1 and FR2  
NetAct name: UL\_PRB\_UTIL\_RATIO\_DNOM  
PI ID: M55910C00027  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Update time:  
After the data reception from all UEs is complete in each UL slot.

Increment value:  
Incremented by the number of average UL PRB Utilization per resource group. It corresponds to the number of available PRBs on PUSCH for slice-aware traffic in the cell.

This counter is incremented as UL\_PRB\_AVAIL\_SAS (see 5G\_L2\_16036\_replaced([11194227](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28xfW_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), but it is reported on NGR level - unlike UL\_PRB\_AVAIL\_SAS, which is incremented at the cell level. This counter is implemented as workaround solution for NetAct limitations. From 5G-L2-PS perspective, UL\_PRB\_AVAIL\_SAS would be sufficient.

Note that counter's value is 100 times higher than the actual value (for example, 1.23 is stored as 123), so the reported value should be multiplied by 100.

---

#### 2.9.4.5.0-6 NR UL SAS PM Counters Denominator for the calculation of the UL PRB Utilization per PLMN (ID: 11247044)

**2.9.4.5.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11247051`)

NR UL SAS PM Counters
**Measurement: NR Cell Utilization per PLMN**

**NetAct name: UL\_PRB\_UTIL\_RATIO\_DNOM\_PLMN**

**PI ID: M55338C00004**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

**Update time:**

Updated when a data slot is available for PUSCH.

**Increment value :**

Counter corresponds to the number of available PRBs on PUSCH for PLMN-aware traffic in the cell. The reported value is 100 times higher than the actual value (for example, 1.23 is stored as 123).

---

#### 2.9.4.5.0-7 NR UL SAS PM Counters Number of additional UL PRBs used due to MU-MIMO pairing for slice-aware scheduling per resource group (ID: 11194245)

**2.9.4.5.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `11194251`)

NR UL SAS PM Counters
Measurement: NR cell utilization per NR resource group

NetAct name: UL\_ADD\_PRB\_USED\_MUMIMO\_NRG

PI ID:

M55910C00026

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

After the data reception from all UEs is complete in each UL slot.

Increment value:

Shall be incremented by the number of excessive PRBs assigned on PDSCH due to MU-MIMO pairing which would not be assigned otherwise if the UEs were scheduled as SU-MIMO. Counted per resource group configured via dlResourceGroupConfig in CellSetupReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and/or CellReconfigurationReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))). In practice this is difference between of rrmActRGPrbAlloc\_k(t) (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26375\_replaced([11208360](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwubG_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and sum of rrmInstDrbPrbAlloc\_j,c(t) (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23256\_replaced([11207913](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwt0AvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for all DRBs j belonging to this resource group from slot t.

Note that counter's value is 100 times higher than the actual value (for example, 1.23 is stored as 123), so the reported value should be multiplied by 100.

---

### 2.9.4.6 NR UL Post Scheduler

#### 2.9.4.6.1 NR UL Received Interference Power

##### 2.9.4.6.1.0-1 NR UL Received Interference Power Cell level avg UL RIP for scheduled PRB 0 to PRB 272 (ID: 11194265)

**2.9.4.6.1.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `12526774`)

NR UL Received Interference Power
Measurement: NR UL Received Interference Power

NetAct name: CELL\_AVG\_UL\_RIP\_SCHED\_PRBX

PI ID: M55360C00000 ... M55360C00272

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update Time:

For the PM counters update, 5G-L2-PS UL Scheduler maintains a 1s sample timer, based on the TTI trigger for scheduling. Internal counters shall be used to ensure the 100 SFN between 2 timer expiries.

Increment value:

On timer expiry, for each cell, 5G-L2-PS reads configuration parameter actNrUlRipCounters (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

The parameter actNrUlRipCounters in respect to below rules for:

| Lp. | Old values | New values |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 0 | disabled | x | x | x | x | x |
| 1 | enabledWithPRACH\_PUCCH\_F1 | Scheduled PUSCH PRBs, | PUCCH F2,F3,F4, | PUCCH F1, | PRACH with Preamble, | PRACH without Preamble |
| 2 | enabledWithoutPRACH | Scheduled PUSCH PRBs | PUCCH F2,F3,F4, | PUCCH F1 | x | x |
| 3 | enabledWithoutPUCCH\_F1 | Scheduled PUSCH PRBs, | PUCCH F2,F3,F4, | x | PRACH with Preamble, | PRACH without Preamble |
| 4 | enabledWithoutPRACH\_PUCCH\_F1 | Scheduled PUSCH PRBs, | PUCCH F2,F3,F4 | x | x | x |

Apart from the configuration in the table, there is available to set (up to customer) any possible combination (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

If actNrUlRipCounters is not equal to disabled, then:

* 5G-L2-PS reads configuration parameter ulBandwidth (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* For each prbIndex in range of [0 … ulBandwidth - 1], 5G-L2-PS reads number of items from internal counter instantAvgUlRipSchedPrb\_dBm (see 5G\_L2\_5371\_replaced([11194346](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28ytdPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

If actNrUlRipCounter second bit is raised (Unscheduled PUSCH PRBs), 5G-L2-PS shall schedule a fake UE on unallocated UL slot on PUSCH channel on the primary subcell

If the number of items is greater than 0, then 5G-L2-PS:

* fills PM counter M55360C00xxx (where xxx = prbIndex, e.g. M55360C00011 for prbIndex = 11) with the values carried by internal counter instantAvgUlRipSchedPrb\_dBm (see 5G\_L2\_5371\_replaced([11194346](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28ytdPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));
* prints diagnostic information if enabled for the given prbIndex (see 5G\_L2\_5377\_replaced([11194389](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28ytffvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Notes:

1. This set of PM counters shall be nullable. For details, see: 5G\_L2\_14919\_replaced([11192212](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iO1PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[CB009543-A] In case of FDD supercell, PUSCH and PUCCH allocations shall be considered only from UE's UL serving subcell for counter updates. For PRACH, the counter updates ~~to be done after selection of initial UL serving subcell~~ shall be skipped since actNrUlRipCounters will be set to any value except "5:PRACH with Preamble, 6:PRACH without Preamble".

[End CB009543-A]

---

##### 2.9.4.6.1.0-2 NR UL Received Interference Power Cell level max UL RIP for scheduled PRB 0 to PRB 272 (ID: 11194285)

**2.9.4.6.1.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `12526773`)

NR UL Received Interference Power
**Measurement: NR UL Received Interference Power**

**NetAct name: CELL\_MAX\_UL\_RIP\_SCHED\_PRBX**

**PI ID: M55360C01000...M55360C01272**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

**Update Time: See 5G\_L2\_20519\_replaced([11194265](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28yGZPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

**Increment value: See 5G\_L2\_20519\_replaced([11194265](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28yGZPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

This set of PM counters shall be nullable. For details, see: 5G\_L2\_14919\_replaced([11192212](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iO1PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

**Note:**

CELL\_MAX\_UL\_RIP\_SCHED PM counters shall be filled with the values averaged over a 1 second period - just like CELL\_AVG\_UL\_RIP\_SCHED\_PRB PM counters (see 5G\_L2\_20519\_replaced([11194265](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28yGZPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Later, the higher layers shall find the maximum value out of these averaged values reported by 5G-L2-PS. This solution has been selected in order to smooth the reported values.

[CB009543-A] In case of FDD supercell, PUSCH and PUCCH allocations shall be considered only from UE's UL serving subcell for counter updates. For PRACH, the counter updates ~~to be done after selection of initial UL serving subcell~~ shall be skipped since actNrUlRipCounters will be set to any value except "5:PRACH with Preamble, 6:PRACH without Preamble"

[End CB009543-A]

---

##### 2.9.4.6.1.0-3 NR UL Received Interference Power RIP samples per PRB 000 … 272 (ID: 11194306)

**2.9.4.6.1.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `12575805`)

NR UL Received Interference Power
Measurement: NR RIP sample measurements

NetAct name : NUM\_RIP\_SAMPLES\_PRB0 … NUM\_RIP\_SAMPLES\_PRB272

PI ID : M55388C00001 … M55388C00272

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when UL RIP measurement is available for the UL slot so when all below conditions are met:

5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq or PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq from 5G-CP-RT with CounterConfig structure:

* IE actNrUlRipCounters is not equal to disabled (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* IE L1HwVariant is different from 0 = Loner (counters are not updated with ABIL)

Increment value:

The counter is incremented by 1 when UL RIP measurement per slot per PRB (CELL\_AVG\_UL\_RIP\_SCHED\_PRB0 …272 / M55360C00000 ... 272) is available for the UL slot.

Ex. When CELL\_AVG\_UL\_RIP\_SCHED\_PRB0 is available then increment by 1 counter NUM\_RIP\_SAMPLES\_PRB0.

[CB009543-A]

In case of FDD supercell, this counter is updated when corresponding cell UL RIP counters are updated.

[End CB009543-A]

---

##### 2.9.4.6.1.0-4 NR UL Received Interference Power Received Interference Power PM Counters (ID: 11194317)

**2.9.4.6.1.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11194322`)

NR UL Received Interference Power
For the PM counters update, 5G-L2-PS UL Scheduler maintains a 1s sample timer, based on the TTI trigger for scheduling. Internal counters shall be used to ensure the 100 SFN between 2 timer expiries.

On timer expiry, for each cell, 5G-L2-PS reads configuration parameter actNrUlRipMeasurement (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

If actNrUlRipMeasurement is not equal to disabled, then:

• 5G-L2-PS reads configuration parameter ulBandwidth (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

• For each prbIndex in range of [0 .. ulBandwidth - 1], 5G-L2-PS reads number of items from internal counter instantAvgUlRipSchedPrb\_aW (see 5G\_L2\_5371\_replaced([11194346](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28ytdPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

If the number of items is greater than 0, then 5G-L2-PS:

• fills PM counter M55360C00xxx (where xxx = prbIndex, e.g. M55360C00011 for prbIndex = 11) with the values carried by internal counter instantAvgUlRipSchedPrb\_aW[ prbIndex ] (see 5G\_L2\_5371\_replaced([11194346](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28ytdPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

• fills PM counter M55360C01xxx (where xxx = prbIndex, e.g. M55360C01011 for prbIndex = 11) with the value carried by internal counter instantMaxUlRipSchedPrb\_aW[ prbIndex ] (see 5G\_L2\_5371\_replaced([11194346](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28ytdPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

• prints diagnostic information if enabled for the given prbIndex (see 5G\_L2\_5377\_replaced([11194389](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28ytffvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

CP2 requirement(s):

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2-PS

---

##### 2.9.4.6.1.0-5 NR UL Received Interference Power Updating Received Interference Power internal counters for aggregation in spatial domain (ID: 11194326)

**2.9.4.6.1.0-5.0-3**  (ID: `11194341`)

NR UL Received Interference Power
During slot processing, [Before CNI-126050-A] instantAvgUlRipSchedPrbForCurrentSlot\_aW[ prbIndex ] [CNI-126050-A] instantAvgUlRipSchedPrbForCurrentSlot\_dBm[ prbIndex ] [End CNI-126050-A] (see 5G\_L2\_5367\_replaced([11194374](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28ytevvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) internal counters are updated with measurements for PRACH (see 5G\_L2\_5312\_replaced([11180606](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27OAIPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), PUSCH (see 5G\_L2\_5317\_replaced([11180186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27K82PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and PUCCH (see 5G\_L2\_5315\_replaced([11180510](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27MyDvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Each time a new measurement for the prbIndex is received from 5G-L1-UL, 5G-L2-PS reads the received interference power for invalid values.

If the reported power is less than or equal to [Before CNI-126050-A] 10 attowatts (10^(-17) W (Watt), see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7421\_replaced([11109729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ko7J_fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [CNI-126050-A] -140 dBm (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7421\_replaced([11109729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ko7J_fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9244\_replaced([11109801](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ko8YG_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CNI-126050-A], then:

• The sample is discarded.

Otherwise:

• The cumulative sum field shall be increased by the measured power in attowatts.

• The number of items field shall be increased by 1.

[Before CNI-126050-A]

As UL MU-MIMO is not supported, for each uplink physical channel only one valid received interference power sample should be registered during the slot processing (for each prbIndex).

[CNI-126050-A]

Note: When UL MU-MIMO is enabled, more than one valid received interference power sample may be registered during slot processing (for each prbIndex) — but only for PUSCH.

[End CNI-126050-A]

---

##### 2.9.4.6.1.0-6 NR UL Received Interference Power Received Interference Power internal counters for aggregation in time domain (ID: 11194346)

**2.9.4.6.1.0-6.0-2**  (ID: `11194355`)

NR UL Received Interference Power
To perform time aggregation of measurements over 1s period (linear average over slot samples), 5G-L2-PS shall maintain internal counters for the PM counter report:

[Before CNI-126050-A]

* instantAvgUlRipSchedPrb\_aW[ prbIndex ]
* instantMaxUlRipSchedPrb\_aW[ prbIndex ]

[CNI-126050-A]

instantAvgUlRipSchedPrb\_dBm[ prbIndex ]

[End CNI-126050-A]

for each prbIndex in range of [0 .. 272].

Average counters are split to two Sum type of counters (cumulative sum and number of items).

The internal counters shall be stored in cell database.

---

##### 2.9.4.6.1.0-7 NR UL Received Interference Power Updating Received Interference Power internal counters for aggregation in time domain (ID: 11194359)

**2.9.4.6.1.0-7.0-3**  (ID: `12469446`)

NR UL Received Interference Power
By the end of each slot, for each cell in cell group, 5G-L2-PS reads configuration parameter [Before CB012464-C] actNrUlRipMeasurement [End CB012464-C] [CB012464-C-UPD002] actNrUlRipCounter [End CB012464-C-UPD002]  (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

If [Before CB012464-C] actNrUlRipMeasurement [End CB012464-C] [CB012464-C-UPD002] actNrUlRipCounter [End CB012464-C-UPD002]  is not equal to disabled, then:

* 5G-L2-PS reads configuration parameter ulBandwidth (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* For each prbIndex in range of [0 .. ulBandwidth - 1], 5G-L2-PS reads number of items from internal counter instantAvgUlRipSchedPrbForCurrentSlot\_dBm (see 5G\_L2\_5367\_replaced([11194374](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28ytevvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). If the number of items is greater than 0, then:
* 5G-L2-PS performs spatial aggregation over physical channels for the current slot by following the formula:

avgUlRipSchedPrbForCurrentSlot\_dBm = instantAvgUlRipSchedPrbForCurrentSlot\_dBm[ prbIndex ].sum / instantAvgUlRipSchedPrbForCurrentSlot\_dBm[ prbIndex ].samples

with:

* instantAvgUlRipSchedPrbForCurrentSlot\_dBm[ prbIndex ].sum : the cumulative sum field of the internal counter instantAvgUlRipSchedPrbForCurrentSlot\_dBm[ prbIndex];
* instantAvgUlRipSchedPrbForCurrentSlot\_dBm[ prbIndex ].samples: the number of items field of the internal counter instantAvgUlRipSchedPrbForCurrentSlot\_dBm[ prbIndex].
* 5G-L2-PS updates instantAvgUlRipSchedPrb\_dBm[ prbIndex ] internal counter:
* The cumulative sum field shall be increased by avgUlRipSchedPrbForCurrentSlot\_dBm.
* The number of items field shall be increased by 1.
* 5G-L2-PS prints diagnostic information if enabled for the given prbIndex (see 5G\_L2\_5377\_replaced([11194389](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28ytffvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* 5G-L2-PS resets internal counter instantAvgUlRipSchedPrbForCurrentSlot\_dBm[ prbIndex ].

---

##### 2.9.4.6.1.0-8 NR UL Received Interference Power Received Interference Power internal counters for aggregation in spatial domain (ID: 11194374)

**2.9.4.6.1.0-8.0-2**  (ID: `11194384`)

NR UL Received Interference Power
To perform spatial aggregation of measurements over physical channels (linear average over PRACH, PUSCH and PUCCH), 5G-L2-PS shall maintain internal counters for the PM counter report:

[Before CNI-126050-A]

* instantAvgUlRipSchedPrbForCurrentSlot\_aW[ prbIndex ]

[CNI-126050-A]

instantAvgUlRipSchedPrbForCurrentSlot\_dBm[ prbIndex ]

[End CNI-126050-A]

for each prbIndex in range of [0 .. 272].

Average counters shall be split into two Sum type of counters (cumulative sum and number of items).

The internal counters shall be stored in cell database.

---

##### 2.9.4.6.1.0-9 NR UL Received Interference Power Diagnostic information for data aggregation for Received Interference Power PM Counters (ID: 11194389)

**2.9.4.6.1.0-9.0-2**  (ID: `11194400`)

NR UL Received Interference Power
Printing diagnostic information for data aggregation for Received Interference Power PM Counters is controlled with R&D parameter rdNrUlReceivedInterferencePowerDiagnosticBitmap (see 5G\_L2\_5308\_replaced([11189129](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28NeqPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[Before CNI-89884-C] This bitmap defines [CNI-89884-C] Bit 31 (MSB) from this bitmap defines logging periodicity.

If this bit is not set and SFN mod 100 is not equal to 0, 5G-L2-PS abandons printing the diagnostic information.

Otherwise, 5G-L2-PS reads the other bits of the bitmap.

Bits 0-27 from rdNrUlReceivedInterferencePowerDiagnosticBitmap define [End CNI-89884-C] for which PRBs diagnostic prints shall be enabled during measurements aggregation for NR UL Received Interference Power counters.

To determine if the diagnostic information shall be printed, 5G-L2-PS calculates the bit index by following the formula:

bitIndex = floor( prbIndex / 10 )

with:

bitIndex: bit position in rdNrUlReceivedInterferencePowerDiagnosticBitmap;

prbIndex: Physical Resource Block index of the Received Interference Power PM Counter for which data aggregation is performed.

Then, 5G-L2-PS reads the appropriate bit from rdNrUlReceivedInterferencePowerDiagnosticBitmap (starting from the least significant bit). If the bit value is set to 1, 5G-L2-PS prints the diagnostic information.

---

#### 2.9.4.6.2 NR UL Received Total Wideband Power PM Counter Support

##### 2.9.4.6.2.0-1 NR UL Received Total Wideband Power PM Counter Support Spatial stream mapping for NR UL Received Total Wideband Power measurements (ID: 11194411)

**2.9.4.6.2.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `11194437`)

NR UL Received Total Wideband Power PM Counter Support
When PsCell\_CellSetupReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) message is received, for each ulSubcellId (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_77\_replaced([10968024](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UVvvfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall initialize ulSpatialStreamIds array in cell configuration database and fill it with invalid values.

5G-L2-PS shall start assigning ulSpatialStreamIds from 0 and assign the next integer value for each stream.

* If ulSubcellType is A2, C2 or D2, L2-PS shall assign ulSpatialStreamIds for 2 streams.
* If Pusch is 4Rx(numOfRxPusch=4, see 5G\_L2\_16925\_replaced([11141685](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23qV0_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), L2-PS shall assign ulSpatialStreamIds for 4 streams.
* If Pusch is 8Rx(numOfRxPusch=8, see 5G\_L2\_16925\_replaced([11141685](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23qV0_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), L2-PS shall assign ulSpatialStreamIds for 8 streams.
* If Pusch is 16Rx(numOfRxPusch=16, see 5G\_L2\_16925\_replaced([11141685](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23qV0_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) , L2-PS shall assign ulSpatialStreamIds for 16 streams.

Rationale: On reception of NR UL Received Total Wideband Power measurement results, 5G-L2-PS shall assign measurements coming from different UL subcells to the appropriate spatial streams of the whole cell.

Example 1: Cell with 4 UL spatial streams: UL C2 subcell with ulSubcellId = 0 and UL C2 subcell with ulSubcellId = 1

* ulSpatialStreamIds[0]: {0, 1, invalid value, invalid value}
* ulSpatialStreamIds[1]: {2, 3, invalid value, invalid value}

Example 2: Cell with 8 UL spatial streams: UL C4 subcell with ulSubcellId = 0 and UL C4 subcell with ulSubcellId = 1

* ulSpatialStreamIds[0]: {0, 1, 2, 3}
* ulSpatialStreamIds[1]: {4, 5, 6, 7}

Example 3: Cell with 8 UL spatial streams: UL C8 subcell with ulSubcellId = 0

* ulSpatialStreamIds[0]: {0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7}

Example 4: Cell with numberOfRxBeamforming UL spatial streams for PUSCH: UL C4\_2, C8\_2, C8\_4[CB008235-D], C8\_8[End CB008235-D]subcell with ulSubcellId = 0

* ulSpatialStreamIds[0]: {0, 1, ..., numberOfRxBeamforming -1}

---

##### 2.9.4.6.2.0-2 NR UL Received Total Wideband Power PM Counter Support Conditions to fill NR UL Received Total Wideband Power PM Counters (ID: 11194443)

**2.9.4.6.2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11194448`)

NR UL Received Total Wideband Power PM Counter Support
For the PM counters update, 5G-L2-PS UL Scheduler shall maintain a 1s sample timer, based on the TTI trigger for scheduling.

The internal counter shall be used to ensure the 100 SFN between the two consecutive timer expiries.

On the timer expiry, for each cell, 5G-L2-PS shall read configuration parameter actRtwpMeasurement (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

If actRtwpMeasurement is equal to true and actRtwpMeasurement was equal to true during the previous timer expiry, then:

5G-L2-PS shall fill NR UL Received Total Wideband Power PM Counters, as specified in 5G\_L2\_10805\_replaced([11194452](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28zUifvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Rationale: 5G-L2-PS shall not report the RTWP for the first opportunity after the feature (re)activation, as the RTWP would not be aggregated over the whole sampling period.

CP2 Reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17494\_replaced([11215828](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxVfGvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

##### 2.9.4.6.2.0-3 NR UL Received Total Wideband Power PM Counter Support Filling NR UL Received Total Wideband Power PM Counters (ID: 11194452)

**2.9.4.6.2.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11194457`)

NR UL Received Total Wideband Power PM Counter Support
NR UL Received Total Wideband Power PM Counters

---

**2.9.4.6.2.0-3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11194463`)

NR UL Received Total Wideband Power PM Counter Support
When the conditions to fill NR UL Received Total Wideband Power PM Counters are met (see 5G\_L2\_10803\_replaced([11194443](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28zUh_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

for each configured UL spatial stream of the cell, 5G-L2-PS shall:

* Calculate rrmRTWP, as specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17494\_replaced([11215828](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxVfGvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* Print diagnostic information about the calculated rrmRtwp if "Bit 7: RTWP" of R&D parameter rdFeatureFlagBitmap3 (see 5G\_L2\_5995\_replaced([11189293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28OsxvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to 1.
* Fill PM counters: M55369C0000x (NR\_AVG\_UL\_RTWP\_STR\_x), M55369C0010x (NR\_MAX\_UL\_RTWP\_STR\_x) and M55369C0020x (NR\_MIN\_UL\_RTWP\_STR\_x), as specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17494\_replaced([11215828](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxVfGvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

With: x - UL Spatial Stream ID (e.g. M55369C00207 - Minimum NR UL RTWP for UL Spatial stream 7).

---

#### 2.9.4.6.3 NR UL PRB Utilizaton

##### 2.9.4.6.3.0-1 NR UL PRB Utilizaton Maximum UL PRB Utilization per slot (ID: 11194520)

**2.9.4.6.3.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11194531`)

NR UL PRB Utilizaton
[CNI-127108]

Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: UL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX

PI ID: M55308C36002

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time: Each slot.

[END CNI-127108]

[BEFORE CNI-127108]

For 'NR Cell Utilization' class, according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), PM COUNTER M55308C36002 (UL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX) shall be updated each slot t by the value of the maximum UL PRB Utilization, according to following rules:

[END CNI-127108]

[CNI-127108]

Increment value:

[END CNI-127108]

ulPrbUtilization(t) = ROUND((numOfUsedPuschPrbs(t)/numOfAvailablePuschPrbs(t)) \* 100%);

UL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX = MAX(ulPrbUtilization(t), UL\_PRB\_UTIL\_SLOT\_MAX);

where:

* ulPrbUtilization(t) = the percentage of utilized PRBs on PUSCH per slot t
* numOfUsedPuschPrbs(t) = the number of PRBs allocated for PUSCH in slot t
* numOfAvailablePuschPrbs(t) = the number of PRBs available for PUSCH in slot t (ref. 5G\_L2\_433\_replaced([11193740](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28t0__vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

[BEFORE CNI-127108]

CP2 requirements:

[CNI-127108]

CP2 Reference:

[END CNI-127108]

* 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) PM Counters for 5G-L2-PS

---

**2.9.4.6.3.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12709082`)

NR UL PRB Utilizaton
Measurement: NR Resource Utilization per CELL

NetAct name: PERC\_RATIO\_SLOTS\_100\_UTIL

PI ID: M55165CRD50003

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Increment value: if  ulPrbUtilization(t) is 100 %(Refer: [11194520](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28z7lvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), increment the Numerator by 1. Denominator is incremented by 1 for every slot accounted for ulPrbUtilization(t) computation.

#### 2.9.4.6.4 Critical PRBs in UL

##### 2.9.4.6.4.0-1 Critical PRBs in UL Number of PRBs used for critical traffic on PUSCH (ID: 13495085)

**2.9.4.6.4.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13495067`)

Critical PRBs in UL
Measurement: NR Resource Utilization per cell  
NetAct name: NUM\_PRB\_USED\_CRI\_TRAF\_PUSCH  
PI ID: M55165C00074  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

Update time: 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter during post scheduling after all the PRB allocations are finalized in UL.

Increment value: 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter with the value of total number of PRBs allocated for all critical DRBs in PUSCH.

### 2.9.4.7 NR PUSCH transmission statistic

NR PUSCH transmission statistic
Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: PUSCH\_TRNS\_FIRST\_UL\_SLOT

PI ID: M55308C00123

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time: 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter in the first UL slot after Special Slot after all decisions regarding PUSCH scheduling have been made.

Increment value: 5G-L2-PS shall increment the counter with the number of PUSCH transmissions scheduled (including retransmissions).

#### 2.9.4.7.0-7 NR PUSCH transmission statistic Number of times VoNR PUSCH transmission failed over first UL slot (ID: 11194605)

**2.9.4.7.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `11194610`)

NR PUSCH transmission statistic
Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: PUSCH\_F\_VONR\_TRNS\_FRST\_UL\_SLOT

PI ID: M55308C00129

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time: 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter after the feedback (response) to PUSCH reception request (see 5G\_L1\_IF\_183\_replaced([11513708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRyW7_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) targeted for the first UL slot after Special Slot has been received.

Increment value: 5G-L2-PS shall increment the counter with the number of PUSCH Grants belonging to VoNR (see 5G\_L2\_400\_replaced([11151878](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24k73PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for which IE crc was set to NOK or IE dtx was set to DTX.

---

### 2.9.4.8 NR UL Signal Quality Level

#### 2.9.4.8.0-1 NR UL Signal Quality Level Number of SR response grants scheduled with an DRB request class priority (ID: 11194634)

**2.9.4.8.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11194637`)

NR UL Signal Quality Level
Measurement: **NR UL Signal Quality Level**

NetAct name: **NUM\_SR\_RESP\_SCHED\_DRB\_PRIORITY**

PI ID: **M55303C00033**

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time: Each time SR response grants scheduled with drb request class priority for a PUCCH SR (detected by L1 or set by DL for multiplexed CSI with SR case), excluding fake SR from L2 LO.

Increment value: **1**

note: this counter will be increased only if actServiceAwareSRPrioritization is set to true.

---

Update time: Each time SR response grants scheduled with SR request class priority for a PUCCH SR (detected by L1 or set by DL for multiplexed CSI with SR case), excluding fake SR from L2 LO.

note: this counter will be increased only if actServiceAwareSRPrioritization is set to true.

### 2.9.4.9 NR UL Signal Quality Level 2

#### 2.9.4.9.0-1 NR UL Signal Quality Level 2 UE Pathloss Distribution for PUSCH for SSB0 (ID: 13317763)

**2.9.4.9.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13317792`)

NR UL Signal Quality Level 2
Measurement: NR UL Signal Quality Level 2  
NetAct name: UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB0\_LEV\_1 ... UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB0\_LEV\_25  
PI ID: M55340C00001 ... M55340C00025  
Note: Introduced by 5GC000884-A. PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

Update time: No additional details as compared to NIDD.

Increment value:  
For PUSCH in FR1 for SSB0, L2-PS shall calculate the UL pathloss based on [11119109](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqIq4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). Based on the calculated value, L2-PS shall increment by one the counter corresponding to the appropriate pathloss range.  
The pathloss ranges for each counter are defined as follows:  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB0\_LEV\_1: Pathloss is greater than or equal to 0 dB and less than 40 dB.  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB0\_LEV\_2: Pathloss is greater than or equal to 40 dB and less than 45 dB.  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB0\_LEV\_3: Pathloss is greater than or equal to 45 dB and less than 50 dB.  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB0\_LEV\_4: Pathloss is greater than or equal to 50 dB and less than 55 dB.  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB0\_LEV\_5: Pathloss is greater than or equal to 55 dB and less than 60 dB.  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB0\_LEV\_6: Pathloss is greater than or equal to 60 dB and less than 65 dB.  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB0\_LEV\_7: Pathloss is greater than or equal to 65 dB and less than 70 dB.  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB0\_LEV\_8: Pathloss is greater than or equal to 70 dB and less than 75 dB.  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB0\_LEV\_9: Pathloss is greater than or equal to 75 dB and less than 80 dB.  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB0\_LEV\_10: Pathloss is greater than or equal to 80 dB and less than 85 dB.  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB0\_LEV\_11: Pathloss is greater than or equal to 85 dB and less than 90 dB.  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB0\_LEV\_12: Pathloss is greater than or equal to 90 dB and less than 95 dB.  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB0\_LEV\_13: Pathloss is greater than or equal to 95 dB and less than 100 dB.  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB0\_LEV\_14:  Pathloss is greater than or equal to 100 dB and less than 105 dB.  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB0\_LEV\_15:  Pathloss is greater than or equal to 105 dB and less than 110 dB.  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB0\_LEV\_16:  Pathloss is greater than or equal to 110 dB and less than 115 dB.  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB0\_LEV\_17:  Pathloss is greater than or equal to 115 dB and less than 120 dB.  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB0\_LEV\_18:  Pathloss is greater than or equal to 120 dB and less than 125 dB.  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB0\_LEV\_19:  Pathloss is greater than or equal to 125 dB and less than 130 dB.  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB0\_LEV\_20: Pathloss is greater than or equal to 130 dB and less than 135 dB.  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB0\_LEV\_21: Pathloss is greater than or equal to 135 dB and less than 140 dB.

For PUSCH in FR1 for SSB5, L2-PS shall calculate the UL pathloss based on [11119109](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqIq4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). Based on the calculated value, L2-PS shall increment by one the counter corresponding to the appropriate pathloss range.  
The pathloss ranges for each counter are defined as follows:  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB5\_LEV\_1: Pathloss is greater than or equal to 0 dB and less than 40 dB.  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB5\_LEV\_2: Pathloss is greater than or equal to 40 dB and less than 45 dB.  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB5\_LEV\_3: Pathloss is greater than or equal to 45 dB and less than 50 dB.  
UE\_PATHLOSS\_PUSCH\_SSB5\_LEV\_4: Pathloss is greater than or equal to 50 dB and less than 55 dB.

### 2.9.5.1 Carrier Bandwidth Handling

#### 2.9.5.1.0-1 Carrier Bandwidth Handling BWP Config for UE with Power Saving (ID: 13344057)

**2.9.5.1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11147022`)

Carrier Bandwidth Handling
Number of UEs configured with 2 BWPs

---

**2.9.5.1.0-1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `13344253`)

Carrier Bandwidth Handling
[Before CNI-136896-A]

Below mentioned PM counters shall be updated by L2-PS:

1. MAX\_UE\_CONFIG\_2BWP (M55351C01001): L2 PS shall report to PM agent, number of active UEs with 2 BWP (configured via User Setup or User Modify procedure) at the end of every sampling interval.
2. AVG\_UE\_CONFIG\_2BWP (M55351C01002): L2 PS shall report to PM agent, number of active UEs with 2 BWP (configured via User Setup or User Modify procedure) at the end of every sampling interval.

For details regarding:

* User Setup procedure please see: 5G\_L2\_149\_replaced([11144092](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_233xOvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* User Modify procedure please see: 5G\_L2\_153\_replaced([11144383](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_235mb_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[CNI-136896-A]

This is moved here from chapter 2.1.12, which now refined and split to:

[13344145](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ofdd8N-gEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ) Maximum number of UEs configured with 2 BWPs

[13344155](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2hE-kd-gEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ) Average number of UEs configured with 2 BWPs

[End CNI-136896-A]

---

Carrier Bandwidth Handling
Maximum number of UEs configured with 2 BWPs

---

**2.9.5.1.0-1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `13344156`)

Carrier Bandwidth Handling
Measurement: NR Dynamic BWP

NetAct Name: MAX\_UE\_CONFIG\_2BWP

PI Id: M55351C01001

Note: This counter is incremented for maximum the number of UE configured with 2 BWPs (dedicated and Power Saving BWP)

Update Time: This counter is updated when the number of UE configured with 2 BWPs (via User Setup or User Modify Procedure) over the sampling period exceeds the previous recorded value.

Increment Value: No additional details as compared to NIDD

For details regarding:

* User Setup procedure please see: 5G\_L2\_149\_replaced([11144092](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_233xOvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* User Modify procedure please see: 5G\_L2\_153\_replaced([11144383](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_235mb_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Carrier Bandwidth Handling
Measurement: NR Dynamic BWP

NetAct Name: AVG\_UE\_CONFIG\_2BWP

PI Id: M55351C01002

Note: This counter is incremented for the average number of UE configured with 2 BWPs (dedicated and Power Saving BWP)

Update Time: This counter determines the number of UEs configured with Power Saving BWP (via User Setup or User Modify Procedure) every sampling period, and averages the values at the end of collection interval.

Increment Value: No additional details as compared to NIDD

For details regarding:

* User Setup procedure please see: 5G\_L2\_149\_replaced([11144092](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_233xOvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* User Modify procedure please see: 5G\_L2\_153\_replaced([11144383](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_235mb_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

#### 2.9.5.1.0-2 Carrier Bandwidth Handling Dynamic bandwidth part switch for UE power saving (ID: 11194668)

**2.9.5.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11194673`)

Carrier Bandwidth Handling
Incoming BWP switch

---

**2.9.5.1.0-2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11194677`)

Carrier Bandwidth Handling
Incoming BWP switch for BWP 1 ...

Incoming BWP switch for BWP 4

---

**2.9.5.1.0-2.0-1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11194683`)

Carrier Bandwidth Handling
Measurement: NR Dynamic BWP

NetAct name: INCOM\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWP1 ... INCOM\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWP4

PI ID: M55351C01003 ... M55351C01006

Note: This counter is incremented only for DCI based dedicated BWP switching instances. RRC based BWP switching is not considered for counter increments.

Update time: This counter is updated to track DCI based BWP switch on per BWP basis. i,e for dedicated BWP IDs(1 to 4) there are individual counter IDs for each BWP ID. Counters INCOM\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWP1, INCOM\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWP2, INCOM\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWP3, INCOM\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWP4 map to dedicated BWP IDs 1,2,3,4 respectively as configured by CP-RT. L2 PS increments the counter specific to BWP towards which the switch is performed (INCOM\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWPx is incremented when PDCCH is scheduled with BWP indicator within DCI 1\_1 is set to BWP ID x)

Example: UE is being switched from dedicated BWP-1 to BWP-2, hence BWP indicator within DCI 1\_1 is set to BWP-2. Counter INCOM\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWP2 is incremented after PDCCH with DCI 1\_1 is successfully scheduled for DL transmission.

Note:

1. Counter is incremented only if PDCCH scheduling with DCI 1\_1 is successful.
2. Only first instance of BWP switch DCI 1\_1 is considered. Subsequent retransmissions of DCI 1\_1(if any) are not considered for counter increments.[PR768354] Retransmissions in the current context within one instance of BWP switch refers to all the DCI 1\_1 transmissions after the first DCI 1\_1 transmission, which occur between "Ready for DCI TX" and "Wait for BWP switch complete" states in 5G\_L2\_9994\_replaced([11153121](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24sQl_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) trying to achieve the same BWP switch [End PR768354]

Increment value: Counter is incremented by 1 for each instance of BWP switch using DCI 1\_1

No additional details as compared to NIDD

---

Outgoing BWP switch for BWP 1 ...

---

**2.9.5.1.0-2.0-2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11194696`)

Carrier Bandwidth Handling
Measurement: NR Dynamic BWP

NetAct name: OUTGO\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWP1 ... OUTGO\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWP4

PI ID: M55351C01007 ... M55351C01010

Note: This counter is incremented only for DCI based dedicated BWP switching instances. RRC based BWP switching is not considered for counter increments.

Update time: This counter is updated to track DCI based BWP switch on per BWP basis. i,e for dedicated BWP IDs(1 to 4) there are individual counter IDs for each BWP ID. Counters OUTGO\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWP1, OUTGO\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWP2, OUTGO\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWP3, OUTGO\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWP4 map to dedicated BWP IDs 1,2,3,4 respectively as configured by CP-RT. L2 PS increments the counter specific to BWP from which the switch is performed (OUTGO\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWPx is incremented when PDCCH is scheduled with BWP indicator within DCI 1\_1 is set to another BWP ID other than x)

Example: UE is being switched from dedicated BWP-1 to BWP-2, hence BWP indicator within DCI 1\_1 is set to BWP-2. Counter OUTGO\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWP1 is incremented after PDCCH with DCI 1\_1 is successfully scheduled for DL transmission.

Note:

1. Counter is incremented only if PDCCH scheduling with DCI 1\_1 is successful.
2. Only first instance of BWP switch DCI 1\_1 is considered. Subsequent retransmissions of DCI 1\_1(if any) are not considered for counter increments.[PR768354] Retransmissions in the current context within one instance of BWP switch refers to all the DCI 1\_1 transmissions after the first DCI 1\_1 transmission, which occur between "Ready for DCI TX" and "Wait for BWP switch complete" states in 5G\_L2\_9994\_replaced([11153121](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24sQl_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) trying to achieve the same BWP switch [End PR768354]

Increment value: Counter is incremented by 1 for each instance of BWP switch using DCI 1\_1

No additional details as compared to NIDD

---

Carrier Bandwidth Handling

---

**2.9.5.1.0-2.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11194706`)

Carrier Bandwidth Handling
Incoming BWP switch with no confirmation from UE for BWP 1 ...

Incoming BWP switch with no confirmation from UE for BWP 4

---

**2.9.5.1.0-2.0-3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11194711`)

Carrier Bandwidth Handling
Measurement: NR Dynamic BWP

NetAct name: INCOM\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWP1\_NOCONF ... INCOM\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWP4\_NOCONF

PI ID: M55351C01011 ... M55351C01014

Note: This counter is incremented only for DCI based dedicated BWP switching instances. RRC based BWP switching is not considered for counter increments.

Update time: This counter is updated to track DCI based BWP switch on per BWP basis. i,e for dedicated BWP IDs(1 to 4) there are individual counter IDs for each BWP ID. Counters INCOM\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWP1\_NOCONF, INCOM\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWP2\_NOCONF, INCOM\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWP3\_NOCONF, INCOM\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWP4\_NOCONF map to dedicated BWP IDs 1,2,3,4 respectively as configured by CP-RT. L2 PS increments the counter specific to BWP towards which the switch is performed after exhausting the maximum number of retransmissions for BWP switch DCI 1\_1 and updating active BWP to target BWP without UE's confirmation (INCOM\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWPx\_NOCONF is incremented when BWP indicator within DCI 1\_1 is set to BWP ID x and UE does not respond to all transmissions + retransmissions of DCI 1\_1). At this stage, L2-PS considers the UE to have completed the BWP switch and updates the UE's active BWP to target BWP. This counter intends to count such cases of BWP switching without UE's confirmation. Detailed steps are explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1857\_replaced([11111082](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpKagvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Example: UE is being switched from dedicated BWP-1 to BWP-2, hence BWP indicator within DCI 1\_1 is set to BWP-2. Counter INCOM\_BWP\_SWITCH\_CBWP2\_NOCONF is incremented after PDCCH with DCI 1\_1 is successfully scheduled for maximum DL retransmissions and UE's active BWP gets updated with target BWP without UE's confirmation.

Note:

1. Counter is incremented only if UE does not respond [PR768354] or if UE does not confirm the BWP switch wiht a NACK [End PR768354] to all transmissions (first transmission + subsequent retransmissions) with DCI 1\_1 and its active BWP is updated with target BWP.

[PR768354]

1. Retransmissions in the current context within one instance of BWP switch refers to all the DCI 1\_1 transmissions after the first DCI 1\_1 transmission, which occur between "Ready for DCI TX" and "Wait for BWP switch complete" states in 5G\_L2\_9994\_replaced([11153121](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24sQl_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) trying to achieve the same BWP switch

[End PR768354]

Increment value: Counter is incremented by 1 for each instance of BWP switch using DCI 1\_1

No additional details as compared to NIDD

---

**2.9.5.1.0-2.0-4**  (ID: `11194716`)

Carrier Bandwidth Handling
Inactive BWP scanning and successful recovery

---

**2.9.5.1.0-2.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11194721`)

Carrier Bandwidth Handling
UE active BWP recovery successful for BWP 1 ...

UE active BWP recovery successful for BWP 4

---

**2.9.5.1.0-2.0-4.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11194725`)

Carrier Bandwidth Handling
Measurement: NR Dynamic BWP

NetAct name: UE\_ACT\_CBWP1\_RECOV\_SUCC ... UE\_ACT\_CBWP4\_RECOV\_SUCC

PI ID: M55351C01015 ... M55351C01018

Note: This counter is incremented only for DCI based dedicated BWP scanning and successful recovery instances.

Update time: This counter is updated to track successful instances of DCI based inactive BWP scanning and switching (Inactive BWP scanning procedure is explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_16100\_replaced([11111293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpMPxfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_16104\_replaced([11111313](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpMPyvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) on per BWP basis. i,e for dedicated BWP IDs(1 to 4) there are individual counter IDs for each BWP ID. Counters UE\_ACT\_CBWP1\_RECOV\_SUCC, UE\_ACT\_CBWP2\_RECOV\_SUCC, UE\_ACT\_CBWP3\_RECOV\_SUCC, UE\_ACT\_CBWP4\_RECOV\_SUCC map to dedicated BWP IDs 1,2,3,4 respectively as configured by CP-RT. During the inactive BWP scanning procedure, L2 PS issues a UL grant with DCI 0\_1 using BWP ID where it thinks the UE can be found. Upon receiving the CRC-OK on PUSCH, the UE's active BWP Id is updated and BWP recovery is considered to be successful. The counter increment is specific to BWP towards which UL grant with DCI 0\_1 is sent and upon successful recovery, the counter is incremented (UE\_ACT\_CBWPx\_RECOV\_SUCC is incremented when CRC-OK on PUSCH is received from the UE for the earlier sent UL grant with BWP indicator within DCI 0\_1 was set to BWP ID x)

Example: UE's dedicated BWP is marked as BWP-1 and fulfils all conditions to trigger inactive BWP scanning as mentioned in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_16100\_replaced([11111293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpMPxfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Now as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_16100\_replaced([11111293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpMPxfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) inactive BWP scanning procedure, L2-PS issues UL grants using DCI 0\_1 towards inactive BWP (BWP-2). Subsequently as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_16104\_replaced([11111313](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpMPyvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) when the UE responds with CRC-OK on PUSCH (for first or subsequent UL grant attempts), the scanning process is considered successful and the UE's active BWP will be updated to BWP-2 and counter UE\_ACT\_CBWP2\_RECOV\_SUCC is incremented.

Note: Conditions / Exceptions mentioned in "Note1" of 5G\_UP\_ALG\_16100\_replaced([11111293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpMPxfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) applicable for updating counters also.

Increment value: Counter is incremented by 1 for each instance of successful inactive BWP recovery using DCI 0\_1

No additional details as compared to NIDD

---

**2.9.5.1.0-2.0-5**  (ID: `11194732`)

Carrier Bandwidth Handling
Inactive BWP scanning and attempted recovery

---

**2.9.5.1.0-2.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11194736`)

Carrier Bandwidth Handling
UE active BWP recovery attempt for BWP 1 ...

UE active BWP recovery attempt for BWP 4

---

**2.9.5.1.0-2.0-5.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11194742`)

Carrier Bandwidth Handling
Measurement: NR Dynamic BWP

NetAct name: UE\_ACT\_CBWP1\_RECOV\_ATT ... UE\_ACT\_CBWP4\_RECOV\_ATT

PI ID: M55351CRD50001 ... M55351CRD50004

Note: This R&D counter is incremented only for DCI based dedicated BWP scanning instances.

Update time: This counter is updated to track successful instances of DCI based inactive BWP scanning procedures (Inactive BWP scanning procedure is explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_16100\_replaced([11111293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpMPxfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) on per BWP basis. i,e for dedicated BWP IDs(1 to 4) there are individual counter IDs for each BWP ID. Counters UE\_ACT\_CBWP1\_RECOV\_ATT, UE\_ACT\_CBWP2\_RECOV\_ATT, UE\_ACT\_CBWP3\_RECOV\_ATT, UE\_ACT\_CBWP4\_RECOV\_ATT map to dedicated BWP IDs 1,2,3,4 respectively as configured by CP-RT. During the inactive BWP scanning procedure, L2 PS issues a UL grant with DCI 0\_1 using BWP ID where it thinks the UE can be found. The counter increment is specific to BWP towards which UL grant with DCI 0\_1 is sent. The counter is incremented upon sending the first UL grant with DCI 0\_1 (UE\_ACT\_CBWPx\_RECOV\_ATT is incremented when UL grant is scheduled with BWP indicator within DCI 0\_1 set to BWP ID x)

Example: UE's dedicated BWP is marked as BWP-1 and fulfils all conditions to trigger inactive BWP scanning as mentioned in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_16100\_replaced([11111293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpMPxfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Now as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_16100\_replaced([11111293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpMPxfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) inactive BWP scanning procedure, L2-PS issues UL grants using DCI 0\_1 towards inactive BWP (BWP-2) and counter UE\_ACT\_CBWP2\_RECOV\_ATT is incremented. Retransmissions of DCI 0\_1 are not considered for counter updates.

Note: Conditions / Exceptions mentioned in "Note1" of 5G\_UP\_ALG\_16100\_replaced([11111293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpMPxfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) applicable for updating counters also.

Increment value: Counter is incremented by 1 for each instance of inactive BWP scanning procedure is triggered using DCI 0\_1

No additional details as compared to NIDD

---

### 2.9.5.2 Beam Control

#### 2.9.5.2.0-1 Beam Control PUCCH serving beam - half sector beam -0 ... PUCCH serving beam - half sector beam -1 (ID: 11194752)

**2.9.5.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11194757`)

Beam Control
Measurement: NR Beamforming

NetAct name: PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_HALF\_SECT\_0 … PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_HALF\_SECT\_1

PI ID: M55305CRD50001 … M55305CRD50002

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

When PUSCH = 8RX, PUCCH = 8RX, pucchF3BeamformingEnabled = TRUE, upon sending UlData\_PucchReceiveReq(5G\_L1\_IF\_212\_replaced([11513942](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR0MFfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) by L2-PS to 5G-L1-UL, 4 SSB beams used for PUCCH format 3 reception need to be updated to the PM counters in 5G\_L2\_13577\_replaced([11194752](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_281ww_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))/5G\_L2\_13584\_replaced([11194772](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_281wx_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))/5G\_L2\_13585\_replaced([11194784](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_281wyfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))/5G\_L2\_13586\_replaced([11194792](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_281wy_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) according to different situations. Refer to 5G\_L2\_12901\_replaced([11155736](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2466G_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for PUCCH beam selection.

When only one SSB beam is valid, and SSB1 + highest correlation beam1 + two half sector beams are used for PUCCH according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_21307\_replaced([11113379](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpbgTvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), these two PM counters need to be incremented.

Example:

2 PUCCH beams from UE context are SSB2, SSB3. Second PUCCH beam is a neighbor beam selected randomly(i.e. only one SSB beam is valid for PUCCH).

In this case, SSB2 + highest correlated beam of SSB2 + 2 half sectors will be used for PUCCH.

PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_HALF\_SECT\_0/ PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_HALF\_SECT\_1/ PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_SSB2/ PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_HIGH\_CORR\_SSB2 should be incremented.

Note: the concept of “PUCCH=8RX” or “PUCCH=4RX” is described in 5G\_L2\_12903\_replaced([11155753](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2466HvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Increment value:

No additional details as compared to NIDD.

---

#### 2.9.5.2.0-2 Beam Control PUCCH serving beam - quarter sector beam -0 ... PUCCH serving beam - quarter sector beam -3 (ID: 11194760)

**2.9.5.2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11194766`)

Beam Control
Measurement: NR Beamforming

NetAct name: PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_QUARTER\_SECT\_0 … PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_QUARTER\_SECT\_3

PI ID: M55305CRD50027 … M55305CRD50030

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

These four PM counters shall be incremented upon sending UlData\_PucchReceiveReq (see 5G\_L1\_IF\_212\_replaced([11513942](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR0MFfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) by 5G-L2-PS to 5G-L1-UL if all following conditions are satisfied:

* PUCCH=8RX.
* UE PUCCH format was changed from F1 to F3 whilst selected beams were not updated. It means UE is still using sector beams while having PUCCH format 3 selected.

Note: the concept of “PUCCH=8RX” or “PUCCH=4RX” is described in 5G\_L2\_12903\_replaced([11155753](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2466HvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Increment value:

No additional details as compared to NIDD.

Note:  After PR775922: [ASIM][ABIP][AVQL][trunk][TDD][FR1][lwb\_checked] M55305CRD50027-M55305CRD50030 introduced by CB009363 for PUCCH F3 with sector beam is meaningless, these PM counters are deleted.

---

#### 2.9.5.2.0-3 Beam Control PUCCH serving beam - SSB beam -0 ... PUCCH serving beam - SSB beam -7 (ID: 11194772)

**2.9.5.2.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11194778`)

Beam Control
Measurement: NR Beamforming

NetAct name: PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_SSB0 … PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_SSB7

PI ID: M55305CRD50003 … M55305CRD50010

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

When PUSCH = 8RX, PUCCH = 8RX, pucchF3BeamformingEnabled = TRUE, upon sending UlData\_PucchReceiveReq(5G\_L1\_IF\_212\_replaced([11513942](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR0MFfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) by L2-PS to 5G-L1-UL, 4 SSB beams used for PUCCH format 3 reception need to be updated to the PM counters in 5G\_L2\_13577\_replaced([11194752](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_281ww_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))/5G\_L2\_13584\_replaced([11194772](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_281wx_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))/5G\_L2\_13585\_replaced([11194784](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_281wyfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))/5G\_L2\_13586\_replaced([11194792](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_281wy_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) according to different situations. Refer to 5G\_L2\_12901\_replaced([11155736](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2466G_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for PUCCH beam selection.

When SSBx from the beamset which is configured to the cell is used for PUCCH, PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_SSBx need to be incremented.

See examples from 5G\_L2\_13577\_replaced([11194752](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_281ww_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))/5G\_L2\_13585\_replaced([11194784](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_281wyfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))/5G\_L2\_13586\_replaced([11194792](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_281wy_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Note: the concept of “PUCCH=8RX” or “PUCCH=4RX” is described in 5G\_L2\_12903\_replaced([11155753](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2466HvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Increment value:

No additional details as compared to NIDD.

#### 2.9.5.2.0-4 Beam Control PUCCH serving beam - high correlation beam of SSB beam -0 ... PUCCH serving beam - high correlation beam of SSB beam -7 (ID: 11194784)

**2.9.5.2.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11194786`)

Beam Control
Measurement: NR Beamforming

NetAct name: PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_HIGH\_CORR\_SSB0 … PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_HIGH\_CORR\_SSB7

PI ID: M55305CRD50011 … M55305CRD50018

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

When PUSCH = 8RX, PUCCH = 8RX, pucchF3BeamformingEnabled = TRUE, upon sending UlData\_PucchReceiveReq(5G\_L1\_IF\_212\_replaced([11513942](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR0MFfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) by L2-PS to 5G-L1-UL, 4 SSB beams used for PUCCH format 3 reception need to be updated to the PM counters in 5G\_L2\_13577\_replaced([11194752](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_281ww_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))/5G\_L2\_13584\_replaced([11194772](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_281wx_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))/5G\_L2\_13585\_replaced([11194784](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_281wyfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))/5G\_L2\_13586\_replaced([11194792](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_281wy_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) according to different situations. Refer to 5G\_L2\_12901\_replaced([11155736](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2466G_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for PUCCH beam selection.

When highest correlated SSB coarse beam for SSBx provided by Cplane is used for PUCCH according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_21307\_replaced([11113379](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpbgTvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_HIGH\_CORR\_SSBx need to be incremented.

Example:

PUCCH beams from UE context are SSB4, SSB7. Second PUCCH beam is not a neighbor beam selected randomly(i.e. two SSB beams are valid for PUCCH). Highest correlated beam of SSB4 and Highest correlated beam of SSB7 are not the same.

In this case, SSB4 + highest correlated beam of SSB4 + SSB7 + highest correlated beam of SSB7.

PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_SSB4/ PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_HIGH\_CORR\_SSB4/PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_SSB7/ PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_HIGH\_CORR\_SSB7 should be incremented.

Note: the concept of “PUCCH=8RX” or “PUCCH=4RX” is described in 5G\_L2\_12903\_replaced([11155753](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2466HvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Increment value:

No additional details as compared to NIDD.

---

#### 2.9.5.2.0-5 Beam Control PUCCH serving beam - 2nd high correlation beam of SSB beam -0 ... PUCCH serving beam - 2nd high correlation beam of SSB beam -7 (ID: 11194792)

**2.9.5.2.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11194798`)

Beam Control
Measurement: NR Beamforming

NetAct name: PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_2ND\_CORR\_SSB0 … PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_2ND\_CORR\_SSB7

PI ID: M55305CRD50019 … M55305CRD50026

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

When PUSCH = 8RX, PUCCH = 8RX, pucchF3BeamformingEnabled = TRUE, upon sending UlData\_PucchReceiveReq(5G\_L1\_IF\_212\_replaced([11513942](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR0MFfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) by L2-PS to 5G-L1-UL, 4 SSB beams used for PUCCH format 3 reception need to be updated to the PM counters in 5G\_L2\_13577\_replaced([11194752](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_281ww_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))/5G\_L2\_13584\_replaced([11194772](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_281wx_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))/5G\_L2\_13585\_replaced([11194784](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_281wyfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))/5G\_L2\_13586\_replaced([11194792](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_281wy_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) according to different situations. Refer to 5G\_L2\_12901\_replaced([11155736](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2466G_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for PUCCH beam selection.

When second highest correlated SSB coarse beam for SSBx provided by Cplane is used for PUCCH according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_21307\_replaced([11113379](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpbgTvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_2ND\_CORR\_SSBx need to be incremented.

Only when highest correlated of 2 SSBs are the same, second highest correlated beam of SSB with larger beamID will be used. And in this case, the counter corresponding to the high correlated beam of this beam is not updated.

Example:

2 PUCCH beams from UE context are SSB6, SSB2. Second PUCCH beam is not a neighbor beam selected randomly(i.e. two SSB beams are valid for PUCCH). Highest correlated beam of SSB6 and Highest correlated beam of SSB2 are the same.

In this case, SSB2 + highest correlated beam of SSB2 + SSB6 + second highest correlated beam of SSB6.

PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_SSB2/ PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_HIGH\_CORR\_SSB2/PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_SSB6/PUCCH\_SERV\_BEAM\_2ND\_CORR\_SSB6 should be incremented.

Note: the concept of “PUCCH=8RX” or “PUCCH=4RX” is described in 5G\_L2\_12903\_replaced([11155753](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2466HvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Increment value:

No additional details as compared to NIDD.

#### 2.9.5.2.1 iBLER per BeamType

#### 2.9.5.2.1-1 iBLER per BeamType

**2.9.5.2.1-1.0-1**  (ID: `13467630`)

iBLER per BeamType
**Measurement: [NR Beamforming 2](https://mind.emea.nsn-net.net/measurementList?package=101669&search=NR%20Beamforming%202)**

**NetAct name: NUM\_PROB\_OCC\_3\_SRS\_BEAM**

**PI ID: M55330C00053**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_5KBG5p5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA).**

**Update time:**

5G-L2-PS instance shall update the counter when the state machine changes its state from ProbingNotStarted to OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschScheduling or TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschSchedulingAll (see [12584038: Beam probing state machine](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_ZMnJgDS7EfCKaNlcHOQWmg)), and the instance starts probing of the 3rd beam.

**Increment value:**

No additional details which go beyond the NIDD definition.

**Update time:**

5G-L2-PS instance shall update the counter when the state machine changes its state from ProbingNotStarted to OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschScheduling or TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschSchedulingAll (see [12584038: Beam probing state machine](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_ZMnJgDS7EfCKaNlcHOQWmg)), and the instance starts probing of the 4th beam.

#### 2.9.5.2.1-5 iBLER per BeamType

iBLER per BeamType
**Measurement: [NR Beamforming 2](https://mind.emea.nsn-net.net/measurementList?package=101669&search=NR%20Beamforming%202)**

**NetAct name: PROB\_DELTA\_MEAS\_QUAL\_BIN\_0 … PROB\_DELTA\_MEAS\_QUAL\_BIN\_14**

**PI ID: M55330C00057 … M55330C00071**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_5KBG5p5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA).**

**Update time:**

5G-L2-PS instance shall update the counter corresponding to relevant bin when the event PuschFeedbackReceived occurs (see [12584038: Beam probing state machine](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_ZMnJgDS7EfCKaNlcHOQWmg)).

**Increment value:**

No additional details which go beyond the NIDD definition.

##### 2.9.5.2.1.0-1 iBLER per BeamType PDSCH initial transmissions using SSB beams (ID: 11194806)

**2.9.5.2.1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `13345497`)

iBLER per BeamType
Measurement: NR Beamforming 2

NetAct name: PDSCH\_INI\_TX\_SSB\_BEAM

PI ID: M55330C00043

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

DL Harq Feedback

Note: FDD/TDD&actBeamforming = false/super cell/subSector/UCA, SSB related counter shall be pegged. [CB008577-D]For FDD&actBeamforming = TRUE, if PDSCH is not scheduled on PMI beam, count the beam as SSB beam.[End CB008577-D]

Increment value:

Increment 1 if DL HARQ feedback is received for a TB that was sent with SSB Beam for initial transmission.

Counter valid for FR1

---

iBLER per BeamType
Measurement: NR Beamforming 2

NetAct name: PDSCH\_SUC\_INI\_TX\_SSB\_BEAM

PI ID: M55330C00044

Update time:

DL Harq Feedback

Increment value:

Increment 1 if DL HARQ ACK is received for a TB that was sent with SSB Beam for initial transmission.

[CB008577-D]

Note: For FDD&actBeamforming = TRUE, if PDSCH is not scheduled on PMI beam, count the beam as SSB beam.

[End CB008577-D]

##### 2.9.5.2.1.0-3 iBLER per BeamType PUSCH initial transmissions using SSB beams (ID: 11194826)

Measurement: NR Beamforming 2

UL Harq Feedback

Note: FDD/TDD&actBeamforming = false/super cell/subSector, SSB related counter shall be pegged.[CB008577-D]For FDD&actBeamforming = TRUE, if PUSCH is not scheduled on PMI beam, count the beam as SSB beam.[End CB008577-D]

Increment value:

Increment 1 if PUSCH detection result is received for a TB that was received with SSB Beam for initial transmission, for actUlTxSkip/actUlCgType2/PUSCH Slot Aggregation updating, pls refer to corresponding PM counter definition.

Counter valid for FR1

### 2.9.5.3 Carrier Aggregation Control

#### 2.9.5.3.1 PCell Counters

##### 2.9.5.3.1.0-1 PCell Counters Number of P(S)Cell UEs with x activated (N)SA SCells in DL (ID: 11195011)

**2.9.5.3.1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11195015`)

PCell Counters
Measurement: NR Carrier Aggregation Distributed Unit (gNB-DU)

SA:

NetAct name: PCELL\_UE\_0\_ACT\_SCELL\_DL\_SA ... PCELL\_UE\_7\_ACT\_SCELL\_DL\_SA

PI ID: M55316C15030 ... M55316C15037

[CB009267-Cb]

NSA:

NetAct name: PSCELL\_UE\_0\_ACT\_SCELL\_DL\_NSA ... PSCELL\_UE\_7\_ACT\_SCELL\_DL\_NSA

PI ID: M55316C15063 ... M55316C15070

[End CB009267-Cb]

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

Update every sampling interval time.

Increment value:

Increment by 1 for every UE which has x active SCells in DL.

x = 0 : SA: M55316C15030; [CB009267-Cb] NSA: M55316C15063 [End CB009267-Cb]

x = 1 : SA: M55316C15031; [CB009267-Cb] NSA: M55316C15064 [End CB009267-Cb]

...

x = 7 : SA: M55316C15037; [CB009267-Cb] NSA: M55316C15070 [End CB009267-Cb]

Counter valid for FR1 and FR2 if applicable

---

##### 2.9.5.3.1.0-2 PCell Counters Number of P(S)Cell UEs with x activated (N)SA SCells in UL (ID: 11195021)

**2.9.5.3.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11195025`)

PCell Counters
Measurement: NR Carrier Aggregation Distributed Unit (gNB-DU)

SA:

NetAct name: PCELL\_UE\_0\_ACT\_SCELL\_UL\_SA ... PCELL\_UE\_3\_ACT\_SCELL\_UL\_SA

PI ID: M55316C15038 ... M55316C15041

[CB009267-Cb]

NSA:

NetAct name: PSCELL\_UE\_0\_ACT\_SCELL\_UL\_NSA ... PSCELL\_UE\_3\_ACT\_SCELL\_UL\_NSA

PI ID: M55316C15071 ... M55316C15074

[End CB009267-Cb]

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

Update every sampling interval time.

Increment value:

Increment by 1 for every UE which has x active SCells in UL.

x = 0 : SA: M55316C15038; [CB009267-Cb] NSA: M55316C15071 [End CB009267-Cb]

x = 1 : SA: M55316C15039; [CB009267-Cb] NSA: M55316C15072 [End CB009267-Cb]

...

x = 3 : SA: M55316C15041; [CB009267-Cb] NSA: M55316C15074 [End CB009267-Cb]

Counter valid for FR1 and FR2 if applicable

Note:

PCELL\_UE\_0\_ACT\_SCELL\_UL\_SA [CB009267-Cb] or PCELL\_UE\_0\_ACT\_SCELL\_UL\_NSA [End CB009267-Cb] can be incremented only when SCell is configured as DL and UL, in case when SCell is DL only, then [Before CB009267-Cb] this counter [CB009267-Cb] those counters [End CB009267-Cb] can't be incremented.

---

##### 2.9.5.3.1.0-8 PCell Counters Number of MAC-CE request to UE for SCell activation (ID: 11195081)

**2.9.5.3.1.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `11195084`)

PCell Counters
Measurement: NR Carrier Aggregation Distributed Unit (gNB-DU)

SA:

NetAct name: MACCE\_SENT\_SCELL\_ACT\_SA

PI ID: M55316C00033

NSA:

NetAct name: MACCE\_SENT\_SCELL\_ACT\_NSA

PI ID: M55316C00037

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

Update every time when MAC-CE request is sent to UE from gNB for SCell activation.

In 5G-L2-PS, both initial and re-transmission of MAC-CE for SCell activation will be taken into account.

Increment value:

Increment by 1 every time when condition occurs.

Counter valid for FR1 and FR2

##### 2.9.5.3.1.0-15 PCell Counters SCell UL Timing Alignment for sTag Successful (ID: 13471968)

**2.9.5.3.1.0-15.0-1**  (ID: `13471969`)

PCell Counters
Measurement: NR Carrier Aggregation Distributed Unit (gNB-DU)

NetAct name:  RAN\_ACC\_SUC\_PCEL\_TA\_ALIGN\_STAG

PI ID: M55316C00052

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

Update every time PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingResp with modifType equal to requestUlTimingAlignmentForSTag and status equal to EStatus5G\_Ok is received (see [10979530: PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingResp message content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Eov7YPu5Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ), [13414170: UL Timing Alignment for SCells in Different TAG](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_QPSsZBLqEfG3gf_qmG8Vww))

Increment value:

Increment by 1 every time when condition occurs.

Counter valid for FR1

**2.9.5.3.2.0-28.0-1**  (ID: `12726582`)

SCell Counters
