#### 2.9.5.7.0-13 UL MU MIMO Management Average of the maximum layer per slot for PUSCH (ID: 12555221)

**2.9.5.7.0-13.0-1**  (ID: `12555222`)

UL MU MIMO Management
Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

---

NetAct name: PUSCH\_AVG\_MAX\_LAYER

PI ID: M55308C00170

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall collect data to update the average of the maximum layer per slot for PUSCH (PUSCH\_AVG\_MAX\_LAYER) after PRBs are allocated for all supported MIMO modes. [Before PR847776 ] MIMO modes in UL are activated when 5G-CP-RT sends PsCell\_CellSetupReq to 5G-L2-PS:

* IE ulMuMimoConfig. **actUlMuMimo**([10968836](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UaBI_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))\*\*\*\*
* IE isCellMassiveMimo ([10967599](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UT6g_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))

[End PR847776]

The counter relies on results of legacy counters PRB\_UL\_MU\_MIMO\_xLAYER or PRB\_UL\_SU\_MIMO\_xLAYER, where x means number of used layers.

5G-L2-PS shall compare values from PRB\_UL\_MU\_MIMO\_xLAYER or PRB\_UL\_SU\_MIMO\_xLAYER, then determine the largest value among it and store it as PUSCH\_AVG\_MAX\_LAYER.sum, increment PUSCH\_AVG\_MAX\_LAYER.samples.

Increment value:

When 5G-L2-PS has determined PUSCH\_AVG\_MAX\_LAYER.sum, then 5G-L2-PS shall send to OAM:

* PUSCH\_AVG\_MAX\_LAYER.samples and
* PUSCH\_AVG\_MAX\_LAYER.sum.

When OAM receives PUSCH\_AVG\_MAX\_LAYER.samples and PUSCH\_AVG\_MAX\_LAYER.sum, then OAM shall calculate the average of the maximum layer per slot for PUSCH by dividing PUSCH\_AVG\_MAX\_LAYER.sum by PUSCH\_AVG\_MAX\_LAYER.samples.

---

### 2.9.5.8 Link Adaptation

#### 2.9.5.8.0-1 Link Adaptation Accumulated number of UEs configured with High Reliability DRB (ID: 11196592)

**2.9.5.8.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11196595`)

Link Adaptation
Measurement:

NetAct name: ACC\_UE\_CONFIG\_HRDRB

PI ID: M55366C00013

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

For the update of this counter L2-PS has to maintain a local variable numUesWithConfiguredHrDrb. This varable reflects at any time the value/sample which has to be accumulated as per NIDD definition of this counter. numUesWithConfiguredHrDrb is updated as described below.

At reception of PsCell\_CellSetupReq:

numUesWithConfiguredHrDrb  = 0;

At reception of PsUser\_UserSetupReq:

numUesWithConfiguredHrDrb is incremented by 1 if:

* at least 1 HR DRB is configured and no VoNR DRBs are configured;

Note: it is assumed that if CG is configured at UE Setup together with HR DRB, then CG will not be configured with qam256 mcs-table (ulCgConfigType2.ulCgMcsTable != "qam256");

At reception of PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq:

numUesWithConfiguredHrDrb is decremented by 1 if all the following conditions are true:

* before this message, at least 1 HR DRB is configured and no VoNR DRBs are configured;
* The just completed reconfiguration has succesfully configured CG (PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq.ulCgConfDeconfInd.ulCgConfig = 1 and PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq.ulCgConfDeconfInd.ulCgConfDeconfResult = "success") with qam256 table in UL (PsUser\_UserModifyReq.ulCgConfigType2.ulCgMcsTable = "qam256")

numUesWithConfiguredHrDrb is incremented by 1 if all the following conditions are true:

* before this message, at least 1 HR DRB is configured and no VoNR DRBs are configured;
* The just completed reconfiguration has succesfully de-configured CG (PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq.ulCgConfDeconfInd.ulCgConfig = 0 and PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq.ulCgConfDeconfInd.ulCgConfDeconfResult = "success") and CG was configured with qam256 mcs-table (ulCgConfigType2.ulCgMcsTable = "qam256")

At reception of PsUser\_BearerSetupReq:

numUesWithConfiguredHrDrb is decremented by 1 if all the following conditions are true:

* the received message sets up the 1st VoNR of the UE
* at least 1 HR DRB was configured before;
* If CG was configured before this message, CG was not configured with qam256 mcs-table (ulCgConfigType2.ulCgMcsTable != "qam256")

numUesWithConfiguredHrDrb is incremented by 1 if all the following conditions are true:

* the received message sets up the 1st HR DRB of the UE
* no VoNR DRBs are configured by the present message or were configured before;
* If CG was configured before this message, CG was not configured with qam256 mcs-table (ulCgConfigType2.ulCgMcsTable != "qam256")

At reception of PsUser\_BearerDeleteReq:

numUesWithConfiguredHrDrb is decremented by 1 if all the following conditions are true:

* the received message removes the last HR DRB of the UE
* no VoNR were configured before;
* If CG was configured before this message, CG was not configured with qam256 mcs-table (ulCgConfigType2.ulCgMcsTable != "qam256")

numUesWithConfiguredHrDrb is incremented by 1 if all the following conditions are true:

* the received message removes the last VoNR DRB of the UE
* at least 1 HR DRB is still configured;
* If CG was configured before this message, CG was not configured with qam256 mcs-table (ulCgConfigType2.ulCgMcsTable != "qam256")

At reception of PsUser\_UserDeleteReq:

numUesWithConfiguredHrDrb is de-cremented by 1 if  all the following conditions are true:

* before this message, at least 1 HR DRB is configured and no VoNR DRBs are configured;
* If CG was configured, CG was not configured with qam256 mcs-table (ulCgConfigType2.ulCgMcsTable != "qam256")

numUesWithConfiguredHrDrb updated as above is accumulated at each slot.

Increment value:

---

#### 2.9.5.8.0-2 Link Adaptation Accumulated number of UEs with high-reliability mode active in DL (ID: 11196601)

**2.9.5.8.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11196606`)

Link Adaptation
Measurement:

NetAct name: ACC\_UE\_HR\_ACTIVE\_DL

PI ID: M55366C00014

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

For the update of this counter L2-PS has to maintain a local variable numUeWithActiveHrLaDl. This varable reflects at any time the value/sample which has to be accumulated as per NIDD definition of this counter, that is: numUeWithActiveHrLaDl reflects at any time the number of UEs in the cell whose DL LA is operating in high reliability.

numUeWithActiveHrLaDl is updated as described below.

At reception of PsCell\_CellSetupReq:

numUeWithActiveHrLaDl = 0;

At reception of PsUser\_UserSetupReq:

numUeWithActiveHrLaDl is incremented by 1 if also numHrUeConfigured is incremented by 1 at PsUser\_UserSetupReq (see 5G\_L2\_16141\_replaced([11196592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29EaSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

At reception of PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq:

numUeWithActiveHrLaDl is decremented by 1 if all the following conditions are true:

* numHrUeConfigured is also decremented by 1 at PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq reception (see 5G\_L2\_16141\_replaced([11196592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29EaSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));
* the DL LA of the UE was operating in high relibility mode, before this message;

numUeWithActiveHrLaDl is incremented by 1 if all the following conditions are true:

* numHrUeConfigured is also incremented by 1 at PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq reception (see 5G\_L2\_16141\_replaced([11196592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29EaSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));
* the DL LA of the UE was operating in basic reliability mode, before this message;

At reception of PsUser\_BearerSetupReq:

numUeWithActiveHrLaDl is decremented by 1 if all the following conditions are true:

* numHrUeConfigured is also decremented by 1 at PsUser\_BearerSetupReq reception (see 5G\_L2\_16141\_replaced([11196592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29EaSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));
* the DL LA of the UE was operating in high relibility mode, before this message;

numUeWithActiveHrLaDl is incremented by 1 if all the following conditions are true:

* numHrUeConfigured is also incremented by 1 at PsUser\_BearerSetupReq reception (see 5G\_L2\_16141\_replaced([11196592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29EaSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

At reception of PsUser\_BearerDeleteReq:

numUeWithActiveHrLaDl is decremented by 1 if all the following conditions are true:

* numHrUeConfigured is also decremented by 1 at PsUser\_BearerDeleteReq reception (see 5G\_L2\_16141\_replaced([11196592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29EaSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));
* the DL LA of the UE was operating in high relibility mode, before this message;

numUeWithActiveHrLaDl is incremented by 1 if all the following conditions are true:

* numHrUeConfigured is also incremented by 1 at PsUser\_BearerDeleteReq reception (see 5G\_L2\_16141\_replaced([11196592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29EaSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

At reception of PsUser\_UserDeleteReq:

numUeWithActiveHrLaDl is decremented by 1 if all the following conditions are true:

* numHrUeConfigured is also decremented by 1 at PsUser\_UserDeleteReq reception (see 5G\_L2\_16141\_replaced([11196592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29EaSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));
* the DL LA of the UE was operating in high relibility mode, before this message;

Internal L2-PS event causing the DL LA to switch from BR to HR (5G\_L2\_13215\_replaced([11163574](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ndpfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

numUeWithActiveHrLaDl is incremented by 1;

Internal L2-PS event causing the DL LA to switch from HR to BR (5G\_L2\_13215\_replaced([11163574](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ndpfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

numUeWithActiveHrLaDl is de-cremented by 1;

numUeWithActiveHrLaDl updated as above is accumulated at each slot.

Increment value:

---

#### 2.9.5.8.0-3 Link Adaptation Accumulated number of UEs with high-reliability mode active in UL (ID: 11196612)

**2.9.5.8.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11196616`)

Link Adaptation
Measurement:

NetAct name: ACC\_UE\_HR\_ACTIVE\_UL

PI ID: M55367C00013

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

For the update of this counter L2-PS has to maintain a local variable numUeWithActiveHrLaUl. This varable reflects at any time the value/sample which has to be accumulated as per NIDD definition of this counter, that is: numUeWithActiveHrLaUl reflects at any time the number of UEs in the cell whose UL LA is operating in high reliability.

numUeWithActiveHrLaUl is updated as described below.

At reception of PsCell\_CellSetupReq:

numUeWithActiveHrLaUl = 0;

At reception of PsUser\_UserSetupReq:

numUeWithActiveHrLaUl is incremented by 1 if also numHrUeConfigured is incremented by 1 at PsUser\_UserSetupReq (see 5G\_L2\_16141\_replaced([11196592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29EaSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

At reception of PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq:

numUeWithActiveHrLaUl is decremented by 1 if all the following conditions are true:

* numHrUeConfigured is also decremented by 1 at PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq reception (see 5G\_L2\_16141\_replaced([11196592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29EaSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));
* the UL LA of the UE was operating in high relibility mode, before this message;

numUeWithActiveHrLaUl is incremented by 1 if all the following conditions are true:

* numHrUeConfigured is also incremented by 1 at PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq reception (see 5G\_L2\_16141\_replaced([11196592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29EaSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));
* the UL LA of the UE was operating in basic reliability mode, before this message;

At reception of PsUser\_BearerSetupReq:

numUeWithActiveHrLaUl is decremented by 1 if all the following conditions are true:

* numHrUeConfigured is also decremented by 1 at PsUser\_BearerSetupReq reception (see 5G\_L2\_16141\_replaced([11196592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29EaSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));
* the UL LA of the UE was operating in high relibility mode, before this message;

numUeWithActiveHrLaUl is incremented by 1 if all the following conditions are true:

* numHrUeConfigured is also incremented by 1 at PsUser\_BearerSetupReq reception (see 5G\_L2\_16141\_replaced([11196592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29EaSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));
* The Transform Precoder is disabled for the UE (5G\_UP\_ALG\_3270\_replaced([11140467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krt_UPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

At reception of PsUser\_BearerDeleteReq:

numUeWithActiveHrLaUl is decremented by 1 if all the following conditions are true:

* numHrUeConfigured is also decremented by 1 at PsUser\_BearerDeleteReq reception (see 5G\_L2\_16141\_replaced([11196592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29EaSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));
* the UL LA of the UE was operating in high relibility mode, before this message;

numUeWithActiveHrLaUl is incremented by 1 if all the following conditions are true:

* numHrUeConfigured is also incremented by 1 at PsUser\_BearerDeleteReq reception (see 5G\_L2\_16141\_replaced([11196592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29EaSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

At reception of PsUser\_UserDeleteReq:

numUeWithActiveHrLaUl is decremented by 1 if all the following conditions are true:

* numHrUeConfigured is also decremented by 1 at PsUser\_UserDeleteReq reception (see 5G\_L2\_16141\_replaced([11196592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29EaSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));
* the UL LA of the UE was operating in high relibility mode, before this message;

Internal L2-PS event causing the UL LA to switch from BR to HR (5G\_L2\_13219\_replaced([11163900](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25pS3_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

numUeWithActiveHrLaUl is incremented by 1;

Internal L2-PS event causing the UL LA to switch from HR to BR (5G\_L2\_13219\_replaced([11163900](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25pS3_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

numUeWithActiveHrLaUl is de-cremented by 1;

numUeWithActiveHrLaUl updated as above is accumulated at each slot.

Increment value:

---

#### 2.9.5.8.0-12 Link Adaptation SINR of first PUSCH slot (ID: 11196700)

**2.9.5.8.0-12.0-1**  (ID: `11196704`)

Link Adaptation
Measurement: NR Cell Utilization

NetAct name: AVG\_SINR\_PUSCH\_FIRST\_SLOT

PI ID: M55308CRD54015

Category: R&D

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time: 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter after the feedback (response) to PUSCH reception request (see 5G\_L1\_IF\_183\_replaced([11513708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRyW7_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) targeted for the first UL slot after Special Slot has been received.

Increment value: 5G-L2-PS shall increment the counter with values floor(sinr \* 100) of every Grant with valid feedback. If Grant contains more than one sinr value, each value shall be provided as a separate sample. Note: The unit of the counter remains as dB/100, there is no conversion to the linear scale.

#### 2.9.5.9.0-1 Frame structure configuration Number of slots where one PDCCH symbol is shared with PDSCH (ID: 11196736)

Frame structure configuration
Measurement: NR PDCCH usage

PI ID: M55335C02019

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update the counter when 1 PDCCH symbol is shared with PDSCH in slot. During this process 5G-L2-PS shall increment the counter if one PDCCH symbol is shared with PDSCH.

Increment by 1 when update.

#### 2.9.5.9.0-3 Frame structure configuration Number of received but not decoded valid MSG3 (ID: 11196755)

**2.9.5.9.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11196760`)

Frame structure configuration
Measurement: NRACH

NetAct name: RA\_CBRA\_MSG3\_RECV\_DECODE\_FAIL

PI ID: M55306C10004

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update the counter upon reception of the UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqU (5G\_L1\_IF\_183\_replaced([11513708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRyW7_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with CRC NOK (if no DTX received)/UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqU with DTX for all MSG3 retransmission.

Only for CBRA procedure when 5G-L2-PS creates internally temporary UE context and allocate temporary C-RNTI.

5G-L2-PS shall assume that it was unsuccessful last retransmission of MSG3 if the following condition(s) are met:

1. The transmission was received with CRC=NOK or DTX=dtx (crc and dtx are included in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqU (5G\_L1\_IF\_183\_replaced([11513708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRyW7_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

2. The transmission belongs to the MSG3 process for which the maximum number of the MSG3 retransmission has been reached (maxHarqMsg3Tx, see 5G\_L2\_IF\_3117\_replaced([10966509](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UPCB_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Increment value:

No additional details as compared to NIDD.

---

#### 2.9.5.9.0-4 Frame structure configuration Number of no response from UE for gNB MSG2 (ID: 11196764)

**2.9.5.9.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11196769`)

Frame structure configuration
Measurement: NRACH

NetAct name: RA\_CBRA\_INI\_MSG3\_DTX

PI ID: M55306C10005

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update the counter upon reception of the UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqU (5G\_L1\_IF\_183\_replaced([11513708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRyW7_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) (DTX)  for initial MSG3 transmission.

Only for CBRA procedure when 5G-L2-PS creates internally temporary UE context and allocate temporary C-RNTI.

5G-L2-PS shall assume that it was unsuccessful transmission of MSG3 if the following condition is met:

1. The transmission was received with DTX=dtx in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqU (5G\_L1\_IF\_183\_replaced([11513708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRyW7_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Increment value:

No additional details as compared to NIDD.

---

#### 2.9.5.9.0-5 Frame structure configuration Number of UL grants for MSG3 ReTx (ID: 11196775)

**2.9.5.9.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11196780`)

Frame structure configuration
Measurement: NPRACH

NetAct name: RA\_CBRA\_UL\_GRANT\_MSG3\_RETX

PI ID: M55306C10006

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update the counter upon sending UL grant to UE for MSG3 reTx.

This counter can be updated multiple times in the scope of a single CBRA procedure, when 5G-L2-PS creates internally temporary UE context and allocate temporary C-RNTI.

5G-L2-PS shall send UlData\_PuschReceiveReq with request of MSG3 reTx toward 5G\_L1\_UL .

5G-L2-PS shall send UlData\_PuschReceiveReq with request of MSG3 reTx if the following condition is met:

1. The transmission was received with CRC=NOK or DTX=dtx in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqU (5G\_L1\_IF\_183\_replaced([11513708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRyW7_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Increment value:

No additional details as compared to NIDD.

---

#### 2.9.5.9.0-6 Frame structure configuration Number of UEs with an active BWP with bandwidth less than 40 MHz that are configured with 3-symbol PDCCH (ID: 12790382)

**2.9.5.9.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `12790490`)

Frame structure configuration
Measurement: NR PDCCH usage 2  
NetAct name: NUM\_UE\_ACT\_BWP\_LESS\_40\_3\_PDCCH   
PI ID: M55365C00016  
**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)**.

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a sequence diagram illustrating a process related to User Equipment (UE) configuration in a 5G network. The diagram depicts interactions between different network entities: UE, 5G-L1-UL, 5G-L1\_DL, 5G-L2-PS, and 5G-CP-RT.
The title of the diagram is " ".
The diagram shows the following sequence of events:
1. **5G-L2-PS** sends a `PsCell_CellSetupReq` message to **5G-CP-RT**. This message includes parameters like `actThreeSymbolPdcch='static'` or `actThreeSymbolPdcch='dynamic'`.
2. **5G-CP-RT** responds with `PsUser_UserSetupReq..ueCapability` or `PsUser_UserModifyReq..ueCapability`. These messages indicate the UE's capability, specifically `supportOf3PdcchSymbolsFor20_40MHz="True"`.
3. A message box states "The UEs with active BWPs others than initial BWP".
4. **5G-L1-DL** sends `DIData_PdcochSendReqL1sw(DCI)` or `DIData_PdcochSendReqLoner(DCI)` to **5G-L1-UL**.
5. **5G-L1-DL** also sends `DIData_PdschSendReqL1sw(DCI)` or `DIData_PdschSendReqLoner(DCI)` to **5G-L1-UL**.
6. The **UE** receives a "PDCCH (3 symbols)" and a "PDSCH(TB)".
7. Finally, a counter is incremented, labeled "NUM\_UE\_ACT\_BWP\_LESS\_40\_3\_PDCCH".
The bottom of the image contains a URL: `http://msc-generator.sourceforge.net v6.3.7`.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/12733\_C\_NUM\_UE\_ACT\_BWP\_LESS\_40\_3\_PDCCH.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

**Update time: 5G-L2-PS shall update counter of the number of UEs with an active bandwidth part with a bandwidth of less than 40 MHz that are configured with 3-symbol PDCCH when below conditions are met:**

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq ([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_wZAhEPu3Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) from 5G-CP-RT with
* actThreeSymbolPdcch is set to 'static' or actThreeSymbolPdcch is set to 'dynamic';
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq with ueCapability ([10975032](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_lXXjIPu4Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or PsUser\_UserModifyReq with ueCapability structure:
* supportOf3PdcchSymbolsFor20\_40MHz is set to'True';
* 5G-L2-PS schedules UEs with an active bandwidth part different than the initial BWP and sends:
* DlData\_PdcchSendReqL1sw ([11512562](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Az6S0vvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or DlData\_PdcchSendReqLoner([11512571](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRqbG_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_CqlKNu3yEe-rL47x_rCCmw))
* DlData\_PdschSendReqL1sw ([11512745](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_CqVo9_vwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or DlData\_PdschSendReqLoner([11512761](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_C1cswvvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Increment value: 5G-L2-PS shall increment the counter by each slot with the number of UEs with an active bandwidth part with a bandwidth of less than 40 MHz that are configured with 3-symbol PDCCH.

Link to the file: [12733\_C\_NUM\_UE\_ACT\_BWP\_LESS\_40\_3\_PDCCH.signalling](https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:u:/r/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Drawings%20and%20diagrams%20for%205G/User%20Plane/5G%20L2%20Entity%20Level/2%205G-L2-PS%20Component%20Requirements/2.8%20PM%20Counters/CB012733_C/12733_C_NUM_UE_ACT_BWP_LESS_40_3_PDCCH.signalling?csf=1&web=1&e=jzrR4B)

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a sequence diagram illustrating a process related to the number of UEs with an active Bandwidth Part (BWP) less than 40 MHz. The diagram depicts interactions between several entities: UE, 5G-L1-UL, 5G-L1\_DL, 5G-L2-PS, and 5G-CP-RT.
The diagram starts with a title: "" and a counter name: "".
The sequence of events is as follows:
1. **5G-CP-RT to 5G-L2-PS**: A message `PsCell_CellSetupReq` is sent, with parameters `(actThreeSymbolPdcch='static' or actThreeSymbolPdcch="dynamic"))`.
2. **5G-L2-PS to 5G-L1\_DL**: A message "The UEs with active BWPs others than initial BWP" is shown.
3. **5G-L1\_DL to 5G-L1-UL**: Two messages are sent:
\* `DIData_PdcchSendReqL1sw(DCI) or DIData_PdcchSendReqLoner(DCI)`
\* `DIData_PdschSendReqL1sw(DCI) or DIData_PdschSendReqLoner(DCI)`
4. **5G-L1-UL to UE**: Two messages are sent:
\* `PDCCH`
\* `PDSCH(TB)`
5. **5G-L2-PS**: A box indicates "Increment the counter NUM\_UE\_ACT\_BWP\_LESS\_40".
The diagram also includes a footer with the text "http://msc-generator.sourceforge.net v6.3.7".[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/12733\_C\_NUM\_UE\_ACT\_BWP\_LESS\_40.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

Update time: 5G-L2-PS shall update counter of the number of UEs with an active bandwidth part with a bandwidth of less than 40 MHz when below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq ([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_wZAhEPu3Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) from 5G-CP-RT with
* actThreeSymbolPdcch is set to 'static' or actThreeSymbolPdcch is set to 'dynamic';
* 5G-L2-PS schedules UEs with an active bandwidth part different than the initial BWP and sends:
* DlData\_PdcchSendReqL1sw ([11512562](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Az6S0vvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or DlData\_PdcchSendReqLoner([11512571](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRqbG_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_CqlKNu3yEe-rL47x_rCCmw))
* DlData\_PdschSendReqL1sw ([11512745](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_CqVo9_vwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or DlData\_PdschSendReqLoner([11512761](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_C1cswvvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Increment value:5G-L2-PS shall increment the counter by each slot with the number of UEs with an active bandwidth part with a bandwidth of less than 40 MHz.

Link to the file: [12733\_C\_NUM\_UE\_ACT\_BWP\_LESS\_40.signalling](https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:u:/r/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Drawings%20and%20diagrams%20for%205G/User%20Plane/5G%20L2%20Entity%20Level/2%205G-L2-PS%20Component%20Requirements/2.8%20PM%20Counters/CB012733_C/12733_C_NUM_UE_ACT_BWP_LESS_40.signalling?csf=1&web=1&e=bQ652P)

### 2.9.5.10 Performance Monitoring

#### 2.9.5.10.0-1 Performance Monitoring Number of events taken from monitored queue 0 ... Number of events taken from monitored queue 11 (ID: 11196790)

**2.9.5.10.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11196798`)

Performance Monitoring
Measurement: L2 Performance Monitoring per cell

NetAct name: NUM\_HANDLED\_ENENTS\_QUEUE\_0 ... NUM\_HANDLED\_ENENTS\_QUEUE\_11

PI ID: M55374CRD50001 … M55374CRD50012  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

When rdEmQueuesMonitoring (see 5G\_L2\_16824\_replaced([11189207](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28OFtvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for definition) is enabled for queue L2\_PS should increment matching counter, each time new event from this queue is taken for processing.

Increment value:

Increment by one each tinme event from corresponding queue is taken for ptocessing.

Note: Not recommended to be used in FR2 due to possible preformance impact.

#### 2.9.5.10.0-2 Performance Monitoring Average event delay in monitored queue 0 … Average event delay in monitored queue 11 (ID: 11196801)

**2.9.5.10.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11196805`)

Performance Monitoring
Measurement: L2 Performance Monitoring per cell

NetActName: AVG\_EVENT\_DELAY\_IN\_QUEUE\_0 … AVG\_EVENT\_DELAY\_IN\_QUEUE\_11

PI ID: M55374CRD50013 … M55374CRD50024  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

Reception of dedicated message QueueDelayMonitoringInd which had been earlier sent to the given queue.

Sending QueueDelayMonitoringInd is configured by rdEmQueuesMonitoring (see 5G\_L2\_16824\_replaced([11189207](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28OFtvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for definition) R&D flag.

Increment value:

Number of slots that message QueueDelayMonitoringInd spent in the queue.

Note: Not recommended to be used in FR2 due to possible performance impact.

### 2.9.5.11 NR Latency Counters

#### 2.9.5.11.0-1 NR Latency Counters Average DL Air-Interface delay for RLC SDU (ID: 11196817)

**2.9.5.11.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11196826`)

NR Latency Counters
The average DL Air-Interface delay for RLC SDU is calculated at L2-LO.

L2-PS shall send the DL scheduling HARQ ACK information to L2-LO via HarqStatusUpdateReq message to update the corresponding counter in L2-LO. The counter is based on 3GPP TS 28.552 5.1.3.4.2.

[Before CB013550-C]

For FR1, the message is loCtrl\_Fr1HarqStatusUpdateReq.

For FR2, the message is loCtrl\_Fr2HarqStatusUpdateReq.

HarqStatusUpdateReq message shall be sent to L2-LO per Cell group.

The destination address of HarqStatusUpdateReq message shall be same as loCtrol\_PduMuxReq message.

When each HARQ ACK received on PUCCH or PUCCH over PUSCH, L2-PS shall fill it into HarqStatusUpdateReq message, and send to L2-LO at the beginning of next DL slot trigger event handling to make sure the information already sent to L2-LO before the corresponding HARQ buffer index reused in new DL scheduling. [CB013550-C] For more details about sending HARQ Status, please refer to 5G\_L2\_20535\_replaced([11181238](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27SRmPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [End CB013550-C]

---

#### 2.9.5.11.0-2 NR Latency Counters Average UL over the Air-Interface delay for UL packet (ID: 11196831)

**2.9.5.11.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11196837`)

NR Latency Counters
The average UL over the Air-Interface delay for UL packet is calculated at L2-LO.

L2-PS shall fill the k2 value into UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message and send to L1, L1 will forward this k2 value to L2-LO by UlData\_PuschReceiveRespLo message.

When NIDD actLatencyPmCount is set to off, k2 shall be always filled as 0(value 0 corresponds to invalid case).

In case Configure Grant UE functionality is activated:

For CG scheduling, there's no PDCCH send to UE, k2 shall be always filled as 0(value 0 corresponds to invalid case);

For DG scheduling, the corresponding k2 value shall be filled.

---

### 2.9.5.12 Paging

#### 2.9.5.12.0-1 Paging Number of times fullI-RNTI IE is used as Paging UE-Identity in RRC Paging message (ID: 11196846)

**2.9.5.12.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11196855`)

Paging
Measurement: NR Paging

NetAct name: NRPAG\_RAN\_PAGING\_SUCC\_SENT

PI ID: M55331C00004

NIDD link: <https://nidd-prod1.ext.net.nokia.com/NIDD/Trans/Counter/Details?id=8924027&pId=65523&vId=3.02>

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall increment the counter when Paging message is scheduled for broadcast at 5G-L2-PS.

This counter indicates the total number of UEs paged with UE identity iRnti for RAN paging.

Increment value:

5G-L2-PS shall increment the counter by the total number of UEs with UE identity iRnti for RAN paging.

Note: iRnti is UE identity for RAN paging which define in message PsSgnl\_PcchDataSendReq, see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2546\_replaced([10978576](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VUnKvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[CB012544-D]Note: this counter is also updated for eDRX RAN paging[End CB012544-D]

---

Paging
Measurement: NRPAG

NetAct name: NRPAG\_EDRX\_PAGING\_SUCC\_SENT

PI ID: M55331C00005

Update time:

when Paging is scheduled out, there is eDRX UE in Paging record list. refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11736\_replaced([11167658](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktrHH_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Increment 1 for each eDRX UE, with eDRX CN paging or eDRX RAN paging.

NetAct name: DL\_SU\_MIMO\_1LAYER\_PMQAP ... DL\_SU\_MIMO\_4LAYER\_PMQAP

PI ID: M55356C00008... M55356C00011

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

Post DL FD scheduling.

Increment value:

Increment 1 on relevant counter. See NIDD for range definition of each counter.

[CB015011]

Note: These counters shall be correctly updated when RAT1 feature is activated

[End CB015011]

---

#### 2.9.5.14.0-3 DL SU MIMO Management Number of PRBs for 1 layer Tx for SU MIMO in DL per profile ... Number of PRBs for 4 layer Tx for SU MIMO in DL per profile (ID: 12711508)

**2.9.5.14.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `12711509`)

DL SU MIMO Management
Measurement: UE statistics per NRPMQAP

NetAct name: PRB\_DL\_SU\_MIMO\_1LAYER\_PMQAP ... PRB\_DL\_SU\_MIMO\_4LAYER\_PMQAP

PI ID: M55356C00042 ... M55356C00045

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

Post DL FD scheduling.

L2PS shall calculate and sum all of the PRBs distributed on each DRB(s) based on the data amount for related DRB(s) per slot, may to get a float number of PRBs, then convert float number to integer number:

IF (number of PRBs > 0) AND (number of PRBs < 1)

numberOfPRBs = 1

ELSE

numberOfPRBs = ROUND(number of PRBs)

END

Increment value:

Increment numberOfPRBs on relevant counter per slot. See NIDD for range definition of each counter.

Note: These counters shall be correctly updated for both RAT0 and RAT1.

---

### 2.9.5.16 UE angular distributions

#### 2.9.5.16.0-1 UE angular distributions DOA of the best DFT DL beam 1 ... DOA of the best DFT DL beam 120 (ID: 11197018)

**2.9.5.16.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `13343582`)

UE angular distributions
Measurement: NR UE Angular Distributions

NetAct name: DFT\_DL\_BESTBEAM\_DOA\_1 ... DFT\_DL\_BESTBEAM\_DOA\_120

PI ID: M55372C00001... M55372C00120

Note: 1,  PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[CB008577-D]

2,  When FDD Beamforming is enabled (NRCELL/actBeamforming = True and NRCELL.cellTechnology is equal to 'FDD'), the counter is updated when a UE is scheduled in DL with PMI beam. [CB008577-E] And if beam parameter is online changed, the DoA mapping shall always be based on pmiBeamDoA in the latest PsCell\_CellSsbRefinePmiBeamDoaInd.[End CB008577-E]

[End CB008577-D]

Update time:

Post DL FD scheduling

Increment value:

Increment 1 on relevant counter. See NIDD for range definition of each counter.

Note: For the Zenith angle (V), the value range from CP is [-90°, 90°], as referred to in 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_5955\_replaced([11296085](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqFesPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). To align with the counter's definition, the value shall add +90°.

### 2.9.5.17 Random Access Procedure

#### 2.9.5.17.0-1 Random Access Procedure Number of CFRA setup attempts for dedicated preambles corresponding to SSB beam (ID: 11197031)

**2.9.5.17.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `13358876`)

Random Access Procedure
Measurement: NR SSB Level Measurement

NetAct name: CFRA\_ATT\_DED\_PRMBL\_SSBPM

PI ID: M55202C00001

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

Update every time when a CFRA preamble for a SSB beam is received with valid UE content. [CB008577-D] For FDD cell with actBeamforming = true and one SSB, whether the CFRA preamble is detected with actPrachProbing = TRUE or FALSE, count the preamble on SSB 0 and each preamble count 1 when it is received.[End CB008577-D]

Increment value:

Increment by 1 every time when condition occur, applicable to both initial CFRA setup attempt or re-attempt due to failure.

Counter valid for FR1 and FR2, and both SA and NSA.

---

Measurement: NR SSB Level Measurement

NetAct name: CFRA\_COMP\_SSBPM

Update time:

Update every time when a CFRA setup attempt for a SSB beam is completed successfully.

Increment value:

Increment by 1 every time when condition occur, applicable to both initial CFRA setup attempt or re-attempt due to failure.

Counter valid for FR1 and FR2, and both SA and NSA.

---

#### 2.9.5.17.0-5 Random Access Procedure Number of CBRA initial Msg3 DTX corresponding to SSB beam (ID: 11197073)

#### 2.9.5.17.0-11 Random Access Procedure Average received preamble power per SSB (ID: 11197121)

**2.9.5.17.0-11.0-2**  (ID: `12693541`)

Random Access Procedure
Measurement: NR SSB Level Measurement

NetAct name: AVG\_RX\_PREAMBLE\_POWER\_SSB

PI ID: [Before CB008178] M55202CRD50001 [CB008178] M55202C00006 [END CB008178]

Category: [Before CB008178] R&D [CB008178] Customer [END CB008178]

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update the SSBPM aggregation level counter when the preamble is received in UlData\_PrachReceiveInd on a specific SSB beam

Increment value:

5G-L2-PS shall increment the counter with the value floor(10*log10(*peakMetric)*100).*

For peakMetric see [11514309: UlData\_PrachReceiveInd message content:](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR2oWvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)

This PM counter is nullable, see 5G\_L2\_14919\_replaced([11192212](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iO1PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

#### 2.9.5.17.0-12 Random Access Procedure Initial and retransmission volume on PDSCH per SSB (ID: 12693556)

**2.9.5.17.0-12.0-1**  (ID: `12693738`)

Random Access Procedure
Measurement: NR SSB Level Measurement

NetAct name: PDSCH\_INIRE\_VOL\_SSB

PI ID: M55202C00007

Category: Customer

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall the increment counter with the number of bytes of transport blocks scheduled for initial transmission or retransmission while sending PDSCH per SSB Beam when DL grant is for initTx or reTx is sent on PDCCH.

Note: The counter is updated for both FR1 and FR2.

Increment value:

TBS Size as sent in DlData\_PdschPayloadTbSendReq.

---

#### 2.9.5.17.0-13 Random Access Procedure Initial and retransmission volume on PUSCH per SSB (ID: 12693558)

**2.9.5.17.0-13.0-1**  (ID: `12693740`)

Random Access Procedure
Measurement: NR SSB Level Measurement

NetAct name: PUSCH\_INIRE\_VOL\_SSB

PI ID: M55202C00008

Category: Customer

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall the increment counter with the number of bytes of transport blocks when control message (SRB data, RA msg3 ini/reTx) is scheduled over PUSCH. RA Msg1 which is sent over PRACH is excluded.

Note: The counter is updated for both FR1 and FR2.

Increment value:

TBS Size as received in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs

---

#### 2.9.5.17.0-14 Random Access Procedure Received preamble power on PRACH Level 1... Received preamble power on PRACH Level44 (ID: 12693542)

**2.9.5.17.0-14.0-1**  (ID: `12693742`)

Random Access Procedure
Measurement: NR UL Signal Quality Level 2

NetAct name: RX\_PREAMBLE\_PWR\_PRACH\_LEVEL\_01..44

PI ID: M55340C00026...M55340C00069

Category: Customer

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update the counter when the UlData\_PrachReceiveInd is received, peakMetric Value is converted to dBm and counter for corresponding BIN is updated.

The counter is updated for all the detected preambles when the received preamble power on PRACH falls as per below levels.  
(2dB levels:  
level 1 < = -114dBm;  
-114dbm < level 2 < = -112 dBm  
-112dBm < level 3 < = -110dBm;  
-110dBm < level 4 < = -108dBm;  
.;  
-30dBm < level 44)

Note: -140dBm shall be considered as invalid and counter shall NOT be updated.

Increment value:

5G-L2-PS shall increment the counter by 1 as per the converted dBm value.

---

#### 2.9.5.17.0-15 Random Access Procedure Average noise for PRACH slot when no preamble is detected (ID: 11197129)

**2.9.5.17.0-15.0-1**  (ID: `11197133`)

Random Access Procedure
Measurement: NR UL Received Interference Power

NetAct name: AVG\_PRACH\_NOISE\_NO\_PREAMB

PI ID: M55360CRD50001

Category: R&D

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update the counter when the UlData\_PrachReceiveInd is received with no preambles for the subcell.

Increment value:

5G-L2-PS shall increment the counter with the value floor(noisePower\*100).

This PM counter is nullable, see 5G\_L2\_14919\_replaced([11192212](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iO1PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

### 2.9.5.18 Recommended Bit Rate

#### 2.9.5.18.0-1 Recommended Bit Rate Number of downlink RBR recommendation responses for VoNR or ViNR (ID: 12875270)

**2.9.5.18.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12875272`)

Recommended Bit Rate
Measurement: Number of downlink RBR recommendation responses for VoNR or ViNR

NetAct name: NR\_RBR\_VONR\_VINR\_RESPONSE\_DL

PI ID: M55301C00096

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_5KBG5p5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA).

Update time: L2-PS increase counter when sending request to L2-LO to send recomended bit rate MAC CE (LCID value set to 47) for DL direction, which is reply to query received from UE.

Increment value: Incremented by one per each bit rate recommendation message.

Update time: L2-PS increase counter when sending request to L2-LO to send recomended bit rate MAC CE (LCID value set to 47) for UL direction, which is reply to query received from UE.

#### 2.9.5.18.0-3 Recommended Bit Rate Number of unsolicited uplink RBR recommendations for VoNR or ViNR (ID: 12876249)

PI ID: M55301C00071

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_5KBG5p5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA).

Update time: L2-PS increase counter when sending request to L2-LO to send recomended bit rate MAC CE (LCID value set to 47) for UL direction, which is unsolicited bit rate message, not reply to UE query.

### 2.9.5.19 Uplink Time Alignment Control

#### 2.9.5.19.0-1 Uplink Time Alignment Control Number of RAR Timing Advance per bin (ID: 13478078)

**2.9.5.19.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13478305`)

Uplink Time Alignment Control
Measurement: NR Timing Advance

NetAct name: TA\_RACH\_RESP\_BIN\_01 .. TA\_RACH\_RESP\_BIN\_32

PI ID: M55307C01001 .. M55307C01032

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_nXESkPvPEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update this set of counters only in PCell (specifically - pTag), in two situations:

1. on Random Access Response for CFRA
2. on MSG 3 reception for CBRA (not to takie into account ghost preambles)

Specific counter (i.e. TA\_RACH\_RESP\_BIN\_07, M55307C01007) shall be udpated if Timing Advance for UE falls within range of specific bin (indexed same as counter). Bins and ranges of TA they support are described at [11170092](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_o9VXtvvNEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

Increment value:

Counter shall be incremented by 1 for each RAR TAC sent for any UE in subcell.

Note:

1. This set of counters is incremented based only on initial TA. Later, cumulative TA is raported via TA\_RRC\_CON\_BIN\_01 .. TA\_RRC\_CON\_BIN\_32 (M55307C02001 .. M55307C02032)

---

#### 2.9.5.19.0-2 Uplink Time Alignment Control Number of Timing Advance per bin (ID: 13478335)

**2.9.5.19.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `13478336`)

Uplink Time Alignment Control
Measurement: NR Timing Advance

NetAct name: TA\_RRC\_CON\_BIN\_01 .. TA\_RRC\_CON\_BIN\_32

PI ID: M55307C02001 .. M55307C02032

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_nXESkPvPEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update this set of counters only in PCell (specifically - pTag) when acknowledgement for sent Timing Advance Command ([11150376](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_DfiV8PvMEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) was received.

Specific counter (i.e. TA\_RRC\_CON\_BIN\_07, M55307C02007) shall be udpated if Timing Advance for UE falls within range of specific bin (indexed same as counter). Bins and ranges of TA they support are described at [11170092](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_o9VXtvvNEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). Timing Advance taken into consideration is cumulative value described in [11150417](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_DsudYPvMEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

Increment value:

Counter shall be incremented by 1 for each TAC acknowledged for any UE in subcell.

Note:

1. This set of counters is incremented based only on cumulative TA. Initial TA is reporetd TA\_RACH\_RESP\_BIN\_01 .. TA\_RACH\_RESP\_BIN\_32 (M55307C01001 .. M55307C01032)

---

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Measurement: NR UL HARQ 1

NetAct name: PUSCH\_INI\_TX\_DFT\_R16\_DMRS

PI ID: M55370C00034

Update time:

L2-PS shall update the counter upon reception of UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message (5G\_L1\_IF\_200\_replaced([11513831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for every inital transmission with Rel16 DMRS sequence ('dmrsSequenceType' is set to "type2") when actUlTxSkip is set to "false".

Increment by 1 when update.

L2-PS shall update the counter upon reception of UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message (5G\_L1\_IF\_200\_replaced([11513831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for every  transmission with Rel16 DMRS sequence ('dmrsSequenceType' is set to "type2") and crc is set to "OK".

**2.9.6.1.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `12583715`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Successful PUSCH transmissions by any Tx with CP-OFDM and 256QAM MCS table using MCS00 ...31

---

**2.9.6.1.0-1.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `12583716`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Measurement: NR UL HARQ  
NetAct name: PUSCH\_CP\_SUCC\_ANY\_256TBL\_MCS00 ... PUSCH\_CP\_SUCC\_ANY\_256TBL\_MCS31  
PI ID: M55302C14000 ... M55302C14031  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9): PM Counter Search in NIDD.

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when PUSCH for both initial and retransmitted packets with CP-OFDM 256 QAM modulation scheme is successfully received when all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE crc=OK indicated in ([11200624](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgNwQPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarq from 5G-L1-UL ([11513893](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlDvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* 5G-L2-PS sets CP-OFDM indicated in:
* IE puschTransformPrecoderFlag=0 (disable) in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschPrecodingConfig ([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PuschConfig structure ([10975648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VCTQPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)):
* IE mcsTable=1: 256QAM MCS table
* 5G-L2-PS allocates SAg Repetition = 1X

Increment value: The sum of PUSCH CRC-OK detections with 256QAM modulation scheme.

Note:

Msg3 ini / reTx transmissions shall be excluded from this counter. All relevant transmissions after msg3 are counted (regardless of using fixed MCS or not) until UE deletion.

---

**2.9.6.1.0-1.0-6**  (ID: `12583725`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Successful PUSCH transmissions by any transmission with CP-OFDM and 64QAM MCS table using MCS 0 ... 31

---

**2.9.6.1.0-1.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `12583726`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Measurement: NR UL HARQ  
NetAct name: PUSCH\_CP\_SUCC\_ANY\_64TBL\_MCS\_00 ... PUSCH\_CP\_SUCC\_ANY\_64TBL\_MCS\_31  
PI ID: M55302C05000 ... M55302C050031      
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9): PM Counter Search in NIDD.

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when PUSCH for both initial **and retransmitted packets with 64QAM modulation scheme is successfully received when all below conditions are met:**

* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE crc=OK indicated in ([11200624](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgNwQPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqUL from 5G-L1-UL
* 5G-L2-PS sets CP-OFDM indicated in:
* IE puschTransformPrecoderFlag=0 (disable) in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschPrecodingConfig ([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PuschConfig structure ([10975648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VCTQPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)):
* IE mcsTable=0: 64QAM
* 5G-L2-PS allocates SAg Repetition = 1X

**Increment value: The sum of PUSCH CRC-OK detections with 64QAM modulation scheme.**

---

**2.9.6.1.0-1.0-7**  (ID: `12583727`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Unsuccessful PUSCH transmissions by last HARQ reTx with CP-OFDM and 256QAM MCS table using MCS00 ... 31

---

**2.9.6.1.0-1.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `12583728`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Measurement: NR UL HARQ  
NetAct name: PUSCH\_CP\_UNSUCC\_256TBL\_MCS\_00 ... PUSCH\_CP\_UNSUCC\_256TBL\_MCS\_31      
PI ID: M55302C12000 ... M55302C12031      
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9): PM Counter Search in NIDD.

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when PUSCH isn't successfully decoded for the final HARQ transmissions with 256QAM modulation scheme when all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS sets CP-OFDM indicated in:
* IE puschTransformPrecoderFlag=0 (disable) in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschPrecodingConfig ([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PuschConfig structure ([10975648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VCTQPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)):
* IE mcsTable=1: 256QAM MCS table
* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant
* IE crc=NOK indicated in ([11200624](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgNwQPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarq from 5G-L1-UL ([11513893](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlDvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) AND
* IE maxUlHarqTx is reached indicated in PsCell\_CellGroupSetupReq ([10966509](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UPCB_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) OR PsCell\_CellGroupReconfigReq ([10966782](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UQQMfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), where maxUlHarqTx >1
* 5G-L2-PS allocates SAg Repetition = 1X

Increment value: The sum of Unsuccessful last retransmissions on PUSCH with 256QAM modulation scheme.

Note:

Msg3 ini / reTx transmissions shall be excluded from this counter. All relevant transmissions after msg3 are counted (regardless of using fixed MCS or not) until UE deletion.

---

**2.9.6.1.0-1.0-8**  (ID: `12583729`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Unsuccessful PUSCH transmissions by last HARQ reTx with CP-OFDM and 64QAM MCS table using MCS 0 ... 31

---

**2.9.6.1.0-1.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `12583730`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Measurement: NR UL HARQ  
NetAct name: PUSCH\_CP\_UNSUCC\_64TBL\_MCS\_00 ... PUSCH\_CP\_UNSUCC\_64TBL\_MCS\_31      
PI ID: M55302C03000 ... M55302C03031      
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9): PM Counter Search in NIDD.

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when PUSCH isn't successfully decoded for the final HARQ transmissions with 64QAM modulation scheme when all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS sets CP OFDM indicated in:
* IE puschTransformPrecoderFlag=0 (disable) in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschPrecodingConfig ([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant
* IE crc=NOK indicated in ([11200624](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgNwQPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarq from 5G-L1-UL ([11513893](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlDvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) AND
* IE maxUlHarqTx is reached indicated in PsCell\_CellGroupSetupReq ([10966509](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UPCB_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) **OR PsCell\_CellGroupReconfigReq ([10966782](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UQQMfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), where maxUlHarqTx >1**
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PuschConfig structure ([10975648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VCTQPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)):
* IE mcsTable=2: 64QAM MSC table is used for PUSCH
* 5G-L2-PS allocates SAg Repetition = 1X.

**Increment value: The sum of Unsuccessful last retransmissions on PUSCH with 64QAM modulation scheme.**

---

**2.9.6.1.0-1.0-9**  (ID: `12583731`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Successful PUSCH transmissions by any Tx with DFT-s-OFDM and 64QAM table for slot agg rep2

---

**2.9.6.1.0-1.0-9.0-1**  (ID: `12583732`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Measurement: NR UL HARQ  
NetAct name: PUSCH\_DFT\_SUC\_ANY\_64TBL\_SAG\_R2  
PI ID: M55370C00010  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9): PM Counter Search in NIDD.

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when PUSCH for both initial **and retransmitted packets with 64QAM modulation scheme is successfully received when all below conditions are met:**

* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE crc=OK indicated in ([11200624](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgNwQPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqU from 5G-L1-UL ([11513903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlEPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* 5G-L2-PS sets DFTs OFDM indicated in IE puschTransformPrecoderFlag=1 (enable) in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschPrecodingConfig (5G\_L1\_IF\_195\_replaced([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PuschConfig structure ([10975648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VCTQPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)):
* IE mcsTable=0: 64QAM
* 5G-L2-PS allocates SAg Repetition = 2X.

**Increment value: The sum of PUSCH CRC-OK detections made for any transmission attempt over PUSCH in DFT 64 QAM modulation scheme.**

Note:

Only relevant transmissions after msg3 are counted until UE deletion (regardless of whether fixed MCS is used or not).  
Successful transmission is counted only once for a transmission bundle. Slot repetition within this bundle isn't counted.

---

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when PUSCH for both initial **and retransmitted packets with 64QAM modulation scheme is successfully received when all below conditions are met:**

* 5G-L2-PS sets DFTs OFDM indicated in IE puschTransformPrecoderFlag=1 (enable) in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschPrecodingConfig (5G\_L1\_IF\_195\_replaced([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Measurement: NR UL HARQ  
NetAct name: PUSCH\_DFT\_UNSUC\_64TBL\_SAG\_R2                                                                        
PI ID: M55370C00008          
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9): PM Counter Search in NIDD.

Update time: 5G-L2-PS shall update counter when PUSCH isn't successfully decoded for the final HARQ transmissions with 64QAM modulation scheme when all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PuschConfig structure ([10975648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VCTQPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)):
* IE mcsTable=0: 64QAM
* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant
* IE crc=NOK indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarq from 5G-L1-UL ([11513903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlEPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) AND
* IE maxUlHarqTx is reached indicated in PsCell\_CellGroupSetupReq ([10966509](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UPCB_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) OR PsCell\_CellGroupReconfigReq ([10966782](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UQQMfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), where maxUlHarqTx >1.
* 5G-L2-PS sets DFTs OFDM indicated in:
* IE puschTransformPrecoderFlag=1 (enable) in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschPrecodingConfig ([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* 5G-L2-PS allocates SAg Repetition = 1X.

**Increment value: The sum of unsuccessful last retransmissions on PUSCH in DFT 64 QAM modulation scheme.**

Note:

Only relevant transmissions after msg3 are counted until UE deletion (regardless of whether fixed MCS is used or not).

---

---

**2.9.6.1.0-1.0-15.0-1**  (ID: `12686897`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Measurement: NR UL HARQ  
NetAct name: PUSCH\_INI\_TX, PUSCH\_2ND\_TX .. PUSCH\_8TH\_TX, PUSCH\_UNSUCC\_LAST\_RETX\_DTX, PUSCH\_UNSUCC\_LAST\_RETX  
PI ID: M55370C00051 .. M55370C00060  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143:](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_nXESkPvPEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) PM Counter Search in NIDD.

Update time: Whenever L2-PS receives the following message: UlData::PuschReceiveRespHarqU, L2-PS shall check whether the counters are enabled for the given DRB profile, and if so, L2-PS shall update those counters (see structure definiton in: actNrPuschTxDistCounters ([12677076](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_qcFGEkw8EfC0Ye3M8ARUWQ))).

Increment value:

The PUSCH\_INI\_TX counter shall be incremented in the case of an initial transmission.

The corresponding PUSCH\_2TH\_TX to PUSCH\_8TH\_TX counters shall be incremented for the 2nd to 8th retransmissions.

The PUSCH\_UNSUCC\_LAST\_RETX\_DTX counter shall be incremented if all retransmissions, including the last one, ended in DTX.

The PUSCH\_UNSUCC\_LAST\_RETX counter shall be incremented in case the last retransmission results in either DTX or NACK.

---

#### 2.9.6.1.0-2 Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH) NR MAC PDU throughput (ID: 12583533)

**2.9.6.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12583683`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Initial and retransmission volume on PUSCH with CP-OFDM and 64QAM MCS table using MCS 0 ... 28

---

**2.9.6.1.0-2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12583684`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Measurement: NR MAC PDU throughput  
NetAct name: PUSCH\_CP\_INIRE\_VOL\_64TBL\_MCS00 ... PUSCH\_CP\_INIRE\_VOL\_64TBL\_MCS31  
PI ID: M55304C04000 ... M55304C04031  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9): PM Counter Search in NIDD.

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counters when transport blocks are scheduled for initial transmission **or retransmission of DRB on PUSCH with CP-OFDM and 64QAM MCS table when all below conditions are met:**

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PuschConfig structure ([10975648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VCTQPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)): IE mcsTable=0: 64QAM
* 5G-L2-PS sets CP-OFDM indicated in IE puschTransformPrecoderFlag=0 (disable) in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschPrecodingConfig ([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

**Increment value: The number of bytes on transport blocks scheduled for initial transmission or retransmission on PUSCH in CP-OFDM 64QAM modulation scheme.**

Note:

This counter is also updated when control message (SRB data, RA msg3 ini/reTx) is scheduled over PUSCH. RA Msg1 which is sent over PRACH is excluded.

This measurement shall NOT count data from actually received UL MAC PDU.

---

**2.9.6.1.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `12583685`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Initial and retransmission volume on PUSCH with CP-OFDM and 256QAM MCS table using MCS00 ... 27

---

**2.9.6.1.0-2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12583686`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Measurement: NR MAC PDU throughput  
NetAct name: PUSCH\_CP\_INRE\_VOL\_256TBL\_MCS00 ... PUSCH\_CP\_INRE\_VOL\_256TBL\_MCS31  
PI ID: M55304C10000 ... M55304C10031  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9): PM Counter Search in NIDD.

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counters when transport blocks are scheduled for initial transmission or retransmission of DRB on PUSCH with CP-OFDM and 256QAM MCS table when all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PuschConfig structure ([10975648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VCTQPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)):
* IE mcsTable=1: 256QAM MCS table
* 5G-L2-PS sets CP-OFDM indicated in:
* IE puschTransformPrecoderFlag=0 (disable) in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschPrecodingConfig ([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

**Increment value: The number of bytes on transport blocks scheduled for initial or retransmission on PUSCH regardless of whether it is in transient phase in CP-OFDM 256QAM modulation scheme.**

Note:

When reTx is allocated for PUSCH with CP-OFDM and 256QAM MCS table (i.e. this measurement shall NOT count data from actually received UL MAC PDU).

There is need to send UL grant for this PUSCH, counter shall be incremented only if corresponding PDCCH can be actually sent.

---

**2.9.6.1.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `12583687`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Initial and retransmission volume on PUSCH with DFT-s-OFDM and 64QAM MCS table using MCS00 ... 27

---

**2.9.6.1.0-2.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `12583688`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Measurement: NR MAC PDU throughput  
NetAct name: PUSCH\_DFT\_INRE\_VOL\_64TBL\_MCS00 ... PUSCH\_DFT\_INRE\_VOL\_64TBL\_MCS31  
PI ID: M55304C08000  ... M55304C08031  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9): PM Counter Search in NIDD.

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counters when transport blocks are scheduled for initial transmission or retransmission of DRB on PUSCH with DFTs OFDM and 64QAM MCS table when all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS sets DFTs OFDM indicated in IE puschTransformPrecoderFlag=1 (enable) in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschPrecodingConfig (5G\_L1\_IF\_195\_replaced([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PuschConfig structure ([10975648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VCTQPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)):
* IE mcsTable=0: 64QAM

**Increment value: The number of bytes on transport blocks scheduled for initial or retransmission on PUSCH regardless of whether it is in transient phase in DFT 64QAM modulation scheme.**

Note:  
1. When UL grant needs to be sent for this PUSCH, this counter is incremented only if the corresponding PDCCH with UL grant is actually sent to the UE.  
2. When PDCCH for UL grant for the PUSCH is actually sent, even if the gNB doesn't receive UL data on PUSCH, this counter is incremented.  
3. When UL PUSCH slot aggregation feature is enabled, the volume of initial or retransmission bundles with repetition 2x or 4x shall not be counted.

---

#### 2.9.6.1.0-3 Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH) NR Signal Quality Level LowSE MCS Table (ID: 12583546)

PUSCH transmissions in Rank1 with CP-OFDM and LowSE MCS table using MCS 00 ... 31

**2.9.6.1.0-3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12583709`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Measurement: NR Signal Quality Level LowSE MCS Table  
NetAct name: PUSCH\_CP\_RANK1\_LOWSE\_MCS\_00 ... PUSCH\_CP\_RANK1\_LOWSE\_MCS\_31  
PI ID: M55368C04000 ... M55368C04031  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9): PM Counter Search in NIDD.

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when a UL transmission using Rank1 and SingleTx is transmitted on PUSCH when all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant:
* IE numOfLayers=1 indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschDecoderConfig  from 5G-L1-UL (([11513795](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9_vvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) AND
* IE spatialMode=singleAntenna OR spatialMode = clSpatialMux indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq send to 5G-L1-UL (([11513774](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-vvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* 5G-L2-PS sets CP-OFDM indicated in:
* IE puschTransformPrecoderFlag=0 (disable) in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschPrecodingConfig ([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PuschConfig structure ([10975648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VCTQPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)):
* IE mcsTable=2: 64QAM LowSE MCA table is used for PUSCH

**Increment value: The MCS distribution of UL data transmissions in Rank1 or SingleTx over PUSCH with CP-OFDM and LowSE MCS table.**

---

Measurement: NR Signal Quality Level LowSE MCS Table

#### 2.9.6.1.0-4 Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH) NR UL HARQ LowSE MCS Table (ID: 12583549)

**2.9.6.1.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `12583657`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Successful PUSCH transmissions by any transmission with CP-OFDM and LowSE MCS table using MCS 00 ... 31

---

**2.9.6.1.0-4.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12583658`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Measurement:  NR UL HARQ LowSE MCS Table  
NetAct name: PUSCH\_CP\_SUCC\_ANY\_LOWSE\_MCS\_00 ... PUSCH\_CP\_SUCC\_ANY\_LOWSE\_MCS\_31  
PI ID: M55367C03000 ... M55367C03031  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9): PM Counter Search in NIDD.

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when PUSCH for both initial **and retransmitted packets with 64QAM LowSE modulation scheme is successfully received when all below conditions are met:**

* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE crc=OK indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqUl from 5G-L1-UL (([11513903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlEPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PuschConfig structure ([10975648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VCTQPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)):
* IE mcsTable=2: 64QAM LowSE MCA table is used for PUSCH
* 5G-L2-PS sets CP OFDM indicated in:
* IE puschTransformPrecoderFlag=0 (disable) in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschPrecodingConfig ([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* 5G-L2-PS allocates SAg Repetition = 1X.

**Increment value: The sum of PUSCH CRC-OK detections made for any transmission attempt over PUSCH in CP OFDM 64QAM LowSE modulation scheme**

---

* IE mcsTable=2: 64QAM LowSE MCA table is used for PUSCH
* 5G-L2-PS allocates SAg Repetition = 1X
* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE crc=NOK indicated in ([11200624](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgNwQPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarq from 5G-L1-UL ([11513893](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlDvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

**AND**

* IE maxUlHarqTx is reached indicated in PsCell\_CellGroupSetupReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_3117\_replaced([10966509](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UPCB_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **OR PsCell\_CellGroupReconfigReq ([10966782](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UQQMfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), where maxUlHarqTx >1.**

**Increment value: The sum of unsuccessful last retransmissions on PUSCH in CP OFDM 64QAM LowSE modulation scheme.**

**2.9.6.1.0-5.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12583628`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Measurement: NR UL Signal Quality Level  
NetAct name: PUSCH\_CP\_RANK1\_256TBL\_MCS\_00 ... PUSCH\_CP\_RANK1\_256TBL\_MCS\_31      
PI ID: M55303C22000 ... M55303C22031      
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9): PM Counter Search in NIDD.

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when a UL transmission using Rank1 and**SingleTx is transmitted on PUSCH when all below conditions are met:**

* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant:
* IE numOfLayers=1 indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschDecoderConfig  from 5G-L1-UL ([11513795](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9_vvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) AND

if 5G-L2-PS set per grant:

* IE spatialMode=singleAntenna OR clSpatialMux indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq send to 5G-L1-UL ([11513774](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-vvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* 5G-L2-PS sets CP-OFDM indicated in:
* IE puschTransformPrecoderFlag=0 (disable) in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschPrecodingConfig ([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PuschConfig structure ([10975648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VCTQPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)):
* IE mcsTable=1: 256QAM MCS table

**Increment value: The MCS distribution including MCS00 of UL data transmissions in Rank1 { or SingleTx } over PUSCH with CP-OFDM and 256QAM MCS table.**

**2.9.6.1.0-5.0-5.0-2**  (ID: `12656218`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Measurement:   
NetAct name: PUSCH\_DFT\_RANK1\_PMI\_00 ... PUSCH\_DFT\_RANK1\_PMI\_05  
PI ID: M55303C21000 ... M55303C21005   
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9): PM Counter Search in NIDD.

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when a UL initial transmission or retransmission [PR836065] **or** SingleTx [End PR836065] using Rank1 is transmitted on PUSCH with DFT-s-OFDM when all below conditions are met:\*\*\*\*

* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant
* IE numOfLayers=1 indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschDecoderConfig  from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_198\_replaced([11513795](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9_vvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

[PR836065] **OR**

if 5G-L2-PS set per grant

IE spatialMode=0 (single\_antenna) indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq send to 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_194\_replaced([11513774](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-vvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

[End PR836065]

* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE crc=OK indicated in (5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_561\_replaced([11200624](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgNwQPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqULoner from 5G-L1-UL for Loner (5G\_L1\_IF\_15531\_replaced([11513903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlEPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **OR**
* UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqUL1sw from 5G-L1-UL for all other platforms (5G\_L1\_IF\_15532\_replaced([11513893](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlDvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* 5G-L2-PS sets DFTs OFDM indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs.puschRankPmiStruct from 5G-L1\_UL ([11513848](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlA_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* 5G-L2-PS sets PMIx asa IE codebookIndex={0,1,2,3,4,5} indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschPrecodingConfig ([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))

**Increment value: 1**

---

**2.9.6.1.0-5.0-6.0-2**  (ID: `12526770`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Measurement: NR UL Signal Quality Level  
NetAct name: UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_R1\_LEVEL\_01 ... UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_R1\_LEVEL\_25      
PI ID: M55303C05001 ... M55303C05025  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ): PM Counter Search in NIDD.

Update time:

5G-L2-PS recieves:

* dtx=nonDTX and sinr in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespP which are received by L2-PS from 5G-L1\_UL **AND**
* IE numOfLayers=1 indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschDecoderConfig  from 5G-L1-UL ([11513795](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9_vvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) **OR**
* IE spatialMode=0 (single\_antenna) indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq send to 5G-L1-UL ([11513774](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-vvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

then 5G-L2-PS shall keep sinr value and 5G-L2-PS shall increment the below SINR counters:

* UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_R1\_LEVEL\_01  when: SINR value < -8dB
* UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_R1\_LEVEL\_02  when: -8dB<= SINR value <=  -6dB
* ...
* UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_R1\_LEVEL\_25 when: 38dB < SINR

[CB009543-A] These counters are also updated for FDD supercell. No change in the method of update. [CB009543-A]

Increment value: 1

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
UL RSSI (Received Signal Strength Indication) and SINR (Signal to Interference plus Noise Ratio)
