**2.9.6.1.0-6.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11197191`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Received UE related RSSI for PUSCH BIN 01 ...

Received UE related RSSI for PUSCH BIN 04

---

**2.9.6.1.0-6.0-1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11197198`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Measurement: Radio Quality NRPMQAP

NetAct name : UE\_RSSI\_PUSCH\_BIN\_1\_PMQAP ... UE\_RSSI\_PUSCH\_BIN\_4\_PMQAP

PI ID : M55386C00001 ...M55386C00004

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a diagram illustrating the NR PMQAP counters of UL RSSI. It depicts a sequence of interactions between three entities: 5G-L1-UL, 5G-L2-PS, and 5G-CP-RT.
The diagram starts with a box labeled "Invalid or out of range (5G\_L1\_IF\_201):" which contains two bullet points:
- "Value -140dBm shall be considered as invalid and counter shall NOT be updated."
- "If RSSI=0 value is coming then this is NOT a valid value and 5G-L2-LO shall discard it."
An arrow originates from 5G-L1-UL and points to 5G-L2-PS, labeled "UIData\_PuschReceiveRespP dtx=nonDTX -rssi".
5G-L2-PS then has a box labeled "Keep Rssi value".
An arrow originates from 5G-L2-PS and points to 5G-CP-RT, labeled "PsCell\_CellSetupReq OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq".
Following this, there are three lines of text associated with the interaction with 5G-CP-RT:
- "actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE"
- "actRadioQualityMeasCount = RSSI"
- "puschRssiBinMinThresh"
- "puschRssiBinMaxThresh"
Finally, there is a box below these lines labeled "Increment the below RSSI counters:" with two lines of text:
- "UE\_RSSI\_PUSCH\_BIN\_01\_PMQAP"
- "UE\_RSSI\_PUSCH\_BIN\_04\_PMQAP"[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_9169.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

Update time:

5G-L2-PS recieves:

* dtx=nonDTX and rssi in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespP which are received by L2-PS from 5G-L1\_UL AND

then 5G-L2-PS shall keep rssi value.

5G-L2-PS recieves:

* in PsCell\_CellSetupReq OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq which is received by L2-PS from 5G-CP-RT (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE AND
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID AND
* actRadioQualityMeasCount = RSSI AND
* puschRssiBinMinThresh AND
* puschRssiBinMaxThresh

then 5G-L2-PS shall increment the below RSSI counters:

* UE\_RSSI\_PUSCH\_BIN\_01\_PMQAP when: RSSI value <= puschRssiBinMinThresh
* UE\_RSSI\_PUSCH\_BIN\_02\_PMQAP when: (puschRssiBinMinThresh) < RSSI value <= (puschRssiBinMinThresh)+(puschRssiBinMaxThresh - puschRssiBinMinThresh)/2
* UE\_RSSI\_PUSCH\_BIN\_03\_PMQAP when: (puschRssiBinMinThresh)+(puschRssiBinMaxThresh - puschRssiBinMinThresh)/2 > RSSI value <= (puschRssiBinMaxThresh)
* UE\_RSSI\_PUSCH\_BIN\_04\_PMQAP when: RSSI value > puschRssiBinMaxThresh

Increment value:

No additional details as compared to NIDD

Note :

1. Counters are based on legacy M55303C07001 UE\_RSSI\_PUSCH\_LEVEL\_01 to M55303C07044 UE\_RSSI\_PUSCH\_LEVEL\_44.
2. The exceptional (invalid or out of range) Rssi value is mentioned in 5G\_L1\_IF\_201\_replaced([11513837](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
3. Value -140dBm shall be considered as invalid and counter shall NOT be updated.
4. If RSSI=0 value is coming then according to 5G\_L1\_IF\_201\_replaced([11513837](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) this is NOT a valid value and 5G-L2-LO shall discard it.
5. Counters should be updated for every profile which is assigned to any bearer within coresponding UE

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a diagram illustrating a sequence of operations related to NR PMQAP counters for UL SINR Rank1. The diagram is divided into three vertical sections labeled "5G-L1-UL", "5G-L2-PS", and "5G-CP-RT" at the top.
The main title of the diagram is "".
Below the title, there is a text box with the heading "Invalid or out of range (5G\_L1\_IF\_200):". Inside this box, it states: "In the case of invalid measurements for SINR 5G-L1-UL shall report to 5G-L2-PS the value: -255 dB. - On Loki and Thor, the valid range is restricted to (-20..+40) dB."
A message "UIData\_PuschReceiveRespP" with attributes "dtx=nonDTX" and "sinr" is shown originating from the "5G-L1-UL" section. This message is directed towards the "5G-L2-PS" section.
A box labeled "Keep Sinr value" is positioned below the "UIData\_PuschReceiveRespP" message, indicating a process or decision related to the SINR value.
From the "5G-L2-PS" section, a message is sent to the "5G-CP-RT" section. This message is represented by an arrow pointing left and contains the following information:
"PsCell\_CellSetupReq OR
PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq
actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE
actRadioQualityMeasCount = SINR
puschSinrBinMinThresh
puschSinrBinMaxThresh"
Finally, a text box is shown below the "5G-L2-PS" section, containing the instruction "increment the below RSSI Rank1 counters:" followed by two counter names:
"UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_R1\_BIN\_01\_PMQAP"
"UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_R1\_BIN\_05\_PMQAP"[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_9171.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

**Update time:**

5G-L2-PS recieves:

* dtx=nonDTX and sinr in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespP which are received by L2-PS from 5G-L1\_UL **AND**

then 5G-L2-PS shall keep sinr value.

5G-L2-PS recieves:

* in PsCell\_CellSetupReq **OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq which is received by L2-PS from 5G-CP-RT (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):**
* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE **AND**
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID **AND**
* actRadioQualityMeasCount = SINR **AND**
* puschSinrBinMinThresh **AND puschSinrBinMaxThresh**
* IE numOfLayers=1 indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschDecoderConfig  from 5G-L1-UL ([11513795](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9_vvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) **OR**
* IE spatialMode=0 (single\_antenna) indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq send to 5G-L1-UL ([11513774](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-vvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

then 5G-L2-PS shall increment the below SINR counters:

* UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_R1\_BIN\_01\_PMQAP  when: SINR value < puschSinrBinMinThresh
* UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_R1\_BIN\_02\_PMQAP  when: (puschSinrBinMinThresh) <= SINR value <= (puschSinrBinMinThresh)+(puschSinrBinMaxThresh - puschSinrBinMinThresh)/3
* UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_R1\_BIN\_03\_PMQAP  when: (puschSinrBinMinThresh)+(puschSinrBinMaxThresh - puschSinrBinMinThresh)/3    > SINR value <= (puschSinrBinMinThresh)+2\*(puschSinrBinMaxThresh - puschSinrBinMinThresh)/3
* UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_R1\_BIN\_04\_PMQAP  when: (puschSinrBinMinThresh)+2\*(puschSinrBinMaxThresh - puschSinrBinMinThresh)/3 > SINR value <= (puschSinrBinMaxThresh)
* UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_R1\_BIN\_05\_PMQAP  when: SINR value > (puschSinrBinMaxThresh)

**Increment value:**

No additional details as compared to NIDD

**Note :**

1. Counters are based on legacy M55303C05001 UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_R1\_LEVEL\_01 to M55303C05025 UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_R1\_LEVEL\_25
2. The exceptional (invalid or out of range) Sinr value is mentioned in 5G\_L1\_IF\_200\_replaced([11513831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
3. Counters should be updated for every profile which is assigned to any bearer within coresponding UE

---

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Received UE related SINR in Rank 2 for PUSCH BIN 01 ...

**2.9.6.1.0-6.0-1.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11197223`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Measurement: Radio Quality NRPMQAP

NetAct name : UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_R2\_BIN\_1\_PMQAP ... UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_R2\_BIN\_5\_PMQAP

PI ID : M55386C00010 ... M55386C00014

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a diagram illustrating the "NR PMQAP counters of UL SINR Rank2". It depicts a sequence of interactions between three entities: 5G-L1-UL, 5G-L2-PS, and 5G-CP-RT.
The diagram shows the following flow:
1. **5G-L1-UL** sends a `UIData_PuschReceiveRespP` message containing `dtx=nonDTX` and `sinr`.
2. A note indicates that if the `sinr` value is "Invalid or out of range (5G\_L1\_IF\_200)", it should be reported to 5G-L2-PS with a value of -255 dB. It also specifies that for "Loki and Thor", the valid range is restricted to (-20..+40) dB.
3. A message box labeled "Keep Sinr value" is positioned between 5G-L1-UL and 5G-L2-PS, suggesting that the SINR value is retained.
4. **5G-L2-PS** receives a message which is either `PsCell_CellSetupReq` OR `PsCell_CellReconfigurationReq`.
5. Following this, `actNrpmqapProfiles` is set to `TRUE`.
6. Then, `actRadioQualityMeasCount` is set to `SINR`.
7. Two thresholds are mentioned: `puschSinrBinMinThresh` and `puschSinrBinMaxThresh`.
8. Finally, a note states "increment the below RSSI Rank2 counters:", followed by two counter names:
\* `UE_SINR_PUSCH_R2_BIN_01_PMQAP`
\* `UE_SINR_PUSCH_R2_BIN_05_PMQAP`
The diagram uses vertical lines to represent the lifelines of the entities and arrows to indicate the messages exchanged between them. Text boxes are used to describe the messages, parameters, conditions, and actions.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_9173.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall recieve:

* dtx=nonDTX and sinr in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespP which are received by L2-PS from 5G-L1\_UL AND

then 5G-L2-PS shall keep sinr value.

5G-L2-PS shall recieve:

* in PsCell\_CellSetupReq OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq which is received by L2-PS from 5G-CP-RT (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE AND
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID AND
* actRadioQualityMeasCount = SINR AND
* puschSinrBinMinThresh AND puschSinrBinMaxThresh

then 5G-L2-PS shall increment the below SINR counters:

* UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_R2\_BIN\_01\_PMQAP when: SINR value < puschSinrBinMinThresh
* UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_R2\_BIN\_02\_PMQAP when: (puschSinrBinMinThresh) <= SINR value <= (puschSinrBinMinThresh)+(puschSinrBinMaxThresh - puschSinrBinMinThresh)/3
* UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_R2\_BIN\_03\_PMQAP when: (puschSinrBinMinThresh)+(puschSinrBinMaxThresh - puschSinrBinMinThresh)/3    > SINR value <= (puschSinrBinMinThresh)+2\*(puschSinrBinMaxThresh - puschSinrBinMinThresh)/3
* UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_R2\_BIN\_04\_PMQAP when: (puschSinrBinMinThresh)+2\*(puschSinrBinMaxThresh - puschSinrBinMinThresh)/3 > SINR value <= (puschSinrBinMaxThresh)
* UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_R2\_BIN\_05\_PMQAP when: SINR value > (puschSinrBinMaxThresh)

Increment value:

No additional details as compared to NIDD

Notes :

1. Counters are based on legacy M55303C06001 UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_R2\_LEVEL\_01 to M55303C06025 UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_R2\_LEVEL\_25
2. The exceptional (invalid or out of range) Sinr value is mentioned in 5G\_L1\_IF\_200\_replaced([11513831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
3. Counters should be updated for every profile which is assigned to any bearer within coresponding UE.

**2.9.6.1.0-6.0-2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11197234`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
**Measurement: Radio Quality NRPMQAP**

**NetAct name : PUSCH\_ANY\_SUCC\_DRB\_PMQAP**

**PI ID : M55386C00029**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

**Update time:**

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when PUSCH for both initial **and retransmitted packets with any modulation scheme is successfully received when all below conditions are met:**

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq **OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq from 5G-CP-RT with (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):**
* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE **AND**
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID **AND**
* actRadioQualityMeasCount = BLER
* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE crc=OK indicated in (5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_561\_replaced([11200624](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgNwQPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqULoner from 5G-L1-UL for Loner (5G\_L1\_IF\_15531\_replaced([11513903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlEPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **OR**
* UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqUL1sw from 5G-L1-UL for all other platforms (5G\_L1\_IF\_15532\_replaced([11513893](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlDvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

**Increment value: 1**

Counters should be incremented by 1 for each PMQAP profile which is assigned to each configured bearer within corresponding UE.

**Notes :**

1. Counters are based on legacy:
2. M55302C05000 PUSCH\_CP\_SUCC\_ANY\_64TBL\_MCS\_00 ...  M55302C05031 PUSCH\_CP\_SUCC\_ANY\_64TBL\_MCS\_31
3. M55302C09000 PUSCH\_DFT\_SUCC\_ANY\_64TBL\_MCS00 ...  M55302C09031PUSCH\_DFT\_SUCC\_ANY\_64TBL\_MCS31MCS\_31
4. M55302C14000 PUSCH\_CP\_SUCC\_ANY\_256TBL\_MCS00 ...  M55302C14031 PUSCH\_CP\_SUCC\_ANY\_256TBL\_MCS31MCS\_31
5. M55367C03000 PUSCH\_CP\_SUCC\_ANY\_LOWSE\_MCS\_00 ...  M55367C03031 PUSCH\_CP\_SUCC\_ANY\_LOWSE\_MCS\_31
6. M55370C00010 PUSCH\_DFT\_SUC\_ANY\_64TBL\_SAG\_R2
7. M55370C00016 PUSCH\_DFT\_SUC\_ANY\_64TBL\_SAG\_R4

**2.9.6.1.0-6.0-2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11197241`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
**Measurement: Radio Quality NRPMQAP**

**NetAct name : PUSCH\_LAST\_FAIL\_DRB\_PMQAP**

**PI ID : M55386C00028**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

**Update time:**

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when PUSCH isn't successfully decoded for the final HARQ transmissions with any modulation scheme when all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS shall receive PsCell\_CellSetupReq **OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq from 5G-CP-RT with (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):**
* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE **AND**
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID **AND**
* actRadioQualityMeasCount = BLER
* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE crc=NOK indicated in (5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_561\_replaced([11200624](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgNwQPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqULoner from 5G-L1-UL for Loner (5G\_L1\_IF\_15531\_replaced([11513903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlEPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **OR**
* UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqUL1sw from 5G-L1-UL for all other platforms (5G\_L1\_IF\_15532\_replaced([11513893](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlDvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

**AND**

* IE maxUlHarqTx is reached indicated in PsCell\_CellGroupSetupReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_3117\_replaced([10966509](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UPCB_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **OR PsCell\_CellGroupReconfigReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_47\_replaced([10966782](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UQQMfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), where maxUlHarqTx >1.**

**Increment value: 1**

Counters should be incremented by 1 for each PMQAP profile which is assigned to each configured bearer within corresponding UE.

**Notes :**

1. Counters are based on legacy:
2. M55302C03000 PUSCH\_CP\_UNSUCC\_64TBL\_MCS\_00 ... M55302C03031 PUSCH\_CP\_UNSUCC\_64TBL\_MCS\_31
3. M55302C07000 PUSCH\_DFT\_UNSUCC\_64TBL\_MCS\_00 ... M55302C07031 PUSCH\_DFT\_UNSUCC\_64TBL\_MCS\_31
4. M55302C12000 PUSCH\_CP\_UNSUCC\_256TBL\_MCS\_00 ... M55302C12031 PUSCH\_CP\_UNSUCC\_256TBL\_MCS\_31
5. M55367C04000 PUSCH\_CP\_UNSUCC\_LOWSE\_MCS\_00 ... M55367C04031 PUSCH\_CP\_UNSUCC\_LOWSE\_MCS\_31
6. M55370C00008 PUSCH\_DFT\_UNSUC\_64TBL\_SAG\_R2,
7. M55370C00014 PUSCH\_DFT\_UNSUC\_64TBL\_SAG\_R4

**2.9.6.1.0-6.0-3.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `13368449`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
**Measurement: Radio Quality NRPMQAP**

**NetAct name : PUSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN0\_64TBL\_PMQ ... PUSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN4\_64TBL\_PMQ**

**PI ID : M55386C00038 ... M55386C00042**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

**Update time:**

5G-L2-PS shall update counters when successfully received initial transmission **or retransmission of DRB on PUSCH with CP-OFDM and 64QAM MCS table when all below conditions are met:**

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq **OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq from 5G-CP-RT with (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):**
* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE **AND**
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID **AND**
* actRadioQualityMeasCount = MCS
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PuschConfig structure ([10975648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VCTQPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)):
* IE mcsTable=0: 64QAM
* 5G-L2-PS sets CP OFDM indicated in:
* IE puschTransformPrecoderFlag=0 (disable) in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschPrecodingConfig (5G\_L1\_IF\_195\_replaced([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

**[Before CNI-154407-A]**

* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE crc=OK indicated in (5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_561\_replaced([11200624](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgNwQPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqULoner from 5G-L1-UL for Loner (5G\_L1\_IF\_15531\_replaced([11513903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlEPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **OR**
* UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqUL1sw from 5G-L1-UL for all other platforms (5G\_L1\_IF\_15532\_replaced([11513893](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlDvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

The counters are updated based on the thresholds of the BIN provided below:

* BIN0: MCS 0 - MCS 8
* BIN1: MCS 9 - MCS 16
* BIN2: MCS 17 - MCS 25
* BIN3: MCS 26 - MCS 29
* BIN4: MCS 30 - MCS 31

**Increment value: 1**

Counters should be incremented by 1 for each PMQAP profile which is assigned to each configured bearer within corresponding UE regardless of whether it is in transient phase..  
**[End CNI-154407-A]**

**[CNI-154407-A]**

* (1) 5G-L2-PS sends UlData\_PuschReceiveReq towards 5G-L1-UL ([11513756: UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message content:](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_NV2wcPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* store mcs per Ul grant per harqId per UE given in structure ([11513795: PuschDecoderConfig)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Ny8VEPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)
* (2) 5G-L2-PS receives LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd from 5G-L2-LO ([10984729: LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd message content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_rsutSPu5Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* store harqId with ACK for given UE
* store bearer PMQAP profiles keyed by logical channelId for which UL data were received

**Increment value: 1**

Counters shall be incremented by 1 for each bearer PMQAP profile and its corresponding MCS bin.  
Each time when:

* The sequence of messages (1) and (2) is present and UE-to-UE and harqId-to-harqId matching between both messages is possible.
* UL data has been received for a given bearer with PMQAP profile
* The counters are updated based on the thresholds of the BIN provided below:
* BIN0: MCS 0 - MCS 4
* BIN1: MCS 5 - MCS 9, MCS 29
* BIN2: MCS 10 - MCS 16, MCS 30
* BIN3: MCS 17 - MCS 22
* BIN4: MCS 23 - MCS 28, MCS 31
* Note: MCS 29-31 are used for adaptive retransmission

**[End CNI-154407-A]**

**Notes :**

1. Counters are based on legacy:
2. M55304C04000 PUSCH\_CP\_INIRE\_VOL\_64TBL\_MCS00 to M55304C04031 PUSCH\_CP\_INIRE\_VOL\_64TBL\_MCS31

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)

5G-L2-PS shall update counters when successfully received initial transmission or retransmission of DRB on PUSCH with CP-OFDM and 256QAM MCS table when all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq **OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq from 5G-CP-RT with (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):**

* 5G-L2-PS sets CP-OFDM indicated in:

* UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqULoner from 5G-L1-UL for Loner (5G\_L1\_IF\_15531\_replaced([11513903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlEPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **OR**
* UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqUL1sw from 5G-L1-UL for all other platforms (5G\_L1\_IF\_15532\_replaced([11513893](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlDvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

The counters are updated based on the thresholds of the BIN provided below:

* BIN0: MCS 0 - MCS 8
* BIN1: MCS 9 - MCS 16
* BIN2: MCS 17 - MCS 25
* BIN3: MCS 26 - MCS 29
* BIN4: MCS 30 - MCS 31

**Increment value: 1**

Counters should be incremented by 1 for each PMQAP profile which is assigned to each configured bearer within corresponding UE regardless of whether it is in transient phase.  
**[End CNI-154407-A]**[CNI-154407-A]\*\*\*\*

* (1) 5G-L2-PS sends UlData\_PuschReceiveReq towards 5G-L1-UL ([11513756: UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message content:](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_NV2wcPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* store mcs per Ul grant per harqId per UE given in structure ([11513795: PuschDecoderConfig)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Ny8VEPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)
* (2) 5G-L2-PS receives LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd from 5G-L2-LO ([10984729: LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd message content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_rsutSPu5Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* store harqId with ACK for given UE
* store bearer PMQAP profiles keyed by logical channelId for which UL data were received

**Increment value: 1**

Counters shall be incremented by 1 for each bearer PMQAP profile and its corresponding MCS bin.  
Each time when:

* The sequence of messages (1) and (2) is present and UE-to-UE and harqId-to-harqId matching between both messages is possible.
* UL data has been received for a given bearer with PMQAP profile
* The counters are updated based on the thresholds of the BIN provided below:
* BIN0: MCS 0 - MCS 4, MCS 28
* BIN1: MCS 5 - MCS 10, MCS 29
* BIN2: MCS 11 - MCS 15
* BIN3: MCS 16 - MCS 19, MCS 30
* BIN4: MCS 20 - MCS 27, MCS 31
* Note:  MCS 28-31 are used for adaptive retransmission

**[End CNI-154407-A]**

**Notes :**

1. Counters are based on legacy:
2. M55304C10000 PUSCH\_CP\_INRE\_VOL\_256TBL\_MCS00 to M55304C10031 PUSCH\_CP\_INRE\_VOL\_256TBL\_MCS31

---

**2.9.6.1.0-6.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `11197268`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Initial and retransmission PUSCH with DFTS and 64QAM MCS table BIN0 ... BIN4

---

**2.9.6.1.0-6.0-3.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `13370926`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
**Measurement: Radio Quality NRPMQAP**

**NetAct name : PUSCH\_DFTS\_INRE\_BIN0\_64TBL\_PMQ ... PUSCH\_DFTS\_INRE\_BIN4\_64TBL\_PMQ**

**PI ID : M55386C00048 ... M55386C00052**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

**Update time:**

5G-L2-PS shall update counters when successfully received initial transmission or retransmission of DRB on PUSCH with DFTs OFDM and 64QAM MCS table when all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq **OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq from 5G-CP-RT with (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):**
* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE **AND**
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID **AND**
* actRadioQualityMeasCount = MCS
* 5G-L2-PS sets DFTs OFDM indicated in:
* IE puschTransformPrecoderFlag=1 (enable) in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschPrecodingConfig (5G\_L1\_IF\_195\_replaced([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PuschConfig structure ([10975648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VCTQPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* IE mcsTable=0: 64QAM

**[Before CNI-154407-A]**

* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE crc=OK indicated in (5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_561\_replaced([11200624](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgNwQPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqULoner from 5G-L1-UL for Loner (5G\_L1\_IF\_15531\_replaced([11513903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlEPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **OR**
* UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqUL1sw from 5G-L1-UL for all other platforms (5G\_L1\_IF\_15532\_replaced([11513893](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlDvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

The counters are updated based on the thresholds of the BIN provided below:

* BIN0: MCS 0 - MCS 8
* BIN1: MCS 9 - MCS 16
* BIN2: MCS 17 - MCS 25
* BIN3: MCS 26 - MCS 29
* BIN4: MCS 30 - MCS 31

**Increment value: 1**

Counters should be incremented by 1 for each PMQAP profile which is assigned to each configured bearer within corresponding UE regardless of whether it is in transient phase.  
**[End CNI-154407-A]**

**[CNI-154407-A]**

* (1) 5G-L2-PS sends UlData\_PuschReceiveReq towards 5G-L1-UL ([11513756: UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message content:](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_NV2wcPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* store mcs per Ul grant per harqId per UE given in structure ([11513795: PuschDecoderConfig)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Ny8VEPvwEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)
* (2) 5G-L2-PS receives LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd from 5G-L2-LO ([10984729: LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd message content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_rsutSPu5Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* store harqId with ACK for given UE
* store bearer PMQAP profiles keyed by logical channelId for which UL data were received

**Increment value: 1**

Counters shall be incremented by 1 for each bearer PMQAP profile and its corresponding MCS bin.  
Each time when:

* The sequence of messages (1) and (2) is present and UE-to-UE and harqId-to-harqId matching between both messages is possible.
* UL data has been received for a given bearer with PMQAP profile
* The counters are updated based on the thresholds of the BIN provided below:
* BIN0: MCS 0 - MCS 4
* BIN1: MCS 5 - MCS 9, MCS 29
* BIN2: MCS 10 - MCS 16, MCS 30
* BIN3: MCS 17 - MCS 22
* BIN4: MCS 23 - MCS 28, MCS 31
* Note: MCS 29-31 are used for adaptive retransmission

**[End CNI-154407-A]**

**Notes :**

1. Counters are based on legacy:
2. M55304C08000 PUSCH\_DFT\_INRE\_VOL\_64TBL\_MCS00 to M55304C08031 PUSCH\_DFT\_INRE\_VOL\_64TBL\_MCS31

**2.9.6.1.0-6.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11197281`)

**2.9.6.1.0-6.0-4.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11197285`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
**Measurement: Radio Quality NRPMQAP**

**NetAct name : PUSCH\_DFTS\_INIRE\_RANK1\_PMQAP**

**PI ID : M55386C00063**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

**Update time:**

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when a UL transmission using Rank1 **or SingleTx is transmitted on PUSCH when all below conditions are met:**

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq **OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq from 5G-CP-RT in structure pmqapCounterConfig (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):**
* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE **AND**
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID **AND**
* actRadioQualityMeasCount = RANK
* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant
* IE numOfLayers=1 indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschDecoderConfig  from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_198\_replaced([11513795](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9_vvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **OR**

if 5G-L2-PS set per grant

IE spatialMode=0 (single\_antenna) indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq send to 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_194\_replaced([11513774](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-vvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE crc=OK indicated in (5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_561\_replaced([11200624](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgNwQPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqULoner from 5G-L1-UL for Loner (5G\_L1\_IF\_15531\_replaced([11513903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlEPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **OR**
* UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqUL1sw from 5G-L1-UL for all other platforms (5G\_L1\_IF\_15532\_replaced([11513893](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlDvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* 5G-L2-PS sets DFTs OFDM indicated in:
* IE puschTransformPrecoderFlag=1 (enable) in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschPrecodingConfig (5G\_L1\_IF\_195\_replaced([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

**Increment value: 1**

Counters should be incremented by 1 for each PMQAP profile which is assigned to each configured bearer within corresponding UE.

**Notes :**

1. Counters are based on legacy:
2. M55303C21000 PUSCH\_DFT\_RANK1\_PMI\_00 to M55303C21005 PUSCH\_DFT\_RANK1\_PMI\_05

---

**2.9.6.1.0-6.0-4.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11197293`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
**Measurement: Radio Quality NRPMQAP**

**NetAct name : PUSCH\_CP\_INIRE\_RANK1\_PMQAP**

**PI ID : M55386C00064**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

**Update time:**

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when a UL transmission using Rank1 is **or SingleTx is transmitted on PUSCH when all below conditions are met:**

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq **OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq from 5G-CP-RT in structure pmqapCounterConfig (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):**
* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE **AND**
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID **AND**
* actRadioQualityMeasCount = RANK
* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant:
* IE numOfLayers=1 indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschDecoderConfig  from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_198\_replaced([11513795](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9_vvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **OR**

if 5G-L2-PS set per grant:

* IE spatialMode=singleAntenna indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq send to 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_194\_replaced([11513774](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-vvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE crc=OK indicated in (5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_561\_replaced([11200624](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgNwQPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqULoner from 5G-L1-UL for Loner (5G\_L1\_IF\_15531\_replaced([11513903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlEPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **OR**
* UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqUL1sw from 5G-L1-UL for all other platforms (5G\_L1\_IF\_15532\_replaced([11513893](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlDvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* 5G-L2-PS sets CP-OFDM indicated in:
* IE puschTransformPrecoderFlag=0 (disable) in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschPrecodingConfig (5G\_L1\_IF\_195\_replaced([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

**Increment value: 1**

Counters should be incremented by 1 for each PMQAP profile which is assigned to each configured bearer within corresponding UE.

**Notes :**

1. Counters are based on legacy:
2. M55303C00000 PUSCH\_CP\_RANK1\_64TBL\_MCS\_00 to M55303C00031 PUSCH\_CP\_RANK1\_64TBL\_MCS\_31
3. M55303C22000 PUSCH\_CP\_RANK1\_256TBL\_MCS\_00 to M55303C22031 PUSCH\_CP\_RANK1\_256TBL\_MCS\_31
4. M55368C04000 PUSCH\_CP\_RANK1\_LOWSE\_MCS\_00 to M55368C04031 PUSCH\_CP\_RANK1\_LOWSE\_MCS\_31

**2.9.6.1.0-6.0-4.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11197302`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
**Measurement: Radio Quality NRPMQAP**

**NetAct name : PUSCH\_CP\_INIRE\_RANK2\_PMQAP**

**PI ID : M55386C00065**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

**Update time:**

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when a UL transmission using Rank2 is transmitted on PUSCH when all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq **OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq from 5G-CP-RT in structure pmqapCounterConfig (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):**
* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE **AND**
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID **AND**
* actRadioQualityMeasCount = RANK
* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE numOfLayers=2 indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschDecoderConfig  from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_198\_replaced([11513795](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9_vvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE crc=OK indicated in (5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_561\_replaced([11200624](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgNwQPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqULoner from 5G-L1-UL for Loner (5G\_L1\_IF\_15531\_replaced([11513903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlEPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **OR**
* UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqUL1sw from 5G-L1-UL for all other platforms (5G\_L1\_IF\_15532\_replaced([11513893](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlDvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* 5G-L2-PS sets CP-OFDM indicated in:
* IE puschTransformPrecoderFlag=0 (disable) in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq.PuschPrecodingConfig (5G\_L1\_IF\_195\_replaced([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

**Increment value: 1**

**Notes :**

2. M55303C01000 PUSCH\_CP\_RANK2\_64TBL\_MCS\_00 to M55303C01031 PUSCH\_CP\_RANK2\_64TBL\_MCS\_31
3. M55303C23000 PUSCH\_CP\_RANK2\_256TBL\_MCS\_00 to M55303C23031 PUSCH\_CP\_RANK2\_256TBL\_MCS\_31

**2.9.6.1.0-6.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11197311`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Timing advance (TA) in near range for RRC connected UE

---

**2.9.6.1.0-6.0-5.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `13478781`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
**Measurement: Radio Quality NRPMQAP**

**NetAct name : TA\_RRC\_CON\_NEAR\_PMQAP**

**PI ID : M55386C00015**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

**Update time:**

5G-L2-PS shall update counter [CB015279] only on PCell (specifically pTag) [End CB015279] when below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq **OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq from 5G-CP-RT with pmqapCounterConfig structure (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):**
* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE **AND**
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID **AND**
* actRadioQualityMeasCount = TA **AND**
* rrcTABinNearThresh **AND**
* rrcTABinFarThresh

**Increment value: 1**

Counter should be incremented by 1 for each PMQAP profile which is assigned to each configured bearer within corresponding UE.

5G-L2-PS shall increment TA\_RRC\_CON\_NEAR\_PMQAP

* if BIN **<= rrcTANearThresh,**

where BIN is based on legacy counters TA\_RRC\_CON\_BIN\_01 ... TA\_RRC\_CON\_BIN\_32 (5G\_L2\_672\_replaced([11170092](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26HM5fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

**Example:**

When IE rrcTABinNearThresh and rrcTABinFarThresh are set as below:

* rrcTANearThresh = 5
* rrcTAFarThresh = 20

and calculated sample is TA\_RRC\_CON\_BIN\_05 so:

* TA\_RRC\_CON\_BIN\_05 <= rrcTANearThresh

then 5G-L2-PS shall increment counter TA\_RRC\_CON\_NEAR\_PMQAP.

**Notes :**

1. Counters are based on legacy:
2. M55307C02001 TA\_RRC\_CON\_BIN\_01 to M55307C02032 TA\_RRC\_CON\_BIN\_32 (5G\_L2\_672\_replaced([11170092](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26HM5fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Timing advance (TA) in middle range for RRC connected UE

---

**2.9.6.1.0-6.0-5.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `13478784`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
**Measurement: Radio Quality NRPMQAP**

**NetAct name : TA\_RRC\_CON\_MIDDLE\_PMQAP**

**PI ID : M55386C00016**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

**Update time:**

5G-L2-PS shall update counter [CB015279] only on PCell (specifically pTag) [End CB015279] when below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq **OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq from 5G-CP-RT with pmqapCounterConfig structure (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):**
* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE **AND**
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID **AND**
* actRadioQualityMeasCount = TA **AND**
* rrcTABinNearThresh **AND**
* rrcTABinFarThresh

**Increment value:**

Counter should be incremented by 1 for each PMQAP profile which is assigned to each configured bearer within corresponding UE.

5G-L2-PS shall increment TA\_RRC\_CON\_MIDDLE\_PMQAP

* if rrcTANearThresh **< BIN** <= rrcTAFarThresh,\*\*\*\*

where BIN is based on legacy counters TA\_RRC\_CON\_BIN\_01 ... TA\_RRC\_CON\_BIN\_32 (5G\_L2\_672\_replaced([11170092](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26HM5fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

**Example:**

When IE rrcTABinNearThresh and rrcTABinFarThresh are set as below:

* rrcTANearThresh = 5
* rrcTAFarThresh = 20

and calculated sample is TA\_RRC\_CON\_BIN\_09 so:

* rrcTANearThresh **< TA\_RRC\_CON\_BIN\_09** <= rrcTAFarThresh\*\*\*\*

then 5G-L2-PS shall increment counter TA\_RRC\_CON\_MIDDLE\_PMQAP.

**Notes :**

1. Counters are based on legacy:
2. M55307C02001 TA\_RRC\_CON\_BIN\_01 to M55307C02032 TA\_RRC\_CON\_BIN\_32 (5G\_L2\_672\_replaced([11170092](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26HM5fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
3. Counters should be incremented by 1 for each PMQAP profile which is assigned to each configured bearer within corresponding UE.

**Update time:**

5G-L2-PS shall update counter [CB015279] only on PCell (specifically pTag) [End CB015279] when below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq **OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq from 5G-CP-RT with pmqapCounterConfig structure (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):**
* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE **AND**
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID **AND**
* actRadioQualityMeasCount = TA **AND**
* rrcTABinNearThresh **AND**
* rrcTABinFarThresh

**Increment value: 1**

Counter should be incremented by 1 for each PMQAP profile which is assigned to each configured bearer within corresponding UE.

5G-L2-PS shall increment TA\_RRC\_CON\_FAR\_PMQAP

* if BIN **> rrcTAFarThresh,**

where BIN is based on legacy counters TA\_RRC\_CON\_BIN\_01 ... TA\_RRC\_CON\_BIN\_32 (5G\_L2\_672\_replaced([11170092](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26HM5fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

**Example:**

When IE rrcTABinNearThresh and rrcTABinFarThresh are set as below:

* rrcTANearThresh = 5
* rrcTAFarThresh = 20

and calculated sample is TA\_RRC\_CON\_BIN\_21 so:

* TA\_RRC\_CON\_BIN\_21**> rrcTAFarThresh**

then 5G-L2-PS shall increment counter TA\_RRC\_CON\_FAR\_PMQAP.

**Notes :**

1. Counters are based on legacy:
2. M55307C02001 TA\_RRC\_CON\_BIN\_01 to M55307C02032 TA\_RRC\_CON\_BIN\_32 (5G\_L2\_672\_replaced([11170092](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26HM5fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

#### 2.9.6.1.0-7 Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH) NR spatial stream level measurement (ID: 11197336)

**2.9.6.1.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `11197339`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
UL SINR (Signal to Interference plus Noise Ratio)

---

**2.9.6.1.0-7.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11197344`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Average PUSCH SINR for UL Spatial stream 0 ...3

---

**2.9.6.1.0-7.0-1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11197348`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Measurement: NR spatial stream level measurement

NetAct name: AVG\_UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_STR\_0 ... AVG\_UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_STR\_3

PI ID: M55387C00001 ... M55387C00004

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counter by sum all the SINR of the measured Rx antenna values for the UL Spatial stream when all below conditions are met:

5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

* IE actBeamforming = false - UL SINR counters are applicable only for non-beamforming
* IE numOfSuperSubcells = 0 - Value of 0 indicates supercell is not activated
* IE isCellMassiveMimo = false - UL SINR counters are applicable only for standard MIMO

5G-L2-PS receives parameter settings per subcell, per grant indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs from 5G-L1-UL:

* IE sinrOfAnt [dB] – SINR of Rx antenna spatial streams (5G\_L1\_IF\_202\_replaced([11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* IE puschAntMeas – Rx antenna spatial stream (5G\_L1\_IF\_200\_replaced([11513831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Notes:

The exceptional (invalid or out of range) sinrOfAnt value is mentioned in 5G\_L1\_IF\_202\_replaced([11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

* Value -255 dB shall be considered as invalid, and counter shall NOT be updated.

Increment value:

After reception UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs, 5G-L2-PS shall take all SINR values (IE sinrOfAnt) from all grants for given spatial stream (IE puschAntMeas) and then:

* Multiply each SINR values by 10 and sum all values for given spatial stream
* After each sum operation, number of samples should be incremented
* Report  number of samples (AVG\_UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_STR\_X.samples) sum SINR value (AVG\_UE\_SINR\_PUSCH\_STR\_X.sum) in dB unit to PmAgent/ OAM.
* Calculating of the average PUSCH SINR for UL per spatial stream is done by OAM after 5G-L2-PS send required data.
* [PR827701] Fake UEs are not to be considered into incrementing counters. [End PR827701].

---

**2.9.6.1.0-7.0-2**  (ID: `11197352`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
UL RIP (Received Noice and Interference Power)

---

**2.9.6.1.0-7.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11197355`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Average PUSCH RIP for UL Spatial stream 0 ... 3

---

**2.9.6.1.0-7.0-2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11197360`)

Physical Uplink Shared Channel Receive (PUSCH)
Measurement: NR spatial stream level measurement

NetAct name: AVG\_UE\_RIP\_PUSCH\_STR\_0 ... AVG\_UE\_RIP\_PUSCH\_STR\_3

PI ID: M55387C00005 ... M55387C00008

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counter by sum all the measured RIP values for the UL Spatial stream when all below conditions are met:

5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

* IE actBeamforming = false - UL RIP counters are applicable only for non-beamforming
* IE numOfSuperSubcells = 0 - Value of 0 indicates supercell is not activated
* IE isCellMassiveMimo = false - UL RIP counters are applicable only for standard MIMO

5G-L2-PS receives per subcell, per grant indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs from 5G-L1-UL:

* IE linNoiseOfAnt [aW] – RIP - noise measure over antenna spatial stream (5G\_L1\_IF\_202\_replaced([11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* IE puschAntMeas – Rx antenna spatial stream (5G\_L1\_IF\_200\_replaced([11513831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Notes:

The exceptional (invalid or out of range) linNoiseOfAnt value is mentioned in 5G\_L1\_IF\_202\_replaced([11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

* Value 10 aW shall be considered as invalid, and counter shall NOT be updated.

Increment value:

After reception UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs, 5G-L2-PS shall take all RIP values (IE linNoiseOfAnt) from all grants for given spatial stream (IE puschAntMeas) and then:

* Convert to dBm unit, Multiply each RIP values by 10 and sum all values for given spatial stream
* After each sum operation, number of samples should be incremented
* Report number of samples (AVG\_UE\_RIP\_PUSCH\_STR \_X.samples) and sum RIP value (AVG\_UE\_RIP\_PUSCH\_STR\_X.sum) in dBm unit to PmAgent/ OAM.
* Calculating of the average PUSCH RIP for UL per spatial stream is done by OAM after 5G-L2-PS send required data.
* [PR827701] Fake UEs are not to be considered into incrementing counters. [End PR827701]

### 2.9.6.2 Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)

#### 2.9.6.2.0-1 Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH) DL Radio Quality NRPMQAP (for FR1 only) (ID: 11197368)

**2.9.6.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11197372`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
DL CQI (Channel Quality Indicator)

---

**2.9.6.2.0-1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11197377`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
Wideband CQI Histogram for UE reports related to 64QAM table - CQI Level 0 to CQI Level 15

---

**2.9.6.2.0-1.0-1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11197382`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
Measurement: Radio Quality NRPMQAP

NetAct name: WB\_CQI\_64TBL\_CQI\_BIN01\_PMQAP ... WB\_CQI\_64TBL\_CQI\_BIN05\_PMQAP

PI ID: M55386C00018 ... M55386C00022

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counters of wideband CQI Histogram for UE reports related to 64QAM table when all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq from 5G-CP-RT with pmqapCounterConfig structure (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE AND
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID AND
* actRadioQualityMeasCount = CQI
* 5G-L2-PS receives decoded 4 bits of CQI for:
* PUCCH: IE uciBits in UlData\_PucchReceiveRespPs received by L2-PS from 5G-L1\_UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_221\_replaced([11514182](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR2BQvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) OR
* PUSCH: IE uciCsiPart1Bits OR IE uciCsiPart2Bits in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs received by L2-PS from 5G-L1\_UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_207\_replaced([11513864](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlB_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PdschConfig structure (5G\_L2\_IF\_428\_replaced([10975561](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VBsNfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* IE mcsTable=0: 64QAM

Note:

5G-L2-PS shall check if is in transient phase, if yes then 5G-L2-PS shall wait for the ending of transient phase when PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq is received.

Increment value: 1

One counter should be incremented by 1 for each CQI value which is provided. CQI index=0 is in range and should be incremented.

Counters are incremented before WB-CQI Averaging (5G\_UP\_ALG\_3005\_replaced([11125595](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqvu4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Counters should be incremented by 1 for each PMQAP profile which is assigned to each configured bearer within corresponding UE.

Note:

1. Counters are based on legacy M55301C19020 WB\_CQI\_64TBL\_QCI\_00 to M55301C19035 WB\_CQI\_64TBL\_CQI\_15.

---

**2.9.6.2.0-1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11197385`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
Wideband CQI Histogram for UE reports related to 256QAM table - CQI Level 0 to 15

---

**2.9.6.2.0-1.0-1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11197388`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
Measurement: Radio Quality NRPMQAP

NetAct name: WB\_CQI\_256TBL\_CQI\_BIN01\_PMQAP - WB\_CQI\_256TBL\_CQI\_BIN05\_PMQAP

PI ID: M55386C00023 ... M55386C00027

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counters of wideband CQI Histogram for UE reports related to 256QAM table when all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq from 5G-CP-RT with pmqapCounterConfig structure (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE AND
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID AND
* actRadioQualityMeasCount = CQI
* 5G-L2-PS receives decoded 4 bits of CQI for:
* PUCCH: IE uciBits in UlData\_PucchReceiveRespPs received by L2-PS from 5G-L1\_UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_221\_replaced([11514182](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR2BQvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) OR
* PUSCH: IE uciCsiPart1Bits OR IE uciCsiPart2Bits in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs received by L2-PS from 5G-L1\_UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_207\_replaced([11513864](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlB_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PdschConfig structure (5G\_L2\_IF\_428\_replaced([10975561](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VBsNfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* IE mcsTable=1: 256QAM MCS table is used for PDSCH

Note:

5G-L2-PS shall check if is in transient phase, if yes then L2PS shall wait for the ending of transient phase when PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq is received.

Increment value: 1

One counter should be incremented by 1 for each CQI value which is provided. CQI index=0 is in range and should be incremented.

Counters are incremented before WB-CQI Averaging (5G\_UP\_ALG\_3005\_replaced([11125595](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqvu4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Counters should be incremented by 1 for each PMQAP profile which is assigned to each configured bearer within corresponding UE.

Note:

1. Counters are based on legacy M55301C20020 WB\_CQI\_256TBL\_CQI\_00 to M55301C20035 WB\_CQI\_256TBL\_CQI\_15.

**2.9.6.2.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11197394`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
DL BLER (Block Error Rate)

---

**2.9.6.2.0-1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11197397`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
Number of successful PDSCH transmissions by any transmission with any modulation scheme

---

**2.9.6.2.0-1.0-2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11197400`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
Measurement: Radio Quality NRPMQAP

NetAct name: PDSCH\_ANY\_SUCC\_DRB\_PMQAP

PI ID: M55386C00031

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when HARQ-ACK is received for any transmission on PDSCH with any modulation scheme when all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq from 5G-CP-RT with pmqapCounterConfig structure (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE AND
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID AND
* actRadioQualityMeasCount = BLER AND
* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE ackNack=1 (Ack) over PUCCH indicated in:
* Loner: UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDLoner.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15584\_replaced([11512786](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRsQQPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) OR
* Other: UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDL1sw.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15583\_replaced([11512777](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRrpQvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Note: If 5G-L2-PS receives dtx=1 (dtx) in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs, 5G-L2-PS treats DTX accordingly to Speculative DTX Algorithm [5G\_UP\_ALG\_6907\_replaced([11184154](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvQbfPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))].

* 5G-L2-PS receives per grant IE ackNack1BitUci=1 (Ack) OR ackNackUciMoreThan1Bit=1 (Ack) over PUSCH indicated in:
* Loner: UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDLoner from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15584\_replaced([11512786](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRsQQPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) OR
* Other: UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDL1sw from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15583\_replaced([11512777](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRrpQvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Increment value: 1

Counters should be incremented by 1 for each PMQAP profile which is assigned to any bearer with scheduled data within corresponding UE.

Note:

1. Counters are based on legacy:
2. M55300C02000 PDSCH\_SUCC\_ANY\_64TBL\_MCS\_00 ... M55300C02031 PDSCH\_SUCC\_ANY\_64TBL\_MCS\_31
3. M55300C06000 PDSCH\_SUCC\_ANY\_256TBL\_MCS\_00 ... M55300C06031 PDSCH\_SUCC\_ANY\_256TBL\_MCS\_31
4. M55366C03000 PDSCH\_SUCC\_ANY\_LOWSE\_MCS\_00 ...  M55366C03031 PDSCH\_SUCC\_ANY\_LOWSE\_MCS\_31

**2.9.6.2.0-1.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11197406`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
Number of unsuccessful PDSCH transmissions by last HARQ reTx with any modulation scheme

---

**2.9.6.2.0-1.0-2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11197409`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
Measurement: Radio Quality NRPMQAP

NetAct name: PDSCH\_LAST\_FAIL\_DRB\_PMQAP

PI ID: M55386C00030

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when PDSCH isn't successfully decoded for the final HARQ transmissions with any modulation scheme when all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS shall receive PsCell\_CellSetupReq OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq from 5G-CP-RT with pmqapCounterConfig structure (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE AND
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID AND
* actRadioQualityMeasCount = BLER
* 5G-L2-PS receives for PUCCH per grant IE ackNack=0 (Nack) indicated in:
* Loner: UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDLoner.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15584\_replaced([11512786](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRsQQPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) OR
* Other: UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDL1sw.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15583\_replaced([11512777](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRrpQvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Note: If 5G-L2-PS recieves dtx=1 (dtx) in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespP, 5G-L2-PS treats DTX accordingly to Speculative DTX Algorithm [5G\_UP\_ALG\_6907\_replaced([11184154](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvQbfPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))].

* 5G-L2-PS receives for PUSCH per grant
* IE ackNack1BitUci=0 (Nack) OR ackNackUciMoreThan1Bit=0 (Nack) indicated in:
  + Loner: UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDLoner from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15584\_replaced([11512786](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRsQQPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) OR
  + Other: UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqDL1sw from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15583\_replaced([11512777](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRrpQvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

AND

* IE maxDlHarqTx is reached indicated in PsCell\_CellGroupSetupReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_3117\_replaced([10966509](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UPCB_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) OR PsCell\_CellGroupReconfigReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_47\_replaced([10966782](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UQQMfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), where maxDlHarqTx ​​> 1.

Note:

If the HARQ Ack of the last retransmitted data is not received, increment the counter for the profile matching the DRB Id for which the data was transmitted but the Ack not received failed.

Increment value: 1

Counters should be incremented by 1 for each PMQAP profile which is assigned to any bearer with scheduled data within corresponding UE.

Note:

1. Counters are based on legacy:
2. M55300C03000 PDSCH\_UNSUCC\_64TBL\_MCS\_00 ... M55300C03031 PDSCH\_UNSUCC\_64TBL\_MCS\_31
3. M55300C07000 PDSCH\_UNSUCC\_256TBL\_MCS\_00 ... M55300C07031 PDSCH\_UNSUCC\_256TBL\_MCS\_31
4. M55366C04000 PDSCH\_UNSUCC\_LOWSE\_MCS\_00 ...  M55366C04031 PDSCH\_UNSUCC\_LOWSE\_MCS\_31

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)

**2.9.6.2.0-1.0-3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11197422`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
Measurement: Radio Quality NRPMQAP

NetAct name: PDSCH\_2TX\_RI\_01\_PMQAP

PI ID: M55386C00032

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when DL data using rank 1 (2Tx transmission) is transmitted on PDSCH regardless of the aggregation level and all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq from 5G-CP-RT with pmqapCounterConfig structure (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE AND
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID AND
* actRadioQualityMeasCount = RANK
* 5G-L2-PS sets per grant rank as an IE numOfLayers =1 indicated in:
* Loner: DlData\_PdschSendReqLoner.PdschEncoderConfigLoner from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15605\_replaced([11512895](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRs3VvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) OR
* Other: DlData\_PdschSendReqL1sw.PdschEncoderConfigL1sw from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15604\_replaced([11512888](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRs3VPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with mimoConfigData structure (5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* IE DlMimoMode=ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_2x2 OR
* IE DlMimoMode=OpenLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_2x2

Increment value: 1

Counters should be incremented by 1 for each PMQAP profile which is assigned to each configured bearer within corresponding UE.

Note:

1. Counters are based on legacy M55301C09001 PDSCH\_2TX\_RI\_01.

---

**2.9.6.2.0-1.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11197426`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
Number of PDSCH transmissions using 2TX transmission with rank 2

---

**2.9.6.2.0-1.0-3.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11197430`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
Measurement: Radio Quality NRPMQAP

NetAct name: PDSCH\_2TX\_RI\_02\_PMQAP

PI ID: M55386C00033

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when DL data using rank 2 (2Tx transmission) is transmitted on PDSCH regardless of the aggregation level and all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq from 5G-CP-RT with pmqapCounterConfig structure (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE AND
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID AND
* actRadioQualityMeasCount = RANK
* 5G-L2-PS set per grant rank as an IE numOfLayers =2 indicated in:
* Loner: DlData\_PdschSendReqLoner.PdschEncoderConfigLoner from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15605\_replaced([11512895](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRs3VvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) OR
* Other: DlData\_PdschSendReqL1sw.PdschEncoderConfigL1sw from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15604\_replaced([11512888](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRs3VPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with mimoConfigData structure (5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* IE DlMimoMode=ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_2x2 OR
* IE DlMimoMode=OpenLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_2x2

Increment value: 1

Counters should be incremented by 1 for each PMQAP profile which is assigned to each configured bearer within corresponding UE.

Note:

1. Counters are based on legacy M55301C09002 PDSCH\_2TX\_RI\_02.

**2.9.6.2.0-1.0-3.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11197462`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
**Measurement: Radio Quality NRPMQAP**

* 5G-L2-PS set per grant rank as an IE numOfLayers =4 indicated in:
* Loner: DlData\_PdschSendReqLoner.PdschEncoderConfigLoner from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15605\_replaced([11512895](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRs3VvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **OR**
* Other: DlData\_PdschSendReqL1sw.PdschEncoderConfigL1sw from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15604\_replaced([11512888](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRs3VPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with mimoConfigData structure (5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* IE DlMimoMode=ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_4x4or4x2 **OR**
* IE DlMimoMode=OpenLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_4x4or4x2

**Increment value: 1**

**2.9.6.2.0-1.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11197470`)

---

**2.9.6.2.0-1.0-4.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `12772234`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
Measurement: Radio Quality NRPMQAP

NetAct name: PDSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN0\_64TBL\_PMQ - PDSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN4\_64TBL\_PMQ

PI ID: M55386C00053 ... M55386C00057

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counters when DL data is scheduled over PDSCH with CP-OFDM and 64QAM MCS table so when all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq from 5G-CP-RT with pmqapCounterConfig structure (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* actNrpmqapProfiles = TRUE AND
* pmqapProfileList, with up to 40 entries of PMQAP ID AND
* actRadioQualityMeasCount = MCS
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PdschConfig structure (5G\_L2\_IF\_428\_replaced([10975561](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VBsNfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* IE mcsTable=0: 64QAM table

The counters are updated based on the thresholds of the BIN provided below:

**[Before PR848710]**

* BIN0: MCS 0  - MCS 8           PDSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN0\_64TBL\_PMQ     M55386C00053
* BIN1: MCS 9  - MCS 16         PDSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN1\_64TBL\_PMQ    M55386C00054
* BIN2: MCS 17 - MCS 25        PDSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN2\_64TBL\_PMQ    M55386C00055
* BIN3: MCS 26 - MCS 29        PDSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN3\_64TBL\_PMQ    M55386C00056
* BIN4: MCS 30 - MCS 31        PDSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN4\_64TBL\_PMQ    M55386C00057

[**PR848710]**

* BIN0: MCS 0   - MCS 4                         PDSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN0\_64TBL\_PMQ    M55386C00053
* BIN1: MCS 5   - MCS 9   or MCS 29    PDSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN1\_64TBL\_PMQ    M55386C00054
* BIN2: MCS 10 - MCS 16 or MCS 30   PDSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN2\_64TBL\_PMQ    M55386C00055
* BIN3: MCS 17 - MCS 22                      PDSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN3\_64TBL\_PMQ    M55386C00056
* BIN4: MCS 23 - MCS 28 or MCS 31  PDSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN4\_64TBL\_PMQ    M55386C00057

[End **PR848710]**

Increment value: 1

Counters should be incremented by 1 for each PMQAP profile which is assigned to any bearer with scheduled data within corresponding UE regardless of whether it is in transient phase.

Counters shouldn't be updated when the SRB control message was sending over the PDSCH.

Note:

1. Counters are based on legacy counters from PDSCH\_INIRE\_VOL\_64TBL\_MCS00 (M55304C02000) to PDSCH\_INIRE\_VOL\_64TBL\_MCS31 (M55304C02031).
2. In DL is used CP-OFDM only.

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
**Measurement: Radio Quality NRPMQAP**

5G-L2-PS shall update counters when DL data is scheduled over PDSCH with CP-OFDM and 256QAM MCS table so when all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq **OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq from 5G-CP-RT with pmqapCounterConfig structure (5G\_L2\_IF\_7696\_replaced([10974472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):**

* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PdschConfig structure (5G\_L2\_IF\_428\_replaced([10975561](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VBsNfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

The counters are updated based on the thresholds of the BIN provided below:

[Before PR848710]

* BIN0: MCS 0  - MCS 8              PDSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN0\_256TBL\_PMQ    M55386C00058
* BIN1: MCS 9  - MCS 16            PDSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN1\_256TBL\_PMQ    M55386C00059
* BIN2: MCS 17 - MCS 25           PDSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN2\_256TBL\_PMQ    M55386C00060
* BIN3: MCS 26 - MCS 29           PDSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN3\_256TBL\_PMQ    M55386C00061
* BIN4: MCS 30 - MCS 31           PDSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN4\_256TBL\_PMQ    M55386C00062

[PR848710]

* BIN0: MCS 0  -  MCS 4    or MCS 28   PDSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN0\_256TBL\_PMQ   M55386C00058
* BIN1: MCS 5  -  MCS 10  or MCS 29  PDSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN1\_256TBL\_PMQ    M55386C00059
* BIN2: MCS 11 - MCS 15                      PDSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN2\_256TBL\_PMQ    M55386C00060
* BIN3: MCS 16 - MCS 19  or MCS 30  PDSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN3\_256TBL\_PMQ    M55386C00061
* BIN4: MCS 20 - MCS 27  or MCS 31  PDSCH\_CP\_INRE\_BIN4\_256TBL\_PMQ    M55386C00062

[End PR848710]

**Increment value: 1**

Counters should be incremented by 1 for each PMQAP profile which is assigned to each bearer with scheduled data within corresponding UE regardless of whether it is in transient phase.

Counters shouldn't be updated when the SRB control message was sending over the PDSCH.

**Note:**

1. Counters are based on legacy counters from PDSCH\_INIRE\_VOL\_256TBL\_MCS00 (M55304C06000) to PDSCH\_INIRE\_VOL\_256TBL\_MCS31 (M55304C06031).
2. In DL is used CP-OFDM only.

#### 2.9.6.2.0-2 Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH) NR DL HARQ (ID: 12583506)

**2.9.6.2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12583610`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
Successful PDSCH transmissions by any transmission with 256QAM MCS table using MCS 0 ... 31

---

**2.9.6.2.0-2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12583611`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
Measurement: NR DL HARQ  
NetAct name: PDSCH\_SUCC\_ANY\_256TBL\_MCS\_00 ... PDSCH\_SUCC\_ANY\_256TBL\_MCS\_31  
PI ID: M55300C06000 ... M55300C06031  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9): PM Counter Search in NIDD.

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when HARQ-ACK is received for any transmission on PDSCH with 256QAM modulation scheme when all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives for PUCCH per grant IE ackNack=1 (Nack) indicated in UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqDL.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15584\_replaced([11512786](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRsQQPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* 5G-L2-PS receives for PUSCH per grant IE ackNack1BitUci=1 (Ack) OR ackNackUciMoreThan1Bit=1 (Ack) indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqD from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15584\_replaced([11512786](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRsQQPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PdschConfig structure (5G\_L2\_IF\_428\_replaced([10975561](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VBsNfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* IE mcsTable=1: 256QAM MCS table is used for PDSCH

Increment value: The sum of HARQ ACK feedback received for any transmission attempt over the measurement period for UEs.

---

**2.9.6.2.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `12583612`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
Successful PDSCH transmissions by any transmission with 64QAM MCS table using MCS 0 ... 31

---

* 5G-L2-PS receives for PUCCH per grant IE ackNack=1 (Ack) indicated in UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqD.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15584\_replaced([11512786](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRsQQPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* 5G-L2-PS receives for PUSCH per grant IE ackNack1BitUci=1 (Ack) OR ackNackUciMoreThan1Bit=1 (Ack) indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqD from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15584\_replaced([11512786](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRsQQPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PdschConfig structure (5G\_L2\_IF\_428\_replaced([10975561](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VBsNfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* IE mcsTable=0: 64QAM table

Increment value: The sum of HARQ ACK feedback received for any transmission attempt over the measurement period per for UEs.

---

**2.9.6.2.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `12583614`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
Unsuccessful PDSCH transmissions by last HARQ reTx with 256QAM MCS table using MCS 0 ... 31

---

**2.9.6.2.0-2.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `12583615`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
Measurement: NR DL HARQ  
NetAct name: PDSCH\_UNSUCC\_256TBL\_MCS\_00 ... PDSCH\_UNSUCC\_256TBL\_MCS\_31  
PI ID: M55300C07000 ... M55300C07031  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9): PM Counter Search in NIDD.

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when PDSCH isn't successfully decoded for the final HARQ transmissions with 256QAM modulation scheme when all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives
* for PUCCH per grant IE ackNack=0 (Nack) indicated in UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqD.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15584\_replaced([11512786](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRsQQPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) OR
* dtx=nonDTX in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespP which are received by L2-PS from 5G-L1\_UL
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PdschConfig structure (5G\_L2\_IF\_428\_replaced([10975561](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VBsNfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* IE mcsTable=1: 256QAM MCS table is used for PDSCH
* 5G-L2-PS receives for PUSCH per grant
* IE ackNack1BitUci=0 (Nack) OR ackNackUciMoreThan1Bit=0 (Nack) indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqD from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15584\_replaced([11512786](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRsQQPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) AND
* IE maxDlHarqTx is reached indicated in PsCell\_CellGroupSetupReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_3117\_replaced([10966509](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UPCB_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) OR PsCell\_CellGroupReconfigReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_47\_replaced([10966782](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UQQMfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), where maxDlHarqTx ​​> 1.

Increment value: The sum of Unsuccessful last retransmissions on PDSCH over the measurement period for UEs with 256QAM MCS table.

---

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
Measurement: NR DL HARQ

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when PDSCH isn't successfully decoded for the final HARQ transmissions with 64QAM modulation scheme when all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives
* for PUCCH per grant IE ackNack=0 (Nack) indicated in UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqD.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15584\_replaced([11512786](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRsQQPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) OR
* dtx=nonDTX in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespP which are received by L2-PS from 5G-L1\_UL
* 5G-L2-PS receives for PUSCH per grant
* IE ackNack1BitUci=0 (Nack) OR ackNackUciMoreThan1Bit=0 (Nack) indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqD from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15584\_replaced([11512786](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRsQQPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) AND
* IE maxDlHarqTx is reached indicated in PsCell\_CellGroupSetupReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_3117\_replaced([10966509](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UPCB_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) OR PsCell\_CellGroupReconfigReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_47\_replaced([10966782](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UQQMfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), where maxDlHarqTx ​​> 1.
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PdschConfig structure (5G\_L2\_IF\_428\_replaced([10975561](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VBsNfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

Increment value: The sum of unsuccessful last retransmissions on PDSCH over the measurement period for UEs.

**2.9.6.2.0-2.0-5**  (ID: `12686828`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
HARQ retransmission distribution

---

**2.9.6.2.0-2.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `12686829`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
Measurement: NR DL HARQ  
NetAct name: PDSCH\_INI\_TX, PDSCH\_2ND\_TX .. PDSCH\_8TH\_TX, PDSCH\_UNSUCC\_LAST\_RETX\_DTX, PDSCH\_UNSUCC\_LAST\_RETX  
PI ID: M55300C00050 .. M55300C00059  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD.

Update time: Whenever L2-PS receives one of the following messages: UlData::PucchReceiveRespHarqD or UlData::PuschReceiveRespHarqD, L2-PS shall check whether the counters are enabled for the given DRB profile, and if so, L2-PS shall update those counters (see structure definiton in: actNrPdschTxDistCounters ([12677076](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_qcFGEkw8EfC0Ye3M8ARUWQ))).

Increment value:

The PDSCH\_INI\_TX counter shall be incremented in the case of an initial transmission.

The corresponding PDSCH\_2TH\_TX to PDSCH\_8TH\_TX counters shall be incremented for the 2nd to 8th retransmissions.

The PDSCH\_UNSUCC\_LAST\_RETX\_DTX counter shall be incremented if all retransmissions, including the last one, ended in DTX.

The PDSCH\_UNSUCC\_LAST\_RETX counter shall be incremented in case the last retransmission results in either DTX or NACK.

Note: Speculative DTX is also taken into account.

---

Successful PDSCH transmissions by any transmission with LowSE MCS table using MCS 00 ... 31

---

**2.9.6.2.0-3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12583606`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
Measurement: NR DL HARQ LowSE MCS Table  
NetAct name: PDSCH\_SUCC\_ANY\_LOWSE\_MCS\_00 ... PDSCH\_SUCC\_ANY\_LOWSE\_MCS\_31  
PI ID: M55366C03000 ... M55366C03031  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9): PM Counter Search in NIDD.

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when HARQ-ACK is received for any transmission on PDSCH with 64QAM LowSE modulation scheme when all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives for PUCCH per grant IE ackNack=1 (Ack) indicated in UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqD.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15584\_replaced([11512786](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRsQQPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* 5G-L2-PS receives for PUSCH per grant IE ackNack1BitUci=1 (Ack) OR ackNackUciMoreThan1Bit=1 (Ack) indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqD from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15584\_replaced([11512786](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRsQQPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PdschConfig structure (5G\_L2\_IF\_428\_replaced([10975561](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VBsNfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* IE mcsTable=2: 64QAM LowSE MCA table is used for PDSCH

Increment value: The sum of HARQ ACK feedback received for any transmission attempt over the measurement period for UEs.

---

**2.9.6.2.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `12583608`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
Unsuccessful PDSCH transmissions by last HARQ reTx with LowSE MCS table using MCS 00 ... 31

---

**2.9.6.2.0-3.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12583609`)

Physical Downlink Shared Channel Receive (PDSCH)
Measurement: NR DL HARQ LowSE MCS Table  
NetAct name: PDSCH\_UNSUCC\_LOWSE\_MCS\_00 ... PDSCH\_UNSUCC\_LOWSE\_MCS\_31      
PI ID: M55366C04000 ... M55366C04031  
Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9): PM Counter Search in NIDD.

Update time:

5G-L2-PS shall update counter when PDSCH isn't successfully decoded for the final HARQ transmissions with 64QAM LowSE modulation scheme when all below conditions are met:

* 5G-L2-PS receives
* for PUCCH per grant IE ackNack=0 (Nack) indicated in UlData\_PucchReceiveRespHarqD.pucchResources from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15584\_replaced([11512786](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRsQQPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) OR
* dtx=nonDTX in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespP which are received by L2-PS from 5G-L1\_UL
* 5G-L2-PS receives for PUSCH per grant
* IE ackNack1BitUci=0 (Nack) OR ackNackUciMoreThan1Bit=0 (Nack) indicated in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespHarqD from 5G-L1-UL (5G\_L1\_IF\_15584\_replaced([11512786](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRsQQPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) AND
* IE maxDlHarqTx is reached indicated in PsCell\_CellGroupSetupReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_3117\_replaced([10966509](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UPCB_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) OR PsCell\_CellGroupReconfigReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_47\_replaced([10966782](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UQQMfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), where maxDlHarqTx ​​> 1.
* 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserSetupReq from 5G-CP-RT with PdschConfig structure ([10975561](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VBsNfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)):
* IE mcsTable=2: 64QAM LowSE MCA table is used for PDSCH

Note:

If the HARQ Ack of the last retransmitted data is not received, increment the counter for the profile matching the DRB Id for which the data was transmitted but the Ack not received failed.

Increment value: The sum of unsuccessful last retransmissions on PDSCH over the measurement period for UEs
