### 2.9.7.0-17 Load Control Average time consumed for non-scheduling-related processing (ID: 11198049)

**2.9.7.0-17.0-1**  (ID: `11198054`)

Load Control
Introduction

---

**2.9.7.0-17.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11198056`)

Load Control
The L2-PS load control manages the time for non scheduling-related processing per core and not per DL/UL scheduler, therefore these counters shall also measure the time for non scheduling-related processing which is globally consumed on a specific core.

“Core” is not a valid ‘aggregation dimension’ for PM counters and “NRCELLGRP” is chosen instead. Nevertheless (for the reason mentioned above) the measured time doesn’t refer to the non-scheduling processing of the NRCELLGRP but of the core where the NRCELLGRP is deployed, according to the table below:

|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Counter | Update Time | Update Value |
| AVG\_CONS\_PROC\_TIME\_NSCHD\_DLSLT (NRCELLGRP A) | Slot of load type = loadTypeDlOnly | Time consumed for non scheduling-related processing on the L2-PS core hosting the DL-sch of NRCELLGRP A |
| AVG\_CONS\_PROC\_TIME\_NSCHD\_ULSLT (NRCELLGRP A) | Slot of load type = loadTypeUlOnly | Time consumed for non scheduling-related processing on the L2-PS core hosting the UL-sch of NRCELLGRP A |
| AVG\_CONS\_PROC\_TIME\_NSCHD\_MIXSLT\_DL (NRCELLGRP A) | Slot of load type = loadTypeMixed | Time consumed for non scheduling-related processing on the L2-PS core hosting the DL-sch of NRCELLGRP A |
| AVG\_CONS\_PROC\_TIME\_NSCHD\_MIXSLT\_UL (NRCELLGRP A) | Slot of load type = loadTypeMixed | Time consumed for non scheduling-related processing on the L2-PS core hosting the UL-sch of NRCELLGRP A |

The calculation of the “Time consumed for non scheduler-related processing” is done per core and slot Load type and the same value is used to update the affected counters for that slot load type.

For a slot n of load type = loadTypeDlOnly and a core Y:

* Calculated Value:

consumedTimeForNonSchedProcessing(n, core Y) = slotUtilization(n, core Y) + lastSrsBmSlotUtilization(n, core Y) - SUM(all DL-sched X on core Y){ consumedTimeForSchedProcessing(n, dl-sch X) }

where:

* consumedTimeForSchedProcessing(n, dl-sch X) is calculated in 5G\_L2\_22676\_replaced([11197898](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29ROl_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));
* Affected Counters:
* AVG\_CONS\_PROC\_TIME\_NSCHD\_DLSLT of all the NRCELLGRPs which DL-scheduler is hosted by core Y, are updated with the value above;

For a slot n of load type = loadTypeUlOnly and a core Y:

* Calculated Value:

consumedTimeForNonSchedProcessing(n, core Y) = slotUtilization(n, core Y) + lastSrsBmSlotUtilization(n, core Y) - SUM(all UL-sched X on core Y){ consumedTimeForSchedProcessing(n, ul-sch X) }

where:

* consumedTimeForSchedProcessing(n, ul-sch X) is calculated in 5G\_L2\_22715\_replaced([11197907](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29ROmfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));
* Affected Counters:
* AVG\_CONS\_PROC\_TIME\_NSCHD\_ULSLT of all the NRCELLGRPs which UL-scheduler is hosted by core Y, are updated with the value above;

For a slot n of load type = loadTypeMixed and a core Y:

* Calculated Value:

consumedTimeForNonSchedProcessing(n, core Y) = slotUtilization(n, core Y) + lastSrsBmSlotUtilization(n, core Y) - SUM(all DL-sched X on core Y){ consumedTimeForSchedProcessing(n, dl-sch X) } - SUM(all UL-sched X on core Y){ consumedTimeForSchedProcessing(n, ul-sch X) }

where:

* consumedTimeForSchedProcessing(n, dl-sch X) is calculated in 5G\_L2\_22717\_replaced([11197916](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29ROm_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));
* consumedTimeForSchedProcessing(n, ul-sch X) is calculated in 5G\_L2\_22719\_replaced([11197924](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29ROnfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));
* Affected Counters:
* AVG\_CONS\_PROC\_TIME\_NSCHD\_MIXSLT\_DL of all the NRCELLGRPs which DL-scheduler is hosted by core Y, are updated with the value above;
* AVG\_CONS\_PROC\_TIME\_NSCHD\_MIXSLT\_UL of all the NRCELLGRPs which UL-scheduler is hosted by core Y, are updated with the value above;
* slotUtilization is calculated in 5G\_L2\_15565\_replaced([11213581](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-syAPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* lastSrsBmSlotUtilization is traced within ulLoadControlData (5G\_L2\_6441\_replaced([11203655](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_299LEPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and it measures the time consumed per core for SRS BM processing in a slot. Such processing is not counted within slotUtilization.

Note:

Based on this definition, depending on the deployment of the schedulers on the L2-PS cores, some of the counters shall provide identical information:

Slot of load type = loadTypeDlOnly:

* AVG\_CONS\_PROC\_TIME\_NSCHD\_DLSLT (NRCELLGRP A) == AVG\_CONS\_PROC\_TIME\_NSCHD\_DLSLT (NRCELLGRP B), if DL-sch(NRCELLGRP A) and DL-sch(NRCELLGRP B) are deployed on same L2-PS core;

Slot of load type = loadTypeUlOnly:

* AVG\_CONS\_PROC\_TIME\_NSCHD\_ULSLT (NRCELLGRP A) == AVG\_CONS\_PROC\_TIME\_NSCHD\_ULSLT (NRCELLGRP B), if UL-sch(NRCELLGRP A) and UL-sch(NRCELLGRP B) are deployed on same L2-PS core;

Slot of load type = loadTypeMixed:

* AVG\_CONS\_PROC\_TIME\_NSCHD\_MIXSLT\_DL (NRCELLGRP A) == AVG\_CONS\_PROC\_TIME\_NSCHD\_MIXSLT\_DL (NRCELLGRP B), if DL-sch(NRCELLGRP A) and DL-sch(NRCELLGRP B) are deployed on same L2-PS core;
* AVG\_CONS\_PROC\_TIME\_NSCHD\_MIXSLT\_UL (NRCELLGRP A) == AVG\_CONS\_PROC\_TIME\_NSCHD\_MIXSLT\_UL (NRCELLGRP B), if UL-sch(NRCELLGRP A) and UL-sch(NRCELLGRP B) are deployed on same L2-PS core;
* AVG\_CONS\_PROC\_TIME\_NSCHD\_MIXSLT\_DL == AVG\_CONS\_PROC\_TIME\_NSCHD\_MIXSLT\_UL, if DL-sch and UL-sch of same or different NRCELLGRPs are deployed on same L2-PS core;

---

**2.9.7.0-18.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11198102`)

Load Control
Measurement: NR L2-PS overload report in NRCELLGRP

NetAct name: MAX\_CONS\_PROC\_TIME\_NSCHD\_DLSLT

### 2.9.7.0-19 Load Control Load States Counters (ID: 11198130)

**2.9.7.0-19.0-1**  (ID: `11198132`)

Load Control
Number of slots in which the DL scheduler is in no or nominal load state

---

**2.9.7.0-19.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11198138`)

Load Control
Measurement: NR L2-PS overload report in NRCELLGRP

NetAct name: NORMAL\_LOAD\_DL

PI ID: M55384CRD50002

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

* every slot of type "loadTypeDlOnly" or "loadTypeMixed" (5G\_L2\_6333\_replaced([11212562](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-mrUfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* For performance reasons L2-PS can avoid updating the counter in the shared-memory bank (5G\_UP\_2732\_replaced([11392091](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ufcd8fvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) at each new sample. The samples can be accumulated locally and the counter updated once per radio frame (for example) with the accumulated value.

Increment value:

The DL-sch shall increment the counter of '1' if in the current slot the following condition is true:

(averageCs1ListMaxSize > rdCs1MaxThresHighForLoadStateCounter)

where averageCs1ListMaxSize is defined in 5G\_L2\_19562\_replaced([11213721](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-uAGvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and rdCs1MaxThresHighForLoadStateCounter is defined in 5G\_L2\_22320\_replaced([11191172](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28cIIvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

the counter is updated only if rdEnableOverloadControlCounters = 1.

---

**2.9.7.0-19.0-2**  (ID: `11198144`)

Load Control
Number of slots in which the DL scheduler is in degraded moderate load state

---

**2.9.7.0-19.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11198148`)

Load Control
Measurement: NR L2-PS overload report in NRCELLGRP

NetAct name: MODERATE\_LOAD\_DL

PI ID: M55384CRD50003

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

* every slot of type "loadTypeDlOnly" or "loadTypeMixed" (5G\_L2\_6333\_replaced([11212562](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-mrUfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* For performance reasons L2-PS can avoid updating the counter in the shared-memory bank (5G\_UP\_2732\_replaced([11392091](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ufcd8fvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) at each new sample. The samples can be accumulated locally and the counter updated once per radio frame (for example) with the accumulated value.

Increment value:

The DL-sch shall increment the counter of '1' if in the current slot the following condition is true:

(averageCs1ListMaxSize > rdCs1MaxThresLowForLoadStateCounter) AND (averageCs1ListMaxSize <= rdCs1MaxThresHighForLoadStateCounter)

where averageCs1ListMaxSize is defined in 5G\_L2\_19562\_replaced([11213721](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-uAGvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), rdCs1MaxThresHighForLoadStateCounter is defined in 5G\_L2\_22320\_replaced([11191172](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28cIIvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and rdCs1MaxThresLowForLoadStateCounter in 5G\_L2\_22318\_replaced([11191159](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28cIIPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

the counter is updated only if rdEnableOverloadControlCounters = 1.

### 2.9.7.0-20 Load Control Average limited UE scheduling per slot (ID: 12737856)

**2.9.7.0-20.0-1**  (ID: `12738383`)

Load Control
**Calculation of the number of FDM UEs skipped in a slot**

---

**2.9.7.0-20.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12738384`)

Load Control
If actFdmScheduling and actFdmUeSkippingOlc features are enabled, 5G-L2-PS can skip scheduling certain number of UEs as described in [11213271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-q8xvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-q8xvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9").

The number of FDM skipped UEs are computed as follows:

IF (fdmUesSkipped), then:

numFdmSkippedUes = min{ numOfRemainingUesInCs2List,  (rrmMaxNumUesFdmOlc - scheduledUes) }

ELSE

numFdmSkippedUes = 0

where, "numOfRemainingUesInCs2List" represents the number of UEs still present in the CS2 list that couldn't be processed due to FDM UE skipping ([11213271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-q8xvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-q8xvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")).

Note:

* NRCELL.actFdmScheduling is configured to L2-PS via PsCell\_CellSetupReq ([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")) within struct fdmConfig ([10969448](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Ucdbvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* actFdmUeSkippingOlc is configured to L2-PS via PsCell\_CellGroupSetupReq ([10966509](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UPCB_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* rrmMaxNumUesFdmOlc is defined in [11213384](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-rj2vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-rj2vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9").
* scheduledUes is the number of UE(s) scheduled by the FD scheduler ([11213112](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-purPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-purPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ")).
* fdmUesSkipped is described in [11213271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-q8xvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-q8xvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9").

---

**2.9.7.0-20.0-2**  (ID: `12738393`)

Load Control
**Calculation of short CS1 gap**

---

**2.9.7.0-20.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12738394`)

Load Control
If the number of UEs is very low, or (DL or UL) schedule load is less on a particular slot, or if few UEs are added to the CS1 list due to selection restrictions applied to the pre-scheduler candidate set ([11174627](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kudxRfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kudxRfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9") for DL and [11195013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4tnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4tnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9") for UL), the resulting CS1 size may be too short, which results in less averaged number of UEs scheduled per slot.

The short CS1 gap computed as follows:

shortCs1Gap = max{ 0, (rrmMaxNumUesFdmOlc - numUesInCs1) }

where, "numUesInCs1" represents the number of UEs present in the CS1 list that were added as part of UE selection criteria described in [11174627](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kudxRfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kudxRfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9") for DL scheduler and [11195013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4tnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4tnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9") for UL scheduler.

Note:

* rrmMaxNumUesFdmOlc is defined in [11213384](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-rj2vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-rj2vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9").

---

**2.9.7.0-20.0-3**  (ID: `12737858`)

Load Control
**Average number of DL UEs per slot limited by BBRM UE pooling**

---

**2.9.7.0-20.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `12737859`)

Load Control
**Measurement: NR L2 overload report in DU for RLC and MAC**

**NetAct name: AVG\_DL\_UE\_SLOT\_LIM\_UE\_POOL**

**PI ID: M55381CRD50011**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).**

**Update time:**

* If the Scheduled UE/slot pooling feature is enabled (i.e. NRBTS.actScheUePooling or NRBTS.actScheUePoolingEnh is set to True)
* Every slot of type "loadTypeDlOnly" or "loadTypeMixed" ([11212562](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-mrUfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* For performance reasons L2-PS can avoid updating the counter in the shared-memory bank ([11392091](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ufcd8fvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) at each new sample. Since the limitation applied by BBRM Scheduled UE/slot pooling remains constant in any given pooling period(i.e.: bbPoolEvalPeriod). The value can be computed once per BBRM pooling period and multiplied by DL eligible slots in the BBRM pooling period.

**Increment value:**

5G-L2-PS DL scheduler shall increment the counter by value formulated below:

Increment value = NRCELL.maxNumPdschAllocationPerSlot - maxNumPdschPerSlotByBBRM

Note:

* NRBTS.actScheUePooling and NRBTS.actScheUePoolingEnh is configured to L2-PS via PsCnfg\_AddressDistributionReq ([10966093](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UL-vvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UL-vvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")).
* bbPoolEvalPeriod is configured to L2-PS via PsCnfg\_AddressDistributionReq ([10966093](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UL-vvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UL-vvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")) within structure bbPoolInfos ([10966229](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UNM1Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UNM1Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")).
* NRCELL.maxNumPdschAllocationPerSlot is configured via PsCell\_CellSetupReq ([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")) or re-configured via PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq ([10970911](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UlnW_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UlnW_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")).
* maxNumPdschPerSlotByBBRM is defined in [11210371](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw4zLvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw4zLvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9").

**2.9.7.0-20.0-4**  (ID: `12738314`)

Load Control
**Average number of DL UEs per slot limited by Load Control**

---

**2.9.7.0-20.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `12738315`)

Load Control
**Measurement: NR L2 overload report in DU for RLC and MAC**

**NetAct name: AVG\_DL\_UE\_SLOT\_LIM\_OLC**

**PI ID: M55381CRD50013**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).**

**Update time:**

* If the FDM scheduling feature is enabled (i.e. actFdmScheduling = True).
* Every slot of type "loadTypeDlOnly" or "loadTypeMixed" ([11212562](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-mrUfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* For performance reasons L2-PS can avoid updating the counter in the shared-memory bank ([11392091](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ufcd8fvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) at each new sample. The samples can be accumulated locally and the counter updated once per radio frame (for example) with the accumulated value.

**Increment value:**

5G-L2-PS DL scheduler shall increment the counter by value formulated below:

Increment value = rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl - rrmMaxNumUesFdmOlc

Note:

* NRCELL.actFdmSchedulingis configured to L2-PS via PsCell\_CellSetupReq ([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")) within struct fdmConfig ([10969448](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Ucdbvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl is defined in [11179079](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku3Z6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku3Z6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9").
* rrmMaxNumUesFdmOlc is defined in [11213384](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-rj2vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-rj2vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9").

---

**2.9.7.0-20.0-5**  (ID: `12738320`)

Load Control
**Average number of DL UEs per slot limited by RRM**

---

**2.9.7.0-20.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `12738321`)

Load Control
**Measurement: NR L2 overload report in DU for RLC and MAC**

**NetAct name: AVG\_DL\_UE\_SLOT\_LIM\_RRM**

**PI ID: M55381CRD50015**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).**

**Update time:**

* If the FDM scheduling feature is enabled (i.e. actFdmScheduling = True).
* Every slot of type "loadTypeDlOnly" or "loadTypeMixed" ([11212562](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-mrUfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* For performance reasons L2-PS can avoid updating the counter in the shared-memory bank ([11392091](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ufcd8fvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) at each new sample. The samples can be accumulated locally and the counter updated once per radio frame (for example) with the accumulated value.

**Increment value:**

5G-L2-PS DL scheduler shall increment the counter by value formulated below:

Increment value = rrmMaxNumUesFdmOlc - scheduledUes - numFdmSkippedUes - shortCs1Gap

Note:

* NRCELL.actFdmScheduling is configured to L2-PS via PsCell\_CellSetupReq ([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")) within struct fdmConfig ([10969448](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Ucdbvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* rrmMaxNumUesFdmOlc is defined in [11213384](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-rj2vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-rj2vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9").
* scheduledUes is the number of UE(s) scheduled by the FD scheduler ([11213112](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-purPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-purPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ")).
* numFdmSkippedUes is defined in [12738383](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uSlju3jVEfCdZt6bzaG3fw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uSlju3jVEfCdZt6bzaG3fw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9").
* shortCs1Gap is defined in [12738393](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-BVClHjXEfCdZt6bzaG3fw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-BVClHjXEfCdZt6bzaG3fw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9").

---

**2.9.7.0-20.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `12738353`)

Load Control
**Measurement: NR L2 overload report in DU for RLC and MAC**

**NetAct name: AVG\_DL\_UE\_SLOT\_LIM\_FDM\_SKIP**

**PI ID: M55381CRD50017**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).**

**Update time:**

* If the FDM scheduling feature is enabled (i.e. actFdmScheduling = True).
* If FDM UE Skipping feature is enabled (i.e. actFdmUeSkippingOlc = True)
* Every slot of type "loadTypeDlOnly" or "loadTypeMixed" ([11212562](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-mrUfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* For performance reasons L2-PS can avoid updating the counter in the shared-memory bank ([11392091](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ufcd8fvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) at each new sample. The samples can be accumulated locally and the counter updated once per radio frame (for example) with the accumulated value.

**Increment value:**

5G-L2-PS DL scheduler shall increment the counter by value as described in [12738383](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uSlju3jVEfCdZt6bzaG3fw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uSlju3jVEfCdZt6bzaG3fw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9").

Note:

* NRCELL.actFdmScheduling is configured to L2-PS via PsCell\_CellSetupReq ([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")) within struct fdmConfig ([10969448](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Ucdbvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* actFdmUeSkippingOlc is configured to L2-PS via PsCell\_CellGroupSetupReq ([10966509](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UPCB_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).**

**Update time:**

* Every slot of type "loadTypeDlOnly" or "loadTypeMixed" ([11212562](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-mrUfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* For performance reasons L2-PS can avoid updating the counter in the shared-memory bank ([11392091](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ufcd8fvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) at each new sample. The samples can be accumulated locally and the counter updated once per radio frame (for example) with the accumulated value.

**Increment value:**

5G-L2-PS DL scheduler shall increment the counter by value as described in [12738393](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-BVClHjXEfCdZt6bzaG3fw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-BVClHjXEfCdZt6bzaG3fw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9").

**2.9.7.0-20.0-8**  (ID: `12738421`)

Load Control
**Average number of UL UEs per slot limited by BBRM UE pooling**

---

**2.9.7.0-20.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `12738422`)

Load Control
**Measurement: NR L2 overload report in DU for RLC and MAC**

**NetAct name: AVG\_UL\_UE\_SLOT\_LIM\_UE\_POOL**

**PI ID: M55381CRD50012**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).**

**Update time:**

* If the Scheduled UE/slot pooling feature is enabled (i.e. NRBTS.actScheUePooling or NRBTS.actScheUePoolingEnh is set to True)
* Every slot of type "loadTypeUlOnly" or "loadTypeMixed" ([11212562](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-mrUfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* For performance reasons L2-PS can avoid updating the counter in the shared-memory bank ([11392091](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ufcd8fvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) at each new sample. Since the limitation applied by BBRM Scheduled UE/slot pooling remains constant in any given pooling period(i.e.: bbPoolEvalPeriod). The value can be computed once per BBRM pooling period and multiplied by UL eligible slots in the BBRM pooling period.

**Increment value:**

5G-L2-PS UL scheduler shall increment the counter by value formulated below:

Increment value = NRCELL.maxNumPuschAllocationPerSlot - maxNumPuschPerSlotByBBRM

Note:

* NRBTS.actScheUePooling and NRBTS.actScheUePoolingEnh is configured to L2-PS via PsCnfg\_AddressDistributionReq ([10966093](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UL-vvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UL-vvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")).
* bbPoolEvalPeriod is configured to L2-PS via PsCnfg\_AddressDistributionReq ([10966093](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UL-vvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UL-vvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")) within structure bbPoolInfos ([10966229](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UNM1Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UNM1Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")).
* NRCELL.maxNumPuschAllocationPerSlot is configured via PsCell\_CellSetupReq ([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")) or re-configured via PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq ([10970911](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UlnW_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UlnW_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")).
* maxNumPuschPerSlotByBBRM is defined in [11210371](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw4zLvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw4zLvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9").

**Measurement: NR L2 overload report in DU for RLC and MAC**

**NetAct name: AVG\_UL\_UE\_SLOT\_LIM\_RRM**

**PI ID: M55381CRD50016**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).**

**Update time:**

* If the FDM scheduling feature is enabled (i.e. actFdmScheduling = True).
* Every slot of type "loadTypeUlOnly" or "loadTypeMixed" ([11212562](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-mrUfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* For performance reasons L2-PS can avoid updating the counter in the shared-memory bank ([11392091](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ufcd8fvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) at each new sample. The samples can be accumulated locally and the counter updated once per radio frame (for example) with the accumulated value.

**Increment value:**

5G-L2-PS UL scheduler shall increment the counter by value formulated below:

Increment value = rrmMaxNumUesFdmOlc - scheduledUes - numFdmSkippedUes - shortCs1Gap

Note:

* NRCELL.actFdmScheduling is configured to L2-PS via PsCell\_CellSetupReq ([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")) within struct fdmConfig ([10969448](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Ucdbvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* rrmMaxNumUesFdmOlc is defined in [11213384](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-rj2vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-rj2vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9").
* scheduledUes is the number of UE(s) scheduled by the FD scheduler ([11213112](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-purPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-purPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ")).
* numFdmSkippedUes is defined in [12738383](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uSlju3jVEfCdZt6bzaG3fw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uSlju3jVEfCdZt6bzaG3fw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9").
* shortCs1Gap is defined in [12738393](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-BVClHjXEfCdZt6bzaG3fw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-BVClHjXEfCdZt6bzaG3fw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9").

---

**2.9.7.0-20.0-11**  (ID: `12738427`)

Load Control
**Average number of UL UEs per slot limited by FDM UE skipping**

---

**2.9.7.0-20.0-11.0-1**  (ID: `12738428`)

Load Control
**Measurement: NR L2 overload report in DU for RLC and MAC**

**NetAct name: AVG\_UL\_UE\_SLOT\_LIM\_FDM\_SKIP**

**PI ID: M55381CRD50018**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).**

**Update time:**

* If the FDM scheduling feature is enabled (i.e. actFdmScheduling = True).
* If FDM UE Skipping feature is enabled (i.e. actFdmUeSkippingOlc = True)
* Every slot of type "loadTypeUlOnly" or "loadTypeMixed" ([11212562](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-mrUfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* For performance reasons L2-PS can avoid updating the counter in the shared-memory bank ([11392091](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ufcd8fvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) at each new sample. The samples can be accumulated locally and the counter updated once per radio frame (for example) with the accumulated value.

**Increment value:**

5G-L2-PS UL scheduler shall increment the counter by value as described in [12738383](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uSlju3jVEfCdZt6bzaG3fw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uSlju3jVEfCdZt6bzaG3fw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9").

Note:

* NRCELL.actFdmScheduling is configured to L2-PS via PsCell\_CellSetupReq ([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9")) within struct fdmConfig ([10969448](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Ucdbvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* actFdmUeSkippingOlc is configured to L2-PS via PsCell\_CellGroupSetupReq ([10966509](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UPCB_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

No additional details as compared to NIDD

**2.9.7.1.2.0-1.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `12589883`)

Countermeasures
**Measurement: NR user plane congestion**

**NetAct name:  TOT\_CNTR\_MEAS\_DL\_TYPE5**

**PI ID: M55208C00020**

**Note: This counter provides the total number of samples for which the DL countermeasure type 5 is active**

**Update time:**

This counter counts the number of times the DL MU-MIMO countermeasures are active. This counter counts for all the underneath countermeasures for DL MU-MIMO which are activated at different thresholds. The counter thus gives the aggregate number of sampling intervals for all active countermeasures for DL MU-MIMO.

Note:

[Before PR839240]

During the period of sampling intervals in each slot for all active countermeasures for DL MU-MIMO , L2 PS shall update counter measurement update with 1 /2/3/4 based on  muMimovUeLow/muMimovUeMed/muMimovUeHigh/muMimovUeDisabled status for the cell as the bellow graph.

[image-0][image\_desc]The image displays a timeline or sequence of slots, numbered from 0 to 159. Each slot is represented by a colored rectangle, with different colors indicating different states or types. The colors observed are pink, yellow, light blue, and white. Arrows originate from several slots (specifically slots 0 through 9, and slots 148 through 159) and point downwards towards an oval-shaped text box. The text box contains the following text: "During the period of sampling intervals in each slot, L2 PS shall update counter measurement update with 1/2/3/4 based on muMimovUeLow/muMimovUeMed/muMimovUeHigh/muMimovUeDisabled status for the cell,". There are also dotted lines extending horizontally across the middle of the image, suggesting a continuation of the timeline or a representation of time passing. A small green square is present in the bottom right corner of the image.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-06301856.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

[PR839240]

L2 PS shall update counter measurement update with 1 /2/3/4 based on  muMimovUeLow/muMimovUeMed/muMimovUeHigh/muMimovUeDisabled status for the cell as the bellow graph at the end of the sampling interval if the DL countermeasure typye 5 is active as the bellow graph

[image-1][image\_desc]The image depicts a timeline illustrating different states of MU-MIMO (Multi-User Multiple-Input Multiple-Output) counter updates over periods of sampling intervals, each lasting 160ms. The timeline is divided into four segments, each associated with a specific MU-MIMO status and a corresponding counter measurement update.
The text "MU-MIMO counter updated event case" is present on the left side of the image.
The timeline is visually represented by colored bars (green and blue) indicating the "period of sampling intervals" of 160ms. Arrows connect these intervals to oval-shaped callouts that describe the assumed status and counter update for each interval.
The four callouts are:
1. **assume muMimovUeLow**: This status is associated with a counter measurement update of "1 (+1)".
2. **assume muMimovUeMed**: This status is associated with a counter measurement update of "2 (+2)".
3. **assume muMimovUeHigh**: This status is associated with a counter measurement update of "3 (+3)".
4. **assume muMimovUeDisabled**: This status is associated with a counter measurement update of "3 (+4)".
The image appears to be a screenshot from a spreadsheet or a similar document, indicated by the grid lines in the background.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-06301900.png[/image\_path][/image-1]

[End PR839240]

**Increment value:**

No additional details as compared to NIDD

---

**2.9.7.1.2.0-1.0-6**  (ID: `12533220`)

Countermeasures
Total number of samples in which the DL countermeasure type 6 is active

---

**2.9.7.1.2.0-1.0-6.0-2**  (ID: `12882334`)

Countermeasures
**Measurement: NR user plane congestion**

**NetAct name:  TOT\_CNTR\_MEAS\_DL\_TYPE6**

**PI ID: M55208C00021**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). This counter provides the total number of sampling intervals for which the DL countermeasure type 6 is active. And this counter can be only pegged with FR1 CA enabled by flexibleCAMode != 'basicCAMode' or any invalid value as per [10967202: PsCell\_CellSetupReq Message Content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).**

**Update time:**

This counter is updated with the value 1 at the end of the sampling interval if the DL countermeasure type 6 is active, in which at least one of PCell counter measure based on thrshold in [11120584: CA Relationship management for FR1 due to scheduler processing overload](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqSb4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), [11122225: Core level scheduler processing load status determination for CA activation decision](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) is triggered, according to [11120462: Suspend/Resume DL Buffer Status monitoring](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqRNxPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) and  [11120866: SCell activation / deactivation evaluation](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqU4JvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

When DL RT severity metric is updated as specified in [12449300](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_kZWR8AotEfCT35inaBGo7g) and the countermeasure is triggered as active or is active already.

**Increment value:**

No additional details as compared to NIDD

---

**2.9.7.1.2.0-1.0-7**  (ID: `12533482`)

Countermeasures
Total number of samples in which the DL countermeasure type 7 is active

---

**2.9.7.1.2.0-1.0-7.0-2**  (ID: `12882336`)

Countermeasures
**Measurement: NR user plane congestion**

**NetAct name:  TOT\_CNTR\_MEAS\_DL\_TYPE7**

**PI ID: M55208C00022**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). This counter provides the total number of sampling intervals for which the DL countermeasure type 7 is active. And this counter can be only pegged with FR1 CA enabled by flexibleCAMode != 'basicCAMode' or any invalid value as per [10967202: PsCell\_CellSetupReq Message Content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).**

**Update time:**

This counter is updated with the value 1 at the end of the sampling interval if the DL countermeasure type 7 is active, in which the cell as SCell is overloaded according [11122209: SCell scheduler level processing load status determination for CA activation decision for DL branch](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCEfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) or [11122225: Core level scheduler processing load status determination for CA activation decision](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for DL.

When DL RT severity metric is updated as specified in [12449300](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_kZWR8AotEfCT35inaBGo7g) and the countermeasure is triggered as active or is active already.

**Increment value:**

No additional details as compared to NIDD

---

**2.9.7.1.2.0-1.0-8**  (ID: `12533505`)

Countermeasures
Total number of times the DL countermeasure type 8 is active

---

**2.9.7.1.2.0-1.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `12533506`)

Countermeasures
**Measurement: NR user plane congestion**

**NetAct name:  TOT\_CNTR\_MEAS\_DL\_TYPE8**

**PI ID:**M55208C00023

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).  This counter provides the total number of times the DL countermeasure type 8 is applied.**

**Update time:**

This counter is updated with the value 1 each time if the DL countermeasure type 8 is applied, in which PCell will exclude a SCell for UE SCell activation MACCE  because SCell is overloaded according to [11122209: SCell scheduler level processing load status determination for CA activation decision for DL branch](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCEfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) or [11122218: SCell scheduler level processing load status determination for CA activation decision for UL branch](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCE_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) or [11122225: Core level scheduler processing load status determination for CA activation decision](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for DL or UL.

**Increment value:**

No additional details as compared to NIDD

---

**2.9.7.1.2.0-1.0-9**  (ID: `12533986`)

Countermeasures
Total number of times the DL countermeasure type 9 is active

---

**2.9.7.1.2.0-1.0-9.0-1**  (ID: `12533987`)

Countermeasures
**Measurement: NR user plane congestion**

**NetAct name:  TOT\_CNTR\_MEAS\_DL\_TYPE9**

**PI ID: M55208C00024**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).  This counter provides the total number of times the DL countermeasure type 9 is active.**

**Update time:**

This counter is updated with the value 1 each time if the DL countermeasure type 9 is active, in which PCell deactivate an SCell because the deactivation is caused by SCell overload in [11122234: Evaluation of Scell scheduler processing load for Scell deactivation for DL branch](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCF_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) or [11122241: Evaluation of Scell scheduler processing load for Scell deactivation for UL branch](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCGfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

When DL RT severity metric is updated as specified in [12449300](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_kZWR8AotEfCT35inaBGo7g) and the countermeasure is triggered as active or is active already.

**Increment value:**

No additional details as compared to NIDD

---

Countermeasures
Total number of samples in which the DL countermeasure type 10 is active

---

**2.9.7.1.2.0-1.0-10.0-2**  (ID: `12882337`)

Countermeasures
**Measurement: NR user plane congestion**

**NetAct name:  TOT\_CNTR\_MEAS\_DL\_TYPE10**

**PI ID: M55208C00025**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). This counter provides the total number of sampling intervals for which the DL countermeasure type 10 is active. And this counter can be only pegged with FR1 CA enabled by flexibleCAMode != 'basicCAMode' or any invalid value as per [10967202: PsCell\_CellSetupReq Message Content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).**

This counter is updated with the value 1 at the end of the sampling interval if the DL countermeasure type 10 is active, in which [11122234: Evaluation of Scell scheduler processing load for Scell deactivation for DL branch](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCF_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) overload is triggered.

When DL RT severity metric is updated as specified in [12449300](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_kZWR8AotEfCT35inaBGo7g) and the overload is triggered as active or is active already.

## 2.9.9 VoNR Quality Measurement

### 2.9.9.0-1 VoNR Quality Measurement VoNR DL/UL Residual Bler Measurement (ID: 11198213)

**2.9.9.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11198221`)

VoNR Quality Measurement
The VoNR DL/UL residual BLER is calculated once in 10S as mentioned in 5G\_PM\_2094.

To calculate BLER for all VoNR UEs at the end of 10s could overshoot the slot duration.

To avoid this,In L2PS the below design is followed.

1) For every Vonr UE Tx updated the rrmNumOfFailedTbTxQci1 and rrmNumOfIniHarqTxQci1 for both UL and DL.

2) The number of ues for computation is optimized based on the available time in the slot, as shown in below section.

3) The number of slots required for BLER computation just before the end of 10s is determined by R&D parameter rdNumOfSlotForVonrCounterProcessing

4) The number of UEs to be processed in the slot in post TD phase is determined by left over time in slot dividing by time required for processing one UE. The max ue that can be processed in a slot is determined by rdMaxUesForVonrCounterUpdatePerSlot.

Num UE's to be processed = min(Left Over time in Slot/ Time needed for one processing, rdMaxUesForVonrCounterUpdatePerSlot)

5) However during this period of bler computation, there could be cases where the UEs ACK/NACK could be ignored for BLER computation.

[image-0][image\_desc]The image displays a timeline or a process flow diagram with time on the horizontal axis. The timeline starts at 0.0 and extends to 1000.0.
There are two main segments indicated by horizontal bars. The first segment spans from 0.0 to approximately the middle of the timeline and is labeled "10sec". The second segment also spans approximately 10 seconds and is located after the first segment, ending at 1000.0.
Below the timeline, there are annotations and graphical elements.
A label "startTimer" is present on the left side, with a teal-colored line graph originating from it and extending horizontally. This graph shows an initial dip and then stabilizes.
Two bracketed annotations are present below the timeline:
1. A longer bracket on the left, spanning the first "10sec" segment, is labeled "Slot for Vonr Tx data collection".
2. A shorter bracket on the right, spanning a portion of the second "10sec" segment, is labeled "vonr data processing for all the ues".
A yellow highlighted rectangular area is visible on the timeline, positioned within the first "10sec" segment.
A blue downward-pointing arrow is located above the timeline, pointing towards the beginning of the first "10sec" segment.
A text annotation is placed below the timeline, spanning across both "10sec" segments. It reads: "20 slot(In 10 sec sampling time 1000 unique Ue's Vonr Tx is possible, divide the bler computation of the ues among 20 slot controlled via Radparam)". This text describes the functionality or purpose of the timeline segments.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_9414.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

### 2.9.9.0-2 VoNR Quality Measurement PDSCH transmissions for VoNR with 64QAM MCS table (ID: 11198224)

**2.9.9.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11198227`)

VoNR Quality Measurement
Measurement: NR DL Harq

NetAct name: PDSCH\_TX\_VONR\_64TBL\_MCS\_00 ....PDSCH\_TX\_VONR\_64TBL\_MCS\_31

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time: 5G-L2-PS shall update The counter when the HARQ feedback (ACK, NACK, or DTX) is received for a MAC PDU (TB) with VoNR packets sent as initial transmission or re-transmission on PDSCH using MCS 0 to MCS 31 with 64QAM.

Increment value: 5G-L2-PS shall increment the counter with the number of PDSCH transmissions scheduled (including retransmissions).

### 2.9.9.0-4 VoNR Quality Measurement PDSCH transmissions for VoNR with 1024QAM MCS table - Bin0 ... Bin4 (ID: 13133880)

**2.9.9.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `13133913`)

VoNR Quality Measurement
**Measurement: NR DL HARQ 1024QAM MCS table**

**NetAct name: PDSCH\_TX\_VONR\_1024TBL\_BIN0 ... PDSCH\_TX\_VONR\_1024TBL\_BIN4**

**PI ID: M55401C00119 ... M55401C00123**

**Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in [11192143: PM Counter Search in NIDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_5KBG5p5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA).**

**Update time:**

Update time: 5G-L2-PS shall update the counter when the HARQ feedback (ACK, NACK, or DTX) is received for a MAC PDU (TB) with VoNR packets sent as initial transmission or re-transmission on PDSCH using 1024QAM MCS table.

**Increment value:**

5G-L2-PS shall increment dedicate counter according to the modulation order used for PDSCH scheduling:

* PDSCH\_TX\_VONR\_1024TBL\_BIN0: QPSK (corresponding MCS indexes: 0, 1, 2, 27)
* PDSCH\_TX\_VONR\_1024TBL\_BIN1: 16Qam (corresponding MCS indexes: 3, 4, 5, 28)
* PDSCH\_TX\_VONR\_1024TBL\_BIN2: 64Qam (corresponding MCS indexes: 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 29)
* PDSCH\_TX\_VONR\_1024TBL\_BIN3: 256Qam (corresponding MCS indexes: 15, 16, 17, 18, 19, 20, 21, 22, 30)
* PDSCH\_TX\_VONR\_1024TBL\_BIN4: 1024Qam (corresponding MCS indexes: 23, 24, 25, 26, 31)

---

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time: 5G-L2-PS shall update The counter when the HARQ feedback (ACK, NACK, or DTX) is received for a MAC PDU (TB) with VoNR packets sent as initial transmission or re-transmission on PUSCH using MCS 0 to MCS 31 with 256QAM using CP-OFDM.

Increment value: 5G-L2-PS shall increment the counter with the number of PUSCH transmissions scheduled (including retransmissions).

## 2.9.10 Machine learning

### 2.9.10-1 Scell activation use case

#### 2.9.10-1.0-1 Scell activation use case UL Serving Beam ID (ID: 12521469)

**2.9.10-1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `13345415`)

Scell activation use case
Measurement: UL Serving Beam ID - Beam 0 to 5

NetAct name: UL\_SERV\_BEAM\_ID\_BEAM\_00 to 05

PI ID: M55305C01001 to M55305C01006

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

Along with other conditions mentioned in the counter definition, additional condition to be considered is

1. NR FDD supercell scenario, the counter is incremented for the corresponding UL subcell index when PUSCH is scheduled.

Beam ID 0 to 5 maps to Subcell Index 0 to n maps to subcell indicated in 0th to nth index of UlSubCellList[] within PsCell\_CellSetupReq message(n has a range from 1 to 5 where the number of UL subcells in supercell is 2 to 6). UE's UL serving subcell index is used to map the update to the corresponding counter UL\_SERV\_BEAM\_ID\_BEAM\_00 to UL\_SERV\_BEAM\_ID\_BEAM\_05.

Example: UL Serving Beam ID counter is updated when UE has been scheduled a PUSCH grant, in this manner

1. UE's serving subcell is the subcell at index 0 -> Counter UL\_SERV\_BEAM\_ID\_BEAM\_00 is incremented

2. UE's serving subcell is the subcell at index 1 -> Counter UL\_SERV\_BEAM\_ID\_BEAM\_01 is incremented

3. UE's serving subcell is the subcell at index 2 -> Counter UL\_SERV\_BEAM\_ID\_BEAM\_02 is incremented

4. UE's serving subcell is the subcell at index 3 -> Counter UL\_SERV\_BEAM\_ID\_BEAM\_03 is incremented

5. UE's serving subcell is the subcell at index 4 -> Counter UL\_SERV\_BEAM\_ID\_BEAM\_04 is incremented

6. UE's serving subcell is the subcell at index 5 -> Counter UL\_SERV\_BEAM\_ID\_BEAM\_05 is incremented

[CB008577-D]

For FDD cell with actBeamforming = TRUE, though with one SSB can mapping to UL\_SERV\_BEAM\_ID\_BEAM\_00, UL\_SERV\_BEAM\_ID\_BEAM\_00 is not updated.

[End CB008577-D]

Increment value:

No additional details as compared to NIDD.

---

#### 2.9.10-1.0-2 Scell activation use case Serving Beam ID before HO (ID: 12522051)

**2.9.10-1.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `13345419`)

Scell activation use case
Measurement: Serving Beam ID before HO - Beam ID 0 to Beam ID 5

NetAct name: SERV\_BEAM\_ID\_HO\_00 to 05

PI ID: M55305C02001 to M55305C02006

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced(11192143).

Update time:

Along with other conditions mentioned in the counter definition, additional condition to be considered is

1. NR FDD supercell scenario, the counter is incremented for the corresponding UL subcell index when HO is handled as per [11145216](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23933vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

Beam ID 0 to 5 maps to Subcell Index 0 to n Subcell Index 0 to n maps to subcell indicated in 0th to nth index of UlSubCellList[] within PsCell\_CellSetupReq message(n has a range from 1 to 5 where the number of UL subcells in supercell is 2 to 6). UE's UL serving subcell index is used to map the update to the corresponding counter SERV\_BEAM\_ID\_HO\_00 to SERV\_BEAM\_ID\_HO\_05.

Example: Serving Beam ID before HO counter is updated as indicated below when the HO is handled as per [11145216](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23933vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)

1. UE's serving subcell is the subcell at index 0 before HO -> Counter SERV\_BEAM\_ID\_HO\_00 is incremented
2. UE's serving subcell is the subcell at index 1 before HO -> Counter SERV\_BEAM\_ID\_HO\_01 is incremented
3. UE's serving subcell is the subcell at index 2 before HO -> Counter SERV\_BEAM\_ID\_HO\_02 is incremented
4. UE's serving subcell is the subcell at index 3 before HO -> Counter SERV\_BEAM\_ID\_HO\_03 is incremented
5. UE's serving subcell is the subcell at index 4 before HO -> Counter SERV\_BEAM\_ID\_HO\_04 is incremented
6. UE's serving subcell is the subcell at index 5 before HO -> Counter SERV\_BEAM\_ID\_HO\_05 is incremented

[CB008577-D]

For FDD cell with actBeamforming = TRUE, though with one SSB can mapping to SERV\_BEAM\_ID\_HO\_00, SERV\_BEAM\_ID\_HO\_00 is not updated.

[End CB008577-D]

Increment value:

No additional details as compared to NIDD.

---

#### 2.9.10-1.0-3 Scell activation use case Time of "UE on same beam" Histogram (ID: 12460659)

**2.9.10-1.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `12522115`)

Scell activation use case
Measurement: Time of "UE on same beam" Histogram - Bin 1 to Bin 13

NetAct name: TIME\_BEAM\_BIN\_1 to 13

PI ID: M55305C11001 to M55305C11013

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced(11192143).

Update time:

Along with other conditions mentioned in the counter definition, additional condition to be considered is

1. In NR FDD supercell scenario, the counter is updated when UE is released from the current UL serving subcell OR when UE is switched to a different UL serving subcell.

Beam ID 0 to 5 maps to Subcell Index 0 to n. Subcell Index 0 to n maps to subcell indicated in 0th to nth index of UlSubCellList[] within PsCell\_CellSetupReq message(n has a range from 1 to 5 where the number of UL subcells in supercell is 2 to 6).

Example: The counter is updated as per the time it uses the UL serving subcell ID at UE release [CB009543-B] or at UE's UL serving subcell switch, [End CB009543-B] in this manner

1. UE's serving subcell is the subcell at index 0 for time <= 50ms then Counter TIME\_BEAM\_BIN\_1 is incremented
2. UE's serving subcell is the subcell at index 1 for time 1min <= 5min then Counter TIME\_BEAM\_BIN\_10 is incremented

Increment value:

No additional details as compared to NIDD.

---

#### 2.9.10-1.0-4 Scell activation use case Number of UEs per beam (ID: 12526750)

**2.9.10-1.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `12526766`)

Scell activation use case
Measurement: Number of UEs per beam - Beam ID 0 to 5

NetAct name: UEs\_PER\_BEAM\_ID\_0 to 5

PI ID: M55305C12001 to M55305C12005

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

Along with other conditions mentioned in the counter definition, additional condition to be considered is

1. NR FDD supercell scenario, the counter related to UE's UL serving subcell index is incremented "once per UE" within the sampling interval. [CB009543-B] Due to UE's UL serving subcell switch, the same UE can update multiple counters mapping to respective serving subcells across different sampling intervals [End CB009543-B]

Beam ID 0 to 5 maps to Subcell Index 0 to n maps to subcell indicated in 0th to nth index of UlSubCellList[] within PsCell\_CellSetupReq message(n has a range from 1 to 5 where the number of UL subcells in supercell is 2 to 6). UE's UL serving subcell index is used to map the update to the corresponding counter UEs\_PER\_BEAM\_ID\_0 to UEs\_PER\_BEAM\_ID\_5.

Example: Number of UEs per beam counter is updated when one ore more UEs have been using the UL serving subcell, in this manner

1. n x UE's serving subcell is the subcell at index 0 -> Counter UEs\_PER\_BEAM\_ID\_0 is incremented n times

1. m x UE's serving subcell is the subcell at index 1 -> Counter UEs\_PER\_BEAM\_ID\_1 is incremented m times

Increment value:

No additional details as compared to NIDD.

---

#### 2.9.10-1.0-5 Scell activation use case Number of beam toggles (ID: 12526762)

**2.9.10-1.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `12526775`)

Scell activation use case
Measurement: Number of beam toggles

NetAct name: BEAM\_TOGGLES

PI ID: M55305C13001

Note: PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Update time:

Along with other conditions mentioned in the counter definition, additional condition to be considered is

1. NR FDD supercell scenario, the UE's UL serving subcell is considered to monitor beam switch activity.

Example: UL Serving subcell index changed from index 0 to index 3 and again changed from index 3 to index 0 this counter is updated once.

Increment value:

No additional details as compared to NIDD.

---

#### 2.9.10-1.0-6 Scell activation use case Beam Change Histogram (ID: 12526763)

**2.9.10-1.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `12526776`)

Scell activation use case
Measurement: Beam Change Histogram - Bin 1 to Bin 46

NetAct name: BEAM\_CHANGE\_0\_0, 1\_0,  2\_0, 3\_0, 4\_0, 5\_0 .. 0\_1, 1\_1, 2\_1, 3\_1, 4\_1, 5\_1 ..  to BEAM\_CHANGE\_5\_5

PI ID: M55305C03001 to M55305C03046

Note:

1. PM counter definitions can be found in NIDD as explained in 5G\_L2\_13022\_replaced([11192143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28iOyPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
2. In case of FDD supercell, only upto 6 beams are considered for updating the beam change counters. The rest are not used.
3. In case of FDD supercell, all beam changes from same source and target beams are skipped. Counters corresponding to BEAM\_CHANGE\_0\_0, BEAM\_CHANGE\_1\_1, BEAM\_CHANGE\_2\_2, BEAM\_CHANGE\_3\_3, BEAM\_CHANGE\_4\_4, BEAM\_CHANGE\_5\_5 are not updated (because such beam change cannot happen)
4. In case of FDD supercell, Beam ID 0 to 5 maps to Subcell Index 0 to n maps to subcell indicated in 0th to nth index of UlSubCellList[] within PsCell\_CellSetupReq message(n has a range from 1 to 5 where the number of UL subcells in supercell is 2 to 6). UE's UL serving subcell index is used to map the update to the corresponding counter BEAM\_CHANGE\_x\_y

Update time:

Along with other conditions mentioned in the counter definition, additional condition to be considered is

1. NR FDD supercell scenario, the counter BEAM\_CHANGE\_x\_y is incremented when the UE's UL serving subcell switch is completed from source(subcell index x) to target (subcell index y).

Example: Beam Change Histogram counter is updated when UE's subcell switch is completed, in this manner

1. UE's serving subcell switch from subcell at index 1 to subcell at index 3 is completed -> Counter BEAM\_CHANGE\_1\_3 is incremented

2. UE's serving subcell switch from subcell at index 4 to subcell at index 5 is completed -> Counter BEAM\_CHANGE\_4\_5 is incremented

3. UE's serving subcell switch from subcell at index 0 to subcell at index 2 is completed -> Counter BEAM\_CHANGE\_0\_2 is incremented

4. UE's serving subcell switch from subcell at index 3 to subcell at index 1 is completed -> Counter BEAM\_CHANGE\_3\_1 is incremented

5. UE's serving subcell switch from subcell at index 5 to subcell at index 3 is completed -> Counter BEAM\_CHANGE\_5\_3 is incremented

6. UE's serving subcell switch from subcell at index 2 to subcell at index 0 is completed -> Counter BEAM\_CHANGE\_2\_0 is incremented

Increment value:

No additional details as compared to NIDD.

---

**2.9.10.1.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11198329`)

Measurement: Scell activation not based on AI/ML
